C: 初入罗浮，建木灾异，演武仪典…她目睹了仙舟的变化，也见证了自己的成长。 照片上的女孩子在花林之间腾挪移转，凌厉的剑招下，落花如雨，纷纷乱乱飘满了她的衣裳。 还是以前那个三月七吗？步法熟练，从容不迫。不知不觉，双剑已是舞得小有所成…她都有些认不出自己了。 「嗯…自己是谁，应当由自己去探寻……」 她暗自下定决心，满怀期待地看向天空。在那里，无数的星星、无数的世界朝她眨着眼。 「我的过去，正在一点点变多呢。」 她的过去与未来，都已逐渐染上新的色彩。
E: Visiting the Luofu for the first time, the Ambrosial Arbor crisis, the Wardance... She not only bore witness to the Xianzhou ship's transformation, but also her own growth. The girl in the photograph moved nimbly in the flower grove. Petals rained down as she wielded her sword with vigor, fluttering all over her robes. Was she still the same March 7th from before? Her footwork had become skilled, and she carried herself with poise and composure. Before she knew it, she could already wield her dual swords with confidence... A minor achievement, but one that nevertheless transformed her into a person that she could hardly recognize. "...If I want to know who I really am, then I must find the truth myself." She quietly made up her mind and turned her gaze to the sky, hope and anticipation filling her eyes. Countless stars and endless worlds gazed back upon her, twinkling in the sky as they did. "My past is growing bit by bit each and every day." Indeed, for her past and future, both have gradually taken on new colors.

C:
姬子有一个手提箱。

手提箱是她的宝库。以前，其中装满了维修列车的各种工具，她靠着它们将列车修葺一新；现在，其中多了一把单分子锯、一颗逃逸的卫星，还有数不胜数的其他机巧——它们是她奇想的具现，是她步履不歇的证明。

没有哪位旅伴比她的旅行箱更忠实。列车上的旅客来来去去，就连那位「列车长」或许也不能从始至终陪伴她与列车。

但她不在意。就像她不在意那个装腔作势的金发男人不告而别，就像她不在意那过于遥远的故乡和故人。

她明白这趟旅程是孤独的。就算她能在旅行中结识志同道合的旅伴，就算她受尽旅伴慷慨恩惠，就算她能与旅伴一同见证某段旅途的终点——那也不过是她足够侥幸罢了。

她明白这趟旅程是孤独的。任何人都无法踏足与他人完全相同的行迹。任何人都无法代他人体验沿途所见的风景。她能够依靠的只有自己的双眼与双脚。

然后，她会将那双眼见证的一切光景，还有那双脚履行的一切足迹，全部装进自己的手提箱中。
E:
Himeko has a suitcase.

This suitcase is her treasure trove. Previously, she'd filled it with all kinds of train repair tools to fix up the Express. But now, it's packed with a molecular saw, an escaped satellite, and countless other contraptions — the embodiment of her whims and the proof of her resolute will.

No travel companion is more faithful to her than this suitcase. Passengers come and go on the Express, and perhaps not even "the conductor" would be able to accompany her and the Express from start to finish.

But she doesn't care. She didn't care when that pretentious blond man left without saying goodbye, just like how she didn't care about her distant homeworld and old friends.

She knows that this journey is lonely. Even if she could get to know like-minded travel companions, even if they showed her generous grace, even if she could witness the end of a complete journey with those companions — that's all just a momentary fluke.

She knows that this journey is lonely. Nobody can follow in the exact same footsteps as anyone else. Nobody can experience for someone else everything that happens along a journey. All she can rely on are her own two eyes and feet.

That's why she stores inside her suitcase all the sights her eyes have witnessed, and all the footprints her feet have left behind.

C: 她站在虹霓都市最高的大厦顶端，从这里可以望见她出生的地方。  只有一个员工的快餐店，用地下室改装的街机厅，几台陈旧的游戏机，她记得，这就是她的童年。  她记得自己喜欢《波恩》：两条横线，一个光点，最简单的击球游戏，她能玩上一整天。  恰如此时此刻，无人机群的红光遍布夜空，连缀成线。它们一片一片向她袭来，又一片一片轰然坠地。  她记得自己喜欢《战轮32》：点阵绘成的星空中，八个迥异的色块，规则只有一条——成为第一，不论方法。  恰如此时此刻，各异的色彩将网络空间一分为八，来自各个组织的人们在广场上攒动，为了同一个目标——抓住「银狼」，不计代价。  她记得自己喜欢《几何战争》，喜欢《奥德修斯》，喜欢《星际猎豹》：那些游戏的得分记录上，满是不可追及的天文数字。  恰如此时——哦不，只有这个不太一样……  不可追及。哈，什么是「不可追及」？  她站在虹霓都市最高的大厦顶端，从这里可以望见她出生的地方。  她站得太高，以致身边容不下第二个人。  但她还要抬起头，往更高的地方看去，她看见星空就在那里，近在咫尺，又遥不可及。  「好无聊啊。」  名为「虹霓都市」的游戏，在这一天结束了。
E: She stood at the top of the tallest building in the Rainbow City, from which she could see her birthplace. A fast food restaurant with only one employee, a basement turned into an arcade hall, several old arcade machines — this was her childhood. She remembered liking the game of Pong — two lines and a dot of light, the simplest of ball games. She could play it for a whole day. Just like how right now the crimson lights of the hoard of drones filled the night sky in crisscrossed line. Wave by wave they swarmed her, and wave by wave they fell. She remembered liking Battle Wheel 32 — eight blocks of different colors on a matrix-drawn sky. There was only one rule: Win, no matter what. Just like how right now distinct colors split the internet into eight regions, and people from all kinds of organizations gather in the square for a singular goal — to capture Silver Wolf, no matter the cost. She remembered liking Geometric Wars, liking Odysseus, liking Star Cheetah. The score records on these games were filled with insurmountable, astronomical numbers. Just like how right now— Wait, no, only this is somewhat different... "Insurmountable." Hah, what's that? She stood at the top of the tallest building in the Rainbow City, from which she could see her birthplace. She has climbed too high for another person to stand beside her. However, she looked up even higher than before. She can see the starry skies within reach of her hands, but yet so impossibly far. "So boring." The game called Rainbow City ended that day.

C:
希儿人生中第一次打架是为了自己。

那时，她每天漫无目的地在街巷间游荡，渴了便到孤儿院的救济处讨水喝，饿了便用捡到的破烂和街边小贩换饼干吃。在铆钉镇的背面，人人都见过那个天不怕地不怕的流浪女孩，人人都想避开一个野蛮顽固的小小无赖。

某个炎热的傍晚，她因为玩耍过头感到口干舌燥。她来到救济处，却发现铁桶里的井水已经见底。与她同时前来讨水的还有一个面相干瘪的流浪汉——一阵爪牙并用的厮打过后，流浪汉落荒而逃，希儿夺得了独饮井水的权利。

希儿再次见到那个流浪汉是在三天以后。透过诊所的窗户，她看到一个干瘦的身影躺在病床上，奄奄一息。

自那之后，她总会为后来的人留下几口井水。
E:
Seele's first fight in her life was for herself.

Back then, she would wander aimlessly through the alleyways each day. When she was thirsty, she'd beg for water at the orphanage. When she was hungry, she'd swap scraps she found with the merchants for biscuits. Everyone in the dark side of Rivet Town knew that fearless homeless girl, and everyone was keen to avoid this wild, stubborn little rascal.

One hot evening, she felt very thirsty from too much playing. She arrived at the orphanage to discover the bucket containing water from the well is almost empty. Another shriveled homeless man was also there trying to get a drink — and after a power struggle which involved fists and even teeth, the man fled and Seele earned the right to slake her thirst alone.

Seele saw the man three days later. Through the window of the clinic, she saw that wizened figure at death's door, lying on a stretcher.

Ever since then, she's always left a little water in the bucket for the people coming later.

C: 过去，人人都知道希露瓦•朗道曾是银鬃铁卫军中最聪慧的大脑——有关朗道家天才大小姐的诸多传闻中，有八成都与这件事相关。 然而，就在数年前的某天，这些传闻几乎是在顷刻间便被新的流言取代：素来与大守护者交往密切的她为何毫无预兆地被开出军队？希露瓦又是否对此怀恨在心？人们对此众说纷纭。 「第一个问题的答案很简单——无可奉告。这事关银鬃铁卫的最高机密，希望你们能体谅一下。」 「至于第二个问题嘛……」 「我…我是完全不在乎啦。你想啊，能名正言顺地过上这样悠闲的生活，还有比这更爽的事吗？倒不如说是那女人帮了我一把——我还得谢谢她呢！」 「这个世道，不如及时行乐…个屁啦。」 「既然末日已经注定，哪有什么真正的乐子可言。」
E: In days gone by, everyone knew that Serval Landau was the smartest out of all the Silvermane Guards — 80% of the rumors about the talented elder daughter of the Landaus are based around this fact. However those rumors were almost instantly replaced by a new piece of gossip a few years ago. Why was she, who had always been close with the Supreme Guardian, being fired from the armed forces with no prior warning? Does Serval hold a grudge about it? Everyone has their own theory. "The answer to the first question is simple: 'No comment.' This is the Silvermane Guards's top secret. I hope you understand." "And as for the second question..." "I... I don't give two hoots. Think about it. Is there anything better than living out a justifiably leisurely life? I prefer to say that woman helped me out — I really owe her a debt!" "In this world, it's better to enjoy the present moment... No, who am I kidding." "If our ends are already doomed, there will be no such thing as true joy."

C:
无光的幽暗中，他仿佛回到持明卵中，在波涛与幻梦里辗转来去。

他梦见自己站在祭坛上，舞雩吟诵。歌谣与手势不过是表象，双眸中放出的光明，血脉中涌动的风暴才是真髓。他信手编织鳞渊境中如烟似雾的浪涛，将躁狂的「龙」镇入蔓生的巨木中。随着长吟冲天散去，鳞渊境将再续数百年的平静，而他的使命也宣告完成。

礼毕，他回头望去。离去的石阶上，不知何时站立着数不清龙角华服的尊者。他们宛如镜中留影，以微妙的误差一个个舞袖、转身、准备离去。不可尽数的人结成天梯，向着无穷尽的虚空延伸出去，所有人的面容每日晨起时都在镜中与他相见——那是他的脸。

不，那是属于最初的龙尊的脸。他苦笑着，将手掌覆上自己的五官，似在确认自己是否能撕下这副面具，将它交还给真正的主人。

他做不到。
E:
In the dim abyss devoid of light, he seemed to have returned to the insides of a Vidyadhara egg, being ceaselessly churned in tumultuous waves and elusive dreams.

He dreamed he was standing before a sacrificial altar, dancing and chanting. However, the songs and gestures were mere facades. The light emanating from his eyes and the storm roiling in his blood were the true forces at play. Casually, he wove the misty and foggy tide in Scalegorge Waterscape, sealing the maddened and frenzied "dragon" into the propagating giant tree. As the echoing roar streamed up into the heavens and dissipated, Scalegorge Waterscape will continue its peace for centuries more, and his duty was over.

The ceremony ended, and he turned to look behind him. In the blink of an eye, the stairs he had stepped down from had become full of standing dignitaries with draconic horns and dressed like royalty. As if they were mirages in a mirror, each of them turned and their sleeves swirled with the motion, ready to leave one after another in a meticulously calculated arrangement. Innumerable, they formed a staircase to the sky, stretching into the never-ending spatial void. The faces of all these people would greet him every morning in his dressing mirror — That was his face.

No, it was the face of the primordial, the original, the very first high elder. He smiled bitterly and covered his face with his palm, as if ascertaining whether he could tear off this mask and return it to its true owner.

He could not.

C: 少女微弱的意识徘徊于黑暗。 前方，是不见尽头的长夜，背后，似是近在咫尺的归途。 她向后退，那里是她熟悉的繁华花灯，故友在远方呼唤，等待自己重拾商人之业。黑雾自前方涌现，街市转瞬化作朽木死灰。 她向后退，星槎的甲板于脚下显现，她欲乘风而上，却见诡异的星体悬于天空，熟悉之人化作怪物，举刀相向。 她想如从前那般能言巧辩，此时却无法对着面前的怪形发出半分声响。 「只能向前去吧。」她同自己说道。 「但我如何向前？」她向自己发问。 「抬起你的手。」冷冷的声音从远方传来。 她低下头，看着贯穿于手掌的伤痕。手中捏着的仍是那把折扇，她记得它于火中成了灰白，但如今它就在那，就在自己手上。 黑雾再次向她席卷而来。 「向前去吧。」 她抬起手来，穿透掌心的伤痕亮起。那光穿透了黑暗，但也照亮了她自己。 「向前去吧。」 她举起扇子，那乘凉消遣的折扇如今却要冒出火来。 黑雾绵延不绝，但她愈是往前，光芒便愈盛。 「向前去吧。」 那冷冷的声音愈发清晰。 「不要回头。」 她向前奔去。 「这星海间万千世界，我还远远未看够呢……」 她的背后，五条绒尾在此刻彻底绽放，化作烈焰照亮了将她困住的漫漫长夜。 实验室。 少女的指尖微微颤动，一滴晶莹的泪从眼角滚落。 那位清冷的科学家望向舱内，表情终于有了些许变化。 「恭喜你『选择』这边的世界。」
E: The young girl's fragile consciousness drifts through the darkness. Ahead lies an endless night, while behind her, the path home feels just within reach. She steps back into familiar ground, where bustling lanterns glow and the voices of old friends call to her from afar, urging her to return to her trade as a merchant. Before her, black mist creeps in, turning the once lively market instantly into rotting wood and dead ash. She steps back again, and the deck of the starskiff appears beneath her feet. She longs to ride the wind upward, but a strange astral body looms in the sky, and the people she once knew become monsters, raising swords against one another. She wishes to be as articulate as before, but now, facing monstrous forms before her, not a single sound escapes her lips. "I'll just have to move forward," she whispers to herself. "But how?" She asks herself. "Raise your hand." A cold voice echoes from afar. She lowers her gaze, eyes tracing the scar that pierces her palm. The fan still rests in her hand, though she remembers it turning ashen white in the fire. Yet here it is — whole again in her hand. The black mist surges toward her once more. "Go forward." She lifts her hand, and the wound that pierces her palm begins to glow. The light cut through the darkness but also illuminates herself. "Go forward." She raises the fan — Once a source of leisurely comfort, the fan now threatens to burst forth with flames. The black mist stretches endlessly, but the more she moves forward, the more the light intensifies. "Go forward." That cold voice is growing clearer. "Don't look back." She runs ahead. "I haven't seen enough of the countless worlds in the starry seas..." Behind her, five fluffy tails completely unfurl, igniting into fiery flames that cast light into the long night that ensnares her. The laboratory. The young girl's fingertips tremble slightly as a crystal-clear teardrop slips down the corner of her eye. The aloof scientist peers into the cabin, and her expression shifts at long last. "Congratulations on 'choosing' the world on this side."

C: 飞船投下的阴影遮住了草原的月光。 他从呼啸而过的火车上跳下。浓烟和尘灰散去的时候，他早已提着战利品回到了营地。 他仰头看着这群不速之客。衣冠楚楚的黑衣人走下飞船的甲板，在全副武装的守卫护送下走进牛仔们的驻地。他接住黑衣人称为联觉信标的东西，陌生宏大的名词闯入他的脑海，他第一次知道了在草原、森林、河流、铁轨之外，银河中还有万千闪耀的世界。 无视当地人的反对，巨大的挖掘机出现在草原的天际线，大地开始涌流出黑色的矿产。全副武装的警卫亵渎他们的信仰，驱赶他们离开自己的家园，以微不足道的赔偿侮辱他们的尊严。 同以前一样，他和同伴以游击作战的方式拖延黑衣人的前进，但在绝对的武力面前，牛仔的阴谋诡计、百发百中的枪法、日行千里的良驹…无一不显得如此原始和可笑。随着一个又一个家人的离世，他意识到，如果不能找到这一切的始作俑者，那么这场事端将永无解决的机会。 他穿上偷来的员工制服，趁夜潜入飞船。凭着多年捕猎练就的直觉与灵敏，他无声无息地放倒路上的警卫，躲过层层关卡与盘问，来到了核心的舱室。 他看到一个男人的背影，他似乎在朝面前的下属说着什么。 「……阿尔冈-阿帕歇蕴藏着重要的战略资源。谁能先抢到手，就能在部门竞争中占上风。既然野蛮无礼的牛仔们不愿意与市场开拓部合作，我们不得不代为管理这个世界。 时间已经不多了。你们可以使用武力，为这个世界带来文明。」 一个恐怖的想法闯入他的脑海，他慌不择路地朝外跑去。周围的员工还在嘻嘻哈哈开着玩笑，他屏住呼吸、忍住怒火和眼泪——他的家人还需要他，他不能停下脚步。 炮火从天而降，当他跌跌撞撞回到沦为地狱的牧场，年迈的格蕾、尼克和从小一起长大的伙伴早已葬身火海。他有一丝侥幸，期望能找到那个小小的身影——她才学会走路不久，会使劲拍他给她做的小木吉他，然后咯咯地笑。但是没有，什么都没有，故土只有一片焦黑——他甚至来不及为他们立一块墓碑。 「星际和平公司…市场开拓部……」 这噩梦一般的名字和场景，将在今后的岁月里刻入他的骨髓，成为他脱胎换骨也无法忘却的事物。 据「阿尔冈-阿帕歇」星球志记载，世代游牧于其上的民族自一场起因不明的大灾难后销声匿迹，残存的老少在越来越小的自留地栖居，时至今日，那黑色的矿产依旧作为稀有的金属大量运用于制造高功率的武器，被一艘艘公司的货运舰送往更多的星球。
E: The shadow cast down by the spaceship eclipsed the moonlight across the plains. He jumped from the speeding train as it passed by with a roar. By the time the smoke and dust had settled, he'd already made it back to his base with his bounty. He raised his head to look up at the uninvited guests above. Well-dressed people in black walked out from the deck of the spaceship under the escort of guards armed to the teeth and onto the cowboy's land. He took something that the person in black called a "Synesthesia Beacon," as great, strange visions flooded into his mind. This is the first time he learned of the endless shining worlds outside the plains, forests, streams, and tracks that he knew. Giant excavators appeared on the horizon of the plains, completely disregarding protests from the locals. Then, black ore began to stream forth from the earth below. The heavily armed guards blasphemed against the local's beliefs, cast them out of their homes, and insulted their honor with meager compensation. As always, he and his partners turned to guerrilla warfare to fight off the advance of the people in black. However, in the face of absolute military might, the cowboys' schemes, marksmanship, and swift mounts all seemed so primitive and laughable. As the members of his family died one after another, he realized that unless he found the person who started all of this, he would never be able to bring things to an end. He put on a worker's uniform that he stole and snuck aboard the spaceship under the cover of night. With the instincts and sharp senses he had honed over years of hunting, he silently took down every guard that stood in his way and cleared every checkpoint and interrogation to reach the core cabin. He saw the figure of a man who seemed to be saying something to his subordinates. "Aeragan-Epharshel contains crucial strategic resources. He who claims it first will take great advantage in departmental competition. As these savage and uncivilized cowboys are unwilling to cooperate with the Marketing Development Department, we have no choice but to assume administration of this world on their behalf. We are running out of time. You are permitted to use military force and bring civilization to this world." A terrifying thought rushed into his mind. He frantically ran out. Around him, the employees were still joking and laughing. He held his breath and stifled his rage and tears... His family still needed him. He could not just stop here. Cannon fire rained down from the heavens. By the time he stumbled back to the farm that had now been reduced to ashes, the elderly Graey and Nick, as well as all the friends he'd grown up with, had already lost their lives to the sea of flames. He held on to a faint glimmer of hope that he would be able to find that tiny figure... She had only learned to walk a while ago and would gently slap at the little wooden guitar he had made for her and giggle. But no. There was nothing. The land was scorched black... he didn't even have time to erect a gravestone for the ones he'd lost. "The Interastral Peace Corporation... The Marketing Development Department..." This sight and these names rang through his mind like a nightmare that went on to be etched into his core. Even if he were to die and be born again, he would never forget this. According to the planetary records of Aeragan-Epharshel, the locals who roamed and farmed the land for generations were wiped out by an unknown disaster. The survivors, mostly frail elderly and youth, now only shelter in smaller and smaller reservations. To this day, that black ore is still used in massive quantities as a rare metal to create devastating weaponry, and is shipped out to more and more planets on fleets of IPC transport ships.

C: 「黎明圣城奥赫玛为此世之中黑潮尚无法侵扰的净土，但黑潮对其包围之势已显而易见。 千年历史，黑潮所过之处，生灵异化为非人的怪物，城邦风蚀为无人的废墟，即便强盛如悬锋，其神明亦被黑潮污染，一切荒废无存。 逐火至今，大部分火种都已归位，然而黑潮将临，时间已所剩无几，在再创世之前，如若奥赫玛失守，一切都将前功尽弃。 笔者于此大胆揣测，在不久的将来，逐火的英雄必将与黑潮一战。从以往记录来看，哪怕是最为勇猛的战士，也无法在黑潮中坚持长久。黄金裔英雄各有所长，若说此战的希望，若非那骁勇的白厄，便会落在迈德漠斯身上。 当然，那不仅是因为迈德漠斯作为此世勇者之冠，拒绝死亡的天生之命，也不仅因为悬锋旧城位处抵挡黑潮的关要。纵然迈德漠斯如悬锋的狮子般一生迁徙多次，最后停留在离诞生地极远的地方，孤高的王也绝无可能在他国中称臣。一旦安顿好子民，将使命视作生命的迈德漠斯必定归乡，只不过这一次，他背负的不只是悬锋人的希望，更是世界的未来。 塔兰顿的祭司曾预言，千年纷争的历史始于悬锋，亦将终结于悬锋。或许在未来的某一日，那不死之身踏入黑潮，方生方死，那会是怎样的境况，怎样的悲壮……」 ——选段自歌耳巴尼帕耳图书馆藏 「逐火观察：黑潮专题」 「一如冥海，一如既往。」 ——男人新近的批注
E: "The holy city of Okhema remains one of the last pure lands untouched by the black tide. Yet, the encirclement of the black tide around it has become unmistakably clear. For a thousand years, wherever the black tide has swept, life has been twisted into inhuman monstrosities, and city-states have been eroded by the wind into desolate ruins. Even a stronghold like Kremnos saw its gods tainted by the black tide, leaving nothing but wastelands in its wake. Most of the Coreflames had been restored, yet as the black tide approached, we found ourselves desperately short on time. All we have achieved will have been in vain should Okhema fall before the Era Nova. The author boldly speculated that, soon, the heroes chasing the flame would inevitably face a decisive battle against the black tide. Historical records showed that even the most valiant warriors could not endure long within the black tide. Among the Chrysos Heir heroes, if there was any hope for this battle, it would either rest upon the fearless Phainon or fall to Mydeimos. This wasn't merely because Mydeimos hailed as the bravest in this world, carried a destiny that defied death, nor was it solely because the old city of Kremnos occupied a strategic choke point against the black tide. Even though Mydeimos, like the lion of Kremnos, had migrated countless times in his life and ultimately settled far from his birthplace, the solitary king would never submit to foreign rule. Once he had settled his people, Mydeimos, who regarded his mission as his very essence, would undoubtedly return home. Yet, this time, he bore not only the hopes of the Kremnoans but also the future of the entire world. Talanton's priests once prophesied that the millennium of Strife that started in Kremnos would also find its end there. Perhaps, one day, that eternal figure will face the black tide — suspended between life and death. Imagine such a scene, such a profound tragedy..." — Excerpt from "Flame-Chasing Observations: Black Tide Special Report" archived in the Garbaniphoro Library collection "As with the Sea of Souls, as it has always been." — A recently-made annotation in a man's handwriting

C: 丰饶玄鹿受到的伤害降低。弱点击破后，行动额外延后，受到的伤害额外提高。
E: Abundant Ebon Deer takes less DMG. After Weakness is broken, additionally delays action and additionally increases DMG taken.

C: 云璃：猎野围城
E: Yunli: Encirclement of Wild Hunt

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 身为大守护者之女，布洛妮娅总是剖决如流、一马当先——当然，她在这次针对你的追捕行动中也不例外。\n好在你的「好哥们」桑博及时现身解围，只是…如果他没用成分不明的烟雾弹将你迷晕就更好了。\n你在阵阵晕眩中发觉自己没被五花大绑，而是被安置在某处的床板上——这多少能说明你暂无性命之虞。至于具体情况嘛，则要你向面前这位陌生女性讨教了。
E: As the daughter of the Supreme Guardian, Bronya has always been quick and decisive — this pursuit operation targeted at you was no exception.\nGood thing your "good pal" Sampo arrived just in time to rescue you. It's just that... it would've been better if he didn't knock you out with the smoke bomb made from questionable ingredients.\nIn your daze, you realize that you aren't tied up but placed on a bed somewhere — to a degree, this tells you that you're not in immediate danger. You'll have to ask the unfamiliar woman in front of you for more details.

C: 果不其然，你在八角笼里发现了冷厉如故的丹恒。尽管你在情感上接受了丹恒就在这里的事实，但你的理性实在无法解释他为何会出现在这里。\n总之，先帮助这位抛下同伴来参加搏击的「冷面小青龙」度过眼前的难关，再向他仔细问清楚好了。\n不过既然是丹恒，想必会说出「就算你们不来，我一个人也能解决」之类的话吧…
E: Just as you expected, you find Dan Heng with the same cold and fierce expression in the octagon. Although you've accepted the fact that he's here, you still can't logically understand the reason for it.\nAnyways, help this companion known as the Cold Dragon Young get through the challenge presented first. The questioning can come afterward.\nHowever, being Dan Heng, he'll probably say something along the lines of "I can take them on my own, you know." ...

C: 你们终于在迂回曲折的铆钉镇中找到了前往孤儿院的路。沿路拾级而上，便能看到那坐落在高处的豪华宅邸，它日复一日地俯瞰着小镇的种种世事无常。\n你看到希儿的表情变得有些许复杂；更令人费解的是，就连布洛妮娅也流露出类似的情绪…
E: You finally find your way through the complex roads of Rivet Town and discover the path to the orphanage. As you make your way uphill, you can see the luxurious mansions that overlook the town, watching its every move each and every day.\nYou see that Seele's expression has turned complex, but what's more confusing is that Bronya seems to be having the same emotions...

C: 可可利亚不愧为大守护者。为了庆祝你们重返上层区，她甚至悉心安排银鬃铁卫夹道欢迎，可谓是关怀备至。\n但铁卫们却不似可可利亚那般贴心——他们为了尽快完成任务，似乎只想把你五花大绑之后丢进克里珀堡。\n你们现在已俨然成为全城瞩目的大明星了…还是依丹恒所说，先想办法去机械屋避避风头吧。
E: The Supreme Guardian Cocolia has her Silvermane Guards lined up on both sides of the road to welcome you and your companions back to the Overworld. Such a grand reception can only come from a worthy ruler.\nThe Guards, however, are not so keen on the idea of putting up a show. To complete their task as soon as possible, they'd rather see you hogtied and thrown into the Qlipoth Fort.\nYou and your company are now talk of the town... Maybe you should listen to Dan Heng and go to the workshop to avoid unnecessary attention.

C: 克服千难万险之后，你们终于来到了寒潮肆虐的极北之地，百年来除大守护者外无人能够踏足的古代战场。\n可可利亚与布洛妮娅就在这里的某处…你们要做的就是深入禁域，找到她们。\n那灾难的源头「星核」也在前方——做好决一死战的准备吧。
E: After overcoming numerous difficulties and dangers, you have finally come to the Far North, where the Eternal Freeze is raging. For hundreds of years, no one except the Supreme Guardian could set foot upon this ancient battlefield.\nCocolia and Bronya are here somewhere... Your mission is to go deep into the forbidden zone and find them.\nStellaron, the source of disaster, also lies ahead. Get ready for a fight to the death!

C: 你在这个神秘的空间醒来，被朦混的星空笼罩，被琥珀色的命运包裹。\n你记得自己的身体被可可利亚的枪尖贯穿——这里是死后的世界吗？但你的意识如此清醒，身体也轻盈如初…脑海中某个浑厚的声音似乎在指引着你，告诉你「我还活着」。\n也许你的同伴们还在与可可利亚厮杀。无论如何，你必须找到办法回到他们的身边。
E: You wake up in a strange place surrounded by nebulous stars, seemingly enveloped by an amber-colored destiny.\nThe last thing you remember is being pierced by Cocolia's lance... Could this be the afterlife? But your mind is still very clear and your body still has strength... These resounding voices in your head seem to be guiding you, telling you that you are still alive.\nYour companions might still be in fierce combat with Cocolia. You have to find a way to get back to their side, no matter what.

C: 布洛妮娅捎来信息，上下层区长达十余年的封锁即将终结。\n缆车道即将开放，下层区居民终将重见光明，在同一片天空下自由地呼吸。\n虽然对年久失修的缆车道的安全系数有些许担忧…你还是决定体验一把，用这种传统的方式回到上层区。
E: Bronya sent news that the blockade between the Overworld and Underworld is about to lift after more than a decade.\nThe cable car is about to re-open. Underworld residents would see the light again and breathe freely under the open sky.\nThough you are rather concerned with the safety of the cable car due to its lack of maintenance, you still decide to give it a go and return to the Overworld in this traditional method.

C: 追踪星核猎手——你们想象着这桩任务的艰巨危险，猜测卡芙卡会准备怎样的诡计和陷阱。她却悠闲自若地现身，告诉你们已等候许久。一切并不如你们所想的那样。
E: Tracking the Stellaron Hunter — You could feel the gravity and danger of the task at hand and speculated on the tricks and traps Kafka prepared for you. But instead, she shows up at ease and tells you that she's been waiting for your arrival for a long time. It's not at all how you imagined it.

C: 在同卡芙卡缠斗时，太卜司之首符玄出现，奉景元的命令将犯人带往太卜司。\n在筹备审问事宜前，你们被暂时留在「长乐天」静候太卜司引路人的消息。
E: Fu Xuan, head of the Divination Commission, appears while you are engaged in combat with Kafka. She then takes Kafka back to the Divination Commission as per Jing Yuan's orders.\nYou are temporarily left in the Exalting Sanctum as Kafka's interrogation is being prepared and are told to wait for the guide from the Divination Commission.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 新的旅程即将开始。帕姆在短信群聊中表示，它将在本次航线会议上强调「三件事」。考虑到这位列车长难得有卖关子的时候，你或许可以酝酿一下情绪，在航线会议上为严肃的列车长捧哏。\n在观景车厢找个合适的地方等待大家到齐吧。
E: A new journey is about to begin. Pom-Pom has stated in the group chat that they want to stress "three things" during this navigation meeting. Given that the conductor rarely leaves people in suspense, perhaps you can mull over what they are thinking and play the role of the stern conductor's straight man for the navigation meeting.\nFind a suitable place in the Parlor Car to wait for everyone to arrive.

C: 梦中的女人似乎意有所指——虽然你不知道她究竟想表达什么。下一秒，她抽刀挥向你，陌生的梦境转瞬即逝。\n再睁开眼时，你发现列车已经抵达匹诺康尼。三月七似乎正在等你，和她一起下车吧。
E: The woman in the dream seems to be trying to tell you something, though you don't know what it is. The next thing you know, she swings a blade at you, and the strange dreamscape disappears in an instant.\nWhen you open your eyes, you realize that the train has already arrived in Penacony. It looks like March 7th is waiting for you. Alight from the train with her.

C: 你终于捱过了入梦前的一系列神秘遭遇，恭喜你！\n只要在房间中央的入梦池躺下，再按照指引进行操作，你就可以顺利入梦了。
E: You have finally made it through the series of mysterious encounters standing between you and entering the dream. Congratulations!\nNow you just need to enter the Dreampool in the center of your room and operate it according to the instructions, and you'll be dreaming in no time.

C: 流萤继续带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡——她建议你尝试一下「艾迪恩公园」的各类娱乐设施。你已经领取了足够多的代币，是时候大玩特玩了。\n当然，如果你玩腻了，也可以找到流萤，和她一起在附近休息会儿。
E: Firefly continues to lead you through the various tourist hotspots in the area — She suggests you try out the various amusement facilities in Aideen Park. You have collected plenty of tokens, so it's time to play to your heart's content!\nOf course, if you get bored with the games, you can find Firefly and rest with her for a while.

C: 在灌满糖浆的下水道中经历了一段阴暗地爬行，你成功抵达了流萤的「秘密据点」…的入口。\n流萤正在不远处等你，你应该和她会合。
E: After some twisted crawling in the syrup-filled sewers, you successfully reach the entrance to... Firefly's "secret stronghold."\nFirefly is waiting for you nearby. You should go and meet her.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n跨越了倒下的猎犬家系成员，你们决定继续前进。不虚此行，对吧？
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nAfter stepping over the collapsed Bloodhound Family member, you decide to continue onwards. You wouldn't want your trip to be a waste, right?

C: 筑梦绅士在匹诺康尼随处可见，此刻他又恰如其分地出现在你的面前，以便为你提供一道根本没有必要存在的谜题。\n完成这道谜题，离开这座被扭曲的忆域吧。
E: The Dreamweaver Gentleman can be seen all over Penacony, yet he has appeared before you precisely at this moment again to give you a completely unnecessary puzzle.\nComplete this puzzle and leave this distorted Memory Zone.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们终于抵达了黑天鹅所说的区域。接下来，忆者为你们复现了出与流萤相关的记忆——试着从中梳理出凶案的真相吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou finally reach the area that Black Swan was talking about. From there, the Memokeeper reproduces the memories related to Firefly — Try to iron out the truth behind this murder.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们终于抵达了黑天鹅所说的区域。接下来，忆者将为你们复现出与流萤相关的记忆——希望这些痕迹能够打开你们的思路。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou finally reach the area that Black Swan was talking about. From there, the Memokeeper reproduces the memories related to Firefly — Let's hope that these traces can enlighten your thoughts.

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 米沙声称流梦礁是自己的家——如果真是这样，那「白日梦」酒店的待遇可真有够糟糕的。不过，天真可爱的小米沙不以为意，反而看出你们遇到了麻烦，提出带领各位寻找走失的同伴，顺便游览这座冷寂的小镇。不仅如此，你们甚至还有机会见到一位老朋友——知更鸟。\n你们与三月七顺利会师，但在出发寻找姬子之前，你们还得把这位被粉色的流梦礁之鬼吓晕的倒霉蛋交给当地人照看才行，而三月七口中的翠丝阿姨似乎是个不错的人选。
E: Misha claims Dreamflux Reef to be his home... If that is the case, you can only imagine how bad the treatment must have been at The Reverie. Although, the cute and naïve Misha has not taken that to heart. In fact, seeing that you are in trouble, he offers to lead you on a search for your lost companions and give you a tour of the desolate town along the way. Not only that, you may even have a chance to meet with an old friend... Robin.\nYou were able to reunite with March 7th safely. However, before you can go in search of Himeko, you will need to find a local to look after this poor soul that was scared unconscious by the pink spirit of Dreamflux Reef. This Aunt Jessie that March 7th mentioned sounds like a solid candidate.

C: 始终藏在阴影中的翡翠女士终于现身，她将和托帕共赴与家族的会谈。\n家族方的代表是苜蓿草家族的家主奥帝•艾弗法，一位经验丰富、眼光毒辣的皮皮西商人。即便精明如两位「石心十人」的女强人，她们也难以预料这场会谈的走向……
E: Madam Jade, who had been hiding in the shadows this whole time, finally appears. She and Topaz will attend the meeting with The Family.\nThe Family rep is Oti Alfalfa of the Alfalfas, a seasoned, eagle-eyed Pepeshi merchant. Smart as two of the Ten Stonehearts, not even they are able to predict the direction this meeting will take...

C: 谐乐大典开幕式不出意外地出意外了：那位爱笑的女孩费心布局，四处分发按钮，显然就是为了这一刻。\n<unbreak>999</unbreak>枚虚数中子弹…说真的，她到底是从哪儿搞来这么多大规模杀伤性武器的？但无论如何，身为无名客的你必须挺身而出，守护美梦——按图索骥，火速解决危机吧。
E: As expected, something unexpected happened during the opening of the Charmony Festival: That laughter-worshiping girl had painstakingly laid out buttons everywhere obviously for precisely this moment.\n<unbreak>999</unbreak> imaginary neutron bombs... seriously, how on earth did she get her hands on so many weapons of mass destruction? But in any case, as one of the Nameless, you are duty-bound to stand up and protect the Dreamjoy: Follow the clues and overcome the crisis as soon as possible.

C: 可怖！于梦境营销课上，种种歪理•邪说层出不穷，此番邪祟若是继续误忍子弟，后果不堪设想！球棒•忍者，快用你的忍术阻止它吧！\n对猴子用钟表把戏试试吧…你不禁好奇，钟表把戏到底能用在多少地方，下次对着垃圾桶试试？
E: Alarming! In the Dream Marketing class, deceptive and malevolent rhetoric is rampant. If this fiendling continues its misguidance of the students, it could cause serious consequences! Baseball Bat Ninja! Use your ninjutsu to stop it!\nTry using your Clockwork on the monkey... You can't help but wonder just how many uses Clockwork has. Maybe try it on a trashcan next time?

C: 缭乱•忍侠的过往如浮世绘画卷般徐徐展开，在她飒爽的身姿与笑容之暗面，究竟隐藏着何种不为人知的血泪秘事呢…接下来，成为忍徒的你要继续每日的苦行，为了拥有忍者的筋骨、觉知与空手道技艺，绝不可退却畏惧。\nAK-A-2，你从诞生的那一天起，就知道自己是个实验品，对吧？
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero's past unfurls like a Ukiyo-e scroll. Just what kind of untold sorrow and pain is hiding behind her determined facade and cheerful smile...? As a ninja initiate, you must continue your torturous training daily to attain the swift movements, acute senses, and impressive karate skills of a true ninja. You absolutely cannot retreat or be afraid.\nAK-A-2, you've known that you're an experimental subject from the moment of your birth, aren't you?

C: 名为遐蝶与万敌的黄金裔为我们扫清沿途阻碍，我们即将与白厄一同直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利，成就英雄之名。
E: The Chrysos Heirs named Castorice and Mydei cleared the obstacles in our path. Now, alongside Phainon, we will face Nikador, Lance of Fury, and become heroes.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 你前去断崖寻找那刻夏，那位专注灵魂研究的贤人存在着拯救{NICKNAME}的可能性，显然那刻夏对你的到来早有准备。\n「那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样」，那些陌生的记忆也许是找到塞纳托斯的线索。
E: You head to Titan Cliff in search of Anaxa. The Sage, expert in soul studies, might be able to save {NICKNAME}. And it seems Anaxa has been expecting your arrival.\n"Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood." — these strange memories may point the way to Thanatos.

C: 你前去断崖寻找那刻夏，那位专注灵魂研究的贤人存在着拯救{NICKNAME}的可能性，显然那刻夏对你的到来早有准备。\n「那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样」，那些陌生的记忆也许是找到塞纳托斯的线索。
E: You head to Titan Cliff in search of Anaxa. The Sage, expert in soul studies, might be able to save {NICKNAME}. And it seems Anaxa has been expecting your arrival.\n"Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood." — these strange memories may point the way to Thanatos.

C: 遐蝶的解释得到黄金裔们的理解——为了得到塞纳托斯的去向，她主动站在元老院一侧，这是必要的选择。\n有人需要处理「暂停逐火之旅」的会议，也有人需要寻找塞纳托斯的踪影。
E: Castorice's explanation earned her the Chrysos Heirs' understanding. To find out where Thanatos went, she actively stood with the Council of Elders. This is an essential choice.\nSomeone needs to handle the conference about "pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" and someone needs to find a trace of Thanatos.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。\n这灵魂的残留似乎与炼金术、与塞纳托斯都脱不开干系。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be fallen who lived during Era Chrysea.\nThe remains left by these spirits seem to have a connection with alchemy and Thanatos.

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n你的十五个门扉时终将结束，最后一场表演即将开幕。
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYour fifteen Entry Hours are done. The last performance is about to begin.

C: 此时，{NICKNAME}与白厄正在树庭继续着他们的意象训练。把力气用光后，友爱之馆的丰富馆藏将他们的视线吸引了过去…
E: Right now, {NICKNAME} and Phainon are deep in their imagery training at the Grove. After spending all their strength, their gaze drifts to the vast collection in the Library of Philia...

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 盗火行者突然陷入凝滞，似乎是发生了某种变故。思索间，我却再次见到了{NICKNAME}的身影…
E: The Flame Reaver suddenly froze, as if something unforeseen had transpired. As I pondered what might have happened, I spotted {NICKNAME}'s figure once more...

C: 盗火行者突然陷入凝滞，似乎是发生了某种变故。思索间，我却再次见到了{NICKNAME}的身影…
E: The Flame Reaver suddenly froze, as if something unforeseen had transpired. As I pondered what might have happened, I spotted {NICKNAME}'s figure once more...

C: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
E: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

C:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

C: 看着眼前的圣杯，一段记忆正缓缓涌上心头。最近这么健忘，要不改天找个忆者朋友看看脑子好了——算了，那群家伙也挺不靠谱的。
E: As you stare into the Holy Grail, memories start to bubble up. You've been so forgetful lately. Maybe it's time to ask one of those Memokeepers to check your head? Eh, then again, most of them are pretty flaky anyway.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 说起来，长夜月已经帮了三月七很多了…她究竟是敌是友，或许最好的方式是面对面谈谈。
E: Come to think of it, Evernight has helped March 7th quite a lot... Whether she's friend or foe, perhaps the best way to find out is to talk face to face.

C: 多亏了星期日与长夜月的短暂碰撞，得以让潜伏起来的黑天鹅锁定了长夜月的藏身处，并沿着命途的河流逆流而上。\n忆庭决不允许黑天鹅擅自行动，而黑天鹅也不知道自己将面对什么……
E: Thanks to the brief collision between Sunday and Evernight, Black Swan, who had been lurking, managed to lock onto Evernight's hideout and travel upstream along the currents of the Path.\nThe Garden of Recollection would never allow Black Swan to act on her own, while she had no idea what she was about to face...

C: 在权杖身心合一的瞬间，藉由浮黎的瞥视，昔涟得以暂时保存受难者的记忆。在这刹那的永恒中，我必须不断奔跑，直至找到昔涟。
E: At the moment when the Scepter united its body and soul, Cyrene managed to temporarily preserve the memories of the victims thanks to Fuli's glimpse. In this eternal instant, I must keep running until I find Cyrene.

C: 历经希拉与古恩这场经由时光埋藏的秘密后，你将录像带归还给以斯帖。\n她向你讲述了一则唏嘘的故事，而你将带着故事继续上路。
E: Once you uncover the secret of Sheila and Gunn from many years ago, you return the tapes to Esther.\nShe tells you a pitiful story. You will continue your journey with it in mind.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 质询结束，你暂时洗清了嫌疑，但真理医生点名要求你一同前往阿兰处寻求协助
E: You have temporarily exculpated yourself by the end of the interrogation, but Dr. Ratio specifically asked for you to go with him to Arlan to ask for help.

C: 艾丝妲在你们眼前被冥火吞没，先听听螺丝咕姆的判断再做打算
E: Asta was swallowed up by infernal fire before your eyes. Listen to Screwllum's deductions before you act on anything.

C: 你突然被鼹鼠党的二把手尤利安叫住，虎克的老爹好像出什么事儿了，而虎克需要你的帮助。\n鼹鼠党的小伙伴们总是将冒险夸大其词，但是这一次你感觉到，确实是发生了人命关天的事情。
E: Julian, the Moles' second-in-command, stops you. According to him, something happened to Hook's daddy, and Hook needs your help.\nThe Moles often exaggerate their adventures, but you have a feeling that this time they're serious.

C: 瓦赫留下的「特效药」摧残了那个可怜女人的家庭。\n你终于可以认定所谓的「互助会」就是一个倒卖假药、谋财害命的可恶组织。\n去和娜塔莎再见一面吧，看看她决定应该采取什么样的行动。
E: Vache's wonder medicine destroyed that poor woman's family.\nNow, you're sure that the so-called Mutual Aid Society is an evil organization that sells counterfeit drugs which can kill people.\nGo find Natasha again and see what she thinks should be done.

C: 你收到信息，下层区即将举办一场由「地火」主持的拍卖会。\n具体的信息需要咨询磐岩镇的拍卖会工作人员，如果有兴趣的话就去看看吧？
E: You're informed that an auction will be held by the "Wildfire" in the underworld.\nFor more details, you need to consult the auction staff in Boulder Town. Go there if you're interested.

C: 好好的拍卖会，因为「技术调整」中断了，你倒要去问问什么是「技术调整」！\n不会是你和虎克大人期盼已久的地髓探针没了吧？不会吧不会吧！
E: The auction has been suspended because of some technical issues. What issues?\nIs the Geomarrow Probe that you and Hook have been waiting for still here?

C: 你们成功安抚了茉莉，并让她前往「永动」机械屋暂避风头，同时也获得了证明军中腐败确有其事的口供。\n回到禁区，你们却发现茉莉竟先一步来到此处与犯人对峙。她的处境十分危险——帮帮茉莉！
E: After comforting Molly, you tell her to hide in Neverwinter Workshop, and get her testimony that corruption is happening in the army.\nWhen you return to the restricted zone, you find that Molly has come here to confront the criminal. Her life is at risk, she needs your help!

C: 佩拉和玲可此行的目的原来是「观测极光」——为了达成这一目标，两人必须首先找到一处合适的露营地才行。
E: Pela and Lynx's goal for this trip was actually to observe the aurora — They need to first find a suitable camping ground before they can achieve that goal.

C: 经历一番斗智斗勇，你们终于破获了博物馆的展品失窃案。\n「微缩胶片」已经回到了你们手上，只要把它放进博物馆的投影仪里，历史展区就能再次对外开放了。
E: After a battle of wits and fists, you finally solve the museum's exhibit theft case.\nThe microfilm is back in your hands. As long as you put it into the museum's projector, the History Exhibit can open to the public again.

C: 你吃下了丹枢为你准备的「餐云承露丹」。服药后，你感到周身发热、头晕目眩…情况不太对劲，快去和青镞商量一下吧。
E: You swallowed the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet that Dan Shu gave you. Almost immediately, your body starts heating up, and you feel a little dizzy and nauseated... Something feels strange, go ahead and discuss it with Qingzu.

C: 如同从旧梦中醒来，一条消息让你想起了自己依旧身处于一条全新道路的起点，有着与自己同行的友人——无论你们最终会走向何处。
E: As if waking from an old dream, a message made you remember that you are still at the beginning of a brand-new road alongside companions who will progress its path with you — No matter where you end up.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 失去挚友的罗伯特陷入了绝望，开始徒劳地追逐莱斯利•迪恩的影子。\n将他珍视的东西还给他，让他暂时忘记莱斯利•迪恩吧。
E: Faced with the loss of his dearest friend, Robert succumbed to despair and fruitlessly pursued the shadow of Lesley Dean.\nRestore what he cherishes most and let him temporarily forget Lesley Dean.

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 既然无法改变外界，柯柯娜只能选择…改变自己。
E: Unable to change the external world, Cocona has to... change herself.

C: 音乐制作人埃夫姆似乎正沉醉于美梦之中，忘记了此行是为了谈生意。快找到他，免得埃夫姆和合作伙伴们的心血付之东流。
E: Music producer Ephraim seems to have overindulged himself in his dreams, and forgotten that he is here on official business. Find him quickly, before Ephraim and his partners' hard work go up in smoke.

C: 你在筑梦边境遇到了一位目光深邃的老人。\n和他聊聊，了解他经历了什么。
E: You encounter an old man with a profound gaze at the Dream's Edge.\nTalk with him and learn about his experiences.

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n找到螺丝咕姆的拼图，帮助查德威克与他重聚。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nFind Screwllum's puzzle pieces to facilitate their reunion.

C: 停留在流梦礁的折纸小鸟，「湛蓝爵士」，似乎和其它小鸟有些不同，去看看究竟怎么回事吧。
E: Dr. Blues, the Origami Bird staying in Dreamflux Reef, seems to be a bit different from the other birds. Go and see what is happening.

C: 英雄或罪人，民众会如何看待这位老者？他究竟是在为众人抱薪，还是在腐蚀圣城的墙垣？\n你选择以仁慈作答，与人为善者的生命中应有更多公平。
E: Hero or sinner? How will the people view this old man? Is he willing to sacrifice himself for others, or is he deliberately corroding the foundations of the holy city?\nYou have chosen to respond with kindness. Those who are kind to others should receive greater justice in life.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，你发现她在为戴什么款式的眼镜而发愁。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She's trying to figure out what style of glasses to wear. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 空间站的科员们似乎在偷偷议论着谁，过去听听究竟是怎么回事吧。
E: The researchers are gossiping about someone. Go and listen in on what they're saying.

C: 你在空间站里发现科员们似乎在争吵，过去听听看究竟出什么事了。
E: You hear an argument among the researchers on the space station, go and check out what the matter is.

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 你解开了放置在幽囚狱中的「枘凿六合•Remake」，「魔方秘社」因为做游戏被抓起来了，特地邀请你狱中相见。这里有太多可以吐槽的地方了，总之先去「魔方秘社」的囚室看看吧。
E: You solve the "Hexanexus: Remake" placed in the Shackling Prison. The Hex Club, who were rounded up and arrested for creating the game, have specially invited you to meet them in prison. There is much to gripe about, but let's head to the Hex Club's cell first and take a look.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 尽管有些遗憾，不过还是先回去向帕姆复命吧！
E: It was a shame, but report to Pom-Pom first!

C: 「管家」就在前方，区区造物而已，威胁几句应该就能交出奇物了吧？但你隐约觉得事情似乎没有这么简单……
E: The butler awaits just ahead. A few threats may be sufficient to retrieve the Curio, but you have a lingering sense that it won't be that easy...

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 邓恩发来消息，希望你能作为主教官参与铁卫禁区的军事演练活动。\n承蒙这位指挥官的认可，你认为自己理应赴约。
E: Dunn sent you a message, hoping you will be the main drillmaster for the military exercise in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nWith the commanding officer's approval, you feel you should attend this exercise.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 在刻法勒的神像后找到一个隐蔽的藏身处，完成你的扮演！
E: Find a well-hidden spot behind the Kephale statue and pull off your performance!

C: 该怎么将阿波罗尼消失一事传达给他的伙伴们呢？你一筹莫展……
E: How should you tell Apollonius's friends that he had disappeared? You feel stuck...

C: 消失的阿波罗尼重新出现了？这怎么可能……
E: Apollonius had returned after his disappearance? How is that possible...

C: 晴霓已经知道了那些她想知道的故事，而其中很多，是驭空不想让她知道的。现在，她该为自己的人生做出选择了。正如星核猎手的老朋友曾对你说过的那样：「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
E: Qingni already knew the stories she wanted to know, many of which Yukong wished to conceal from her. Now it's time for her to make a decision for her own life. Just as an old Stellaron Hunter friend once said to you: "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."

C: 真心话游戏来到了第二轮，卡芙卡想通过这个游戏得到什么呢？也许只是解闷而已。但你确实可以从一真一假的回答中，得到自己好奇已久的答案。至于孰真孰假……
E: The game of truth and lies has entered its second round. What does Kafka hope to gain from this game? Perhaps just some entertainment. But from the truthful and false answers, you can finally find answers to things you've been curious about for a long time. As for which answers are true or false...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 按道理来说，罗浮夜市不应该如此冷清。眼下似乎只有小吃摊旁边还算有些烟火气。\n你得到了白露想要的小吃，现在就拿去给她吧。
E: Theoretically, Luofu's night market shouldn't be so deserted. Only the food stalls have some semblance of life around them.\nYou got the snacks that Bailu wanted. Go bring it over to her.

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说杜氏茶庄和商会建立合作关系。但杜老板此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Du's Teahouse to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boss Du has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 通往冠军之路如一卷红毯直铺你脚下。\n你们的第三枚资格徽章就藏在空间站「黑塔」之中，不知里面会有什么挑战在等待。
E: The road to the championship stretches out beneath your feet like a red carpet.\nThe third Mastery Mark hides within Herta Space Station. What kind of challenges await within?

C: 这注定是一场史无前例的决斗。你和那位玩家将共同升至巅峰，沸腾的热血足以点燃冰原的寒风。即使某日你们连记忆都已模糊，这场景也会一次次出现在你们的梦中，仿佛琥珀封存的宝藏。\n就让游戏开始吧——
E: This moment is fated to be a duel most unprecedented. You and the other player achieved twin ascents in sync, and the fire in your veins flows more than capable of igniting the cold winds carried upon these frosted plains. Even should someday your memories erode and succumb to vagueness, this scene will appear time and time again in your dreams, like a treasure encased eternally in the embrace of amber.\nLet the games begin...

C: 你们在鳞渊境中的冒险经历让宝烛向往不已，向它好好介绍一下吧。
E: Your adventures in Scalegorge Waterscape have sparked great curiosity in Arkeri. Introduce them to the wonders of this place.

C: 在修好奇怪的钟表之后，你收到了几条不知所云的骚扰短信。短信中似乎提到了「白日梦」酒店的「桌球室」，去找找符合描述的地方找找看吧。
E: After repairing the peculiar clock, you receive several strange spam messages that mention a "pool room" at The Reverie. Find and investigate the place that matches the description.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!

C: 《美梦仙踪》的广告拍摄完成了，去找甲方交差吧！
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has concluded. Go show it to the client!

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 选择上次没有去过的关卡，见证旅途的另一种可能。
E: Select a stage you didn't experience last time and witness another possibility.

C: 不知所踪的「沉眠」出现在了这里…它似乎想说什么。
E: The missing "Dormancy" has appeared here... It seems to be trying to say something.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 卢卡现在心烦意乱，需要一些独处的时间来让自己冷静下来。\n请你先去休息室外面逛逛吧。
E: Luka is very upset right now and needs some time alone to calm himself down.\nFeel free to leave the lounge and go walk around outside.

C: 探查善逝的历史记录，感染了反有机方程的智械，也会有「情感」留存吗？
E: Review Sugata's historical records. Would an Intellitron infected with the Anti-Organic Equation still have "emotions" remaining within?

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n你和财富学院代表达成了赌约——若是乐队未能在他到达舞台前开始演出，所有成员都会遭到开除。等待乱破归来的这段时间里，和现场观众聊聊吧。或许…事情还会有转机。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nYou and the Fortune Academy representative made a wager: If the band cannot start their performance before he reaches the stage, then all members will be expelled. As you wait for Rappa to turn, chat with the audience. Perhaps... things might take a turn for the better.

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 应物科的科员捷德有事找你，就是不知她这次找你又是所为何事……
E: Geed, a researcher from the Department of Implement Arts, wants to see you for something. You're quite not sure what she wants you to do this time...

C: 天才与学士，一切若即若离地联系在一起。你们所追寻的真相，究竟是本质，还是火光背后的虚影？
E: Genius and scholars... Everything seems vaguely connected to each other. Is the truth you see the essence, or dancing shadows behind a torch?

C: 再没什么事比彻夜打游戏更快乐了！
E: Few things feel better than staying up all night to play video games!

C: 英雄不可能只击败一个怪物就取得胜利，宝库前也不会只有一道门。
E: A hero cannot take victory by defeating just a single monster. Why would there only be one gate in front of a vault?

C: 第一场比赛旗开得胜，接下来你需要面对新的强敌——来自昏光庭院的和普赫斯和他的绷带海豹。\n听说高风亮节的参赛者会为对手送上祝福，你衷心地祝愿他能撑到比赛开始的时候。
E: A triumphant start in the first match! Next, you'll face a new formidable opponent — Perhippas from Twilight Courtyard and his Bandaged Seal.\nRumor has it that noble-hearted contestants offer blessings to their rivals, so you sincerely wish him the strength to at least make it to the start of the match.

C: 「仰望星空时，我意识到那里存在着万千可能。」——阿赞•阿贝加，市场开拓部第一舰队主力舰长\n你已经有段时间没回列车看看了，也许帕姆有什么新东西可以分享？
E: "Looking up at the stars, I realized there are countless possibilities out there." — Azan Abega, Captain of the First Fleet of the Marketing Development Department\nIt's been a while since you checked in on the train. Maybe Pom-Pom has something new to share?

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。只剩下最后一份配方了…接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Mix Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the "Dreamjolt Hostelry". With just one recipe left to go... what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: 猎犬家系的凯特找到一个奇怪的梦泡，就梦泡的内容来看，它与「假面愚者」似乎有些关系。\n在梦泡里，你的战斗将引起神秘人发笑…虽然听上去有些令人生气，但要是能让他们憋笑失败也蛮爽的，你一定要狠狠出击啊！
E: Kate from the Bloodhound Family found a strange dream bubble, and from its contents, it seems to have some connection to the Masked Fools.\nIn the dream bubble, your combat will make the mysterious figures laugh... Though that sounds a bit annoying, making them fail to hold back their laughter would be pretty satisfying. You've got to hit them with everything you've got!

C: 列车长，能给我一杯果汁吗？谢谢啦～
E: Conductor, can I get a juice, please? Thank youuuu~

C: 我感觉还好。
E: I feel fine.

C: 我可以告诉你们未来会如何：如果你们没有前往「罗浮」，星核最终将污染整艘仙舟，飞船上大约一半的住民将会丧生……
E: I can tell you what the future holds: If you don't go to the Luofu, the Stellaron will eventually contaminate the entire ship, and over half of the inhabitants will perish.

C: 我都行啦。
E: I'm okay with whatever we do.

C: {M#你这个时候倒挺有担当的耶……}{F#你这个时候倒挺有担当的耶……}
E: Pfft, taking things seriously all of a sudden...?

C: 虽然星核猎手抛出了许多烟雾弹，但这次仙舟之行最重要的是……
E: The Stellaron Hunters have given us a lot to consider, and a lot to doubt... But the most important part of this expedition is—

C: 有些事不必强求，三月。我觉得那孩子很珍惜跟你们同行的时光。
E: *chuckles* We need to give him some time, March. I think he treasures the time spent with you guys.

C: 果然，和她相比，我还是少了些放手的魄力。
E: Hehe... And she was right. I really need to stop worrying so much.

C: 但是拜他所赐，俱乐部才声名远扬。他过世后，星际和平公司一直想找到替代者。他们找了无数个琥珀纪，却没有一个天才愿意屈就…终于找到了我。
E: But the Society is famous thanks to him. The Interastral Peace Corporation has been trying to find a replacement ever since his death. They searched for many Amber Eras, but no genius was willing to lower their head to the IPC... Until they found me.

C: 呵，我记得俱乐部历史上八十多号人，大约一半都是寿终正寝的啊。不是还有个只活了十几天的…叫什么来着？
E: Hah. I seem to recall that over half of the Genius Society's eighty-odd members had a normal death. Wasn't there someone who only lived for a dozen days or so? What was their name...

C: 黑色的屏幕中倒影出自己的脸，与其他鲜活灵动的画面形成鲜明的对比。
E: The black screen, which is reflecting your face, contrasts the vibrant and dynamic images.

C: 列车与黑塔女士有些来往，因此我们时不时会在这里稍作停留。
E: Well the Express has some dealings with Madam Herta, so we come to visit the space station from time to time.

C: …算了，咱也不问了。
E: ...Never mind. I won't ask if you don't wanna talk about it.

C: 你好。你是…{NICKNAME}，对吗？有什么想知道的？
E: Hello, you must be... {NICKNAME}, right? How can I help you?

C: 想了解艾丝妲。
E: I'd like to learn about you.

C: 艾丝妲！
E: Asta!

C: 没想到我有幸亲眼见证，嘿，嘿嘿……
E: I didn't think I'd be fortunate enough to witness... hehehehe...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着符玄：「<unbreak>77</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Fu Xuan: "<unbreak>77</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 真的不需要我帮忙么？
E: Is there really no way I can help?

C: 不过你看起来还有什么烦恼，来，你说，我听着。
E: But you look like you've got something on your mind... come on, out with it!

C: 这个问题得你们自己解决。
E: That sounds more like a problem for you guys.

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think things over.

C: 我这都还没敲门呢……
E: I haven't even knocked...

C: 嘿嘿，我第一次经历跃迁的时候，也很激动。但现在我可就稳重多啦！
E: Hehe, I was excited the first time I experienced a warp jump, too. But I'm used to it now.

C: 第三步，用力——把焦虑都拽出来，扔掉！
E: Now for step three: Yank out that anxiety and cast it away with all your might!

C: 啊，我大概猜到你想要问的是什么了。那你的确是找对人了。
E: Oh, I think I know what you were going to ask. You've come to the right person.

C: 关于本质…
E: About its nature...

C: 我们不知道他在逃避什么。有一次他跟我说：他也不知道，只是有什么在追逐他，让他不得不逃亡；他曾经待过仙舟，有阵子为公司工作。
E: We don't know what he's running from. He once told me that he didn't know either. All he knew was that something was chasing him and that he had to run away — first from the Xianzhou, then the IPC.

C: 接触到「裂界」的事物与时空，都会遭到转变，从而成为特殊的「裂界造物」。
E: All matter and space that comes into contact with the Fragmentum will be turned into Fragmentum creations.

C: 晚上要不要打枕头大战？要不要要不要？我觉得这酒店的枕头一定是鹅毛绒的～
E: Wanna have a pillow fight later? Huh? Huh? I bet they're stuffed with goose feathers, haha!

C: 好像咱们每次的开拓之旅，第一天都会折腾得不轻呢。是吧丹恒？
E: Seems like the first day of our trailblazing expeditions is always pretty eventful, huh Dan Heng.

C: 列车组想办法解开了大门的机关……
E: The Crew figures out the mechanism for the gate...

C: 就算平安穿过铁卫禁区——还有一大片裂界挡在前边。
E: Even if you get past the restricted zone in one piece... you'll have a whole heap of Fragmentum to deal with.

C: 所以，我是说，不要再打拆开它的主意啦！
E: What I'm trying to say is that we shouldn't even try to take it apart!

C: （任由她哭喊发泄）
E: (Let her cry and vent.)

C: 那我们来试试看吧。
E: So let's try it out.

C: 难道是下一条线索的位置？
E: Could it be the location of the next clue?

C: 二点五。五！
E: Two point five. Five!

C: 的确，你和大多数人都不一样——你全身上下，无时无刻不散发着自信。
E: And that's not surprising — you're different from others. You seem to radiate a confidence most people don't have.

C: …希露瓦，我理解你不愿意再重回铁卫编制的想法。
E: ...Serval, I understand your reluctance to rejoin the Silvermane Guards.

C: 这把吉他…就是我们那时捣鼓出来的作品之一。可可利亚给它起的名字是——
E: This guitar was one of those inventions. Cocolia came up with a name...

C: …当然啦！这可是一辈子只有一次的机会哪，我可不能错过了。
E: ...Of course! This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity — I can't miss it.

C: 我猜你们也刚到不久…
E: You look like you only just got here...

C: 你只来过行政区，因此你很好奇：贝洛伯格究竟有多大？有多少需要依靠电话才能联络的人们？
E: You've only visited the Administrative District so far, so you start to wonder how big Belobog really is? How many people rely on phones to contact each other?

C: 你听说了《雪国往事》是历史悠久的传统歌剧，正是筑城者的精神塑造了一代又一代的贝洛伯格人。
E: You've heard that Once Upon a Snowsieged Country is a time-honored traditional opera. And it is none other than the spirit of the city's Architects that have shaped Belobog's people for generations to come.

C: 这辆汽车的车身冰凉凉的，好像很久没有人驾驶过了。
E: The body of the car is cold to the touch. Seems like it hasn't been driven for a long time.

C: 一种红黄交间的小花，形状很像太阳。
E: A little flower shaped like the sun, featuring both red and yellow.

C: 想了解一个城市，就去翻它的垃圾桶。
E: To understand a city, go through its trashcans.

C: 撤退！
E: Retreaaaat!

C: 还有个铁卫打扮的小姑娘，我特地嘱咐桑博看住她。但她趁桑博出门的时候，一眨眼就不见了。
E: As for the girl in the Silvermane Guard uniform, I told Sampo to watch her... but it seems that he left his post and she made a run for it.

C: 「地火」这群人都干嘛呢？不会是在躲着我吧？
E: What's Wildfire up to...? Hmm... are they avoiding me?

C: 嘿，说的比唱的还好听，你们保护了地下什么？把铁卫全调上去，封锁上下通路，说好听点还不是为了保护所谓的「筑城者」么？
E: Hah, do you even hear yourself? You? Protect the underground? Redeploying every Guard to the surface, sealing off the only passageway... Protecting the so-called Architects, more like it.

C: 奥列格？他带着一帮人下去里圈了，说是打算把侵入的机器人都给赶走。
E: Oleg? He took a group into the inner section. Said it was to clear off the invading robots.

C: 矿工都救出来了，回去吧。
E: We saved the miners, let's go back.

C: 啊，糟糕，说漏嘴了…反正你们快去找吧！
E: Argh, darn! I've said too much... Anyway, just try and see if you can find him, heh!

C: 「地火」凭什么要帮我们？
E: Why would Wildfire want to help us?

C: 你们来得正是时候，那些流浪者一直在问机器人的事，可我真的什么也不知道……
E: You've got good timing — those vagrants were asking me about the robots, but I don't know anything...

C: 大叔他们都好几天没合眼了，还是先歇歇吧，硬撑着上，也帮不上我的忙啊，反而累赘。
E: The rest of Wildfire has barely gotten any sleep the last few days. They should rest. They'd only be holding their eyelids open and slowing me down.

C: 我和希儿其实都不是在这镇上长大的。我们来自北边的一座工业小镇，它的主城区几年前被裂界渗透了。
E: Seele and I actually aren't from here. We both come from an industrial town to the north. A few years ago, the Fragmentum began to seep into the town center.

C: 来吧，我给你们列一个物资清单。
E: Come. Let me give you a list of materials we need.

C: 最后是止痛剂。应该还有一批存在旧实验室里，希望没被怪物毁掉……
E: ...Lastly, painkillers. There should be a bunch stored in the old lab. Hopefully they haven't been destroyed by monsters...

C: {NICKNAME}已经尽力说服他了。没能事先准备得再周全些，是我的责任。
E: {NICKNAME}, you tried your best to persuade him. It's my fault for not preparing better for such a situation in advance.

C: 干嘛这么郑重其事…你这点最让人受不了了。
E: *sigh* You're always so serious... It really gets on people's nerves sometimes, you know?

C: 如果能有一座桥梁把上下层再次连结起来…我们一定还能回到那个不分你我的年代，并肩抵御寒潮和裂界。
E: If there is a way to bridge the gap between the two worlds, we can definitely go back to the time when you and I were not divided. When we could stand side by side against the Eternal Freeze and the Fragmentum.

C: 行，你问我答，知无不言。
E: Ask away, my friend. I have all the answers you seek.

C: 我看到他们为了公义拔枪，为了他人的理想拼上性命。我可以确认，他们的确是为了「星核」而来，为了解除它给贝洛伯格带来的灾难。
E: I witnessed them take up arms in the name of justice, and risk their lives for the sake of others. I can also ascertain that they did come for the Stellaron, but only to relieve the disaster it has brought upon Belobog.

C: 圆圆的，黑黑的。
E: Round and black.

C: 真是意外的黑宝石。
E: What a surprise...

C: 怀念？如果你指的是老战友之间的交情，那的确有不少值得怀念的地方。至于其它东西，我不觉得下层比上面差到哪儿去。
E: Do I miss it? If you're talking about the time with my comrades-in-arms, of course. But other than that, I don't really prefer it over life in the Underworld.

C: 你先帮我个忙，我现在得找一位特别的「拳手」，之后我再把尾款补上。放心，这事对你来说轻松得很，我保证！
E: How about you do me a favor first? I'm now in need of a special boxer. If you can find one, I'll give you the rest of the money. Easy eh? I promise!

C: 史考特跟你说过盔甲的事吗？
E: Did Scott tell you about the armor?

C: 手臂这里的甲板好像有点松了，算了，我还是自己调整一下吧……
E: The arm plates seem to be a little loose. Forget it, I'll just fix it myself...

C: 换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
E: In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?

C: 换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
E: In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?

C: 这分数具体怎么算，我们会负责搞定的，您只要专注于比赛本身就行。一旦您的排名发生变化，我们会立刻通知您。
E: As for the calculation of the points, we'll take care of that. All you need to do is focus on the fight itself. As soon as your ranking changes, we'll notify you.

C: 先通知大矿区的矿队吧。
E: Let's start with the mining team over at the Great Mine.

C: 去找虎克和鼹鼠党吧。
E: Let's start with Hook and The Moles.

C: …在那几个人面前，感觉我完全插不上话呢。
E: ...I couldn't get a word in while they were talking.

C: 娜塔莎小姐，我回来了。
E: Miss Natasha, we've returned.

C: 公司将不忘初心，牢记创业之初的唯一原则：将一切奉献给「琥珀王」。
E: The IPC will remain true to its sole creed upon which it was founded — To dedicate everything to the Amber Lord.

C: 这将是第<unbreak>22</unbreak>号会员利尔他、第<unbreak>56</unbreak>号会员以利亚萨拉斯之后，第三位智识的天才与公司携手，共同存护琥珀王的宇宙。
E: Madam Herta is the third genius of the Erudition to partner with the IPC, after Member #22 Aiden and Member #56 Elias Salas. The Corporation stands united with Madam Herta to protect the Amber Lord's universe.

C: 公司对此高度重视，第一时间对该信号进行了深度解析。
E: The IPC responded promptly and performed an analysis on the signals.

C: 他不是站在我们这边吗？
E: I thought he was on our side?

C: 恩公何事？
E: How can I help?

C: 不太乐观…
E: I'm not very optimistic...

C: 我能听到风里飘来的人声喧闹，嗅到工造司雨云降下的湿气，触摸到玉勒花瓣细腻的质感。但独独缺一双眼睛……
E: I can hear the sounds of people on the wind, smell the moisture from the rain clouds of the Artisanship Commission, feel the delicate texture of the yule flower's petals. All I lack is a window on the world...

C: 事已至此，只好走一步看一步了。
E: At this stage, I'm just taking it one step at a time.

C: 嗯？还有什么事？
E: Hmm? Something else?

C: 怎么感觉你很失望呢。
E: Seems like you're not particularly happy to see us.

C: 现在「谛听」应该能追踪到她的踪迹了。
E: Diting should be able to pick up her traces now.

C: 我们俩就是奶茶姐妹！
E: Haha, milk tea twins!

C: 咦，你们不是云骑啊…来这里做什么？很危险的。
E: Hmm? You're not the Knights... What is your purpose here? It's dangerous.

C: 多嘴多舌。我若把你医好，你也会是我们中的一员啊。
E: Silence. If my healing worked, you'll become one of us...

C: 想要问话？可以。但我必须全程旁听，这部分内容要一并录入口供。
E: You want to ask questions? Fine, but I must be present the whole way through. This part needs to be recorded as testimony.

C: 血肉泥犁困不住我…化身玄鹿我看到了枝叶伸展遮蔽穹窿，我将再度变化……
E: Mere flesh will not trap me... I am the Ebon Deer. I see the leaves and branches covering the sky. I will change again...

C: 算一卦吧。
E: Do a divination.

C: 炉身渐渐停止震动，不停涌出的烟霭渐渐止息。
E: The crucible gradually stops shaking, and the smoke slowly ceases to pour out.

C: 如何，阿刃，你满意了吗？
E: Well, Bladie? Are you satisfied?

C: 魁首大人的失败，定是因为心志不坚，无法唤来药王的庇佑。
E: The master must have failed to summon the protection of Sanctus Medicus — her will must have wavered.

C: 我是<color=#dbc291ff>丹恒</color>。那位<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>是英雄也好，罪人也罢，都与我无关。我已承担了他的刑罚，接受永久的放逐——这我没有怨言，但将军看我时，请务必弃去过去的影子。
E: I am <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Heng</color>. Whether <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> was hero or villain has nothing to do with me. I bore his punishment, accepted my eternal banishment without complaint... but do not let his shadow cloud your estimation of me, general.

C: 但，你和绘影图形里记录的样子所差无几，持明的转生真的会让人重获新生吗？
E: ...but your appearance closely matches the depiction in the annals... Does Vidyadhara reincarnation really entail a complete transformation — a new life?

C: 做什么？
E: What do I want?

C: 所谓的「封印」，是指这些造型古怪的石灯吗？
E: Those seals you mentioned — do you mean these weird-looking stone lanterns?

C: 「恩公」也来了？切莫心急，「小女子」还未梳妆完毕呢。
E: And the benefactors, too? Patience, patience, let me make myself presentable...

C: 怎么，面对这小子，下不了重手？
E: What's wrong, afraid to hurt the boy?

C: 你们俩确实棘手。
E: You two just won't give up...

C: 将军吩咐过，若他不能视事，就由太卜大人暂代职责。
E: The general did order that if he were unable to return to duty, then the master diviner would take over his duties temporarily.

C: 辛苦杨叔一路照顾。
E: Thanks for looking out for me, Mr. Yang.

C: 我想看看那张弓…
E: I want to take a look at that bow...

C: 这张弓……
E: This bow...

C: 不过我要提醒你，丹枫的罪孽牵扯深远。而有些人的想法，如同鳞渊境的潮动，绝不会随一纸命令轻易改变。
E: ...But I must remind you that the crimes of Dan Feng have had far-reaching implications... and some people, such as those in Scalegorge Waterscape, will not be much moved by the issuance of a paper edict.

C: 我只能保证你的来去自由，却无法保证你的安全。这点还请你理解。
E: While I can guarantee your freedom to come and go as you please, I cannot guarantee your safety. Again, I hope you can understand.

C: 我曾在方壶仙舟上举行过同样的典礼，那已是三十年前的事了。痛苦的记忆不会随岁月淡去，我不想再目睹同样的场面了。
E: I once held the same ceremony on the Fanghu, some thirty years or so ago now. Painful memories don't ever fade away with time, and I don't want to bear witness to those scenes again.

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}。能得到你的理解，我也感到轻松了些。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. It's reassuring to know we're on a similar wavelength.

C: 但在分别前，我有一个请求。
E: But before you do, I would make a request of you.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: …是无名客常用的求救手段。
E: ...A distress call method regularly used by the Nameless.

C: 这，您突然这么说，恐怕……
E: I— even if that is so, I'm afraid...

C: 哎，还真是一波三折。既然那位星期…星期日先生打了包票，我们总算可以正常入住了吧？
E: *sigh* It's just one surprise after another. But since that mister... which day was he? Sunday. Since Mr. Sunday has vouched for us, I guess we can finally check in normally?

C: 还挺深奥…
E: This is deep...

C: 它来自私人匿名捐赠，据说其中的记忆…属于已陨的星神阿基维利！我可以向您保证，这枚梦泡绝对适合您！
E: It's a contribution from an anonymous donor and is said to contain the memory of the fallen Aeon, Akivili! I can assure you that this dream bubble is perfect for you!

C: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 保护美少女我义不容辞！
E: I'll do my best to protect a pretty young lady!

C: 您好，管理员先生。我的朋友是第一次来匹诺康尼，可以为{M#他}{F#她}兑换一些艾迪恩代币吗？
E: Hi, there. This is my friend's first visit to Penacony. May I get some Aideen Tokens for {M#him}{F#her}?

C: 当然没问题，请出示一下您的梦境护照。
E: Of course. Please show me your Dreamscape Pass.

C: 玩得还开心吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Did you have fun, {NICKNAME}?

C: 这没问题，我去告诉她。你们几个，在这等会儿。
E: Sure thing, I'll deliver your message to her. Please wait here.

C: 当然，我也只是提个建议，你不想试也没问题，大不了我来——
E: Of course, it's just a suggestion. If you aren't up for it, I'll do it myself...

C: 呃…这是在做什么？
E: Um... What's going on?

C: 只是…噢，他的样子可真让人害怕——就像是真正的、喜怒无常的石头老板一样。
E: It's just that... seeing that gleeful smile on his face... he's just as scary as he was before.

C: 谢谢你们的好意…
E: I appreciate the gesture...

C: 不管怎么样，我得给各位好好赔礼道歉才是——小的们，给我列队！好好向贵客们道歉！
E: Anyway, I owe everyone a proper apology. Gang, line up and say sorry to our honored guests!

C: 它就在那里，永远散发着耀眼的光芒，就像这五光十色的美梦本身。
E: It radiates dazzling light perpetually, just like this glamorous dream.

C: 一眨眼的工夫，就轻轻从那栋楼到了这栋楼…在现实里，这是不可能发生的事。
E: We moved from that building to this building in the blink of an eye... This would be impossible in reality.

C: 两人暂时无暇聊天，还是先利用「钟表把戏」解决眼下的问题吧。
E: The two of you are too busy to chat. Use your Clockwork and solve your pressing issues first.

C: …小心。现在我可以确信，你的这位朋友有问题。
E: ...Careful. I'm more than certain now that there's something not right about this friend of yours.

C: 我要来找你了哦。
E: Ready or not? Here I come.

C: 到底在哪里…？
E: Where the heck are you...?
██Help█ ███ █ help ██...

C: （她应该是想说，只有你能团结这群，呃，垃圾桶，然后带领他们打倒邪恶的坏人…吧。）
E: (I think she's trying to say that you're the only one who can unite these, uhm, trashcans and lead their battle against the evil king... or something like that.)

C: 这件事还需要讨论…
E: This requires further discussion...

C: 你若将金垃圾赐予我，我便许诺你无穷的智慧，胜过任何一袋满溢的垃圾。
E: If you give the golden trash to me, I will grant you endless knowledge, more than any full bag of trashcan provide.

C: 将金垃圾切成三份平均分配。
E: Split golden trash into three and distribute evenly.

C: 您用行动证明了自己。我们三桶将成为你的助力，为垃圾桶赢得自由。
E: You have proven yourself with your actions. We three cans shall become your aides, and win freedom once more for trashcans.

C: …她说的没错。各位，还记得入梦时的景色吗？
E: ...She's right. Everyone, do you all still remember your surroundings during your entry into the Dreamscape?

C: ——因为阿弗利特死了。
E: Because Ifrit is dead.

C: 据可靠消息称，一些人在匹诺康尼目击到了身穿银色盔甲的高大男性。我向猎犬家系打听了消息，也走访了不少声称见过这位入侵者的来宾……
E: According to reliable sources, some people spotted a tall silver-armored man on Penacony. I've reached out to the Bloodhound Family for news, and visited many of those guests who claimed to have seen this invader...

C: 我的意思是，没问题。
E: I mean, no problem.

C: 也因此，在这场金色的宴会中…她是我最关注的舞者。
E: That's why, during this golden soirée... she is the dance's centerpiece.

C: …我们走吧。
E: ...Let's go.

C: 宝宝，快听…这就是雨的声音。在你出生的那一日，天上也像这样降下{RUBY_B#雨水}母神的恩赐{RUBY_E#}。
E: Darling, listen... this is the sound of rain. On the day you were born, the sky also sent down {RUBY_B#Raindrops}a gift{RUBY_E#} like this from Gaiathra.

C: 两起凶杀案？！我就说那无名客的反应不对劲，{M#他}{F#她}一定是撞见另一场了……
E: Two murder cases!? I told you, something seemed off about the Nameless. {M#He}{F#She} must have come across the other one...

C: 我不会。从来不会。
E: I don't. Never have.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我为「钟表匠的遗产」而来…</color>就只是这样。我想自己已经足够坦诚。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I'm here for the Watchmaker's Legacy...</color> and that's it. I think I've been honest enough.

C: 当妈妈在我们怀里慢慢变冷的时候，母神又在哪里…妈妈直到闭眼的那一刻，口中还在请求她的原谅……
E: And where was Gaiathra Triclops when Mom was shivering in our arms? Mom was still pleading for Gaiathra Triclops' forgiveness under her breath until the moment she closed her eyes...

C: 「所有埃维金人都在一场屠杀中丧命了，是吗？」
E: "All the Avgins were killed in a massacre. Am I right?"

C: 「你是否能够立誓，此刻——『砂金石』正安然无恙地躺在这个匣子里？」
E: "Can you swear that at this very moment, the Aventurine stone is safe and sound in this box?"

C: 但那位流萤小姐也真是神秘，酒店系统中竟然找不到任何有关她的信息。就算是偷渡犯…入境后也该有个伪装的身份吧。
E: But that Miss Firefly is truly mysterious. There's no information on her in the hotel system. Even if she's a stowaway... she should have a disguised identity after entering the planet.

C: 美梦正在崩溃，但并不因为某柱星神、某个派系，或某位具体的来客。它的崩溃源自某种人性的必然，家族不愿承认这点，却在无形中反成了催化剂……
