E: The beautiful dream is crumbling, but not because of a particular Aeon, a particular faction, or a particular visitor. Its collapse stems from a certain inevitability of human nature. The Family refuses to acknowledge this, and it has ultimately backfired and become a catalyst...

C: 我没想到你还有脸来见我。
E: Didn't think you'd have the nerve to show yourself.

C: 你比我更清楚呀，是谁眼巴巴地看着唱不出歌儿的小鸟横死在面前？当然是你啦，小孔雀～
E: You know better than I do. Who watched the little songbird that couldn't sing perish right before their eyes? You did, Blondie.

C: 剩下的我自己会办成：我会给家族的垮台准备一场伟大的揭幕表演。等到了最高潮，高墙将崩塌、人们将惊醒，<color=#dbc291ff>不能说话的人也将重新开口</color>——
E: I'll handle the rest myself. I'll orchestrate a grand finale for the downfall of The Family. And at the climax, the walls will crumble, people will wake up, and <color=#dbc291ff>those who couldn't speak will find their voices again</color>...

C: 目前还只是推测，我们很难相信{RUBY_B#「钟表匠」}匹诺康尼之父{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#家族}它的实际管理人{RUBY_E#}这么不对付。
E: That's just our speculation. Actually, it's hard to believe that the {RUBY_B#The Watchmaker}Father of Penacony{RUBY_E#} and its {RUBY_B#The Family}actual managers{RUBY_E#} are at odds.

C: 不是要讲「钟表匠」的事吗？我还以为会去资料室之类的地方，怎么是这里……
E: Wait, aren't we supposed to be discussing "The Watchmaker"? I would have expected you to take us to maybe a library or an archive room of sorts, but an amusement park...?

C: 是啊，时光会抚平一切。年少的美梦…也终会醒来。
E: Yeah, time has a way of smoothing things out. The beautiful dreams of youth... will eventually fade away.

C: …卑贱的赌徒？
E: ...Lowly gambler?

C: 我们来赴约了，砂金先生。按照礼仪，您也应该现身才是。
E: We've kept your appointment, Mr. Aventurine. It is customary to show yourself as well.

C: 你到底想说什么？
E: What are you on about?

C: 所以你才能赢。时运和谋略，缺一不可。
E: And that's how you win. Opportunity and strategy, both are essential.

C: 引爆一颗星核…我做不到。「砂金石」已经太过破碎，甚至无法保护我从舞台上全身而退。
E: Detonating a Stellaron... I can't do it. The aventurine stone is too broken to even safeguard my escape from the stage.

C: 这就是家族口中的「万众一心」？
E: Is this the "United as One" that The Family espouses?

C: 知更鸟小姐。我知道猎犬家系已经封锁了影视乐园，也相信家族能妥善控制局势，但这于事无补。
E: Miss Robin. I know the Bloodhound Family has already sealed off the theme park and has control over the situation, but it won't resolve the problem.
One...

C: 这座城寨的气氛…和美梦大不相同啊。
E: The atmosphere in this fortress is... pretty different from that in the beautiful dream.

C: 翠丝阿姨，晚上好！呃…现在算晚上吗？
E: Evening, Jessie! Uhm... is it evening?

C: 说常见也算不上，但频率是越来越高了。这也是*美梦崩溃*的征兆之一吧。
E: Not really, but they're becoming more frequent now. Guess it's one of the signs of the sweet dream's collapse.

C: 我们之前在居住地，遇见了好些偷渡客。他们大多是从邻近星系来的。
E: We met some stowaways in the residential area. Most of them came from neighboring star systems.

C: 不用担心，知更鸟小姐。梦有意义，但它不是一切，我和孩子们都明白这点，无论在梦里飞翔多久，最后总要飞回现实。
E: Don't worry, Robin. Dreams have their significance, but they aren't everything. Both the children and I understand this. No matter how long we fly through this dream, we will one day return to reality.

C: （真正的梦境，流放之地…出发前，要再和大家聊聊么？）
E: (The real Dreamscape, the land of the exiles... Before we go, should we speak to everyone first?)

C: 就凭那位大名鼎鼎的知更鸟也选择站在这边。再加上一位叛徒的线索，和匹诺康尼的光明未来——这样的特饮能满足你的胃口么？
E: The fact that the famous Robin has chosen my side. Plus, some clues about a traitor, and a bright future for Penacony... Any of that catch your interest?

C: 果然是这样，家族的化身，最早出现在美梦中的建筑…它就是匹诺康尼变成这幅样子的罪魁祸首。
E: As I suspected. It's the embodiment of The Family, the edifice that first materialized within the sweet dream... That's what turned Penacony into its current state.

C: 老朋友，有时候我会忘记你已经死了，好像你还有很多话想说，还有很多路没走完。
E: Sometimes I feel like you're still alive, old friend, like you've still got so much to say and do.

C: 然而价值并非是由人们凭空创造的，其总和亦有上限。要想实现所谓的价值，人就必须从他人手中掠夺。就这样，弱者们被剥削、被压迫……
E: However, value doesn't come out of thin air, and there's a limit to it. To accumulate value, people have to take from others. So, the weak get exploited and oppressed...

C: 因为有先例，原则上应该没问题。请容我联系一下二位的同伴——
E: Since there is a precedent, it shouldn't be a problem. Just give me a second to contact your companions...

C: 这也不行那也不行，你到底想怎样？让咱哥俩在前台打地铺是吧？
E: So nothing works, huh? What's your solution then? Are you saying we sleep here, at the reception?

C: 噢，看看这对妙人儿，多有明星相啊！既然你们是双人组合，那我就为你们准备一个双人对戏的场景吧！
E: Oof, just take a look at this pair. Such star quality! Since you've come as a pair, I'll prep a two-person scene for you!

C: 但此时，你的搭档却仰望天空，闭上双眼。雨滴落下，视野也一片模糊，她悲伤地说——
E: But at this moment, your partner yet gazes into the sky, both her eyes closed. The rain drops fall, blurring her vision, and she tragically says...

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达™，快乐美梦速速达，嘎呜——！
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad™, and make your dreams a blast! Grawwrr!

C: 哼？哼…哼。
E: Hmph? Hmph... Hmph.

C: 「——去触碰那台可疑的电视机！」
E: "...Touch that suspicious-looking TV right now!"

C: 天哪，它的样子太让人伤心了。但没关系，我们可以找回它内心缺失的部分，帮助它从失意中走出来！
E: Oh dear, seeing it like this is utterly heart-wrenching. But fear not! We're here to help it rediscover the missing parts of its inner self and guide it out of despair!

C: 滴答！灰色的朋友，我们还没帮那位迷钟打开心结呢！
E: Tick-tock! Hey there my gray-haired friend, we still haven't helped Big Ticker find closure yet!

C: 二位有着卓越的表演才能，预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: Both of you possess excellent performative talent. I wish you all the best!

C: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们……
E: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim...

C: 做出选择。
E: Make the decision.

C: 我…说不上来。但好像有种似曾相识的感觉。这是哪儿？
E: I... don't know, but I feel a sense of déjà vu. What is this place?

C: 我可没有倚老卖老，就是有感而发嘛。
E: I'm not an elder. I was just being a bit sentimental.

C: 昨天晚上，我做了个很长的梦，梦见我们相遇的那天。我想把那个梦记录下来。
E: Last night, I had a long dream about the day we met. I want to write down that dream.

C: 行遍人生旅途的最后，我把这一点自视珍贵的火苗留在最深的梦里，希望交给后世的无名客们。
E: At the end of the journey, I left this little flame, which I so cherished, in my deepest dreams, hoping to pass it on to the Nameless of future generations.

C: 利用一整个世界的意志，推动一位星神的降生…这场对决绝不是单纯力量的交锋。为了匹诺康尼的未来，不能只有你们在舞台上战斗。
E: They've harnessed the will of an entire planet to create an Aeon... This confrontation is far more complicated than a simple power struggle. To secure Penacony's future, fighting on the stage alone is not enough.

C: 那一天，他把我叫到书房里，说他要像往常那样出海了。但我看得出来，爷爷的表情很严肃，爸爸最后一次远航前，我在他脸上见过同样的表情。
E: On that day, he called me to his study, telling me that he was embarking on another journey. However, I could sense the gravity in his expression. It... It was the same look I had seen on my father's face before his final voyage.

C: 米哈伊尔啊，米哈伊尔，我不知道他们说的是不是真的，但如果心向自由就活该要下地狱……
E: Well, I don't know if they really meant it, but if longing for freedom means going to hell...

C: 哦，差点忘记了，还有件事……
E: Oh, I almost forgot. There's one more thing...

C: 「我将飞上高空，变作天上的太阳。」
E: "I shall ascend to the heavens, becoming the scorching sun."

C: 这或许就是星期日暗藏在文脉下的内容——「同谐」改变了匹诺康尼，但做法却与过去的狱卒无异。
E: Perhaps this is the truth Sunday is trying to express, if you read between lines. The Harmony changed Penacony just as the guards once did.

C: 「在君王出现前，它们各行其是；在君王离开后，它们依旧各行其是。」
E: "Before the arrival of a king, everything followed its natural course, and so it shall continue even after the king's departure."

C: 嗯？按之前两幕戏，这里不该触发一段小故事，然后开始打架吗？怎么这些人偶都不说台词？
E: Hey? Aren't we supposed to kick off a short story and have a fight here just like we did in the previous acts? Why aren't any of these puppets saying anything?

C: 好啦好啦，不开玩笑了。神君威力大是大，但也不至于把你弄失忆啦。看你状态不错，我放心咯。
E: Alright, alright, stop joking around. The Lightning-Lord may be all-powerful, but they're not going to cause sudden memory loss. I'm just glad you're okay.

C: 嗨，我们又见面了，小瞌睡虫。
E: Hey, we meet again, sleepy head.

C: 唉，最近几次开拓之旅都太吓人了，动不动就有性命之忧…也该来点轻松愉快温暖人心的可爱冒险了吧！
E: The last couple of trailblazing expeditions have been downright terrifying... It's about time we had some fun, cozy, and cute adventures for a change!

C: 你们和星期日、知更鸟决定分头寻找封印星核的方法。谁曾想，星期日与「梦主」早就另有图谋，你们终究不得不在谐乐大典的舞台上一决生死。
E: You split up with Sunday and Robin, looking for a way to seal the Stellaron. However, it turned out that Sunday and the Dreammaster had their own hidden agenda, and you had to engage in an ultimate duel on the stage of the Charmony Festival.

C: 她为寻求更广阔的学术天地，随星穹列车投身建设阿斯德纳，展开有关忆质的研究。
E: To seek out broader academic possibilities, she joined the crew of the Astral Express to build Asdana and launched her research into memoria.

C: 他来自海洋星球露莎卡，是传奇航海家米哈伊尔-夏尔夫妇的养子。
E: Hailing from the oceanic planet of Lushaka, he was adopted by legendary seafarers, the Mikhail-Char couple.

C: 「巡猎」的飞星，只会坠落在最漫长的夜晚，而在它身后——将是黎明的到来。
E: The shooting stars of The Hunt only descend on the longest night, and with them... comes the dawn.

C: 我不知道。但曾经有人对我说，总有一天他会与世长辞，他希望那个时候……
E: I don't know, but someone once told me that when the inevitable moment came, he hoped that...

C: 你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？我听房间里一点动静都没有，快吓死了。
E: Are you okay? Can you hear me? I didn't hear a peep from your room, and it really freaked me out.

C: 客人们是什么反应？
E: How did the guests react?

C: 希望你能喜欢这杯，加拉赫。
E: I hope you'll enjoy this one, Gallagher.

C: 当然没有，谁会按啊！
E: Of course not! Who would press something like that!

C: 那你觉得，盛会之星的未来会走向何方？
E: Where do you think the future of the Planet of Festivities is headed?

C: 那剂「鸩毒」——我有些好奇，你是从哪里得到消息的？
E: That dose of "bitter poison"... I'm curious as to how you found this information.

C: 叫我「萨缪尔」就好。
E: Just call me Samuel.

C: 我这是在做梦吗？
E: Am I dreaming?

C: 总会有方向的。毕竟你们是「开拓」的命途行者嘛……
E: There will always be somewhere. After all, you guys are on the Path of the Trailblaze...

C: （希望人没事…但如果又是那两位猎犬，多半不会出岔子吧。）
E: (I hope she's okay... But if it's only those two Hounds again, she'll probably be fine.)

C: 满意了吗？不满意也得满意。好了，既然你找到了我，轮到我完成使命了。接下来，我将倒数五个数，然后爆炸！
E: Satisfied? If not, you'll just have to make do. All right. Now that you've found me, it's my turn to complete my mission. Next, I'll count down from five, and then explode!

C: 是不是很惊喜、很意外、很恐慌？没有吗？真的？好吧，太可惜了。你真该学学怎么讨女孩子欢心！
E: Was it surprising, shocking, horrifying? No? Really? Fine. That's too bad then. You really ought to learn how to win a girl over!

C: 哦，说到这个，我该去找它了。「梗大鬼」脾气火爆，向来没什么耐心。
E: Oh, speaking of which, I should go and look for it. Memey the Monster has an explosive temper, and it's never been very patient.

C: 难道就没别的办法了吗…
E: So that's it? There's no other way?

C: 这…应该也办不到。时间有限，她又会易容，而且就算抓到了，她也一定不会乖乖就范……
E: That's... probably not possible. Time is running out, and she's a master of disguise. And even if we catch her, she won't come quietly...

C: 啊…这么说来，我得为自己的失礼道歉。还记得初次见面的时候吗？我曾说过，你让我想起一位故人。
E: Ah... In that case, I must apologize for my rudeness. Do you remember when we first met? I once said you reminded me of an acquaintance.

C: 我也曾踽踽独行，在陌生的星球邂逅「故人」，看见他们的身影和我的过去重叠在一起。
E: I, too, have wandered alone, encountering "acquaintances" on strange worlds, seeing their silhouettes overlap with my past.

C: 把这次的冒险经历告诉帕姆以后，它就突然开始哭了…我从来没见过帕姆这么伤心……
E: We told Pom-Pom all about our adventure, and... they suddenly started crying... I've never seen Pom-Pom so sad before...

C: 可能没你想的那么美好。
E: It might not be as fun as you're imagining.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 蕉蕉蕉…
E: Bana bana...

C: 走吧走吧，彩色的校园生活在等我们呢。
E: Come on, let's go! A spectacular campus life awaits us!

C: 不是说不用考试吗？
E: No one said there'd be an exam!

C: 好现实呀……
E: That's reality for you...

C: 我社恐。
E: I have social anxiety.

C: …而、而且好辣啊！你们放了什么东西！
E: ...And it's really spicy! What did you put in there!?

C: 忍者的利刃并非不能斩断因果，不如说，我等必须斩断因果。
E: The ninja's blade can and must sever the chain of cause and effect!

C: 那不是更可疑了？
E: Shouldn't that arouse your suspicion?

C: 无名忍者？是说无名客吗，咱们有名字的啦…我叫三月七，他是丹恒。
E: Nameless Ninjas? Are you talking about the Nameless? We have names, you know. I'm March 7th and he's Dan Heng.

C: 我叫丹恒。
E: My name is Dan Heng.

C: 如果能联系上波提欧就好了，他现在到底在哪呢……
E: It would help if we could get in touch with Boothill. I wonder where he is...

C: 怎么了，知更鸟姐姐？
E: Is something the matter, Miss Robin?

C: 不是…啊…你到底什么人……
E: No, wait... Argh... Who the heck are you?

C: 很敏锐的直觉，但那重身份不重要。我出现在这里，只是出于对电影美学的苛求。
E: Keen intuition, but that layer of my identity isn't important. I am only here because of my fastidiousness toward the theatrical arts.

C: 哈——那大明星今天要做的事情难得一见，我当然要回来看看。
E: Pfft. That singing queen's gonna put up a once-in-a-lifetime performance. You bet I'm not missin' it.

C: 你猜怎么着？他宝贝的，我记了几天几夜！这下我知道记忆模块为什么总是坏了，它要承担的东西太多。
E: Guess what? I muddle-fudgin' noted things down for several days straight! And that's when it hit me: I was remembering too much bull pucky! That's why my memory module kept shutting down on me.

C: 但是无用！它的箱盖纹丝不动，彷佛从设计之初就无法打开一般，这让你想起了匹诺康尼街道上那些打不开的门。
E: But it is useless! Its lid does not move an inch, like it was designed to never be opened. This reminds you of those unopenable doors along Penacony's streets.

C: 恐怕不是呢，只是…发现了一些以前忽略的东西。
E: No, that's not it. I just... realized something I've never noticed before.

C: 拜谢苦茶大师，弟子不胜荣幸。
E: Thank you, Master Kucha. This is my greatest honor.

C: 什么情况…嘴巴自己开口了，这课肯定不对劲。
E: What's happening? My mouth was running on autopilot. This class definitely seems fishy.

C: 这真是一幅完美的作品，不是吗？快去找蕉师交差吧！
E: What a masterpiece, isn't it? Hurry and show it to BananAdvisor!

C: 阁下的发言结束了吗？
E: Have you concluded your articulation, sir?

C: 甘饴•忍徒，是这样没错吧？
E: Is that fair to say, Ninja Initiate Patissier?

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 吃完香蕉就睡觉，快快乐乐没烦恼！
E: Eat bananas, nap the day away. Worry no more, be happy everyday!

C: 答对了！幸福的生活，这就是匹诺康尼用户的「痛点」！
E: Bingo! To live a happy life! That is exactly the pain point of Penaconian consumers!

C: NG——我拒绝！蕉授，你知道我为何会落入你们之手吗？
E: No, I refuse! Profnana, have you ever wondered why I ended up under your control?

C: 略施手段，它们就会产生、消逝，你甚至能让自己在短时间内性情大变。
E: With some manipulation, we should be able to easily create or erase emotions. That means triggering a sudden change in your own temperament isn't out of the question!

C: 是啊，他香蕉的，巡海游侠都这样，见到猴子就恨不得翻个跟头。
E: Why not? Galaxy Rangers are forkin' monkey fans. We go bananas at the mere sight of them.

C: 没事啦，他只是看上去凶巴巴的。听丹恒说，他动不动就喵喵叫呢。
E: Aww, there's nothing to be afraid of! He just looks a little scary, but Dan Heng says he's more bark than bite.

C: 赶紧离开这儿，快！
E: Let's get out of this place now, hurry!

C: 您想要离开当然无所谓。可是，您怎么能擅自带走我的观察样本呢？
E: You're free to leave, if you wish. But not with my subject. He's still under observation.

C: ——那就是向着邪恶开火，宝贝！
E: ...And that's to put a bullet in anything evil, muddle-fudger!

C: 无论从任何角度来看，男人终究棋差一招，这个他主动迈入的陷阱，偏偏熄灭了他准备用以炸膛的枪火。
E: No matter how you look at it, the man is always one step behind. The trap he willingly walked into has extinguished the very firepower he intended to use.

C: 十年苦行，一朝封名…在下未曾辜负缭乱•忍法，苦茶大师，真希望你能见证此景……
E: Ten arduous years of training finally culminated in this, a new title will be conferred upon me today... I can proudly say that I have never gone against the tenets of Dazzling Ninjutsu all this time. How I wish you were here to witness this glory of mine today, Master Kucha...

C: 不不，至少现在还不是。
E: No... at least not right now.

C: （脑袋里的*蕉声*越来越清晰了…动作得快……）
E: (The Banagibberish in my mind is getting clearer now... I have to move quickly...)

C: 这样试炼就结束了…回去谒见大师，继续修行吧。
E: That should be the end of my trial... Time to return to Master and resume my training.

C: 此帖记叙着御猿•邪忍的邪术与罪证，多么无血无泪的恶行，想必在阅读后没有人不会为之战抖！
E: This scroll describes the sorcery and crimes attributed to Evil Ninja Osaru. Such ruthless and immoral sins... All who read it will undoubtedly tremble before this monstrosity!

C: 怪不得三号总是疯疯癫癫的……
E: Now I know why No. 3 always looks so loopy...

C: 很荣幸能作为第十七实验室的代表，向在座各位阐述我们的理念——
E: It's an honor for me to represent Laboratory <unbreak>17</unbreak> and elaborate on our beliefs to all who are present today...

C: 你挫败了邪忍的阴谋，救下了很多无辜之人，毫无疑问，你已经有真正的忍者之姿了。
E: You foiled the Evil Ninja's schemes and saved so many innocent people... You undoubtedly already have the bearing of a true ninja.

C: 能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>，这是怎么回事？研究所里全他蕉的是电子涂鸦，把安全系统都搞崩溃了！
E: Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak>, what is going on!? There's digital graffiti all over the laboratory. It even crashed the security system!

C: 接下来还有更可惜的事情——你的实验马上就要失败了。
E: You know what's even more of a waste? Your experiment's on its way to failure.

C: 为何宣战后立刻逃遁，甚是卑鄙！
E: Laying down your challenge only to abscond? Despicable!

C: 只懂得听命邪忍，为害四方的邪祟，有何资格评判在下。
E: You're a fiendling who only knows how to take orders from the Evil Ninja and go around causing trouble. What right do you have to judge me?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>放弃所有一切，眼前风光更好。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Life grows beautiful for those who forfeit it all.</color>

C: 重渊里还藏着这么隐蔽的地方？
E: I never thought there would be such a hidden space in the Abyss.

C: 是啊，都好久了…
E: Yeah, he's been gone for a while now...

C: 没事的，交给我们吧。
E: It's fine. We've got this.

C: …我尽力了。
E: ...I did my best.

C: 所以，小小灰，小小蝶，寻找小那刻夏和大家的任务，就交给缇安吧——缇安找人可厉害了，可以飞上天！
E: So, Little Gray and Little Cas, just leave the task of finding Anaxa and everyone else to Trianne! It's easy for Trianne to look for people because we can fly!

C: 也许他们只是无法转移火种，但设法逃走了…吧。
E: Perhaps they were just unable to transfer the Coreflame, but managed to escape...

C: 嗯…这就…谈拢了？
E: Hm... With that... the discussion is over?

C: 一轮巨大的水车。看似能转，实际上也能转。眼下若水车能转将绝杀，可惜暂时转不得。
E: A giant waterwheel. It looks like it can turn, and it can actually turn. If the waterwheel could turn right now, it would be a sure win. It's a pity that it can't be turned for the time being.

C: 手感有七分…不，九分甚至十分火热呀…！
E: It feels like I've reached medium-well... No, perhaps I'm on the verge of becoming well-done...!

C: 难缠。人子们，切勿动摇，逐个击破便是。
E: How annoying. Children of humanity, don't waver now. Let's just destroy them one by one.

C: 没关系啦，直接一点，才像是你的风格。
E: Hehe, it's alright! Being straightforward suits you better.

C: 不错，很警惕。真言狮口，哪一个？
E: It was prudent of you to be cautious. So, which Verax Leo was he with?

C: 至于悬锋城千百年的「荣光」，那本来就是个笑话——杀戮就是杀戮，为虚荣而高兴的杀人凶手，并不比翁法罗斯最凶蛮的野兽更高贵。
E: As for our millennia-old "glory"... it has always been a joke in my eyes. Glorify it all you want, but it will not alter the nature of slaughter. Those who revel in it are but murderers. They are no more noble than the most monstrous beasts in Amphoreus.

C: 救世主…你在哪里？
E: Deliverer... where have you gone?

C: 是。有一道感应转瞬即逝，但特别强烈…{M#他们}{F#她们}似乎遇见了棘手的麻烦。
E: Yes, I sensed something... It was fleeting, but very strong... It feels like they're in some big trouble.

C: ——我听得懂诗，{RUBY_B#混账}HKS{RUBY_E#}。
E: ...I know how to interpret poetry, {RUBY_B#scoundrel}HKS{RUBY_E#}.

C: 这…不公平……
E: This... This isn't fair...

C: 天上挂着半轮血日，就和那时一样，那个凶手在我面前……
E: A blood-red half-sun hung in the sky, just like on that day. And before my eyes, that murderer...

C: 当然。在悬锋孤军与奥赫玛联合前，他们就战死了。
E: They died on the battlefield before the Kremnoan Detachment managed to join Okhema.

C: 他们在无底沼泽中围追堵截，莱昂为了殿后被斩断双腿。他消失在异乡的泥土里，尸骨无存。
E: They cornered us in a bottomless swamp. Leonnius covered for our retreat, and they cut his legs off. He vanished into the mire of a foreign land, his body never to be recovered.

C: 还有你的那位老师，克拉特鲁斯……
E: And that teacher of yours, Krateros...

C: 我早已做好了心理准备…在这个时代，每一次平凡的道别都可能是永别。
E: I've been prepared for this for a long time... In times like these, any ordinary goodbye might just turn out to be a final farewell.

C: 你们好呀，年轻人。找老费贝尔有什么事情么？
E: Hello, young ones. Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 她们要不肯道歉，尽管和我说，我这个老父亲在她们那儿，还是有些脸面的……
E: If they refuse to apologize, just let me know. Their old dad can still talk some sense into them...

C: …现在，杀了我！
E: ...Now, kill me!

C: （一块黑板？上面画的是……）
E: (A blackboard? And what is that drawing...?)

C: 快█逃█ █ 缇里西庇俄丝█ ██快逃███  █ ██ █
E: Hurry! █un! █ █ Tribios, █ ██ run! ███ █ ██ █

C: 为什么…到处都是娃娃…？！
E: Why... are there dolls everywhere!?

C: {RUBY_B#「理性」之泰坦，瑟希斯}那位泰坦{RUBY_E#}也是这么说的？
E: Is that what {RUBY_B#Cerces, the Reason Titan}the Titan{RUBY_E#} said as well?

C: 黑色斗篷的怪物，很可怕。大家，遇到危险…噩梦，忘不掉。
E: Monster in the black cloak, so scary. Everyone, in danger... Nightmare, can't forget.

C: 不久前 奥赫玛
E: Not long ago, in Okhema

C: 那还真该庆幸啊。那么，既然盗火行者可能的目标有二，我们更得加快动作了……
E: That's a relief. Anyway, since the Flame Reaver has two targets, we need to move fast...

C: 老师，准备动手！我们快顶不住了！
E: Get ready, Prof! We can't hold out much longer!

C: 是不是少了个人？
E: Feels like we're missing someone.

C: 你杀死了我们……
E: You have killed us...

C: 那一晚，说服阿格莱雅放了我的…是你么，迈德漠斯？
E: The one who persuaded Aglaea to set me free that night... Was that you, Mydeimos?

C: 嗯。
E: Yes.

C: 重新审视过往，昂然步向未来，我也经历过这样的挣扎。
E: Reflecting on the past and moving forward to the future, a challenge I've faced as well.

C: 噢…那还真是荣幸。
E: Oh... That's quite an honor, I suppose.

C: 荣耀属于你，歌耳戈之子！
E: Glory belongs to you, son of Gorgo!

C: 快来！看看我新写的……
E: Say! Come and check out what I just wrote...

C: 我们的王…就要回来了。如果是他，一定能把你们…那个黑衣的……
E: Our king... will be back soon... He'll be able to... deal with you... and that black-robed...

C: 要不要让{NICKNAME}试试？
E: How about letting {NICKNAME} give it a try?

C: 那，这时的你们在哪里呢？
E: Then... where are you at this time?

C: 就在那边——
E: Right over there...

C: 这玻璃制品，我见过。
E: I've seen this type of glass before.

C: 这些卷轴也是妈妈留给*我们*的。记得小时候，她会当作睡前故事念给*我们*听。那些故事在她口中妙趣横生，足以在梦中勾勒出一片富饶的翁法罗斯。
E: Mother left us these scrolls too. When we were young, she would read them to us as bedtime stories. Her stories were so engaging that we could vividly imagine all of Amphoreus in our dreams.

C: 我们的愿望，就会一同实现。
E: Our wishes will come true together.

C: 你已明白答案，并亲手做出了决定。
E: The answer is already within you, and you've made your own decision.

C: 哈哈，一点也不意外。这个叫做「圣杯」的奇物确实很古怪。
E: Haha, not surprising at all. This so-called "Holy Grail" Curio is bizarre indeed.

C: 当然是真的！孩子，烙印在手上的令咒已经证明了你的资格。你也召来了从者并见证了他的力量。
E: Of course it can! Kid, the Command Spell branded onto your hand is proof of your qualification. You've also summoned a Servant and witnessed their power for yourself.

C: 老奥帝显然明白这点。是什么样的收益让他愿意押上苜蓿草家系的商誉？
E: Old Oti knows that better than anyone. So what kind of return is big enough for him to risk the Alfalfa Family's entire reputation?
Wait, what???

C: 我小时候最大的梦想，就是拥有一匹自己的坐骑。想成为骑士，骑上马，沿着眼前的这条路前进，穿过原野一直到草原深处，艾克托的屋子就在那里。
E: My greatest dream as a child was to have a mount of my own. To become a knight. To ride a horse. To follow this very path across the fields and reach the grasslands where Ector's house lies.

C: 是吗？可听你谈起各种外界的消息，却比卡美洛宫廷的吟游诗人更博学啊？
E: Really? But you sound more knowledgeable than the bards of Camelot when you talk about all the news from the outside world.

C: 据我最近听到的消息，她的计划被罗浮将军挫败了…但仙舟人也付出了巨大的代价。好心提醒你一句，别拿人家的灾难当成自己吹牛的谈资。
E: From what I've heard, her plan was foiled by the General of the Luofu... but the Xianzhou people paid a heavy price for it. Listen, don't use someone else's tragedy as your bragging material.

C: 哎呀，我早该猜到的！最近应物科进口了一批梦泡，有不少没见过世面的年轻科员都整天沉迷在里面，连工作都甩到一边去了。
E: Haha. Oh, I know what's happening now! The Department of Implement Arts imported a batch of dream bubbles. Loads of young naïve researchers have been wasting entire days in them, ignoring even their paid work.

C: 后天晚上。
E: The night after the next day.

C: 电影公司想将鸟儿打造成美丽的符号，鸟儿却想要飞离这片令它窒息的臭水沟……
E: The movie studio wanted to turn the bird into a symbol of beauty, but the bird longed to escape from this suffocating, filthy gutter...

C: 但匹诺康尼变了，这么多琥珀纪过去后，它变得更陌生了。而我被这个新生的牢笼锁住了。
E: But Penacony has changed. After so many Amber Eras, it's become almost unrecognizable. And now, I am locked in this newly-forged prison.

C: 够了，现在是时候结束这一切了，背叛御主的从者没有存在的资格！
E: Anyway, it's time to end this. A Servant who betrayed their Master has no right to exist!

C: 不知道为什么，记忆里对方似乎长着鱼的脑袋。
E: Not sure why, but I think my enemies all had fish heads on their necks.

C: <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>为了金钱而疯狂啃噬的蛀虫</color></size>。
E: <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>A bug madly devouring wealth.</color></size>

C: 可别这么说，这对匹诺康尼的股东来说可是一桩好事啊。
E: Don't say it like that. This is a good thing for Penacony's shareholders.

C: 男人冰冷的面孔上露出一丝浅笑，消失在众人眼前。很快，这里只剩下了最后的一对主从。
E: A faint smile tugged at the man's cold face, before he vanished from sight. Soon, only the final pair of Master and Servant remained.

C: 你…还会回列车来吗？
E: Will you... be returning to the Express?

C: 关于将家主和股东们牵扯进来一事，正如砂金先生料到的，绝大部分的事情，他都以「娱乐节目」的名义搪塞了过去。
E: As Mr. Aventurine guessed, Oti simply brushed everything off as "entertainment" when questioned about placing Family heads and shareholders in danger.

C: 不好奇。
E: No.

C: 你这乐在其中的样子是怎么回事？
E: What's with the happy smile?

C: 你上电视了，哥！
E: You're on TV, bro!

C: 以常情而论，作为从者把区区房门直接劈开不就好了？御主，请往后退两步。
E: Rationally speaking, as a Servant, wouldn't it be easier to just cut the door down? Master, please take two steps back.

C: 似乎我们几个又回到了原地……
E: Feels like we've just looped back to where we started...

C: 葛瑞迪，看来你已经忘了，被你困在宝具里的可不只有我们几个。
E: Grady, looks like you forgot that you didn't only trap US in your Noble Phantasm.

C: 「每当夜晚降临，钟表乐园便会露出不为人知的一面。」
E: "Each night, the Clockland will reveal its unknown side."

C: Archer，你又在{NICKNAME}面前胡说了什么？
E: Archer, what nonsense are you feeding {NICKNAME} this time?

C: 作为御主，你对魔术的抗性要远低于我们。如果你被葛瑞迪袭击退场，我也会跟着消失，这显然是敌人希望看到的。
E: As a Master, your resistance to magecraft is far weaker than ours. If Grady knocks you out, I disappear with you, and that's exactly what the enemy wants.

C: 巡海游侠！除恶惩奸！
E: Galaxy Ranger! Serving justice!

C: 你…你到底是什么来头？！
E: Just who... who in the world ARE you!?

C: 导演，那我屁股呢？屁股呱！
E: Director! What about my butt? My butt! My—!

C: 这位…斯科特先生，您站到了我们这边，是打算弃暗投明吗？看起来，Assassin拍的烂片连他的御主也忍受不了了。
E: And you... Mr. Skott, did you change your tune because you are planning to abandon the darkness and embrace the light? Looks like not even Assassin's Master can tolerate his trashy films anymore.

C: 因为，这部《外太空计划六号》的结局是——无人生还。
E: Because... the ending of this Plan 6 from Outer Space is — no survivors.

C: 作为营销大师或发明家，你无疑是成功的。但{RUBY_B#我们}观众{RUBY_E#}并不关心你付出了什么，他们只知道，你的电影真的很烂。
E: As a master of marketing or an inventor, you're undoubtedly a success. But {RUBY_B#we}the audience{RUBY_E#} doesn't care what you gave in your efforts, they just know that your movie is terrible.

C: 有件事我忘了问——波提欧先生，你知道斯科特是哪个部门的吗？
E: Oh, by the way, I think I forgot to ask — Mr. Boothill, do you know which department Skott's from?

C: 怎么回事，是星核的影响？匹诺康尼还能让人安心做梦么？
E: What happened? Is this because of the Stellaron? Geez, are we Penaconians never gonna dream in peace again?

C: 但即便如此，你也会偿还我的人情。毕竟我之于你，恩同再造。
E: Yet you will repay this favor all the same. After all, you're only alive today because of me. You owe me that much.

C: 也许歌斐木先生是在以一种代价较小的方式，向我展现他的人生经验：规则不存在完美的范式。如果维系者不能维持自省，曾经高尚的决策也会日渐卑劣。
E: Perhaps he was just using an approach with lighter consequences to show me what he'd learned in life: That there is never an ideal paradigm when it comes to rules. If the enforcer is incapable of introspection, then even regulations once laid down with the noblest of intentions will eventually become defiled.

C: 我还是孩子时，也会对这种悖论感到好奇，想一探究竟。
E: Children tend to be fascinated by such paradoxes. I was no exception.

C: 什么情况？！
E: Yeah, what's going on!?

C: 我也想变成好几个自己。
E: I want to clone copies of myself, too.

C: 停云小姐也变幽默了。
E: Hah, Miss Tingyun's got a sense of humor these days.

C: 这些是……
E: These are...

C: 这道不协和音，实在太刺耳了。
E: These dissonant sounds are much too harsh.

C: 这倒是小女子梦寐以求的珍宝，但将军毕竟身居高位，收不得这个。
E: That's the kind of treasure I've always yearned for, but the general's position won't allow him to accept such a gift.

C: 好主意。虽然随处可见，但终归是匹诺康尼的名产，带些回去正合适。
E: That's a good idea. It might be commonplace, but it's still the specialty of Penacony. It would make for an ideal gift to bring home.

C: 开个玩笑。
E: Just kidding.

C: 没有可能，对此我们早有定论。
E: No, this is a foregone conclusion.

C: 我会请你来完成。
E: I'll leave it to you.

C: 我想听大家的意见。
E: I want to hear everyone's opinion.

C: 这也是理所当然。既然如此，我会在列车离开阿斯德纳后，自行寻找一处合适的站点离去，不给各位添麻烦。
E: Of course, you have every reason to feel that way. In that case, I won't inconvenience you all any more than necessary. I'll find a stop to disembark at once the Express departs Asdana.

C: 如此前那样，一张字条被小心地放在了这块拼图旁边，似是有人始终领先一步——
E: Just as before, a note was placed carefully next to the puzzle, like someone got here a step earlier...

C: 星期日呢？
E: Where's Sunday?

C: 看来列车长预先准备的投票方案，已经不需要了帕。
E: Looks like Pom-Pom's voting plan won't be needed, after all!

C: 好平淡的反应。
E: You're taking it very calmly.

C: 没事的，姬子，我很乖的。大家先出发吧，等我恢复了，立刻就追上你们……
E: It's okay, Himeko. I'll be good on my own. Go ahead, guys! I'll catch up once I feel better...

C: 这次本姑娘没法跟着，你们可千万要留心啊……
E: I can't join you guys this time, but make sure to always look out for one another, okay...?

C: 这是…「同谐」？
E: Is this... the Harmony?

C: 哦，一点都不意外。
E: Hm. Why does that not surprise me?

C: 姬子，能麻烦你给她送去吗？
E: Can you bring it to her, Himeko?

C: 你想起自己和丹恒、三月七初遇的情景……
E: You recall the moment you first met Dan Heng and March 7th...

C: …先试试能不能联系上列车吧。
E: ...We should try making contact with the Express.

C: 那位老人刚才提到了「末世」，还说翁法罗斯哪里都不安全。请问这是……
E: The elder spoke of the "end times" just now and claimed that no place in Amphoreus is safe. What did he mean by that...?

C: 您怎么变成了这幅孩童模样？不对，我一介部族祭司，竟在您面前妄言信仰，真是不识好歹！请您恕罪……
E: Why do you look like a child? No, to think that I, a mere tribal priest, dared lecture you on faith. How ludicrous! Please forgive my transgressions...

C: 什么意思，你想说这里哪个不算市民？
E: What is that supposed to mean? Who are you implying isn't a citizen here?

C: …但我们的援军来了。
E: ...But now our backup is here.

C: 幸好你不是我的历史老师，沉沦于疯狂的家伙，说出来的话能有几分可信？
E: I'm so glad that you're not my history teacher. How much can we trust the words of someone who has sunk so deep into madness?

C: 那里……
E: Once there...

C: 「然后，三位命运泰坦编织了世界法则；三位支柱泰坦创造了大地、海洋和天空；三位创生泰坦捏造了生命、你、我——」
E: "The three Fate Titans wrote laws to govern the world, another three Foundation Titans created the earth, ocean, and skies, and a different three Creation Titans designed and gave life to human beings — like you and me."

C: 「泰坦们就震怒了，谁也不让谁，它们的子民也开始敌视对方、打打杀杀。」
E: "So, the Titans got angry, and no one was willing to give in. Their followers then decided to do the same, fighting and killing each other."

C: 这是什么陷阱…
E: Wha... Is this some kind of trap?

C: 但在翁法罗斯，天空更像是…一座监牢，就连谈论天外都成了一种禁忌。明明有着如此先进的技术……
E: The sky above Amphoreus, though, is more like... a prison. They clearly have advanced technology, so who could imagine that even discussing what's beyond the sky would be taboo?

C: …不合常理的事，实在太多了。
E: ...The list of inexplicable things only gets longer.

C: 说起来，遐蝶小姐也是黄金裔吗？
E: Speaking of which, is Miss Castorice also a Chrysos Heir?

C: 初次喂食，只拿一小块就好。
E: Since it's your first time feeding, just a small piece will do.

C: 拿取干燥的红土结晶。
E: Grab the crystallized dry redsoil.

C: 呜嗡嗡……
E: Grumph...

C: 你直勾勾地盯着手中的红色土块，然后又抬头确认了一下大地兽的眼神。
E: You stare intently at the red clay in your hand, then look up to check the dromas' expression.

C: 纵然黑潮淹没旧土，圣城终能渡往新世……
E: Though the black tide devours the ancient lands, the holy city will cross over to a new world...

C: 诸位公民，请停止传播来历不明的形象！
E: Dear citizens, please stop spreading images of unknown origins!

C: 我都快被他的执着打动了……
E: I'm almost moved by his persistence...

C: 谢谢，我们不需要。走吧。
E: No, thank you. Let's go.

C: 好吧。要是您改主意了，随时找我哈。
E: Alright, feel free to look for me at anytime if you change your mind.

C: 小号的入梦池？
E: Is this a mini Dreampool?

C: 公平公义公正在哪里？
E: Justice, fairness, impartiality, where art thou?

C: …这样啊。
E: ...I see.

C: 待到十二颗星宿全部被点亮之时，黄金裔们口中的「奇迹」便会被点亮——至少他们的神谕中是如此书写的。
E: When the twelve constellations align and shine, the "miracle" that the Chrysos Heirs speak of will illuminate — or so their prophecies claim.

C: 同意！
E: Agreed!

C: 局势并不明朗啊。
E: We're still looking at things through a clouded lens.

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actor

C: 要是悬锋城还留有昔日兵力，哪怕只剩半成，阿格莱雅也是在让我们送死。
E: If even half of Castrum Kremnos' old might remains, it would mean that Aglaea sent us to our deaths.

C: 也许翁法罗斯没那么封闭。
E: Maybe Amphoreus isn't that isolated after all.

C: 换句话说，我们有机会超过万敌了。
E: In other words, this is our chance to overtake Mydei.

C: 别看他表面老实，其实内心精明得很。
E: He might look honest, but he's a lot shrewder than he seems.

C: 既然如此，给{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的夺命一剑就由我们一起刺出，你说呢？
E: In that case, how about we deliver the final blow to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} together? What do you say?

C: 气息微弱，但它就在这里。我们与「纷争」的路途，即将交汇。
E: There's just a faint scent, but I'm certain they're here. We're about to cross paths with Strife.

C: 你有什么妙语？我洗耳恭听。
E: What do you propose? I'm all ears.

C: 除了使命和生存，没有其它动因能为暴力辩护。
E: Aside from one's mission and survival, no other reason can justify violence.

C: 它有个简单的名字：杀意。
E: It has a simple name: Intent to kill.

C: 不是这里，我住在内城。
E: Not here. I lived in the inner city.

C: 目的地是「命运三相殿」，也就是「万径之门」背后的建筑——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}栖身于神殿的最深处，我们必须找到它，说服它同我们合作。
E: The Temple of the Three Fates is behind the Gate of Infinity, and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is at the very heart of this temple. We're going to have to find {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and convince them to help us in our battle.

C: 想想看…这应该不难。
E: Let's think about it... It shouldn't be that difficult.

C: 从这个角度重新认识自己…有些怪异。
E: Getting to know myself from a different perspective... feels a little strange.

C: 我们是伙伴，我不希望有任何事物挡在我们中间，包括疑虑。
E: We're partners, and I don't want anything to come between us, not even doubt.

C: 记忆…收集。拼凑，完整。
E: Memory... collected. Piece together, complete.

C: 他们…是你的伙伴吗？
E: They... are your companions?

C: 讲给我听吧。你早就习惯同我倾诉了，不是吗？
E: Tell me what's on your mind. You're used to confiding in me by now, aren't you?

C: 为了彻底打败尼卡多利。
E: To vanquish Nikador for good.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，你还好吗？刚才……
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, are you feeling alright? You were—

C: 完成。记忆，收集。
E: Done. Memory, collected.

C: 伙伴，相信！出发，悬锋！
E: Friend, trust! Go, Kremnos!

C: 阿、阿格莱雅大人！您、您怎么会……
E: L—Lady Aglaea! Wh—What brings you...

C: 谁在那？赶在金线还未沾染你的血滴之前，现身吧。
E: Show yourself now, before golden thread is stained with your blood.

C: 你怎么这么清楚？
E: How are you so sure about it?

C: 你是…尼卡多利的一部分？
E: You're... a part of Nikador?

C: …那你呢，格奈乌斯阁下？
E: ...What about you, Lord Gnaeus?

C: （不能留下痕迹，避免他人起疑。）
E: (I need to ensure I leave no trace behind, so that no one suspects anything.)

C: 那么…你捋清了吗？
E: Have you... thought things through then?

C: 因为我认为一定有其它解法。<color=#dbc291ff>「比翁法罗斯的命运更为重要之物」…这个题面对你来说太过残酷，太不公平。</color>
E: Because I knew there must be another solution. <color=#dbc291ff>"Something more important than the fate of Amphoreus"... It is far too cruel and unfair to ask that of you.</color>

C: 是啊，幸好有他们。
E: Yeah, it's a good thing we had them.

C: 那刻夏老师教授的科目是…炼金术入门，还有神话史。平心而论，是学生最害怕的两门课程。
E: The courses Professor Anaxa taught were... Introduction to Alchemy and History of Mythology. To be perfectly honest, those two courses were the students' greatest nightmares.

C: 算了，这都是后话…现在，我只希望阁下平安度过试炼，得到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福。
E: Forget it. Let's talk about this in the future... For now, I only hope that you'll be able to complete the trial safely and obtain {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s blessing.

C: 没错。但问题在于，元老院中有不怀好意的极端分子。他们将公民大会视作制衡黄金裔的手段，想以此彻底控制逐火之旅。
E: That is correct. However, the problem lies in the fact that there are ill-intentioned extremists in the Council of Elders. They view the citizens' assembly as a way to restrain the Chrysos Heirs and hope to take complete control over the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 而于此交还它的，是我等黄金裔推举出的两位英雄：一位正直果敢的旅者，与一只招来奇迹的圣兽。
E: It shall now be returned by the two elected heroes of the Chrysos Heirs: a traveler who is upright and courageous and a sacred beast that invokes miracles.

C: 降落到翁法罗斯时，我们的车厢被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的长矛贯穿了。还记得当时的情境么？在重渊的废墟，我是这么说的——
E: When we landed on Amphoreus, our car was pierced by {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s lance. Do you remember? Back in the ruins of the Abyss, this was what I said:

C: 其实…我的转述有些轻描淡写，真实状况要复杂得多。
E: Actually... My account kind of made light of the situation. What actually happened was much more complicated.

C: 然后，然后……
E: And then, and then...

C: 你侵犯到我的个人空间了。
E: You're invading my personal space.

C: 但那也许…并非坏事。彷徨意味着时间…在{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的五指掠走一切前，我们还有机会将{F#她}{M#他}寻回。
E: But perhaps... it might not be a bad thing. If your soul is still wandering around, it means that we still have time... We have a chance to find it before the fingers of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} sweep everything away.

C: 怎么，事到如今，终于留恋起尘世来了？
E: What is it? Are you finally starting to become attached to the mortal world now?

C: 是你？我没想到你会亲自出面接见。
E: It's you? I never expected that you would personally come and meet me.

C: 呵，那就说明翁法罗斯人编撰的神话，连笑话都不如。
E: Heh, in that case, the myths crafted by the people of Amphoreus are nothing more than pitiful jests.

C: 谨遵吩咐。感谢您的配合。
E: As you wish. Your cooperation is much appreciated.

C: 笑话！你们这群渎神的异端，配不得至高之神尊重。
E: Surely you jest! You blasphemous heretics are not worthy of respect from the supreme being.

C: （能从旁人口中听到这件事，看来凯妮斯确实带着些诚意。事情或许比我想象得要顺利些……）
E: (Seeing as we were able to hear of this matter from the mouths of others, it seems that Caenis is indeed quite sincere toward us. Perhaps this affair will proceed smoother than I had anticipated...)

C: 呵呵…难道说，汝是出于这种缘由，才在树庭遇袭时妄图炼化吾之灵魂不成？
E: Heheh... Was this the reason why you failed in your attempt to refine my soul when you were ambushed at the Grove?

C: 各位，退下吧。
E: Everyone, stand down.

C: 怎会如此……
E: How could that be...?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>某人灵魂的样貌。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The souls of people.</color>

C: 这…信息量也太大了。
E: That's... a lot to take in at once.

C: 不…不行…
E: I—I can't...

C: 先不说这个了。我们到了，阁下。
E: Let's put that aside for the moment. We've arrived.

C: 果然是她。
E: So it's her.

C: 我们追。
E: We must pursue her.

C: 你要多少我给多少，开个价吧。
E: Name your price. I'll give you however much you want.

C: 出现了！说话带「喵」的角色…
E: At last! A character that meows has appeared!

C: 更换接头地的原因是……
E: So why are you changing the meeting place...?

C: 不必那样形容，{NICKNAME}阁下……
E: You don't have to describe it like that, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}...

C: 生者，别浪费时间较量口舌了。冥界的「怒火」将至……
E: Living ones, don't waste your time bickering. The nether realm's "wrath" is falling upon you...

C: 万敌阁下，你愿意与我们同行吗？
E: Lord Mydei, are you willing to travel with us?

C: 早知道…应该多拍一些的啊……
E: If I had known... I would have taken more pictures...

C: 正是，你果然如我想象的那样聪慧，但……
E: Yes. You're just as smart as I imagined, but...

C: 有限的生命…塑造了我们热爱且熟知的一切。即便是「死亡」的泰坦，也无权再将它从人的身上剥离。
E: Our limited lifespan shapes all that we know and love... Not even the Death Titan has the right to take that away from humankind again.

C: 你知道吗？我的姐姐，是个善解人意、又有些敏感的人。每当她有心事，却又说不出口的时候，就会躲避别人的视线，望向远方……
E: You know, my sister was a sympathetic but rather sensitive person. Whenever she didn't want to say what was on her mind, she would avoid eye contact and look off into the distance...

C: 在久远的过去，有一对同心的双子。根据预言，她们被选中成为「死亡」之神的递补。
E: A long, long time ago, there were a pair of like-minded twins. As foretold in the prophecy, they were chosen to be successors to the god of "Death."

C: …对不起。
E: ...I'm sorry.

C: 我们，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的职责，从来都不是拣选生命，只有看顾它们而已。
E: Our responsibility as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} was never about picking out favorite souls. We were only meant to watch over life.

C: 不为久别重逢的拥抱，而为以手还手，实现报应……
E: Not to embrace one another after a long separation, but to come in search of retribution.

C: 看得再仔细些！看看被那些华贵的衣袍所遮盖的，是人的热肠？还是害虫的毒腺？
E: Examine them closely! Beneath all that finery, do you see the good heart of a human... or the poisonous glands of a pest?

C: （这是…什么地方？）
E: (What... is this place?)

C: 生死有命，但不是现在。
E: Life and death are predetermined, but yours life doesn't end here.

C: 我可没这么说。
E: Those are your words, not mine.

C: 那是…遐蝶？
E: Is that... Castorice?

C: 别了，「大表演家」。愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
E: Farewell, Great Performer. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.

C: 当然。吾在此立誓见证：神悟树庭「智种学派」的阿那克萨戈拉斯，业已战胜理性之试炼。
E: Very. I hereby swear I have borne witness: Anaxagoras of the Nousporists and the Grove of Epiphany has successfully overcome the trial of Reason.

C: ——那就让我们身后的诸位人子，亲自代你我一探究竟吧。
E: We should allow the children of humanity who come after us to investigate in our stead.

C: …哦？这倒有点意思。
E: ...Oh? How interesting.

C: 对——但不是像你们那样傻乎乎地靠肉身闯关。
E: Yes, but not in the flesh, like you all foolishly did.

C: 嚯…那就是翁法罗斯？外形还真是别具一格。
E: Oh... So that's Amphoreus? Its appearance is — well — sure is unique.

C: 啊，姐姐说，她还需要些时间照看花朵……
E: Oh, my sister needs more time to make sure the flowers are fine...

C: 没想到您还是应了凯妮斯大人的邀请…真是太好了。
E: I didn't expect you to agree to Lady Caenis' invitation... What a wonderful turn of events.

C: 你还真检索啊，把我的脑子当成什么了？
E: You're really searching through my brain? What are you treating it as, some sort of toy?

C: 但那刻夏阁下属于「智种学派」？我听闻那是反对者众多的一派。
E: Yet, it seems you subscribe to the Nousporists instead, Lord Anaxa? I've heard that this school of thought is one with many detractors.

C: （这么一看，和遥远的星神相比，泰坦与人类的距离…要近得多。）
E: (In this regard, Titans can be said to be a lot more similar to humans than Aeons are...)

C: …亲手实践这些猜想，不计代价。
E: ...I'd put my theories to the test, no matter the cost.

C: 呵呵…不过，恕吾直言：在如此悬殊的力量面前，是人，或是大地兽，有何殊异呢？
E: Heh... Before such power, does it make any difference whether you're a human or a dromas?

C: 元老院不会给出空口承诺。诸位请看，站在我身边的人——
E: Know that the Council of Elders is never one to make empty promises. Look at who we have on our side...

C: 平衡已被打破，结果已经明朗。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，以神礼观众之名，我见到——
E: With the balance shattered, the result is clear. By {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} above, as the Theoros, I have observed...

C: 阿格莱雅啊，阿格莱雅…是什么让你心肠变软，口舌不似当年锋快了？
E: Aglaea, dear Aglaea... What has caused your heart to soften? You also don't seem to be as quick-witted as before?

C: 我会等你的。事关重大…{NICKNAME}阁下应该知道整个过程。
E: I will wait for you. This matter is of great consequence... and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} should hear the entire story from beginning to end.

C: 哦？我还以为是「死者为大」之类的呢。
E: Oh? I thought the moral might be closer to something like "honor the dead."

C: 你是想说…「死」和「生」无异，都是迈向「死亡」的旅途？
E: Are you trying to say that... there is no difference between living and dying, for they are both journeys that lead toward Death?

C: 贤者之石，「智种学派」的杰作，以贤人的血肉为根基，将其全数智慧炼就而成的实体。
E: The Nousporists' masterpiece: the Philosopher's Stone. It was made by transmuting all of the Sages' wisdom into a single entity, with their flesh and blood as its foundation.

C: 吾只是想说：那石子乃是汝用心脏炼成而来的罢？
E: I merely wanted to ask: Was that stone transmuted from your heart?

C: …便是对「人」倾注了太多奢侈的期望啊。
E: ...was placing far too much hope in humanity.

C: 若您愿放我一条生路，<color=#dbc291ff>我会让子子孙孙世代传颂您的史诗，直到末世掩埋所有文明和传说。</color>
E: Should you grant me a chance at life, <color=#dbc291ff>I will ensure that your epic is passed down through generations, sung by my descendants until the end times buries all civilizations and legends.</color>

C: 那就投你所好，让你尝尝「侵晨」的烈焰吧！
E: Indulge in this, and taste the fiery blaze of Dawnmaker!

C: Hafau...Deus…
E: Hafau... Deus...

C: …至少，我们能抚慰世界的痛苦！
E: ...At least, we can soothe the world's pain!

C: 面具之下到底藏着何种面孔，就让我来瞅瞅——
E: Let me take a look at what's hidden under that mask —

C: 无法逃离……
E: Can't escape...

C: 高估了自己啊……
E: I overestimated myself...

C: 不用思考其他办法啦，这样…已经能解决问题了。
E: Don't waste time thinking about alternatives. This... this will resolve everything.

C: 那孤独的剑士告别一切，只身浸入疯狂之海时，我就在岸边聆听；那伟岸的霸主卸下战甲，以铁骨填平大地的裂隙时，我就在山巅俯瞰。
E: When that lone swordmaster left everything behind, plunging into a sea of madness, I was on the shore, listening. When that mighty lord shed his armor, filling the crevices of the earth with his iron bones, I was on the mountain top, gazing down.

C: 呃啊——！
E: Uwah —!

C: 每次都这么提心吊胆的…
E: Always keeping me on edge...

C: 感谢你们愿意帮忙。为了迎战艾格勒，还有潜在的威胁…我必须磨砺自己，用最激进的手段。
E: Thanks for the help. To face Aquila and other potential threats, I must sharpen myself with the most aggressive methods.

C: 《一拳神王•艾格勒卷》
E: One Punch God: Aquila

C: 不过现在的翁法罗斯，好像也没有可以钓鱼的地方？
E: But then again, are there even any spots left to fish in Amphoreus these days?

C: cos服不错啊。
E: Nice cosplay.

C: 风堇姑娘……
E: Miss Hyacine...

C: 果真如此么？但你脸上的伤痕和泥印，却在给我讲述另外一个故事。
E: Is that so? But the scars and mud stains on your face tell another story.

C: 这个时候…要不要求助于又大、又吵、又笨重的「扎格列斯之手」？
E: Should we call on that big, noisy, cumbersome Hand of Zagreus?

C: 那裁缝女——她全都在听着呢。
E: That seamstress, she's listening.

C: 熊熊火种在胸中凝结~胸中凝结~凝结！
E: Twinkle, twinkle, in my chest~ How this Coreflame is the best!

C: …超越时~空~逐火旅~途~
E: ...Go beyond all time and space~ On the Journey of Flame-Chase~

C: 这是她的委托。自己的死亡，她早已预见。
E: This was her commission. Her death, she had long foreseen.

C: 即便算上多洛斯传说中的三百侠盗…我依然坚信，你会是唯一能够承载「诡计」神职的命运之女。
E: I am convinced that you're the only one who can bear the authority of Trickery, even if you have to contend with the legendary three hundred master thieves of Dolos.

C: …那刻夏老师，我看日程表上明明还有其它课啊？你是不是搞错了什……
E: ...Professor Anaxa, there are still other classes scheduled on the calendar! Are you sure you didn't —

C: 这说法倒是有趣。不妨再多解释一下吧，助讲。
E: An interesting description. Do explain, assistant.

C: 你相信传说吗？
E: Do you believe in legends?

C: 那是昏光庭院的<color=#dbc291ff>「西风罗盘」，我们可以用它创造出供人行走的微缩彩虹桥。</color>说不定，能靠它前往晨昏之眼的其它区域。
E: That's a <color=#dbc291ff>West Wind Compass of the Twilight Courtyard. We can use it to create a miniature rainbow bridge to walk on.</color> Who knows, it might even lead us to other areas of the Eye of Twilight.

C: 「黄金裔」…在我们的时代，那名号会掀起激愤的浪潮。但你们看上去却是受人尊崇的英雄。
E: "Chrysos Heirs"... In our time, that title used to stir up waves of outrage. But you all seem to be revered as heroes.

C: 记忆中的晖之民们陷入了沉默。哪怕在烈日光芒的修饰下，他们的神情仍然暗如尘灰。
E: The Sunfolks in the memory fall silent. Their expressions are ashen despite being under the bright sunlight.

C: 传说塞涅俄丝的父亲是一位晖之民战士，终日在外漂泊征战，很少回到晨昏之眼。她的童年，更多是在身为雨之民祭司的母亲身边度过的。
E: Legend has it Seliose's father was a Sunfolk warrior who spent his years fighting and rarely returned to the Eye of Twilight. Her childhood was mostly spent beside her mother, a Rainfolk priest.

C: 说不定它不想胜之不武。
E: It could also be that they didn't want to win unfairly.

C: 我们的胜利没有迎来欢呼或庆贺。恐惧的人群乱作一团，放声哭喊，相互践踏……
E: Our victory brought no cheers or celebrations. The terrified crowd became chaotic, screaming and trampling each other...

C: 总算…但愿这能修好浑象仪。
E: We've finally made it... Hopefully this is enough to fix the celestial globe.

C: 即便风堇接过了天空的神权，她恐怕也无法驱散这片黑暗……
E: Even if Hyacine takes the divine authority of the sky, she probably won't be able to banish this darkness...

C: 对。最坏的打算…我们必须时刻准备好归还刻法勒的火种。
E: Right. Worst case scenario... We need to be prepared to return Kephale's Coreflame at any moment.

C: 那刻夏老师教会我的，不止课本上的知识。
E: Professor Anaxa taught me more than just what was in the textbooks.

C: 别管她，{NICKNAME}…专注于目标吧。
E: Leave her, {NICKNAME}... Focus on the objective.

C: 因为那就是你们的使命…你们踏上的「命途」。
E: Because that's your mission... the Path you follow.

C: …缇宁老师！
E: ...Trinnon!

C: 干得好，我们下山。
E: Good job. Now we can get off the mountain.

C: …哈托努斯！
E: ...Chartonus!

C: 它就在您身旁，陪伴您走过了这段漫长的征途。
E: It's been by your side, accompanying you throughout this long journey.

C: 哎呀，你脑袋上怎么还有落叶。难道又躺在树上睡觉了，还是麦田？收拾干净再出门呀。
E: Look at you, leaves in your hair! Were you sleeping in a tree again, or was it the wheat fields this time? At least brush yourself off before wandering around.

C: 哦，什么好东西争来争去的？来让我看看……
E: What's got you two so worked up? Here, show me...

C: 好别致的神谕牌。
E: Nice cards, all looking good.

C: 不不不，这很明显是被人掉包了……
E: No way, someone's switched them out...

C: 灾难就是你踏上旅途的原因。
E: This calamity is what sets you on your journey.

C: （白厄也在。还有…万敌，缇宁？）
E: (Hold on. Phainon's here too? And is that Mydei and Trinnon?)

C: 是么？可我连自己为什么站在这里，都不太确定。
E: That so? I don't even know why I'm standing here right now.

C: …果然，你也是这么想的。
E: ...Looks like we really are on the same wavelength.

C: 「然而，谨记——」
E: "However, heed this..."

C: 我扮演的，到底是什么人？
E: And whose role am I playing?

C: 黑潮，终究还是席卷了世界……
E: So, in the end, the black tide still swallowed everything...

C: 不，我相信你。我只想请求你，与我共同见证「再创世」……
E: No, I know you can... I just wanted to request that you witness the Era Nova with me.

C: 原谅我吧：我必须翦除一切隐患，为新世界编织最坚韧的未来。
E: Forgive me. I must snip away every risk, to weave the strongest future for the new world.

C: 我们是为了回应世界的愿望而启程的，对吧？
E: We set out on this journey to answer the world's desire, didn't we?

C: 嗯…一点小小的勇气和决心？开玩笑的，其实答案很简单啦——
E: Hmm... A little courage and determination? Just kidding, the answer is pretty simple—

C: 与其让火种沦为黑潮的给养，不如由我来成为它们的容器，阻止「再创世」到来。哪怕要燃尽这肉体也无妨，只要我不曾熄灭，逐火就不会终结……
E: Rather than let the Coreflames become nourishment for the black tide, I'll become their vessel, to prevent the arrival of Era Nova. Even if I have to burn through my own body, it's no matter. As long as I don't extinguish, the Flame-Chase will never end...

C: 我是来道别的。或许，我们不会再见了。
E: I'm here to say goodbye. We might not see each other again.

C: 刻法勒永志不忘。
E: Kephale will never forget this.

C: 既狡猾…又天真。
E: Cunning... and yet so naive.

C: …这取决于你的态度。至少目前为止，在你问出了这句话的那些轮回里…结局没有那么残忍。
E: ...That depends on your attitude. At least so far, in the cycles where you've asked this question... the endings haven't been so cruel.

C: 哪怕只是徒劳，你们…我们，都有选择的权利。
E: Even if it's futile, you... we all have the right to choose.

C: 两千四百零四万…一千一百…八十三枚。
E: Twenty-four million... forty-one thousand... one hundred and eighty-three.

C: …真是太沉重了。
E: ...Such a heavy burden.
Ah...

C: 可别哭鼻子啦！桀桀桀桀桀——
E: Don't cry now! Heh, heh, heh—

C: 征服此世，或受我征服——
E: Conquer this world, or be conquered by me—

C: 用金色的火焰…填满天空。
E: Fill the sky with golden fire.

C: 所以，不断把大门推远的，一直在劝阻我的声音…就是你吗？
E: Wait, that was you? Pushing the gate away, sending those warnings?

C: 它的背后是「来古士」，妄图操纵一切的黑幕，真是不可饶恕。
E: "Lygus" is the mastermind behind it, the one who's trying to control everything. How unforgivable.

C: 我不仅在，还顺手救了你4次——在你不知道的时候。
E: Not only am I here, but I also happened to have saved you four times already... without you even being aware of it, of course.

C: 「铁墓」不是早就存在了吗？
E: Hasn't Irontomb been around for a long time?

C: 他把「负世」的使命交给了我。
E: He entrusted the duty of Worldbearing to me.

C: 没有其他要确认的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 同胞们哪！勿要再跪拜残暴的恶敌，勿要再跪拜已死与将死的神明！
E: Compatriots, no more kneeling! Not to brutal tyrants, and not to dead or dying gods!

C: 他们的金血书写了悲惨的命运——但，我的金血会将这命运逆转！
E: Their golden blood wrote of a tragic fate. Mine shall overturn it!

C: 是！
E: Yes, Imperator!

C: 恭迎凯撒回銮！
E: Hail to the Imperator!

C: 有劳诸位镇守圣城。近况如何？
E: Guards, your service to the holy city is appreciated. How have things been?

C: 这位是来自悬锋城的「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，凯撒大人的御用史官。
E: This is Verginia of Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and imperial scribe of the Great Imperator.

C: 那么，请再告诉我：你将如何运用此种伟力，引领世人……
E: Then, please tell me more: How will you use this great power to guide the people...?

C: 吼、吼吼…闲话少叙，就按两位要求，奥赫玛今天最新的讯息来咯——
E: Roarrr, enough small talk. Here's the latest news from Okhema, as you requested...

C: 欸，一瞬间就整装待发了？海瑟音小姐，真是深不可测……
E: Eh, all ready to go in an instant? Miss Hysilens, you truly are impossible to predict...

C: 什么同盟会议…可笑！
E: Alliance Meeting... ridiculous!

C: 好啊——侍从，再拿十罐蜜酿来，今天我要把他喝到不能直立行走！
E: Fine by me. Attendant! Bring us ten more jars of honey brew! I'm gonna make sure he can't even stand straight by the end of this!

C: 讨伐法吉娜…是不是要到海里去作战？
E: Campaigning against Phagousa... Does that mean we need to fight in the ocean?

C: 是我的私人请求。我…无法信任那位神礼官。
E: This is my personal request. I... can't bring myself to trust that Theoros.

C: 呃，好像是有点喝多了…没想到果汁也能上头。
E: I think I had too much... Didn't think you could get drunk on fruit juice.

C: 讨伐泰坦…真的有必要吗？
E: Is it... really necessary to campaign against the Titans?

C: 我们真是好久、好久都没有见面了……
E: We haven't seen each other for such a long, long time...

C: 所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
E: So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.

C: 又一个幻影？我不会上当了…
E: Another illusion? I won't be tricked again...

C: 历历在目，对么？
E: It's as if they all happened just yesterday, right?

C: 荒笛已经陨落，两位天才杳无音信，刻律德菈也拥抱了她的命运，这样下去……
E: Terravox has fallen, the two geniuses vanished without a trace, and Cerydra embraced her fate... At this rate...

C: 别忘记，出于「律法」…你也无法杀死预言中的黄金裔。
E: Don't forget... You can't kill the Chrysos Heirs mentioned in the prophecy because of Law.

C: 此人眼界超凡，无畏牺牲。这场「裂魂仪式」不仅是我的决断，更源于他的谏言。他的智谋必将成为翁法罗斯存续的中坚力量——
E: He has extraordinary insight and fears no sacrifice. This Soul-Rending Ceremony wasn't just my decision. It was his counsel. His wisdom will surely be the backbone of Amphoreus' survival.

C: 还记得么？涡心本就归{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}所有，而世上为数不多的幸存者里，恰好还有一位「海洋」的半神。
E: The Vortex belongs to {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} in the first place, remember? And there happens to be a Demigod of Ocean among the few survivors in the world.

C: 接力的最后一环，由我回到命运三相殿，为欧洛尼斯讲述这些故事，把大家写下的每一页，都装进「记忆」的小瓶子里……
E: As the last link in the relay, I will return to the Temple of the Three Fates, tell Oronyx all of our stories, and bottle every page we've written into the little flask of "memories"...

C: 还是拿进度条举例吧。铁墓现在的进度条处在<unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>的位置，通过这次被改写的「再创世」，我们有信心能让它回退到<unbreak>96%</unbreak>…咳，保守点，<unbreak>97%</unbreak>吧。
E: Let's take the progress bar as an example. Irontomb's progress bar is currently at <unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>, and through this rewritten "Era Nova," we're confident we can push it back to <unbreak>96%</unbreak>... Hmm, let's be conservative, say <unbreak>97%</unbreak>.

C: 我们走吧，她的歌声，等同女王的敕令。
E: Let's go. Her voice carries the queen's command.

C: 姐妹们，不要放弃，别忘了女王许诺的欢宴——那座名为斯缇科西亚的城邦！
E: Sisters, don't give up. Remember the queen's promise of a feast... in the city called Styxia!

C: …再见了，姐妹。我会完成最后的使命，再来布置你们的宴席。
E: ...Farewell, sisters. I'll finish this last task, then return to prepare your feast.

C: 现在，我找到一团火光。即便过于灼热滚烫，却也是唯一的明亮。
E: Now, I've found a flame. It may scald and burn, but it's the only light.

C: 我于岸上徘徊，终于觅见一簇火焰，又将它亲手掐灭……
E: I wandered the shore, found a flicker of flame... only to snuff it out with my own hand.

C: 白白牺牲？你错了——他们的金血不会白流，众爵已为我铺好了成为「律法」神明的道路。
E: Die in vain? No, you're wrong. Their golden blood won't be spilled for nothing. The other dukes have paved the road for me to become the god of Law.

C: 若你已不再与我共享愿景，不再承认我将为翁法罗斯编织崭新的「律法」，那就尽管夺走我的性命吧……
E: If you no longer share my vision or believe in the new Law I seek to weave for Amphoreus, then go on and end me...

C: 往最后的刑场——将我处决，或被我处决。
E: To the final execution ground, where I shall be executed, or be the executioner.

C: 漫长的守候很煎熬吧？
E: Your long wait must have felt like torture.

C: 来古士的思想寄宿于「神话之外」。他既是实验内部的推动者，也是外部的观测者。
E: Lygus's cognition resides in the Exomyth. He is both an instigator within the experiment and the observer outside of it.

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。分开的这段时间，有没有想念人家？
E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Did you miss me while you were away?

C: 在忆质充盈的环境下，生命体知觉有一定概率产生某种关联。即便在空间上相隔极远，也能感知彼此的状态变化。我将这种现象称为「忆域纠缠」。
E: Lifeforms living in that environment abundant with memoria have a chance to connect their perceptions with each other's. Even across great spatial divides, they're able to detect shifts in one another's states. I call this phenomenon "Memory Zone Entanglement."

C: 翁法罗斯，我们…必须击碎旧律，成为星间新的秩序。
E: We... No... Amphoreus must shatter the old law and become the new order among the stars.

C: 或许，我自己也不明白吧。到最后都不知道自己该游向何处。
E: Perhaps even I don't know what I want. I still don't know where I should swim to, even at the end.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」和祂的孩子们，也将趁虚而入，抵达战场？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Remembrance and THEIR children might have taken this opportunity to join the fray as well?</color>

C: 「岁月」火种…没有被归还？
E: The Coreflame of Time... was never returned?

C: 而且，这也是三月七所希望的喔。
E: Besides, that's what March 7th wanted.

C: 他们，都是被诱导到这里的人……
E: They are all humans who got lured into this place...

C: 何不一起踏入其中？你有资格与我同行，将这扇门背后的秘密尽收眼底……
E: Why don't we step into it together? As someone qualified to walk with me, you can now take in all the secrets behind this door...

C: 这一次，该从哪一页讲起呢？让我看看……
E: Where should I start this time? Lemme see...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>密钥封装，已完成。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Encryption key encapsulation complete.</color>

C: 哀丽秘榭再过几千年，也会变成这样吗？
E: Would Aedes Elysiae end up looking like this after a few thousand years?

C: 难怪，这才是你挟持我的理由……
E: So that's why you took me here...

C: 三月七的房间
E: March 7th's Room

C: 最后一枚密钥，带走它吧。
E: That's the last encryption key. Take it with you.

C: 精魄，变成了一本手账？
E: The spirit... turned into a journal?

C: 奥赫玛、悬锋城、树庭…这几张都不错。不得不说，你的技术快赶上三月了。
E: Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove... these shots are all pretty great. I have to say, your skills are almost on par with March's now.

C: 很简单：「如果『再创世』过程中发生任何异常，立即剔除所有外来因素——无论『记忆』，还是『开拓』——十二枚火种将以最纯粹的『毁灭』完成最后的『再创世』。」
E: Simple. "If any anomaly occurs during the Era Nova process, all foreign elements will be eliminated immediately — whether it's the Remembrance or the Trailblaze — and the twelve Coreflames will complete the final Era Nova through the purest form of Destruction."

C: 感激不尽，星期日先生。
E: Many thanks, Mr. Sunday.

C: 「长夜月」…她消失了？
E: Evernight... she's gone?

C: 哈哈，年轻人就是爱开玩笑。
E: Ah, young people. Always full of jokes.

C: （丹恒…居然这么主动？真不像他。）
E: (Huh... Dan Heng, being this forward? That's not like him at all.)

C: 「千万不要放弃，{NICKNAME}……」
E: "No matter what, don't give up, {NICKNAME}..."

C: 我希望你，不要把它当作某种预言。引导你走到这一刻的，是你自己做出的选择。
E: I don't want you to consider this a prophecy. You arrived at this moment because of the decisions you made.

C: 但后者的概率，微乎其微。
E: But the probability of the latter is very low.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>该轮到我，向这个世界施压了。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's my turn to put some pressure on this world.</color>

C: 唯有一桩「背叛」，我无法释怀。
E: There was one "betrayal" I could never forget.

C: 「岁月」的陌客降临在我面前。名为「记忆」的天外伟力…不可思议。
E: "Time's" strange visitor appeared before me. The great power from beyond the sky called the Remembrance... It's incredible.

C: 是她留下的塔拉萨特产，专为这一趟聚会准备的。
E: It's a specialty from Thalassa that she brought and left here just for this gathering.

C: 方才，从漩涡深处被一同打捞上来的，还有这道小蝶鱼的记忆。
E: Along with you, this little butterflyfish's memory was also salvaged from the depths of that whirlpool.

C: 出发吧，拯救这个世界。
E: Let's go and save this world.

C: 远方的建筑群，都是被封葬的数据么……
E: Are those distant structures... all entombed data?

C: 「<color=#dbc291ff>那道将忆庭隔绝在外的阻力就消失了。</color>」
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"...That obstructive force preventing the Garden from entry disappeared."</color>

C: 「<color=#dbc291ff>善见…天……</color>」
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Eden... of Blessed Insight..."</color>

C: 来古士……
E: Lygus...

C: 那…我会告诉你。对于你漫长的旅途，这两个名字只出现弹指一挥间。
E: Then... I'll tell you that those two names only appeared for a blink of an eye in your long journey.

C: 除去启程的信念，我已忘记一切。就连这副身躯，也和你的话语一样陌生。
E: I have forgotten everything except the belief I had when I set off. Even this body is as alien to me as your words.

C: 陵墓之所以得名，不正是因为寄宿其中的——只是往日的遗骸么？
E: Isn't that exactly why it's called a tomb? Because it only houses the remains of what once was.

C: 原来如此，你还是害怕了——害怕重蹈覆辙，自己的造物再度失去控制，只能用这种方式，把它变成一具傀儡。
E: I see. So you were afraid, after all. Afraid of history repeating itself, of losing control over your creation yet again. You had to resort to turning it into a mere puppet.

C: 完成最后的「再创世」吧。
E: Come. Let us complete the final Era Nova.

C: 罗浮已将列车视作重要盟友，我们也无意隐瞒，「铁墓」一役，确有仙舟所求之物。
E: The Luofu already considers the Express an important ally. We also have no intention of hiding the fact that there is indeed something the Xianzhou seeks from this Irontomb operation.

C: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与家族代表联系……
E: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact The Family representative...

C: 可「长夜月」给出了截然相反的说法。她认为：<color=#dbc291ff>那座大墓从始至终都是「空房」</color>。
E: But "Evernight" said the opposite. She believed <color=#dbc291ff>that tomb was empty from the start</color>.

C: 他不在这里。
E: He's not here.

C: 「以您的智慧，想必不是难事。」
E: "It shouldn't be too hard for someone with your insight."

C: 正是。如此一来，星空将铭记一对伟大的君臣……
E: Indeed. This way, the stars shall remember a great sovereign and her faithful retainer...

C: 「正是。不再是弥合破碎的『愿望』……」
E: "Exactly. It's no longer about mending broken wishes..."

C: 阿雅……
E: Agy...

C: 「抱歉，只是习惯。」
E: "Sorry, force of habit."

C: 整片星空都将是你们的旅伴。
E: The entire cosmos will be your travelling companion.

C: 明天，群星会将逐火之旅的故事口口相传。
E: Tomorrow, the stars will sing of the story of the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 我明白，为了翁法罗斯！
E: I understand. For Amphoreus!

C: 毕竟，我是最棒的无名客。
E: After all, I am the best Nameless.

C: 人们会明白，一次又一次，当站在命运的岔路口，他们不曾做出其他选择。
E: People will come to understand that, time and time again, when they stood at the crossroads of fate, they would never have chosen otherwise.
Who is it!?

C: 以往昔的「记忆」，「开拓」来日的命运——
E: Using the Remembrance of the past, we will Trailblaze tomorrow's destiny—

C: 纷争月，我成为永恒「巡猎」的荣光——
E: In the Month of Strife, I become the glory of the eternal Hunt...

C: 你没揩油吧？
E: You're not trying to get handsy, are you?

C: 那三位大人，已经在旁边聊了好一阵啦。
E: Those three have been chatting over there for quite a while now.

C: 这世上没有任何一种语言，一行文字，能托得起这段旅途的重量。既然如此，就不必再囿于细微的字眼……
E: No language in this world, no written words, could ever carry the weight of this journey. In that case, let's not be bound by the minutia of words...

C: 帝王身后，忠臣必将紧随。她强大的气场，恐怕也只有剑旗爵能衬托得起了。
E: Where the Emperor leads, loyal subjects must follow. I guess only the Dux Gladiorum could possibly match that kind of overwhelming presence.

C: 不论等在前方的是欢宴还是虚无…我都会找到它的辉光，并将之歌颂。
E: Whether it's a feast or the Nihility that awaits ahead... I will find its radiance and sing its praises.

C: 「预言」收到，乘以一千~
E: "Prophecy" received, times a thousand~

C: 近似半神议会的温和制度才是文明长存的保证。依我之见，银河中的大部分文明都将演化至此种形态。
E: A moderate system, similar to the Demigod Council, is the only guarantee of a long-lasting civilization. In my view, most civilizations across the cosmos will eventually evolve into this form.

C: 可我明明只是想说：「别放弃，{NICKNAME}会找到你」…「记忆」可真是奇妙呀。
E: All I wanted to say was, "Don't give up. {NICKNAME} will find you"... "Memory" truly is amazing.

C: 但现在，我终于确信……
E: But now, I finally understand...

C: 就是我们共同的{RUBY_B#哀丽秘榭}故乡{RUBY_E#}呀。
E: It leads to the place we both call {RUBY_B#Aedes Elysiae}home{RUBY_E#}.

C: 如果…我不那样做……
E: And if I don't do that...

C: 而后，知晓这个故事的人们，望向银河时会惊讶地发现：漫天繁星被镀上了粉色，而十三秒后，这一抹明媚的光芒就会悄悄褪去。
E: Later, when the people who know this story gaze upon the cosmos, they will discover that the countless stars in the sky now glow pink. And after thirteen seconds, that radiant light will quietly fade away.

C: 这是多么浪漫，却又令人疑惑的景象呀。
E: It will be such a romantic yet puzzling sight!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>昔涟</color>}PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>{RUBY_E#}消失的真相：一场「记忆」的谎言。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As we reveal the truth behind {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Cyrene</color>}PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>{RUBY_E#}'s disappearance: A lie by the Remembrance.</color>

C: 花开花落，多美的结局。这一页在人们的欢笑中结束……
E: Flowers will bloom and wilt... What a beautiful ending. This page concluded in laughter...

C: 看来，也是最后一次啦。
E: ...And it looks like it'll also be the last.

C: 一、二、三、四、五、六、七♪
E: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven ♪

C: 这就够了，不是吗？
E: Isn't that already enough?

C: 故事到来、逝去、去而复返。让我们重逢，又让我们分别。
E: The story comes, passes, then returns. It makes us reunite, then pulls us apart again.

C: 不仅如此，黑塔女士，请设想这样一种可能：
E: Not only that, Madam Herta, please consider this possibility:

C: 斯蒂芬•劳艾德拒绝了邀请。他需要专心筹备攻防，无法参会。
E: Stephen Lloyd declined the invitation. He needs to focus on attacking and defending, and cannot attend the meeting.

C: 反正我也只是来凑热闹的，哈哈！
E: I'm just here for the fun! Ahahaha!

C: 哎呀，假面愚者能有什么坏心思，不过是看看戏、码码牌。
E: Come on, what bad intentions could a Masked Fool possibly have? Just here to watch a show, shuffle a few cards.

C: 献给\n心中的英雄 {NICKNAME}
E: Dedicated to\nThe Hero Within, {NICKNAME}

C: 你知道我的，我讨厌按别人的步调做事。艾利欧也知道，所以他只会告诉我哪些是不能做的。
E: ...You know me, I hate being told what to do. Elio knows this too, so he normally just tells me what's off-limits.

C: 其中必定有诈！
E: This smells fishy!

C: 我不认识你，你再这样我可要喊人了。
E: I don't even know you. I'm gonna call security if you keep this up.

C: 把艾丝妲的密钥交出来。
E: Hand over Asta's encryption key.

C: 「军团」的袭击毁了多少硬件，现在站里瘫痪了多少管线你知道么？
E: Do you know how much hardware was destroyed when the Legion attacked? And how many cables are currently out of order on the station?

C: 希望最后别用上吧。
E: I hope I don't have to use it in the end.

C: 尚未侦测到正在传输的电波讯号。如有需要，请选择您要察看的过往讯号转译纪录。
E: Transmitting airwave has not been detected. If needed, please select the historical signal decoding record that you wish to review.

C: 苦衷？她能有什么苦衷…沐浴在神眷里，接触第一手的资料，和杰出的科考队员密切合作……
E: Reason? What kind of reason... She's bathing in divine blessings, she receives first-hand information and gets to work with top researchers...

C: 呵呵…我这副自怨自艾的样子，又要讨师父的骂了。
E: Heheh... Master's going to lecture me when he sees me being pathetic again.

C: 我先去处理一下，再见了，哥们儿。
E: I should go fix it. See you, bro.

C: 哈哈，没有什么故事，年轻人别想太多。
E: Haha, there isn't. Don't overthink it, young one.

C: 「人总是要死的，但不是现在。」
E: Life is but a path to death, but not today.

C: 怎么了？没瞧见我给卡这儿了吗？当代的年轻人，脑子跟不上，眼睛怎么也不好使啊。
E: What's the matter? Don't you see I'm stuck here? Young people these days. Your brain's fried, and your eyes ain't no good either.

C: 效果我虽不敢保证，但至少…比安慰剂强上那么一点儿。
E: I can't guarantee anything, but at least... They're a little better than placebos.

C: 这到底是怎么一回事……
E: What the heck is going on?

C: 呵呵，你们两个一唱一和，真是好一段精彩的推理。
E: Hehe, you two... I must say, this is all very entertaining to watch.

C: 所以，我是一个活生生的人…的机械替身。我的人生是对另一个逝者的拙劣模仿。
E: So, I'm a mechanical replica... of a real person. My life is a parody of the dead.

C: 对了，你那里还存着希拉的录像带吧？是时候把它们归还到应去的地方。
E: By the way, you still have Sheila's videos there? It's time to return them to their rightful place.

C: 哈，故事的主人公并不重要。我就是和你讲个故事，如有雷同，想必纯属巧合。
E: Ha, that's not important. I'm just telling a story. Any resemblance to real-life events is purely coincidental.

C: 你到这里来干什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 什么「跳出舒适圈，不然你就废掉了」「你吃过的苦会照亮你的路」的…这种毒鸡汤实在令人轻松不起来。
E: Like "Get out of your comfort zone, or you'll be wasted," or "The pain you suffer will light up your way"... cliché quotes that just make people cringe.

C: 为什么你笃定只有一名？
E: Why are you so sure that only one person is infected?

C: 让它自己去，要是也失踪了怎么办？可是我跟着它，当着这么多科员的面调查阿兰的行踪。
E: Peppy can't go alone. What if he gets lost too? And I can't go with him — if people see me, the acting lead researcher, searching for Arlan...

C: 唔，我不方便亲自出面…{NICKNAME}，向卡波特问出情报的事儿就拜托你了。
E: Hmm, it's better if I don't show my face... {NICKNAME}, see if you can get some intel out of him.

C: 好一副领导的派头…
E: Check you out, calling the shots...

C: 阿兰…对不起，我都不知道自己给了你这么多压力……
E: Arlan... I'm sorry. I never knew I was giving you so much pressure...

C: 不必多说！我自有证据。
E: Hold it! I have evidence...

C: 戏命鬼…鬼……
E: J—J—J—Jinx...

C: 嗯，它现在选择非暴力不合作，你们也拿它没办法嘛。
E: Mm, now that it refuses to cooperate, there isn't a thing you can do about it.

C: 科员荣仓终的纪念碑，上面记载着他的生平，表面隐隐有水迹，像是谁的泪痕。
E: Researcher Eikura Shuu's monument, which displays a summary of his life, seems to have faint traces of water on its surface. Perhaps those were the tears left by someone in mourning.

C: 你好…
E: Hello...

C: 打扰了…
E: Excuse me...

C: 等等，听这个事事关心、有求必应的语气，你一定就是最近那位，空间站大名鼎鼎的热心肠！
E: ...Such a concerned and responsive tone... You must be the one everyone's been talking about recently! Your kindheartedness is famous throughout the space station!

C: 呃，你倒是把我问住了，对话推进得太过自然，完全没意识到这个问题……
E: Ugh, you got me there. I got caught up in our conversation. I wasn't paying attention...

C: 只是，我希望给予知识和灵感更多自由生长的空间。
E: I just want to give more room for knowledge and inspiration to grow freely.

C: 那是一个由数据与字符构建的星球，在朋克洛德，现实和虚幻的边界同它的昼夜一般模糊。
E: It is a planet made of data and symbols. The edges of reality and illusion are blurred in Punklorde, as are its days and nights.

C: 这是我的建议，请考虑一下。
E: This is my recommendation. Please take your time to consider it.

C: 「首先，我没有朝思暮想。那张卡带的故事在朋克洛德跟教科书没啥两样，这种人尽皆知的东西，我向来没兴趣。」
E: "First off, I'm not obsessed with it. On Punklorde, the stories of the cartridge are no different from textbooks. I'm not interested in something that everybody already knows about."

C: 对于事件，你还有其他疑问吗？
E: Do you have any other questions regarding this incident?

C: 如果科员们都能像你一样冷静应对，空间站就再也不用担心入侵事件了。
E: If all researchers are able to face it as calmly as you did, there would've been no need to worry that the space station is under a cyber attack.

C: 好可怕…
E: Scary...

C: 请原谅，我是一个不善言辞的人！
E: Forgive me for my lack of eloquence!

C: 你并未理解，我需专注享受宇宙的红夜，才能发现不和谐的音调。它们存在共通性，一旦发现，我必将出手消灭。
E: You misunderstand. I must first wholeheartedly enjoy the red night of the universe before I can discover an inharmonious pitch. These two things are correlated. Once I discover the cause, I shall destroy it.

C: 你态度就不能积极点吗？
E: Can't you be more positive?

C: 你说得很对，他的确是个实力很强的骑士，虽然我不知道他在骑士团的地位有多高吧…
E: You're right. I don't know what his rank among the knights is, but he is quite powerful.

C: 暂且不提你为何能听懂「虫」的语言，这句话本身——
E: Let's ignore the fact that you understand insect-speak for now. That sentence...

C: 理智告诉我如此，但我希望不是。
E: My rational mind tells me yes, yet my heart tells me to believe.

C: 你只是以「幻觉」宽慰自身。
E: You're just consoling yourself with those "hallucinations".

C: 请原谅我不合时宜的举动。我们虽相识不久，但彼此已以交手定下交情——我只可惜它还未完成！我想在临走前了结这份遗憾！
E: Please forgive my inappropriate manner. Our friendship is new, but was forged in the heat of battle, which I only wish we had been able to conclude. I hope now we may conclude it still, that I may leave without regret!

C: （当前抛出的记忆盲点无法唤醒模糊的记忆，请尝试其他记忆盲点）
E: (The Cognition Chasm used cannot restore hazy memories. Please try another Cognition Chasm)

C: 空间坐标发生了偏移……
E: The spatial coordinates have shifted...

C: 数个系统时前……
E: Some system hours ago...

C: 我年纪大啦，眼也花啦，你看要不……
E: I'm not getting any younger and my eyesight is failing. Do you think you can...?

C: 这会儿<color=#dbc291ff>辛克尔和■■■</color>就在附近，我建议你向他们打听一下。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Hinkel and ■■■</color> are around here somewhere. I'd suggest you ask them about it.

C: 诶哟哟，你在我这老婆子面前有什么好谦虚的。
E: No need to be modest — at my age you get a feel for intelligence...

C: 「下落不明」…不就是「失踪」吗？
E: "Don't know the location..." isn't that the same as missing?

C: 咦？可空间站哪里都没有着火的痕迹呀……
E: Huh? But there are no signs of a fire anywhere in the space station...

C: 虽然不能作为直接证据，但如果人偶遇袭前后，系统中也出现了灭火装置的启动记录……
E: This may not be direct evidence, but if the system also recorded the fire-suppression system activating when the puppet was attacked...

C: 他说了什么？
E: What did he talk about?

C: 不容乐观，或者换种说法——糟透了。
E: Less than promising, or to use a different phrase — we're in deep trouble.

C: 从一开始，拉帝奥先生。我也有和你一样的坏习惯。
E: I've had the same bad habit as you since the beginning, Mr. Ratio.

C: 他们都落入了一件空间奇物中，深陷其间无法脱身，直到界种科最了解奇物的人从内部解开了它。
E: They fell into a spatial Curio and could not leave until the Department of Ecology's most knowledgeable Curio expert solved it from within.

C: 我会前往黑塔办公室，启用奇物收容室的折叠空间。只要对参数略作修改，它便可用于阻断对方的转移路线，将其封闭在空间站内。
E: I will head to Herta's office and activate the folded space in the Curio storage room. With some changes to its parameters, I can use it to block the fire's teleportation routes and seal it inside the station.

C: 这是我的工作习惯。通过触碰打开知觉，让关于生命的细节涌入脑海，这能帮助我了解你的生物结构。
E: This is a work habit of mine — using touch to open my senses and letting the details of your biological existence flood into my brain helps me understand your construction as a living organism.

C: 只记得和生物有关。
E: Only that it's about biology.

C: 黑塔就是纵容阮•梅。
E: Herta is spoiling Ruan Mei.

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: 无机生命陪伴谈话服务。
E: Inorganic lifeform companionship chat service.

C: 它们离天才尚有距离，因而无法分辨这种爱是友情？爱情？还是亲情？
E: They are still a long way from becoming geniuses and are therefore unable to discern whether this love is one of friendship, romance, or familial love.

C: 接待，嘶嘶，{NICKNAME}。请问需要查询什么？
E: Welcome, *buzz* {NICKNAME}. How can I help?

C: 正在载入日程数据…载入中…载入完成。
E: Loading itinerary data... Loading... Loading complete.

C: 主张适当放松的「正当权益会社」自然就没落了，会员纷纷退社，现在只有我这个老头子守着告示板喽。
E: Naturally, "The Rightful Rights Society" that advocates for suitable relaxation has declined. Members are quitting one by one, and now I'm left here with the notifications board all alone.

C: 你老婆没和你们一起？
E: Your wife isn't with you?

C: 让我们专注接下来的行程——下一站是仙舟罗浮的金人巷。
E: Let us focus on the next segment of our journey — your next stop is Aurum Alley on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 为了保证茶的品质，我每天一大早就派机巧鸟从波月古海边偷偷汲水。最近那边似乎有所察觉了…这茶怕是有段时间喝不到喽。
E: In order to ensure the quality of the tea, I send cycranes to secretly collect water from the edges of the Lunarescent Depths first thing every morning. I think they're starting to catch on to me... I'm afraid this tea will be unavailable for a while.

C: 可惜，跃渊还没有回复你漂流瓶的后续，不知道她那边现况如何了。
E: Unfortunately, Yueyuan still hasn't replied with an update about the Drift Bottles. You cannot help but wonder how things are going over there.

C: 诶？你是怎么知道的。
E: Huh? How do you know that?

C: 走吧，勇敢地探索未知——这就是「开拓」的精神！
E: Let's go. Braving the unknown... that's the real spirit of trailblazing!

C: 三月七，快给他看照片。
E: Show him the photos, March.

C: 不问问瓦尔特吗？
E: Should we ask Mr. Yang to come with us?

C: …什么呀，你这不是还没准备好吗？
E: What? You're still not ready to go?

C: 没想到事态会朝这个方向发展…我原本还以为，公司是来帮助贝洛伯格重建的……
E: I had no idea things were like this. Here I was thinking the IPC had come to rebuild Belobog, not extort it!

C: 仔细想想，这也是宇宙间生命轮回的一部分呢。
E: When you think about it, it's just another part of the cycle of life.

C: 嗯，我也这么觉得。但摆在布洛妮娅面前的问题也很现实……
E: I guess so, but that still doesn't fix Bronya's problem...

C: …什么啊，原来是之前威胁要灭我们口的家伙！
E: Huh!? So it's you! You're the one who was threatening to take us out in the Snow Plains!

C: 托帕就允许你们这么乱来？
E: Topaz just lets you do whatever you want?

C: 全体员工，听我指令——立刻从大矿区撤离，撤离！不要留下任何项目组来过的痕迹！
E: Attention all personnel. Evacuate the mine immediately! Erase all traces of your presence!

C: …我想好了。我弃票。
E: ...In that case... I... I abstain.

C: 大守护者已经将情况告知于我，让我协助列车组的各位找到托帕。
E: The supreme guardian has briefed me on the situation and asked that I assist you in locating Topaz.

C: 潜爆…机兵？
E: Automaton... Stealth Bomb?

C: 收到，长官！
E: Yes, sir!

C: 呃…娜塔莎是谁？
E: Uh... Who's Natasha?

C: …等会儿，只是个坊间传闻而已，你怎么就信了？
E: ...Hey, it's just a rumor. Don't take my word for it.

C: 患者们还希望我对你保密。
E: The patients wanted me to keep it a secret from you.

C: 然而此信来源蹊跷。它被夹在议事间桌上那本名叫《星域界种指南》的大部头中间，平时除我之外，没有其他人翻看。
E: However, it was a strange story how I got hold of this letter at the beginning. It was sandwiched in a tome called A Guide to Astral Realm Species on the Conference Room table. Normally, no one looks at it except me.

C: 看来，这并不是普通的信件，而是一封「告密信」，意在检举「异星水魈」。
E: It seems this is no ordinary letter, it's from an informant. Their intention is to report on the Xenohydro.

C: 你就祈祷那时候我还没找到什么薇诺娜埃琳娜芭芭娜之类的科员来顶替你吧！哼。
E: Just keep praying that by then, I haven't replaced you with a Renona, an Elena, or a Barbara... or someone else, hmph!

C: 因为…我是顶替了姐姐的名额，才得以进入「黑塔」…当然这件事，卡波特先生也不知道。
E: Because... I only got into the space station in my sister's place... Of course, Mr. Capote doesn't know about that.

C: 我早就看出来了，那封信中所写的共犯就是我。只是我真的…不敢面对。
E: I had already figured that the "accomplice" in that letter was referring to me. It's just that I didn't really... have the courage to face it.

C: 那个，后续我会送上慰问信，来安抚大家受惊的心灵。放心，那一定是由我本人亲笔撰写的慰问信。
E: Well, I'll send you all a letter of condolence later to mend your hearts. Don't worry, it will be written by myself personally.

C: 一夜之间这翻天覆地的变化，我们也很难接受。
E: How can such a drastic change have occurred in the course of one night?

C: 她在昨晚召见我，说你们欺骗了她；你们的身份和目的皆是伪造的，意在破坏筑城者对贝洛伯格的掌控。
E: She summoned me last night to tell me that you had deceived her. Your identities and purpose here are counterfeit. You seek to overthrow the rule of the Architects.

C: 这…唉，我这一时脑热……
E: This... ah, I'm just saying stuff on impulse...

C: 呃，那我就先走一步了，大客户！希望你能改善改善睡眠质量，下次找我的时候清醒一点儿……
E: Mmm, then I'll be heading out, my valued patron! Here's hoping your insomnia improves. Make sure you're fully awake next time you come and see me!

C: 当前要目标物件为「被藏起来的东西」，范围内共「一个」目标物件。请根据「家用寻物仪安全使用指南」，跟随本机进行搜索。
E: The current target is "something hidden." And there is "one" such target in detectable range. Please follow yours truly to conduct the search in accordance with the "Home-Use Object Finder Safety Manual."

C: 栈桥四周不都有控制终端吗？
E: Aren't there control terminals all around the gear bridge?

C: 实话说，在调查数据储存端之前，我真不知道有这种操作…铁卫禁区栈桥的制动系统是希露瓦他们改装过的，用起来比这个方便多了。
E: To be honest, before looking at the data terminal, I really didn't know it could work this way... The braking system of the bridge in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone was modified by Serval, and is much easier to use.

C: 后来我才知道，「初雪八落」的花语里有「美好的回忆」这层意思。我还没来得及感谢他们…感谢他们给了我美好的童年。
E: I only found out later that First Snow represents "beautiful memories." My parents gave me a beautiful childhood, and I still haven't had the chance to thank them for that...

C: 还是说…你想听听有关我的家人和花的故事？
E: Or... did you want to hear some family flower stories?

C: 瓦赫医生总是神出鬼没的，我们小队只撞见过他一次。他好像…不太爱说话，每次都只是把药箱留在特定的位置，等巡逻队自行来取。
E: Doctor Vache is... elusive. My squad only met him once, and he didn't seem like the talkative type. He leaves the medicine at specific locations and our patrols go there to collect it.

C: 被他伤害的人们不会感到安宁。
E: Too bad his victims won't ever share that peace.

C: （士兵会检查4处枪架，确保它们各自放着3把枪支…先去枪架前看看吧。）
E: (The soldiers will check the four gun racks to make sure each has three guns... Go to the gun racks and have a look.)

C: 如你所见，经过为期近百天的翻修，整个博物馆室内现在已经焕然一新。
E: As you can see, after nearly <unbreak>100</unbreak> days of renovation, the interior looks brand-new.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}，我们去歌德大饭店看看。但愿这不是对方的障眼法……
E: Come on, {NICKNAME}, let's go to the Goethe Grand Hotel. I hope this isn't some sort of cover-up operation.

C: 除了大堂助理的职务以外，艾丽斯小姐是贝洛伯格艺术学院的学生，她对这座博物馆的历史和展品都相当了解。
E: In addition to her secretarial duties, Eris is also a student at the Belobog College of Art. She's very knowledgeable about the museum's exhibits and their history.

C: 没有了「齿轮与智慧」，工业展区也就失去了灵魂…我们必须找回雕塑，然后才能把这里向公众开放。
E: Without it, the Industrial Hall loses its soul... We have to retrieve the sculpture before we can open to the public.

C: 走吧，去把展品找回来。
E: Time to go get that sculpture.

C: 嗯，我们这就出发。
E: Let's head out, then.

C: 等等，我还有急事要处理。
E: Hold on, I have something urgent to take care of first.

C: 史瓦罗怎么说？
E: What did Svarog say?

C: 这个区域的故障机器人应该也排查干净了。
E: Looks like we've rescued all the robots in this area too.

C: …好吧，我妥协了！毕竟「齿轮与智慧」的部件数量多得惊人，照这么找下去肯定没完没了……
E: ...Alright, alright, I give up! That sculpture has dozens of individual parts — there's no way we'll recover them all at this rate...

C: 不过你看，这雕塑——如果不拿着设计蓝图细细比对上十几个小时，应该完全看不出和原件的区别吧？干得漂亮，{NICKNAME}！
E: Well... as long as you don't pull out the blueprints and spend dozens of hours comparing... this version is virtually indistinguishable from the original. Excellent work, {NICKNAME}!
Oh...

C: 遵命，守护者大人！
E: Understood, Madam Guardian!

C: 用你的设备拍吧？清晰度应该更好些。
E: Your equipment probably has better specs than mine — I'll leave the picture-taking to you.

C: …不过这些问题还是留到审讯的时候再问吧，你我的工作到这一步就算告一段落啦。这一路以来也辛苦你帮忙了，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...These questions can wait until the interrogation. As for you and me, our work ends here. Thanks for your efforts, {NICKNAME}.

C: …但也只是猜的而已，也拿不出什么证据，是吧？
E: "...Guessed?" So, you don't have any evidence...

C: 赫罗瓦夫妇都是品行高尚的人…我深受触动，这才选择踏上了行医之路。
E: The Harrowers are great people... I was so impacted by them that I took up medicine myself.

C: 但对我而言不是这样——我会尽一切可能给他们力所能及范围内的、最优渥的生活条件，帮助他们成长，做一个正直、善良、幸福的人……
E: But that's not the case for me — I will do everything I can to give them the best living conditions possible, to help them grow up to be upright, kind, and happy people...

C: 咳咳，请面试者保持肃静。
E: Ahem, please be quiet.

C: 嗯，{NICKNAME}？找我有什么事么？
E: Eh, {NICKNAME}? What brings you here?

C: 噗…好了好了，知道啦。我也就不刨根问底了，来看看接下来该问什么吧……
E: Pfft... Okay. I've got it. I'm not going to probe. Let's see what's next...

C: 嗯，虽然手段粗暴了一些，但是它们只是将矿民和流浪者赶了出去。
E: Well, perhaps their methods were lacking in finesse, but that's essentially what they did.

C: 那个人是？
E: And who is "he?"

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: I don't have anything else to ask about.

C: 费斯曼老爷子对我还不赖，以前在铆钉镇的时候，他把整个矿队的伙食都包给我了。
E: That old Fersman was kind to me. When we were at Rivet Town, he put me in charge of the whole mining team's food supply.

C: 咦，虎克？怎么了，找我有事吗？
E: Huh, Hook? What's the matter?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>保姆。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The helper.</color>

C: 无关个人，这是推理的结果。
E: This isn't personal, it's just deductive reasoning.
