C: ——啊不是，没啥，嘿嘿。匹克老弟，看见了吧，我桑博答应过的事哪有办不成的？得了，面罩收好，加上之前的两件，你的矿具就全齐了。
E: Oh, I mean, nothing! Hehe, you see, Peak, I always keep my promises! Alright, here's the gas mask, which means you've got all your mining tools now.

C: （桑博这家伙…算了，再原谅他一次吧。）
E: (This guy... Ugh, forget it, just trust him one more time.)

C: 当然是打倒它——为大家断后。
E: Bring it down. We need to cover the retreat.

C: 哈，那就好…我还怕自己追得太远，把他们落下了呢。
E: Ah, thank goodness... I chased the monster too far and lost them.

C: █约定的新世界 █ ██ 没有你们的位置——！
E: █There is no place for you█ ██the promised new world!

C: 如果这里的天气像城里一样好，那只要找个舒服的地方扎营就可以了。
E: If the weather here was as good as inside the city, then we could have camped anywhere.

C: 啊…好香！我要开动了——！
E: Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!

C: 你这次真的是帮了我们大忙啊——谢谢你啦，{NICKNAME}！
E: You really helped us a lot this time. Thank you so much, {NICKNAME}!

C: 咻…谢，谢谢姐姐！我……
E: *sniffle* ...Th—Thank you! I...

C: 怎么全是空的，到底是谁——
E: How are they all empty? Who could've—

C: 筑城者们说过，对「守护者」继承人的挑选会在整个贝洛伯格范围内进行，过程短则几年，长则数十年。
E: The Architects said that the guardian's successor is selected from among all people in Belobog. The selection process can take anywhere from a few years to a few decades.

C: 我见过这个人，{F#她}{M#他}…{F#她}{M#他}不是坏人，对吧？
E: I've seen this person before. {F#Sh—She's}{M#H—He's} not bad, right?

C: 之前在大矿区的事，真是对不起…史瓦罗先生不信任除了克拉拉以外的人类，尤其是「地火」的各位。
E: I'm really sorry about what happened back in the Great Mine... Mr. Svarog doesn't trust any humans besides me, especially everyone from Wildfire.

C: 而且，其实他们不都是坏人…大家都只想好好地活下去。
E: Also, not all of them are bad people... everyone just wants to survive.

C: 尤利安打算资助我们的冒险，你看，这把花园铲就是他给我的！
E: Julian is willing to contribute to our adventure. Look, he gave me this gardening shovel!

C: 哼，别装啦！你的表情已经把你出卖啦！
E: Hmph, don't even try to pretend otherwise! The look on your face sold you out!

C: 荣誉队员…我只是好奇，你觉得尤利安的玻璃珠能卖多少钱？
E: Honorary member... Um, I wonder, how much do you think Julian's glass marbles would sell for?

C: 没有后半部分的笔记，虎克肯定找不到宝贝……
E: Without the second half of my notes, how will I ever find the treasure...

C: 我要对虎克刮目相看了。
E: You're starting to impress me.

C: 将胜利的消息分享给了鼹鼠党的孩子们……
E: Telling The Moles about the victory...

C: 欢迎，大家，回来，终于。帕斯卡，一直，等待！
E: Welcome, back, everyone, finally. Pascal, has been, waiting!

C: 咿？！…那岂不是，我们现在就……
E: Ah!? Are you saying we're... not alone...?

C: 哎哟，这叫什么话！那不是「地火」下了需求，我兢兢业业给他办事嘛？
E: Hey! That's not nice! Wildfire made a request and I got on with the job.
Beep... Boop...

C: 这么大的镇子，上哪去找那么个小姑娘呀？
E: This is a big town. Where should we start?

C: 不行，这次我们得跟他当面聊清楚。你能带我们去见他吗？
E: No, this time we need to set things straight with him face to face. Can you take us to meet him?

C: 虽然替换了受损的元件，但是设备却没有照常重启，你是否在为这件事苦恼？
E: You replaced the damaged components, but the unit isn't starting up as normal. That's what you're trying to figure out, right?

C: 我们必须找到星核，然后…
E: We must find the Stellaron, and then...

C: 发现大量「地火」武装成员渗透，评估状态……
E: Base breached. Armed Wildfire personnel detected. Assessing...

C: 多亏了有克拉拉…
E: Thanks to Clara...

C: 没太听懂，谁能帮我捋一遍？
E: I didn't quite understand. Can someone go over it again?

C: 「炉心」…通往地上的道路，现在近在咫尺。
E: The Furnace Core... The path to the surface is close at hand now.

C: 你们会得到「地火」的全力支持。
E: You have Wildfire's full support.

C: 喂喂喂，别这么肉麻。我们干买卖的最讨厌谢谢两字了——都是生意，么得感情！
E: Easy there, don't get mushy on me now. We professional types don't have time for "thank yous." It's business! Feelings don't come into it.

C: 老巫…娜塔莎姐姐！「菌菌」已经缝补好了吗？
E: Stupid, witchy old... Natasha! Hehe, h—have you finished fixing Junjun?

C: （宝石专家也要加入竞标，说不定虎克的玩偶会变得非常抢手呢。）
E: (The gemologist will be bidding too. Hook's teddy bear may be the center of attention.)

C: 这样啊，看来我错过他们补货了…我知道了，我收拾收拾就去流浪者营地看看。谢谢你们特地跑一趟来通知我！
E: Oh really? I guess I must've missed the latest additions... In that case, I'll finish up here and head back to the vagrant camp. Thanks so much for letting me know!

C: …那还是算了吧！
E: ...Well, that really can't be helped!

C: 我们正好需要钱…
E: Not even monetarily?

C: 它可是重要的「宝贝」。
E: It's a very important treasure.

C: 打开了费斯曼送给虎克的生日礼物盒……
E: Hook opens the present that Fersman got her...

C: 愿望一定会实现的。
E: I know you will.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你看…这里的痕迹不像是自然形成的，会不会是犯人留下的呢？
E: Take a look at these marks... These are very suspicious. Could they have been left by the culprit?

C: █ 对不起██疼███痛█ 不█痛█对起 █ █对不起 █ ██疼痛█ 对不起对不起 ██ 对不起对██苦██不起██████对不起！
E: █ Sorry██hurt███pain█ no█pain█sorry █ █sorry █ ██pain█ sorry ██ sorry██suffer██sorry██████sorry!

C: 唔，这个插口的位置…好奇怪。芯片的位置藏得非常隐秘，不仔细找的话根本发现不了……
E: This jack's placement is... odd. The chip is buried deep inside. If you don't look closely enough, you won't even find it...
█████Termi█nate███terminate██████.

C: 维修工作如何了？
E: How are the repairs going?

C: █失败█失失败██失败█失败败败█失败██败失失败██——
E: █Failure█failure██failure█failurelure█failure██failure██!

C: 清除多余的信息，再找到核心中还完好的逻辑轨道…然后植入一套新的运行程序。
E: Clear the redundant data and locate the core sectors that are still intact. Then, we can install a new suite of operational programs.

C: 我们相信你的选择，{NICKNAME}。
E: We trust your decision, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这样就…完成了吗？
E: ...Is it done?

C: 你没有又去偷东西吧？
E: You haven't been stealing anymore, have you?

C: 那可不吗，老熟人了。他挺好说话的，看我来说服他。
E: You bet I do. We go way back. He's easy to talk to. Watch me persuade him.

C: 别这么说，你再道歉，我的耳朵都要起茧了。
E: Agh, enough apologizing. My ears can't take any more.

C: 嘴上说说谁不会啊？希望你真的靠得住。
E: Easier said than done! I hope you're really that reliable.

C: 要是你有空的话，我们晚点在机械屋见吧。茉莉看起来需要和人多聊聊天……
E: Let's meet at the workshop later if you are free. Looks like Molly needs someone to talk to...

C: 我是……
E: I am...

C: 能帮我查查这个名字吗？
E: Could you help me look into this name?

C: 这说明我们正在靠近星核…靠近寒潮的中心。
E: It means that we're getting closer to the Stellaron... and the heart of the Eternal Freeze.

C: 地面…地面在震动！怎么回事？！
E: The ground... it's shaking! What's happening!?

C: 引擎…粉碎他们！
E: Engine... break them!

C: 但愿有朝一日我们还能再见…{NICKNAME}。
E: I hope one day we shall meet again, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我…没事。必须…快点动身……..
E: I'm... fine. I need to... hurry...

C: 希儿，你带布洛妮娅回去吧。
E: Seele, take Bronya back with you.

C: 说时迟那时快，力量从天而降…
E: All of a sudden, I was infused with a great and terrible power...!

C: 先着眼于当下的事务吧，姬子和瓦尔特先生处理星核时，不方便打扰他们。返回列车再说。
E: Let's focus on the business at hand first. We shouldn't disrupt Himeko and Mr. Yang while they're dealing with the Stellaron. Let's talk once we're back on the Express.

C: 嗯，也对，毕竟做事就得善始善终嘛…我们赶紧去找娜塔莎。
E: Mm, you're right, we need to finish what we started... Let's hurry up and find Natasha.

C: …痛快了？
E: ...happy?

C: 抱歉…我会帮你。
E: Sorry... I'll help you out.

C: …我下不了手。
E: I... I can't do it.

C: 你就是司辰宫派来体验「星槎测速员」的吧。
E: You're the person sent by the Palace of Astrum to experience being a starskiff speed tester, aren't you?

C: …你说只是站在桥上数数，对体验者来说缺乏挑战性了吗?
E: ...Are you saying that counting skiffs on the bridge is not challenging enough?

C: 规则是什么来着？
E: What are the rules again?

C: 稍等，我还没准备好。
E: Wait, I'm not ready.

C: 机巧鸟抓拍下的影像会带有很多信息，你想看哪个？
E: Cycrane footage definitely provides a lot of useful information. Which one would you like to see?

C: 怎么不找仙舟当地人？
E: Why don't you want Xianzhou locals?

C: 箱子里空空如也，比化外民游客们的荷包还干净——会误信星槎海「百年老店今日店庆」促销广告的那种。
E: The boxes are more empty than the wallets of the outworlder tourists — the kind of tourists who would believe the ads about "a centuries-old establishment having an anniversary sale" in Starskiff Haven.

C: 不过…寄件事故嘛…那册书恰巧掉在这树上了，你要是够得着就直接拿走吧。
E: But... with the shipping incident... that book ended up in a tree. If you can find it then it's yours.

C: 我拍完照片了。
E: The pictures are all done.

C: 我和虎克回来了…
E: Hook and I are back...

C: 我感觉自己生来就注定要被世界抛弃，我不断忏悔、自我放逐，只是为从忧郁中提炼一点诗意，缓和我的悲伤。
E: It feels like I was destined to be abandoned by this world. And I continued to repent and self-exile, just to extract another morsel of poetry to ease my sadness.

C: 我琢磨着，办法总比困难多不是？作为工造司的成员，我的双手虽然写不出什么佳句，但可以造出写情诗的「诗人」啊！
E: I thought to myself, there have to be more solutions than problems in this world, right? As a member of the Artisanship Commission, I may not be able to put together any kind of poetry myself — but these hands of mine could sculpt a different kind of poet, if you get my drift!

C: 在理，是老夫对主人过誉了。
E: Sensible. I do give the master too much credit.

C: 「相见时难别亦难」，讲述离愁别绪的诗歌就是离别的诗。
E: "'Tis hard to meet — and hard to say goodbye"... A poem that describes human emotion when parting from others is called a poem of departures.

C: 我不拦你，只想告诉你，你看看票上的时间。
E: I won't stop you. I just want to remind you to check the time on the ticket.

C: 应该是大功告成了，「蘑菇」快动笔试试。
E: It should be done now. "Mushroom," try writing something.

C: 行吧，不过也没有什么好讲的。
E: Fine, but there's nothing much to tell.

C: 唉，我当然知道，小姐姐远离尘嚣的生活不应受到打扰。但是像我这样的铁杆粉丝也想要获得一个亲口表达心意的机会啊。
E: *sigh* I know, Ms. Daiqing's life beyond the secular universe must not be disturbed. But a hardcore fan like myself would love to have a chance to express my feelings to her.

C: 你不是也在调查？
E: Aren't you doing the same?

C: 啊，又有人来联系你了。
E: Oh, look, someone else is contacting you.

C: （发送消息）
E: (Message sent)

C: 在我知道「美丽狐仙」不是狐人的瞬间，就已经失去了所有的兴趣。
E: The moment I found out the "Foxian Beauty" was not even a foxian, I lost all interest.

C: 我怕自己会心甘情愿地上当。
E: I'm afraid I might easily fall for such tricks.

C: 呼…呼…我…我完全明白了。
E: Huff... Huff... I... I understand it now.

C: 那颗持明卵也保持完好，它只是失去了…一点儿「蛋清」。但它对人的造福却显而易见，不是吗？
E: That egg also remained intact, but it just lost... a little bit of "egg white." That's all. But its benefit to society is obvious, isn't it?

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈哈……
E: Ha... Hahaha...

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我想求龙女大人能救回我的爱人，所以，我用「带她逃离丹鼎司」作为交换条件……
E: I asked her to save my beloved. In return, I helped her escape from the Alchemy Commission...

C: 年轻人，这是你弟弟吗？这孩子长得真可爱，你可不能对弟弟这么粗声粗气说话，会吓着小孩的。
E: Young {F#woman}{M#man}, is this your little brother? He's so cute. You can't be so harsh like that to a kid, or you'll scare him.

C: 我这一生比大部分不知自己所求，又无法得偿所愿的人强太多了。我著书立说，我授徒无数。虽然没有孩子，但我的学生中有不少让我颇为骄傲。
E: In this life I've been far better off than most people, who don't even know what they want, let alone how to get it. I became a published author, and I've taken on countless apprentices. I may have no children, but there are several of my students of whom I'm rather proud.

C: （以这个区域为中心，找找周围有没有什么留下的线索吧。）
E: (Let's start with this area and see if we can find any clues nearby.)

C: 梁沐是个是怎样的人？
E: What's Liangmu like?

C: 那是云骑军、还有药王秘传。
E: There are Cloud Knights and Disciples of Sanctus Medicus over there.

C: 可是你已经……
E: But you already...

C: 抱歉，你们哪里也去不了。
E: Sorry, but you're not going anywhere.

C: 刺客的数量未知，为了安全起见，我们必须赶紧离开，走吧！
E: We don't know how many there are — let's get out of here. Go!

C: 你曾经告诉咱们应当好好珍惜每一世的生命，休战时您也会用云吟法术治好咱们的伤口，可是你为什么最终却背叛了我们！
E: You once told us that we should cherish every life cycle, and that you would use cloudhymn magic to heal our wounds... But in the end, all you did was betray us!

C: {NICKNAME}，现在方便聊聊吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you have time to chat now?

C: 太过理想了，很担心这次行动。
E: I'm very worried about this operation. It's too idealistic.

C: 你是说，次元扑满也…
E: Are you saying that the same has happened to the Warp Trotters...

C: 怪不得隐书说有一股臭味……
E: No wonder Yinshu said she had to cover her nose...

C: 如果因为投诉被司部清退，履历上会留下污点，往后几百年就很难东山再起。
E: ...Because if a complaint led to his dismissal, it would leave a blemish on his resume, making it difficult for him to advance his career for the next few centuries.

C: 我也觉得另有隐情…
E: I think so too.

C: 嗯？怎么感觉乱七八糟的？
E: Really? That feels like a messy order to me.

C: 行啊。你要看哪一段呀？
E: Sure, which one do you want to watch?

C: 你在说什么剧情？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 呵呵，就是因为有我们这种现实原型，《渔公案》里面才会这么写啊。
E: Hah — and who do you think were the inspiration for the Tea Society? Us, that's who.

C: 所以在那「空白的两小时」中，罗刹究竟做了什么呢……
E: So... what did Luocha get up to during those missing two hours...?

C: 是啊…我本以为天舶司的主事者是长袖善舞的商人，就像那个小狐女一样。
E: Yes... I originally thought the head of the Sky-Faring Commission was a suave businesswoman — like that young foxian girl...

C: 不，这一口让我想起了刚登上列车时…艰难吞下姬子泡的咖啡…食道受伤的感觉。
E: No, no, this reminds me of when I first boarded the Express... and forced myself to drink Himeko's coffee... and how my tastebuds never fully recovered.

C: 就会成为玩具推销员？
E: They'll become a toy salesman?

C: 没关系。如果能弄清楚驭空司舵不再愿意飞行的原因，大概也就能弄清楚她不愿意让晴霓小姐成为斗舰飞行士的原因了。
E: No problem. If we can get to the bottom of why Helm Master Yukong no longer flies, we might be able to find out why she doesn't want you to be a fighter pilot.

C: 王牌飞行士的传奇，也需要王牌武备士来成全。和驭空搭档的那个女孩名叫采翼。
E: The legend of the ace fighter pilot is incomplete without the ace gunner. Yukong's partner was Caiyi.

C: 说回正题…二位从景元将军那里知道了些什么吗？
E: Anyway... did you find anything out from General Jing Yuan?

C: 向晴霓转述了景元提供的信息。
E: You relay the information provided by Jing Yuan to Qingni.

C: 我在这里也有些年月了，有什么想知道的，你们不妨直接问我吧…别到处乱翻了，这习惯不好。
E: *sigh* I've been here for a long time, Qingni. If there's something you wish to know, just ask... but don't go rummaging around — that's a bad habit.

C: 她的丈夫，广渊先生则是个飞行士。夫妻共同驾驶斗舰，真是令人羡慕得紧。
E: Her husband, Mr. Guangyuan, was a pilot. They manned the same skiff, and were the envy of many...

C: 这就是仙舟科技吗…
E: Is this some special Xianzhou technology...?

C: 我当时想，骗小孩子都这么不上心，还疑心她是夸我继承了她的天赋。
E: I thought she was just a bad liar... I even thought she meant I'd inherited her talent with starskiffs.

C: 妈妈……
E: Mom...

C: 再坚持一下，我知道你能做到的。
E: Hold out a little longer — I know you can do it.

C: （还是如实回答好了……）
E: (Better to tell it like it is...)

C: 你之所以不记得，是因为执行黑塔计划前，我让你忘了。
E: The reason you don't remember is that I wiped your memory before the operation at Herta Space Station.

C: 基因上来说，你是我的孩子。构成你身体的数据有四分之一来自于我。不过，银狼、阿刃和萨姆都不适合带孩子。
E: Genetically speaking, you are my child. A quarter of the data that makes up your body comes from me. Of course, neither Silver Wolf, Bladie, nor Sam are well-suited for looking after a child...

C: 阿刃复活后，忘记了很多事情，但还记得徒弟们杀死他的那一晚。因此他在全宇宙寻找凶手。
E: After his revival, Bladie had forgotten nearly everything, but he remembered the night his apprentices killed him. He's been searching the whole universe for those who took his life...

C: 换句话说，我和你就是彼此的命运。
E: In other words, you and I are each other's destiny.

C: 这不是箱子，是一具棺柩；重要与否我不好说，但总不能将往生者弃在半路吧。
E: This isn't any old box, miss — it's a coffin. I can't speak to its importance, but leaving the dead behind doesn't sound very appropriate.

C: 很简单！
E: Right!

C: 只消穿过这里，搭上去星槎海的舶船，到了安全地带就用不着再东躲西藏啦。
E: We just need to pass through here, take the barge to Starskiff Haven, and we'll be safe.

C: 我本来是不担忧，但她一副胸有成竹的样子，我就担心起来了……
E: I was perfectly calm until she volunteered to help...

C: 无药可医。
E: There's no cure.

C: 再见，丹恒先生。希望下一次，咱们见面的时候不用这么紧张了。
E: Goodbye for now, Dan Heng. I hope the next time we meet, it will be under happier circumstances.

C: 丹枫也在那片战场上…
E: Dan Feng fought in that battle...

C: 丹枫，他也曾和你一同参战？
E: Did Dan Feng fight alongside you?

C: 不必回应我，答案已经不重要了。饮月，我要送走这艘星槎了。
E: There is no need to respond, Imbibitor Lunae, your answer is no longer important... And now, I will send off this starskiff.

C: 依照天舶司的追查，你随商队来到罗浮，停驻数日，却未与任何人有贸易往来。本该离去之日，又恰逢孽灾爆发。
E: According to the Sky-Faring Commission's investigations, you arrived on the Luofu with a group of merchants, but didn't make a single trade during your stay. Your departure coincided with the day the calamities took place.

C: 我带走那具已成空壳的形骸，授他剑法，赐他百死，教他永远不忘前世业报。听说他重获新生后，还为自己取了个名字…
E: I took the shell that once held his soul and passed my sword techniques on to him. I let him die a hundred deaths... to remind him of the karma of his previous life. Afterward, I heard he was reborn and even gave himself a name...

C: 景元的留影挥手拂过，玉扣爆发出一阵亮光，他的虚幻身形也随之闪动。
E: Jing Yuan's hologram waves. The jade tracer emits a beam of light as the illusory figure flickers.

C: 至于剑法，你用耳朵听个头头是道也就罢了，连我御剑的数目也能报的一柄不差。这份见识，哪是普通人能有的？
E: The biggest giveaway was you comment about my swordplay. Correctly guessing the number of swords from the sound alone? You'd have to be more than human.

C: 因易形而碎裂的骨肉发出令人牙根酸疼的摩擦声，又迅速弥合。这些痛楚，狼首人早习以为常。
E: The cracking bones and warping flesh generated a sharp and painful noise during the deformation, and quickly healed. The wolf-head man has long been used to these pains.

C: 可恶！
E: Argh!

C: 这个来历不明的女人也想找到刃的下落……
E: This mysterious woman also wants to find the whereabouts of Blade...

C: 可如今越来越多的人，尤其是云骑这样要承受压力与风险的人，开始堕入魔阴身。
E: More and more citizens — in particular those dealing with great risks and stress like the Cloud Knights — are becoming stricken with mara.

C: 哎！怎么会呢！我们都是些老实本分的好市民啊，只是比其他仙舟住民更忠实于内心的渴望罢了。我不会害你的。
E: Bah, how so? We are dutiful and sincere — the only difference between us and other Xianzhou residents is that we are more faithful to our inner desires. I won't harm you.

C: 抄写第三遍时，这句话开始在你的心中回响。
E: You finish the third copy. This sentence has started to reverberate within your being.

C: 好的，那你们准备一下吧。时间宝贵，别准备太久。
E: Good. Then prepare yourselves. Time is precious — make it quick.

C: 那么，这就当做是你为组织完成的第一件任务吧。你做事这么积极，我也会和上面如实汇报的。
E: As such, this can be your first mission as a disciple. You take an active approach to getting things done — I'll be sure to pass that on to my superiors.

C: 谁会不认得你呢？我听闻长乐天有位英雄救下了持明族的「衔药龙女」。
E: Everyone does — you're the hero who rescued the Vidyadhara Healer Lady in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 这「龙蟠虬跃」的药理实在险怪，在下需要一些时间来研究。等有了结论，在下会第一时间联系你的。
E: The pharmacology of this Draught of Draconic Surge is peculiar. I'll need time to run a thorough analysis. When I have a conclusive answer, I'll contact you immediately.

C: 那还是一起吧。
E: Hmm, in that case...

C: 你们怎么不走？
E: Why are you still here?

C: 唔，毕竟这是穷观阵的「推演」，有失真的可能…但扰动怎会如此之大？这不合理。
E: Well, this is just a Matrix inference, remember? Distortions are possible... although the scale of this distortion is surprising...?

C: 诶诶诶你别拽我手…烫烫烫烫烫烫！
E: Hey! Don't pull on my hand, I — ow, ow, ow, hot, hot, hot!

C: 对了，三月小姐，还有一件事我得问个明白…你是否有可能经历过什么巨大的痛苦？
E: Oh, Miss March, I have one more thing to ask... Have you ever experienced great suffering?

C: 所以本座要在这里再向你确认一次——你是否还要继续探索自己的记忆？
E: I say this to say one thing — are you certain you wish to continue exploring your memories?

C: 只要你准备好了就可以出发。
E: So long as you're ready.

C: 怎么办…符玄小姐不在，突然觉得有点瘆得慌……
E: What am I gonna do... Why did Miss Fu Xuan pick the scariest time to vanish...

C: 你还记得自己是在什么地方被发现的吗？
E: Do you remember where it was exactly that you were discovered?

C: 三月，自打你触摸那块「冰」之后，我就再也观测不到你了。究竟发生了什么？
E: March, I lost sight of you once you touched that block of ice. What happened?

C: 所以到头来还是一无所获。
E: Looks like we came away empty-handed...

C: （触碰梦泡）
E: (Touch the dream bubble)

C: 小妹妹怎么闹情绪啦？
E: What's wrong, Yunli?

C: …你确实有些身手，但是我不希望你这个时候来阻止我。
E: ...You do have some skill, but now is not a good time to try to stop me.

C: 所谓「魔剑」的真相就是如此，有痴于铸剑的匠人，将岁阳铸进了金铁之中，渴望让武器成为有灵之物。
E: There was a lunatic swordsmith who infused metal blades with heliobi, as he was obsessed with turning weapons into living things, and this is how cursed swords were made.

C: （也许还是看着她为好……）
E: (Maybe I should keep an eye on her...)

C: …看来你也不是单纯来帮忙解围，你是来阻止我的，对吧？
E: ...You're not really here to help me. You're here to stop me, right?

C: 「自焰轮铸炼宫中所出的剑器蜚声星海，锋芒难当，无往不胜。得先生剑器者，纵使是荒野匹夫，也能削铁如泥，无往不利。」
E: "The swords crafted by the Flamewheel Forge are famed across the stars. They possess exceptional sharpness and invincibility. With these legendary weapons, even ordinary people can become skilled warriors, capable of overcoming the most formidable opponents."

C: 喂喂，只是一桩盗窃案而已！
E: Hey, hey, it's just a theft!

C: 当初是孤云阁下的纯美打动了我，我才心甘情愿随旅团奔赴归剑之旅…但遗憾的是，孤云阁下的故乡并非它的理想归处，纯美骑士理应善始善终。
E: Back then, it was the beauty of Master Guyun that impressed me, so I willingly embarked on the journey to return the sword... But unfortunately, Master Guyun's homeland is no longer the ideal place for it to return to. As a Knight of Beauty, I must not abandon it halfway.

C: 那人将自己最深的渴望：「结束战斗」，铭刻进了我的剑身。
E: My master had engraved his deepest desire into my blade: End war.

C: 好个「等一等」。记住今天，在将来的日子里，还会有许多需要我们「等一等」的事情出现。
E: "Be more patient." Well said. Remember what you learned today, because there will be many more situations in the future that will require you to "be more patient."

C: 我名唤银枝，来自「纯美骑士团」，受邀成为卡勒瓦拉使团的一员，护送宝剑「米卡•奇瓦沙」回归仙舟。
E: I am Argenti, a member of the Knights of Beauty. I was invited as part of the Kalevala delegation to escort the legendary Miekka Kivessä back to the Xianzhou.

C: 除此之外，我还在匣中找到一样东西。
E: Plus, I found something else inside the case.

C: 实在圆不上就算了吧……
E: If you can't justify it, don't bother...

C: 眼下，我们就先顺从她的心思，前往下一题的所在吧。希望这次能赶在猎犬家系之前，如果可以，我并不想使用忆者的能力。
E: Right now, let's follow her train of thought and head to the next puzzle. I hope this time we can get ahead of the Bloodhound Family. I want to try and avoid using my Memokeeper powers.

C: 那么请问——凶手是谁，又有什么证据能证明他是凶手呢？
E: Then, go ahead — who is the killer, and what evidence do you have to prove the case?

C: …不对劲。
E: ...Something's off.

C: 这盅鸡汤就不必灌了吧，将军。运势涨落是天理之常，不要想着耍小聪明逃避唷。
E: You don't need to flatter me, General. It's natural for fortune to fluctuate — there's no escaping it.

C: 太卜司不过是将吉凶摆在眼前，尽力做出对的选择罢了，并无扭转乾坤的神通手段。
E: The Divination Commission simply does its best to uncover the good and the bad and then make the right decisions. We have no magical means to turn the tide.

C: 是你露脸的好机会！
E: Your time to shine!

C: 你刚才说，罗浮内部出了叛徒？
E: You said there were traitors inside the Luofu?

C: 开拓任务也该有点新意了…
E: I think I know where this one is going...

C: 出发！
E: ...Let's go!

C: （就在这里听书吧。）
E: (Listen to his book analysis here.)

C: 都说了叫「罗浮三少」，那就是只有三个人！你不识数？
E: It's called a trio, which means only two — uh... th—three people are allowed! D—Don't you know how to count?

C: 三个小孩瞬间扭打成一团。你趁乱带着小姑娘离开了这个是非之地。
E: The three children start tussling with each other. You take the chance to lead the girl away from the site of conflict.

C: 你们别丢下我啊！
E: Hey! Don't leave me behind!

C: 你们俩怎么回事？为什么不可能是来招我的？
E: What are you guys thinking? It's me they want.

C: 这不是安慰，这是…现实。
E: I'm not trying to console her. This is... the reality.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
E: Ah, there you are, {NICKNAME}.

C: 放心好了，咱们师徒二人替他们选择的这个解决方案，绝对能让他们满意。
E: Don't worry. I believe they will be satisfied with our solution.

C: 哎哟哟，这可不好，是出什么事了吗？
E: Sounds awful. What happened?

C: 没想到您一番妙计，「放生帮」三个干部都自食其果了。
E: Thanks to your brilliant plan, the three leaders of the Unshackled have suffered the consequences of their actions.

C: 快看四周，尾巴大爷，咱们似乎已经摸到这个幻境的边缘了……
E: Look around us, Mr. Tail. I think we're at the edge of the illusion...

C: …不、不会是跟丢了吧……
E: ...D—Did we lose her...?

C: 呵呵，那个判官？隔着老远我就品尝到了她咸咸的恐惧了，那样的胆小鬼也能做判官？
E: Ha! THAT judge? I can taste her fear from miles away! That coward has no right calling herself a judge.

C: 别忘了我们之间的交易，只有我达成了目的，才会从你的身体里离开。
E: Now, don't forget about our deal. I will leave only once I've got what I wanted.

C: 我被附身了，救救我！
E: I got possessed! Help me!

C: 你操使那些乌合之众又算什么能耐，不过是些臭鱼烂虾，不堪一击。
E: That group of amateurs you've put together? Hah. They're nothing compared to me.

C: 尾巴干扰了浮烟，是他帮了咱们…但是…但是他却不在了……
E: Tail distracted Cirrus... He helped us so much... B—But now he's gone...

C: 还盯着我干什么，去安慰下那个玻璃心小姑娘吧。
E: What are you staring at? Go. Say something nice to the girl.

C: 这个幻境正在变化。
E: This illusion is shifting.

C: 白痴，这家伙当然是在骗人啊。
E: Stupid girl. This is obviously a trick!

C: 此地不宜久留，请即刻离开。
E: This place is dangerous. You should leave at once.

C: 那就好。除了「黄金的时刻」，我也推荐您去往其他的时刻游览…别处的风景也别有一番滋味。
E: That's good. Besides the Golden Hour, I'd also recommend you touring the other Moments... The sights in other places are all uniquely breathtaking in their own right.

C: 噢，不是…不过，也可以说是。
E: Oh, no... Well, I guess you could say that.

C: 嘀嗒，{NICKNAME}，过来，快过来！
E: Tick-tock, {NICKNAME}, get over here, quick!

C: 不用谢我，还是多感谢你自己的天赋和努力吧。要想成为万里挑一的歌者…你需要去找更好的老师、进行更刻苦的训练。
E: Don't thank me. Thank your own talent and hard work. If you wish to become a one-in-a-million singer... You must find a better teacher and embark on even more arduous training.

C: 还不是因为你，让我们操碎了心……
E: It's all because of you! We're worried to death...

C: 我们都懂…上次，还有人碰见你和格尔温太太的儿子一起吃饭呢。听说你们亲密得很，现在进展到哪一步了？小心那些有钱人，他们最擅长欺骗感情了。
E: We all know... Someone even ran into you having a meal with Mrs. Gerwin's son the other time. I heard you two were getting quite cozy too. So how far into the relationship are you? Beware of those rich folk. They're all masters at manipulating people's feelings.

C: 我是柯柯娜。
E: I am Cocona.
Ah...

C: …直到这片梦境崩解…
E: ...Till this Dreamscape disintegrates...

C: （咦，怎么换了一个人……）
E: (Hmm? It's someone different...)

C: 我来处理这事吧。
E: Let me settle this.

C: 我已经不再需要那个「自我」了。她给我带来的只有伤害。
E: I don't need that version of "myself" anymore. She only brings me harm.

C: 后来呢，你没打算复出吗？
E: What happened after that? Did you not plan to make a comeback?

C: 确认这就是梦境中的异常个体？
E: Are you certain this is the anomaly?

C: 莱斯利陷入一阵沉默。他微微低下头，细长的眉眼也随之耷拉下来；他绽露着奕奕神采的眼眸被悄悄藏起，英俊的面庞被青蓝色的阴影吞噬了一半。
E: Lesley falls silent for a moment. He lowers his head slightly, as his slender eyebrows droop. His eyes that radiate warmth and greatness become hidden from sight as his handsome face becomes half-devoured by the blue shadows.

C: 您离开后，我稍微冷静了下来，然后展开了思考…我开始质疑这场幻梦是否真的需要被打破。
E: However, after you left, I calmed down and began to think in greater depth... I began to question whether or not this fantasy of mine really needed to be shattered.

C: 咚、咚、咚……
E: *Knock, knock*

C: （然后他们集体入梦，打通了彼此之间的意识网络，通过联觉梦境重新塑造了莱斯利•迪恩的形象。）
E: (Then, they entered the dream as a group and connected their individual consciousness networks to recreate the image of Lesley Dean through the Synesthesia Dreamscape.)

C: …我、我知道了，我相信您不会把这件事说出去。
E: ...I, okay. I believe that you will not tell anyone about this.

C: 姬莲——应该就是这位的名字吧？
E: Jillian... That must be this fan's name?

C: 他是属于我的…他是属于我的…他是属于我的……
E: He is mine... He's mine... mine...

C: 但…不知怎么的，我感觉很安心。这种踏实感，我在这梦境中从未有过。
E: But... I don't know why, I feel at ease. I've never felt this peace of mind inside the dream world like this.

C: 再多了解一下「罗莎」。
E: I'd like to learn more about Rosa.

C: 不，让我再想想
E: No, let me think about it.

C: 家族秘书向你欠身致意，在征得你同意后施施然离开……
E: The Family's secretary bows politely and, upon receiving your approval, steadily departs...

C: 首先，我觉得原有的船员素质不错，但还有进步的空间，比如说——他们的制服与工作分区并不统一，作为只招待名流贵宾的空艇，这实在是有些失礼。
E: Firstly, I think the existing crew's sense of professionalism is decent, but there is room for improvement. For example, their uniforms do not match their job's roles and responsibilities. As an airship that services distinguished guests, this is a slight of manners.

C: 你见识到了罗莎的雷厉风行——
E: You have certainly witnessed Rosa's whirlwind-like vigor...

C: 专业的团队才会给我们的贵宾留下深刻的印象。
E: Only the most professional of teams will leave a lasting impression on our VIP guests.

C: 船长，请随我来。
E: Captain, please follow me.

C: 提出这个建议的船员之前曾师从某位油画大师，对无名客的传奇倾慕已久，因而早早画下了您的画像。是否要挂上去，请您自由决断。
E: The crew member who suggested this was an apprentice of a master painter who also long-admired the legends of the Nameless, and had your portrait painted long ago. Please feel free to decide whether you want to hang up the painting.

C: 你在干嘛呢？
E: What are you doing?

C: 那么，这里就全权交给您了。祝您玩得…呃，不对，祝您上班开心！
E: Now, then, I'm bequeathing my entire role to you. Have a great day playing, or rather, working!

C: 一整瓶冰冰凉凉的苏乐达下肚，你现在感觉棒极了。若不是文学造诣实在有限，你现在简直有意立即作诗两首。
E: You feel incredible after sinking a whole bottle of cold SoulGlad. If it weren't for your limited literary abilities, you'd probably have written a poem or two about it already.

C: 你原本预订的是一间经济客房，现在我们可以免费为你升级为「豪华客房」、「高级客房」或者「舒适客房」！
E: You booked an economy room to begin with, but we are now able to upgrade you to a Deluxe Suite, an Executive Suite, or a Comfort Suite — free of charge!

C: …但与他交谈过后我方才发觉，那副冰冷的机械外壳包裹着一颗滚烫的侠义之心。他配得上「纯美」的眷顾。
E: ...But after talking with him, I realized that this cold robot shell contained a blazing hot, chivalrous heart. He surely was worthy of the Beauty's favor.

C: 这、这里是「四尺圣堂」的聚会地…很、很抱歉，我不能让您进去！
E: Th—This is the gathering site of the Four-Foot Hall... I... I'm sorry I can't let you in!

C: （用来启动小小哈努行动的电视机…主意来了！）
E: (It's the TV that activates Hanu's Adventure... I have an idea!)

C: 嗨呀，你们好！
E: Hi, everyone!

C: …装什么装，你不也是两个系统时之前才学会打牌的吗？那段子也是你现搜的吧，别想靠这个唬住我！
E: ...Who are you trying to fool? You only learned this game a couple of system hours ago! And you just looked up that line, didn't you? Don't try to bluff me with that!

C: 离他们来还有一段时间，现在先专心送别仙舟的客人吧。
E: We still have some time before they arrive. Let's focus on sending off our Xianzhou guests for now.

C: 过了不久，朱明仙舟的客人来到了港口……
E: After a few moments, the Zhuming guests arrived at the port...

C: 事情的大致经过，本座已经了解了。虽然这是巧合，但是你们出现在这里也是不争的事实。不如我们各退一步…「各退一步」这词有点不合适，就当你们在迎接本座凯旋吧。
E: I understand what has happened. Although this was merely a coincidence, it is still a fact that you are all here now. How about you meet me halfway... "Meet me halfway" is a strange expression for this, but why don't we pretend you were awaiting my triumphant return?

C: 那太卜大人呢？
E: Then where is the Master Diviner?

C: 非要说有什么遗憾的话……是我没有尽到身为上司的职责，庇护下属的周全。
E: If I had to share my regrets... It would be that I was not able to fulfill my duty as a leader and protect the safety of my subordinates.

C: 上一份。
E: Previous one.

C: 师傅的手稿出事了？不会吧！
E: Something happened to the manuscript? No way!

C: 连他的手稿都保护不了，我还算什么工造司的工匠。
E: I can't even protect a manuscript. What kind of Artisanship Commission craftsman am I?

C: 我会给你们外行人讲解一下星槎的制造原理，你们也算是不虚此行了吧。
E: I'll explain the manufacturing principles to you laypeople, so at least the whole trip won't be in vain.

C: …星槎是由种子长出来的？
E: ...Starskiffs grow out of seeds?

C: 就算是我在资料上看过千八百次，到现场一看，我还是觉得不可思议。
E: Even though I've read about it a thousand times, I still feel a sense of the incredible in the face of such wonder.

C: 不太顺利，实在没好意思展示给你们看。
E: It isn't going well, so I'm too embarrassed to show the design to you.

C: 铖杰师傅，看看你都错过了什么。
E: See what you've missed, Chengjie.

C: 不许捡起来。
E: Don't pick them up.

C: 又守擂成功了——恭喜你啊，卢卡。
E: Another title defended — congrats, Luka.

C: …原来这位就是帮助上下层重建了联系的「开拓者」？真是幸会！
E: ...So this is the trailblazer who helped reunite the Overworld with the Underworld? It's truly a pleasure to meet you!

C: 卢卡这小子，学得很快。一开始，我也搞不清楚他喜不喜欢我教他的东西——搏击，兵器，战略之类的——他也不怎么吭声，只是闷着头学。
E: Luka was a fast learner. At first, I couldn't figure out if he liked what I was teaching him — fighting, weapons, strategy, etc. He didn't talk a lot — just kept his head down.

C: 脑子里一直有个想挑战的强者，但自己却一直没法接近他…那感觉可太憋屈了！多亏你们跟史瓦罗达成了和解，我才能有这个机会——我绝对不想错过！
E: It's a terrible feeling to have a powerful opponent in your head but never be able to get close to him. It's all thanks to your patching things up with Svarog that I'm able to have this opportunity now — I'm not gonna miss it for the world!

C: 那还…真是……
E: That's... really...

C: 不过…这些都还只是玛吉的梦想，不知要过多久才能实现……
E: But... all that is just my dream. I dunno how long it's gonna be till it becomes reality...

C: 嘘，她要过来了！
E: Shh, she's coming this way!

C: 好险…还好没跟丢。快，追上去！
E: Phew... thank goodness we didn't lose him. Quick, let's keep up the chase!

C: 列车刚刚收到了一条从罗浮仙舟发来的消息，从摘要来看，似乎会和接下来的行程计划有冲突。
E: Just got a message from the Xianzhou Luofu. Looks like it'll conflict with our original schedule.

C: 对对对，去绥园！那里可是罗浮著名的灵异圣地，到处都飘着些调皮的小鬼火，可有意思了！
E: Oh, yeah! Fyxestroll Garden! It's famous for supernatural stuff, with those mischievous heliobi floating around! It's pretty fascinating!

C: 只要事后各方手续勘验完成，我们会连人带货一起放行的。
E: Once we're done with the formalities, we'll let you and your cargo go.

C: 喔，是你啊。你好。
E: Oh, it's you. Hello.

C: 小小误会，「赔罪」言重了。耳闻朱明仙舟剑术与匠艺位于巅峰者有「焰轮八叶」的美名传世，今日见到名列其间的云璃小姐…确有火一般的风姿心性。
E: It's a small misunderstanding, and an apology would be too much. I've heard about the Zhuming's incredible swordplay and craftsmanship, most notably the legendary Flamewheel Octet. Seeing Miss Yunli, who is among those ranks today... Well I must say, she definitely has that fiery edge.

C: 你们叫多少人来都不可能说服我！嗯？！怎么是你啊？！
E: Don't think you can possibly convince me! Uh huh!? Why are you here!?

C: 陪彦卿解决公司的麻烦。
E: I'm here to help Yanqing sort out the trouble caused by the IPC.

C: 生物组织？这箱子里装着活物？
E: Biological tissue? Does this crate contain living things?

C: 船当然可以离去，但货却走不得。
E: Your ship can leave whenever you want, but I'm afraid I can't say the same for the cargo.
"Only" forty-seven years?

C: 唔，说的不错。
E: Hmm, can't argue with that.

C: 灵砂大人才刚到罗浮，生活还未安顿妥当，工作也尚未交接完成，实是繁忙，无暇见客。你请回吧。
E: Master Lingsha just arrived on the Luofu and is still settling in and getting her work in order. She's quite busy and unable to meet guests right now. Please understand.

C: 但您放心，只要她看完诊，立刻就到您了。而且那位贵客说了，您此次诊费由她全部承担。
E: But don't worry. As soon as she's done, it'll be your turn. By the way, the esteemed guest said she'll cover your medical expenses as compensation.

C: 就你会做人？只要灵砂姐姐需要，云璃当然乐意拔剑分忧。
E: Oh, you think you're the only one who knows how to behave? If Lingsha needs anything, I'll gladly draw my sword and help her out.

C: 下绝地纪，灭——
E: To earth, it descends with might, eradicate!

C: 唉，彦卿不想这么早领略成年人勾心斗角的事情啊…只希望飞霄和怀炎二位将军能明察事实。演武仪典到来前，罗浮之上可不要再生波折了。
E: *sigh* I really don't want to get caught up in grown-up games so soon... I just hope Generals Feixiao and Huaiyan can see the truth. We don't need any more chaos on the Luofu before the Wardance.

C: 虽说胜者尚未揭晓，也未必就是你二人，但若想得到这彩头，我要你们联手教出一名学徒，让他登上演武仪典，至少赢下一场胜利。
E: We don't know who the winner will be, and it might not be either of you, but if you're eyeing that prize, you'll need to work together. I want you to take on an apprentice who will take part in the Wardance and win at least one match.

C: 为什么不选我？
E: Why don't you choose me?

C: 这么说来，云璃小姐是应承了。彦卿，你觉得呢？
E: So, Miss Yunli has already agreed. What do you say, Yanqing?

C: 转职成为列车第一剑客吧。
E: Time for you to become the best swordmaster on the Express.

C: 以三月小姐的天资，若再肯下个几十年的苦功，也不是没有可能击败云璃的。
E: With your talent, Miss March, if you dedicate a few more decades to training, you might eventually be able to defeat Yunli.

C: 这东西可以救人，也可以杀人，派上的用场可比你们手中的刀剑多多了。
E: This thing can save lives or take them. It's more powerful than the swords in your hands.

C: 欸欸欸，怎么突然骂起人来了？我也不过是给大家普及医药知识，可不是要教唆各位投毒啊。
E: Hey, hey, why the insults all of a sudden? I'm just sharing some medical knowledge here, not persuading you to poison anyone.

C: 作为云骑的一员，将军的弟子，我背负了很多，而且注定要背负更多的东西。
E: As a member of the Cloud Knights and the general's apprentice, I've had a weight on my shoulders, and I know there's still more to shoulder.

C: 趁着几人暂时离去，你如履薄冰地来到一个箱子旁，钻了进去。
E: Taking advantage of the temporary absence of the group, you cautiously approach a crate and crawl inside.

C: 神策将军不愧是文化人，几句话赶得上一本仙舟成语大全了，我喜欢。
E: Just as I expected from our sophisticated Divine Foresight. You have a way with words. I like it.

C: 在我看来，这些统统是蚊蝇无意义的嗡鸣。相隔星海，罗浮上所发生的事，唯有神策将军最清楚其危机和背后隐含的意义……
E: Personally, I think all these rumors are meaningless drivel. Across the sea of stars, the Divine Foresight knows better than anyone else what happened on the Luofu and the meaning behind it...

C: 你是说，曜青仙舟也…？
E: You mean, the Xianzhou Yaoqing is also...?

C: 它本该是个稳妥的关押之处，可惜即便是这样的牢笼也没能困住恶兽。
E: The cage should have been virtually impossible to break out of, yet even it had failed to trap the savage beast for long.

C: 丹恒轻轻拍了拍你的手。
E: Dan Heng gently pats your hand.

C: 寒鸦身为问字部判官，将会接手此次证言记录。
E: As one of the judges from the Interrogation Division, I'll be recording your testimony today.

C: 不过以两位的身手我想不必担心。
E: But with your skills, I don't think you need to worry about that.

C: 只不过幽囚狱的路既是为十王司人员所设的通道，也是为犯人所设的障碍。
E: Well, the paths here serve as both passageways for the Ten-Lords Commission and barriers for the prisoners.

C: 嗯？两位听见什么响动了吗？
E: Hmm? Did you hear something just now?

C: 想来演武仪典召开，总有不轨之徒蠢蠢欲动。只是货物与劫匪一同被扔进监狱的事情，我倒是从没见过。
E: I had a feeling there would be trouble during the Wardance. But throwing both the pirates and the cargo in jail? That's a new one.

C: 呃啊啊啊啊啊——
E: Arrrrgh...

C: 保存实力为先，优先镇伏落单的囚犯和劫狱者。奉十王敕，凡有脱狱、劫狱者，不禁杀伤。
E: Let's preserve our strength and first take down the isolated prisoners. By decree of the Ten Lords, all prison breakers and intruders shall be apprehended, dead or alive.

C: 这真是最糟糕的情况了。人质在手，狱卒们对这些家伙恐怕也无能为力。万一有什么闪失，罗浮仙舟与曜青仙舟的关系…恐怕也将陷入不可挽回的撕裂。
E: This is the worst situation. With hostages in their grasp, the prison guards can't do anything about the prisoners. If anything happens to the messengers, the relationship between the Yaoqing and the Luofu... could be irreversibly damaged.

C: 必须救下使节，逃离此处，向外递送消息。只要还有一线希望，就绝不能放弃！
E: We must rescue the messengers, get out of here, and spread the news. We mustn't give up as long as there's a glimmer of hope!

C: 你就是那个逃脱的曜青使者！
E: Hey, you're the Yaoqing messenger who fled!

C: 幽囚狱劫狱事件后\n\n神策府中
E: After the Shackling Prison Break\n\nIn the Seat of Divine Foresight

C: 我与身后这两位将会下到幽狱深处探查线索。
E: I, and the two behind me, will go deeper into the prison to investigate.

C: 逃？现在想要逃跑的人可不是我。
E: Run away, you said? Well, I'm not the one who's trying to run away right now.

C: （四下看看）
E: (Look around)

C: 没、没什么。
E: No, it's nothing.

C: 没事，我只是随便逛逛。
E: It's nothing. I'm just wandering around.

C: 这位云骑大哥会帮你的。
E: This Cloud Knight will help you.

C: 啊，我明白了！曜青的医士，你是最可悲的那一种人——你追求力量，是为了与别人分享它，用它来行善。
E: Ah, I see! You're the most pitiful of them all, healer of the Yaoqing! You seek power to share it with others and do good.

C: 我是刺入狼心的锋镝，我赐你速死。
E: I am the arrow that pierces the wolf's heart. I grant you a swift death.

C: 剑术练习还真是不容易呢。
E: Swordplay is a truly difficult art!

C: 贱畜，受死！受死！
E: Die, you lowly beast! Die!

C: 你能主动现身，也省去了我们一番功夫。
E: But, the fact that you have willingly shown yourself saves us some time.

C: 得蒙呼雷大人的恩赐，我分享了他的眼界与狼血——都蓝的子裔，应当为狼群的胜利而生，也要为狼群的胜利而死！
E: Thanks to the gift granted to us by Lord Hoolay, I have shared his vision and his blood... The descendants of Duran should live for the victory of the pack, and they should die for it as well!

C: 要说为什么的话…因为我也希望，演武仪典能顺利召开。
E: Why...? Because I also want the Wardance to go smoothly.

C: 你有发现有「狼」的情况吗？
E: Have you noticed any "wolves"?

C: 该不会是步离人伪装的吧？
E: You're not a borisin in disguise, are you?

C: 走这边，我们到的还不算晚！
E: This way, we're not too late!

C: 那你可得留神，被幼崽打败的滋味，你这头老狼未必消化得了啊！
E: I wouldn't let my guard down if I were you. It's about time this old wolf tasted defeat at the hands of a young cub!

C: 将军，地面上的情况还好吗？
E: General, how are things on the ground?

C: 你吞下了「赤月」，你有资格成为步离人的战首。
E: You devoured the Crimson Moon. You are worthy to become the borisin's Warhead.

C: 呃…你是哪位？陛下，这是您的臣民吗？
E: Err... Who might you be? Your Majesty, is this a subject of yours?

C: 唉…这次就算了，我也习惯了。但是，陛下可是用自己的名誉担保，才把你捞出来的。你要是故态复萌，那就是打陛下的脸，明白吗？
E: Sigh... I'll let it go this time. I'm used to it. However, I've placed my own honor on the line to get you out. If you return to your old ways, it'll be a slap in my face. Understood?

C: …嘀嗒！快过来！快过来！
E: ...Tick-tock! Over here! Quickly!

C: 朕现在也开始担心，这群刁民可能开始谋划在现实中对朕下手了……
E: And now I'm starting to worry, that those thugs may be plotting to end my life in reality...

C: 谁？谁在求救？卡在电话亭里了？这也太不小心了…稍等，朕马上就来！
E: Who's calling for help? Stuck in a phone booth? How careless... Hold on. I will be right there!

C: 哎…袭击了她这么多次，给了她这么多次强刺激，她都完全想不起来…事情可能比预估的还要棘手。
E: *sigh* ...Even after so many ambushes, after assassinating her so many times, she still can't remember at all... This is more distressing than anticipated.

C: 能别说车轱辘话了吗？
E: Can we stop repeating ourselves?

C: 灰骑士！快跑！带着她跑啊！那疯女人要杀了所有有继承权的人，斩草除根！快跑！
E: Gray Knight! Run! Take her with you! That mad woman will exterminate all successors to the throne! Hurry!

C: 朕与摄政者们的矛盾越来越激烈、越来越不可调和。
E: My conflicts with the regents became intense, and our relations gradually soured.

C: 您…您这是何意啊……
E: You... What do you mean...?

C: 微臣只不过是用自家的产业给灾民赈灾…这又做错了什么？
E: I was merely using my own assets to provide relief to disaster victims... How is that wrong?

C: 灰骑士，朕最忠诚的灰骑士……
E: Gray Knight, my most loyal Gray Knight...

C: 但她曾是暴君又如何呢？正如她所行的善永远也不能遮蔽她所做的恶，她所做的恶也分毫无法污毁她的所行的善。
E: So what if she was a tyrant? The good deeds she accomplished cannot be overshadowed by the wrongs she committed, just as the evils she committed cannot tarnish the good she had done.

C: 因为这里是匹诺康尼，全银河最大的销金窟，充斥着邪恶、贪婪与背叛。
E: Because this is Penacony, the greatest money pit in the cosmos. It is full of evil, greed and betrayal.

C: 老人的语气中透出一丝激动。
E: The elderly man's voice is palpable with excitement.

C: …请进吧，二位。
E: ...Come in.

C: 别担心，我哪也不去…我哪也去不了。我在这里等你回来，孩子。
E: Don't worry. I'm not going anywhere, because I can't. I'll wait here for your return.

C: 哈哈哈，那倒不一定。我支持更具商业挖掘潜质的理论，仅此而已。
E: Hahaha, that's not totally true. I'll just support any theory with the most commercial value.

C: 长官！我们找到卡尔德隆•查德威克博士了！
E: Captain! We've located Professor Calderon Chadwick!

C: 没有入住的痕迹。
E: No signs of occupancy.

C: 乔伊摇了摇头，她弯下腰，轻柔地敲了敲门板。房内传来窸窸窣窣的响动。
E: Joey shakes her head, bends down, and softly knocks on the door. A rustling can be heard from behind it.

C: 而我有世界上最好的家人。温柔的乔伊、不着调的冯恩，还有巴罗和费歇尔…是他们教我关于筑梦的一切……
E: And I had the world's best family. The gentle Joey, the eccentric Vaughn, and Barlow and Fischer... They taught me everything about dreamweaving...

C: 谢谢，别再来第二次了。老年鸟受不了这个。
E: Thank you, and don't do it again. This old bird can't take it.

C: 好不容易聚在一起，应该留个纪念啾！
E: Now that we're finally together, we should record this occasion, tweet!

C: 我来还东西。
E: I've come to return something.

C: 就是，说不定又是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的遗民，手脚真不干净……
E: Yeah, that one might even be another remnant of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}'s worshipers. Look at them sneaking about...

C: 这些人关我们什么事？
E: What do these people have to do with us?

C: 我再看看。
E: I'll take another look around here.

C: 呵呵，你可不要搞错。那些泰坦们要么陷入疯狂、要么无所作为，这才导致生灵涂炭。
E: Heh-heh, don't get it wrong. Those Titans were either mired in madness, or simply did nothing. That was what caused the devastation of life.

C: 咳…灰发的英雄，我们只是盟友，你越界了。
E: Ahem... Gray-haired hero, we are only allies. You've crossed a line.

C: 圣城应该什么样，是你说了算的吗？你能代表全部奥赫玛人？这座城邦到底是冰冷如铁还是热烈如火，应该由它的公民来评价才对。
E: Who are you to decide what the holy city should be? Can you represent all Okhemans? Whether this state is cold as steel or fiery with passion, it's up to its citizens to judge.
Kill...

C: 这群泰坦眷属就聚集在<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>中，也只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪，拜托了！
E: These Titankin are gathered in <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color>. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.

C: 得了吧，它要是看到别人变成碎块下锅就能消气，就应该是掌管厨艺的泰坦！
E: Are you serious? If they are the type to be appeased by seeing others diced and cast into a pot, would that not make them the Titan of cooking!?

C: 能先把我奖励结了吗？
E: Can I just take my rewards and go?

C: 我曾于黑潮之中救下一位逃难的公主，为表感谢，她才将此国宝赠予我。我每日能感受到这丝线在对我低语，呼唤着我前往那遥远的异乡……
E: I once rescued a princess as she fled from the black tide. As her thanks, she gifted me this national treasure. Every day I can hear it whispering to me, calling me to go to a distant land...

C: 这群人的脸变得真快…
E: These people changed their tune quickly...

C: 啊？不用这么较真吧，别忘了她可是俄诺涅……
E: Huh? Surely it's not that serious? Don't forget, she is a guest of Elder Oenone...

C: 没错，审判她！连同过去伤害我们奥赫玛人的罪责一起审判！
E: That's right! Take her for sentencing! Judge her for this damage to Okhema alongside the past offenses she has committed against our people!

C: 这是什么意思？难道帕里斯对那个眷属……
E: What is he saying? Surely Paris and that Titankin aren't...

C: 天谴猎手一个人遥望着远方的刻法勒，那石铸的面庞上看不出任何情绪。
E: The Furiae Archer sits alone, staring at Kephale in the distance. Their carved stone face shows no emotions at all.

C: 这…这是泰坦们的语言，它们应该会听得懂。
E: That... That was the language of the Titans. I'm sure they understand.

C: 这是在搞什么？
E: What are you playing at?

C: 是那纤细的金丝还牵引着我的手，不令我的箭镞刺破那薄弱的浪漫——
E: It is the thin golden thread that still guides my hand. It will not allow my arrowheads to pierce that fragile romance...

C: 那是什么东西？
E: What's that?

C: 这台装置好像缺了什么东西，看来还得靠扎格列斯来帮忙了……
E: There seems to be something missing from this device. It looks like I'll need to find Zagreus...

C: 那神谕…要怎么……
E: Then that prophecy... How do we...

C: 我可能会成为战士。
E: I may have become a warrior.

C: 你看到黑潮吞没了大地，塞纳托斯引领的死亡带来枯萎和朽烂。
E: You see the black tide swallowing the land. The death led by Thanatos brings decay and rot.

C: 我害怕命中注定的未来。
E: I fear for my destined future.

C: 随着少女失去意识，来自往昔的旧忆也逐渐消散。
E: As she loses consciousness, the memories of the past gradually fades as well.

C: 和圣城卫士说的一样。
E: It's exactly what the city guard said...

C: 到头来，我们母女二人都成了杜撰神谕的骗子。
E: In the end, both my mother and I became liars who fabricated prophecies.

C: 决定了！就勉为其难地借用一下欧洛尼斯的预言算碑吧。
E: It's decided! Let's make do and use Oronyx's prophecy tablet.

C: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
E: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

C: 太好了！放心，吉娜，我会好好爱惜这本书的！
E: Perfect! Don't worry, Gina, I'll take good care of this book!

C: {NICKNAME}？正巧，本座正打算造访星穹列车，你便先找上门来了。有什么事？
E: {NICKNAME}? What perfect timing. I was just about to visit the Astral Express. What's the matter?

C: （叫好）。
E: (cheer)

C: 好，好！
E: Alright, alright!

C: 那可真是：惊回首，乱石瓦砾墟场。销尽也。
E: And truly it was thus: Startled, he turned his head only to behold a wasteland of shattered stone and broken tiles. All had perished, all was spent.

C: 好，好！
E: Alright, alright!

C: 那比我们多诶。
E: That's more than we've got.

C: 学习就是我的全部爱好，我总觉得学的还不够多，要追上大家的脚步，我还差得远呢。
E: Learning is my only hobby. I can never feel like I have learned enough. I have a long way to go.

C: 我学会了！原来如此！谢谢{NICKNAME}老师！
E: Learning finished. I got it! Thank you, {NICKNAME}!

C: 你明白什么了？
E: What do you understand?

C: 直接说正事。
E: Get straight to the point.

C: 咦，你回来了！怎么样，找到零件了吗？
E: Oh, you're back! How is it? Did you find any parts?

C: 关于磁悬浮机器人故障的成因——
E: About the cause behind the maglev robots breaking down—

C: 能不能说点我听得懂的…
E: Can you explain it to me like I'm five...

C: 这么快就修好了？
E: He fixed them this quickly?

C: 我可是把这个故事的改编权交给了他，总得有点回报……
E: I gave him the right to adapt this story. He's gotta give me something in return...

C: 你有见过一个神秘的马桶吗？
E: Have you seen a mysterious toilet seat?

C: 好了不说了，我先记录下它的数据，再加个定位，免得待会儿又找不到了。
E: Well, I should record its data and install a tracking device to make sure I don't lose it again.

C: 听说你走向人生巅峰了？
E: I heard you got a big break in your career.

C: 而且我记得…这款早就售罄了，有钱都买不到。我说你呀，还是别瞎指导人了。
E: Also, I'm pretty sure that type sold out ages ago. You can't even buy it with money now. Don't mislead other people.

C: 「真心」？加点钱能买到吗？
E: "True"? What if I pay extra?

C: 好了，该去帮我找朋友了。和以往一样，要找的人由我来指定。
E: All right, it's time to help me make friends. Just like before, I will decide who I want to make friends with.

C: 将和罗希的谈话内容转述给了华劳斯……
E: You convey what Rossy said to Wallace...

C: 照片？什么照片？
E: Photo? What photo?

C: 一定要赶在「地火」反应过来之前把东西送到，嘿嘿！
E: We have to deliver it before the Wildfire realizes, hee-hee!

C: 你的「线人」是谁？
E: Who is your informant?

C: 可恶，大人的记性都这么差嘛？
E: Ugh, do all grown-ups have such bad memory?

C: 那个，抱歉，这个请求听着可能有点突然——如果你有时间的话，能不能去帮我买一束花？
E: Uh, I'm sorry to make such a sudden request, but... if you have time, could you buy me a bunch of flowers?

C: 嗨，帮人帮到底吧。
E: *sigh* I can't really stop halfway, can I?

C: 我现在明白了，哪怕我这二十多年都没干出什么丰功伟绩，家人也会一直陪在我身边。我之前焦虑的那些事…啧，想想都觉得好笑，哈哈哈。
E: I get it now... Even if I don't have any great achievements over these past twenty-plus years, my family will always be by my side. What I was worrying over... Tsk, it's funny to think about now, haha.

C: 危险吗？我还不想为科学献身…
E: Is it dangerous? I'm not yet ready to sacrifice for science.

C: 同流合污？
E: You mean balderdash, as in "complete and utter balderdash"?

C: 啊对对对，就是这个！刚才我的脑子被大宇宙电磁波给干扰了，一下没想起来……
E: Ah yes — that's the one! My brainwaves were momentarily interrupted by high cosmic radiation levels, rendering my memory sluggish...

C: 不过…你确实蛮聪明的，下次再来挑战吧。…不不不，你还是别来了，怪麻烦的。
E: But... you really are quite smart. Let's give it another try next time. No... no no, actually don't come back. It's too much hassle.

C: 「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」。
E: "Fourteen."

C: 哎，明明闯过了之前两关…真是功亏一篑。没事，这不怪你。是那群官僚太不尊重科学了。
E: Tsk, I already made it through their first two hoops, only to fall at the final hurdle like this. That's alright, and it's not your fault. Those bureaucrats have so little respect for the sciences.

C: 我刚才只是装傻罢了。
E: I was just acting stupid then.

C: 但小女子会让自己喜欢上这本小说的~
E: But I'll make sure that I fall in love with this novel~

C: 长话短说——今天我原本与人约好在此地碰头，那人说要借宾馆房间一用。
E: Long story short — I am supposed to meet someone here today, as they wanted to borrow a hotel room.

C: …哈哈，开玩笑，我才不会相信这种借口。你还不如说他翻垃圾桶翻出病了呢。
E: ...Yeah, right. I'm not going to believe such an excuse. You might as well tell me he got sick from going through Belobog's trashcans.

C: 谢谢你为我跑腿，这是我仅有的部分积蓄，请你收下……
E: Thank you for running the errand for me. These are my only savings. Please take them...

C: 其实事情是这样的——你也知道我每天都专注于推广「深蓝骗局反诈技术」，对吧？
E: Okay — You know I spend my time every day promoting techniques against Dark-Blue Scams, right?

C: 你可以这么理解。
E: You can think of it that way, yes.

C: 他们说…让我在这里乖乖等着…可是他们一直都没回来……
E: They said... I should be a good kid and wait for them here... But they're still not back...

C: 你已经…不属于这个世界了。
E: You... don't belong to this world anymore.

C: 在你面前的孩子抹了把泪，向你指示的方向奔去——仿佛她的父母确实仍在等候——仿佛这裂界描摹生成的旧日街道依旧真实存在。
E: The child before you wipes her tears away and runs toward the direction you pointed to as if her parents are indeed waiting for her, as if these foregone streets sculpted by the Fragmentum indeed still exist.

C: 盖因你看见自己衣着单薄地匍匐在贝洛伯格的郊外积雪中，寒风如刀，刮得你脸疼心也作痛，你被冻得瑟瑟发抖。
E: You envision yourself crawling through the snow in the suburbs of Belobog, dressed in thin clothes. The frigid wind slices through you like a dagger, causing pain to shoot through your skin and your soul.

C: 这茶叫什么名字来着？
E: What's the name of this tea again?

C: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
E: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

C: 你接过这杯茶，徐徐喝下，你的内心很平静，这一路走来你见过无数匪夷所思的事，区区一杯茶，如何能令你的心湖波澜再起？
E: You accept the cup of tea and slowly drink it. Your mind remains calm — you have had your fair share of bizarre encounters on your journey, and how could a cup of tea possibly surprise you now?

C: 你站在修复的雕像前出神。人们总说时光一去不复回，可在这里，连破碎的雕像都能重获新生。
E: You stand before the restored statue in a mesmerized daze. People always say time can never return, but here, even a broken statue can be given a lease of new life.

C: 毛巾架上摆放着洁白的浴巾，你伸手轻抚，意外地发现每条毛巾都带着水汽——这让你想起浴场里流传的笑话：在法吉娜的神殿里，就连毛巾也不愿意保持干燥，这就是艾格勒与法吉娜关系不和的来源。
E: Clean white towels are draped over the towel racks. You graze them lightly, surprisingly realizing that every towel is wet to the touch. You recall a joke that regularly makes its rounds in the baths: In Phagousa's temple, even towels aren't willing to stay dry — this is the origin of Aquila and Phagousa's terse relations.

C: 曾经的铸魂区。工匠们在这里为雕像注入「纷争」的力量，驱动它向悬锋之敌挥剑。
E: The former Soul-Forging Zone. Here, craftsmen would inject the power of Strife into statues and have them brandish their swords against the enemies of Kremnos.

C: 懂了，这是只「里拉精」——依照经验，你给出判断。
E: You've got it, it's a Lyre Fairy — your experience lends weight to your deduction.

C: 「从这冰一般的池子出去后，我何尝不能自称四月八。」
E: "When I emerge from this icy bath, I'd practically be April 8th."

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 黄金裔的浴场
E: Chrysos Heir Bathhouse

C: 「我是不羁的风，飘然而至，与你的火焰相拥。
E: "I am the untamed wind, arriving unbidden to embrace your flame.

C: 泰坦断崖
E: The Titan Cliff

C: 大人，这种力气活还是我来吧，您对自己的身体应该多点关心的。
E: My lord, let me do the heavy work. You must take care of your health.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>三角</color>的砝码象征命运，把它放在<color=#dbc291ff>左侧</color>，<color=#dbc291ff>站在右侧托盘</color>的朝圣者便能如愿进入神殿深处。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The triangle</color> weight symbolizes destiny. Place it on the <color=#dbc291ff>left</color>, <color=#dbc291ff>and those pilgrims standing on the right tray</color> can venture deep into the temple.

C: 伊格尼斯，你只知督战勇士魁首、王翼冠军之名，却不知我还有另一重同样光荣的名号——
E: Ignis, you only know me by my titles of champion warrior and King's Aegis. What you do not know is that I bear another, equally glorious title...

C: 每个清晨，学者们都在在此列队而坐，聆听贤者们讲述智慧的奥秘。长此以往，他们在台阶上留下了坐姿的印记，这大概便是知识沉淀的模样吧。
E: Each morning, scholars would sit in neat rows here, listening to sages unveil the mysteries of wisdom. Over time, their seated forms left imprints on the steps — perhaps this is what the sediment of knowledge looks like.

C: 若是在繁盛的城邦，学者们都将惊叹隐藏其中的创思是多么地巧妙且富有想象吧。但可惜，她从未有机会将自己的所思所想展示给世界。
E: In a thriving city-state, scholars would surely marvel at the ingenuity and imagination concealed within these. Sadly, she never had the opportunity to share her thoughts with the world.

C: …普通的人类。
E: Ordinary humans...

C: 但你不会后悔，因为你已经爱上了这种感觉。
E: Yet you won't regret any of this, since you've fallen in love with this feeling.

C: ——未曾得那万目之一目相视，却甘与一剑之万锋相敌。
E: ...Though I have never met the gaze of ten thousand eyes, I will fight against the blades of ten thousand enemies.
...Hmph.

C: 也许在当前的视角下，它孤零零地飘浮着，与旁边那些脚踏实地的家伙看上去并不一样。
E: Perhaps from this vantage point, it seems to float alone, different from the others that stand firm on the ground.

C: 刻法勒信徒曾说过，地板的想法并不代表刻法勒的想法——最终解释权归刻法勒祭司们所有。
E: Kephale's followers have said that the floor might not reflect Kephale's true thoughts — ultimately, the final word belongs to Kephale's priests.

C: 瑟希斯在上，<color=#dbc291ff>让你用一个绝妙的题目考考本狮</color>，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, <color=#dbc291ff>allow you to test me with a stumper</color>. We shall see how my grasp on intellect fares!

C: 谁是翁法罗斯最美丽的人？
E: Who is the most beautiful in all of Amphoreus?

C: 谁是翁法罗斯最厉害的人？
E: Who is the strongest in all of Amphoreus?

C: 来吧，让你考考我！
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

C: 石榴汁双拼羊乳！
E: Pomegranate juice and milk mix!

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「听不懂你在说什么欧…还是照水面看看吼了」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "You're confusing me... Forget it, I'll check in the water." )∋

C: 周遭的时间流速变得缓慢，就像是浓黑迷雾笼罩了你，你再也看不清眼前的一切，头顶似有星光闪烁，你只得努力抬头张望。
E: The flow of time around you slows as if a dense black mist is enveloping you. Your vision blurs, and distant starlight flickers above — you strain to look up.

C: 希望你没有晕船的问题。
E: Let's hope you're not seasick.

C: 「猜猜我现在在哪？」——发送。
E: "Guess where I am right now?" — Send.

C: 沉溺在骄纵、仇恨和他人的苦痛中自得其乐。永不满足，永无尽头。
E: Wallow in pride, hatred, and others' pain. Never satisfied, never complete.

C: 昔日流淌着黄金流体的圣烛此时暗淡无光，颓然地熄灭在黄昏的暮色里。
E: The sacred candle, once flowing with golden fluid, now lies dim and extinguished, helplessly fading into the dusk of twilight.

C: 你凝神观察，虚影的末端正以缓慢却无可置疑的速度侵吞着大理石，横切面如蠕虫般涌动。
E: You focus intently, observing as the edges of the shadow slowly but unmistakably consume the marble, the cross-section writhing like worms.

C: 赛飞儿…不知道她还好吗？
E: Cipher... I wonder if she's okay?

C: 以后，他会成为村里的新猎户。我也能好好歇歇，每天安心钓鱼、喝茶、享清福了。
E: One day, he'll be the village's new hunter. And I'll finally get to kick back — fishing, tea-sipping, living the good retired life.

C: 桌上摆着水果蛋糕、水果馅饼，还有水果…看来庭院中的那位少女有着一双巧手，以及用来装甜食的第二个胃。
E: There's fruit cake, fruit pie, and... more fruit on the table... Looks like that girl in the courtyard's got magic hands and a second stomach just for sweets.

C: 门的那头只有一片寂静——看来无论你做什么，它都不会有任何反应了。
E: Now there's only silence on the other side of the door. No matter what you do, this door's done responding.

C: 很久很久以前，他或许也曾站在此处，想像村庄之外的世界，等待着踏上英雄之旅——而今，你要接过他心中英雄的旗帜。
E: Long, long ago, he must have stood right here, too, dreaming of the world beyond the village, waiting for the day his journey as a hero would begin. And now, it's your turn to take up the banner he once carried in his heart.

C: 对于完美，你们的定义是：「观者无法指出缺漏之状态」。我想请问：刻法勒能否指出神性的缺漏？
E: Regarding perfection, your definition is "a state where an observer cannot point out flaws." Let me ask you this: Can Kephale identify flaws in divinity?

C: …或许，有关此地的回忆不需要借助任何泰坦的神力，它独属于那时的你和她。
E: ...Perhaps the memories of this place require no Titan's power. They belong solely to you and her, from that time.

C: 哈哈，开个玩笑喀！
E: Haha, just kidding, crrk!

C: 他已经离去了吗？那这里的气息，为何……
E: Has he truly departed? Then why does the presence here...

C: 如果能拔出来…
E: If I could just pull it out...

C: 光芒万丈！
E: Absolutely brilliant!

C: 好吧…
E: Okay...

C: 我是「流光忆庭」的信使，接下来的日子要借宿贵列车，请多指教！
E: I'm a messenger from the Garden of Recollection. I will be staying on the Express from now on. It's very nice to meet you!

C: 它问…它应该问什么？
E: It asked... What it should ask me?

C: 这倒证明了我一直以来的猜想：看来异问魔应该是「欢愉」的造物。
E: This actually confirms a theory that I've always had: It seems like Inquisition Spirits are a creation of the Elation.

C: 对、对了，听说技术部提前在前线布置好了先进的御敌装置，可以在作战中使用。好像是叫…叫…哦，叫<color=#dbc291ff>「照雪灯炉」</color>。
E: O—Oh yeah, the Technology Division told me that they'd set up advanced enemy defenses on the front line which could be used in combat. I th—think they're called... They're called <color=#dbc291ff>Snowshine Lamps</color>.

C: 奥列格兵长跟我复述了您作战的事迹。我、我…我非常崇拜您，希望有朝一日能和您并肩作战！
E: Captain Oleg has told me about your deeds in battle. I—I... I admire you so much, and hope to fight alongside you one day!

C: 再给我讲讲这次行动计划。
E: Tell me more about this current mission.

C: 而且，不知道您注意到了没——我说话不利索的毛病已经彻底改正了！
E: And I'm not sure if you've noticed — but all my stuttering has been completely fixed!

C: 你感到异样，那毛茸茸的一团，似乎是你的…脚？
E: You feel strange. That fluffy pile, it appears to be your... feet?

C: 不是你偷的，那是谁偷的？
E: If it wasn't you, then who stole it?

C: 真是拿你没办法。
E: Fine, I'll play along.

C: 佩佩高兴地望着你。
E: Peppy stares at you happily.

C: 毕竟我的嗓音迷人…
E: Well, my voice is enchanting...

C: 但现在——先来翻开新的一页，人家想和你一起看新的故事！
E: But for now — let's open a new chapter. I want to share a new tale with you!

C: （天舶司入境管理这么松懈吗！）
E: (Is the Sky-Faring Commission's border controls so lax!?)

C: 这「匣里流光」不单单是可以用作武器，光是用在云骑军的金人身上，还可以辅助防御系统和推进系统，真是绝妙的发～明～
E: This Luminflux Pyxis can not only be used as a weapon on the Cloud Knights' aurumatons, it can also assist the defense system and propulsion system. It is a wonderful invention~

C: 要是我的臭徒弟在这里，我肯定就指着他们的鼻子骂起来了——「别人一个外行人都能做到这个程度」！
E: If my apprentices were here, I would point at their noses and say to them, "Even an amateur can do this"!

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 虽说老夫身边也带着「浓云金蟾」、「灯昼龙鱼」机巧护卫，但在这里做武器测试还是不太安全…事实上，云骑军已经警告过我好几次了。
E: I do have the Golden Cloud Toad and Illumination Dragonfish with me, but it is still not safe to do a weapon test here... In fact, the Cloud Knights have warned me several times before.

C: 噗，你这人脑袋里转的念头可真有意思。
E: Ha, I'd love to take a vacation in your brain. What an idea!

C: 还没下完呢，记得回来找我。
E: This isn't finished. Remember to return so we can see this truly settled.

C: 怎么每次都是这句话。
E: You say that every time.

C: 我亲手设计的谜题，只有你能解开！你真是太棒了！
E: Only you can solve the puzzles I personally designed! You're awesome!

C: 啊——够了。
E: Ugh — enough.

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 找你聊会天…
E: I'm here to have a chat with you...

C: 滴、答…游客，我有一个问题。
E: Tick, tock... Guest, I have a question.

C: 滴答，该选哪个呢？
E: Tick-tock, which one should I pick?

C: 有缘再见！别忘了和我们共同相处的快乐——这，就是，「梦境迷钟」！
E: May we meet again! Don't forget the great times we spent together — this, is, the Dream Ticker!

C: 我们都与墨涅塔有着千丝万缕的联系。只要晓之以情，相信它们会愿意出一份力的。毕竟这份预言也和泰坦们有关。
E: We are all connected to Mnestia in one way or another. Once the reasons are articulated, I believe many will be eager to contribute. After all, this prophecy concerns the Titans themselves.

C: 我找到了这个东西…
E: I found something...

C: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们会成为圣城重要的助力。我为你准备了一点薄礼，还请收下。
E: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be an invaluable help to the holy city. I have prepared you a small token of my gratitude. Please, take it.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
E: Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.

C: 不要灰心，年轻人，仔细观察——答案就藏在阳光照耀不到的地方。
E: Fret not, youngling, and watch carefully — the answer is hidden where no sun may shine.

C: 年轻人，想好答案了吗？在纷争的剑锋之下，总共有多少位勇士追随着持矛君王？
E: Youngling, have you your answer? Under the blades of Strife, how many warriors followed the lance-wielding king in total?

C: 元老院雇佣老年人士？
E: The Council of Elders is hiring elderly workers?

C: 不过，那场角斗着实是精彩绝伦！观众席摩肩接踵，欢声雷动…想必尼卡多利那傻大个也乐得歆享这分乐趣吧。
E: Although, it was a truly brilliant battle! The audience was packed with people all roaring and shouting... I bet that great buffoon Nikador enjoyed the show a lot, too.

C: 阿格莱雅的人台？
E: Aglaea's mannequin?

C: 那玩意儿我早就偷过，现在只是借放在刻法勒肩上罢了。
E: I stole that thing ages ago. I'm just borrowing Kephale's shoulder to house it for the moment.

C: 别高兴得太早，等换个地方，有你好看的！
E: Don't be too pleased with yourself! Fight me somewhere else and you'll see!

C: 您看起来不像悬锋城人，莫非也是来参加祭典的战士？
E: You don't look like someone from Castrum Kremnos. Could you be a warrior here to participate in the festival?

C: 桀桀桀，您在说什么笑话呢？我，唯唯诺诺、正直礼貌、好奇又充满干劲，被欺负之后，无能狂怒地放着狠话？
E: Crrkk, whose leg are you pulling? Me? Obsequious and earnestly polite? Curious and full of energy? Only unleashing harsh words in a fit of powerless rage after being bullied?

C: 那是。好歹我们一起玩了这么久，就算没有爱情、友情，那也有亲情了不是？
E: Of course! We've spent so much time together that even without love or friendship, we've developed family-like bonds, haven't we?

C: 人们都说，这位富商真是富可敌国，历史上那些最伟大的商人，恐怕也未必能与他相比。
E: They said this merchant was so incredibly rich that he could rival entire nations — perhaps even the greatest historical merchants paled in comparison.

C: 无论你喜不喜欢，大概也只能陪它们一起玩了吧！桀桀桀……祝你好运，咱临走给你刷个大宝贝！
E: Like it or not, you're stuck playing along with them! Hehehe... Good luck! I'll leave you a big prize before I go!

C: 桀桀，老伙计！惊不惊喜，意不意外？有没有想到在这里也能见到老巴特鲁斯？
E: Heh-heh! My old friend! Bet you didn't expect to run into old Bartholos here, of all places!

C: 嘿，甭管你是不是真的这么想，但我可以放心大胆地告诉你，根据老巴特鲁斯缜密的推理，此时此刻的我的确是一种鬼魂，是由你的幻想所形成的联觉反应。
E: Well, whether or not you are, I can say with full confidence that based on my highly meticulous deduction, I am, at this exact moment, a ghostly figment conjured by your own subconscious.

C: 拜拜啦，老伙计！我还在别处给你留了点好玩的东西哦？
E: Catch ya later, old friend! I left a few more surprises for you out there, so keep your eyes peeled!

C: 没有，都是你的错觉。
E: Nope, it's all your imagination.

C: 那么，祝你玩得开心。
E: Well, have fun, then.

C: 想
E: Yes.

C: …很遗憾，我认识这位信徒，她的父亲确实年迈而思维阻滞，但若是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，将其寻回或也并非妄言。就位吧，辅祭。
E: ...Unfortunately, I know this follower. Her father is indeed elderly and mentally diminished. But if the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#} wills it, recovering the father's intellect may not be impossible. Take your position, acolyte.

C: 在那边的是…风口吗？虽然现在还没有打开，但是用风或许可以把球吹跑？
E: Is that... a wind vent over there? It's not active yet, but maybe we could use the wind to blow the balls away?

C: 另外，偷偷告诉你…这个房间还有着<color=#dbc291ff>另一种特别的样貌</color>，我曾经偶然瞥见过它的幻影，连岁月的祭司都没能发现。
E: Oh, and just between you and me... This room has <color=#dbc291ff>another hidden form</color>. I once caught a glimpse of its phantom, something even the Priest of Time didn't discover.

C: 好，我这就去看看。
E: Alright, I'll go check it out.

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: 你不舒服吗？
E: Hey, you okay?

C: 想起来了，这是刻法勒的谕示集，每个侍奉天父的祭司，都要在受洗礼前对它宣誓虔诚。
E: I remember now. This is the oracles of Kephale. Every priest serving the sky father must swear their devotion to them before baptism.

C: 不重要了…请您将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
E: It doesn't matter anymore... Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

C: 发动欧洛尼斯祷言时的荡漾感还残留在你的身上，刚刚那段经历，或许…只是一缕追忆。
E: The lingering sensation of Oronyx's Prayer still clings to you. That recent experience, perhaps... was just a fleeting memory.

C: 我们能做些什么？
E: How can we help?

C: 「尊敬的{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。」螺丝咕姆的形象出现了，他深深地鞠了一躬，「我本想撰写代码收集#64原始博士的博士之袍，用以吸引他于模拟宇宙中现身。然而没想到代码错误推演出了『纯美之袍』…接着，它与宇宙碎片产生了奇妙的化学反应。」
E: "Dear {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}." Screwllum's figure appears, and he gives a deep bow. "I was originally intending to write a code that collects The Doctor's Robe, property of Dr. Primitive, #64 of the Society. I hoped to use that to lure him into appearing in the Simulated Universe. However, the erroneous code generated the Robe of The Beauty instead... and then a wondrous chemical reaction occurred with the Cosmic Fragments."

C: 新的记忆涌入你的脑海：一个身披褴褛长衣的怪物，喃喃低语，身躯越来越远；一个皮肤黝黑的男人，在星空的阴影下，他的双眼化作烟雾；一个战士高举长弓，弓矢好似流星，紧追仇敌不放；有着许多张脸的女人向你张开臂弯；一道金色的伤痕；遮天蔽日的虫群；一张你平生见过最美丽的面孔；婴儿的啼哭和放肆的笑声……
E: New memories flood into your mind — A monster in a ragged coat, murmuring as its body shifts farther away. A dark-skinned man whose eyes turn to smoke beneath the shadows of the stars. A warrior raises a longbow, arrows streaming after their nemeses like comets. A woman with many faces stretches out her arms to you. A golden scar. A swarm of insects covering the sky. The most beautiful face you've ever seen. A baby crying and giggling with pure joy...

C: 你想套点什么？
E: What do you want to know?

C: 你伸出手指去探，无法触碰到大量微暗的海。你感到自己像一块油脂，漂浮在悲伤的黑暗海面。
E: You stretch out your fingers, but still can't touch the vast, dark sea. You feel like a piece of grease floating on a dark sea of sorrow.

C: 对「模拟宇宙」这么酷的项目，他也提不起劲儿。斯蒂芬帮了我们一点忙，他本人要求匿名，不想大张旗鼓，可能有些天才就是不愿意成为天才吧。
E: He can't even get himself excited about something as cool as the Simulated Universe. Stephen did us a favor and asked to remain anonymous — he doesn't want to make a big splash at all. Perhaps some geniuses wish they weren't one.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「比如，」</color>男人没有看你，他磕磕绊绊地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「呃，比如，这就是个随机事件。我写了一些模板，但『模拟宇宙』现在没办法把它转换成有效的内容。所以你会看到下面这些……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Like,"</color> he stutters without looking at you, <color=#dbc291ff>"like, uh, this is a random Occurrence now. I wrote some templates, but the Simulated Universe currently can't convert them into content. So, you will just see the following..."</color>

C: 「噢…我想看{NICKNAME}的内心戏。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，十分整蛊，「纳努克是最年轻的星神，当然不可能和寰宇蝗灾有关！要是反物质军团也掺和进这场浩劫…天，想都不敢想。」
E: "Oh... I'd really love to see what's on {NICKNAME}'s mind." Herta scrunches her nose mischievously. "Nanook is the youngest Aeon, so they can't possibly have anything to do with the Swarm Disaster! I don't even dare imagine the Antimatter Legion becoming part of this disaster..."

C: 你继续在原地等待——你发誓你真的笑不出来。你的白眼快翻到天上时，祂——终于来了！祂一出现身边就刮起巨大的虚假数据风暴，祂要让你开开心心，你的白眼却翻到天上。…但你发现祂必须要你笑出来，你只好扯出一个咧嘴的虚伪笑容。
E: You continue to wait in place, and you swear you can't force out a laugh. Just as you are rolling your eyes, THEY finally arrived! A massive fake data storm erupts around THEM as soon as THEY appear. THEY are eager to make you happy, but all you can do is roll your eyes. Yet, when you notice THEY demand you to laugh, you have no choice but to stretch your mouth into a fake grin.

C: 「噢，对，有件好玩的事。我和螺丝咕姆下注了一份对赌协议。」黑塔撇了撇嘴，「螺丝咕姆认为『丰饶』的命途可能与塔伊兹育罗斯有关！我赌那会儿药师根本不存在。{NICKNAME}，赌吗？」
E: "Oh, by the way, there's something fun — Screwllum and I are in a betting agreement." Herta pursed her lips and adds. "Screwllum is of the view that the Path of Abundance might have been related to Tayzzyronth! As for me, I think Yaoshi didn't even exist at that time. {NICKNAME}, do you want to place a bet?"

C: 「自然」的蠹星系被「文明」首次发现时，地上正爬行着无数的虫族。一位领袖于屏幕中注视着星系谱：这是一个伟大的时刻，他将指南镜片对准蠹星——汹涌的「喜悦」袭来。
E: When the "uncivilized" Lepismat system was first discovered by "civilization," the planet's surface teemed with swarms of insects. A leader gazed upon the star charts on the screen, relishing in the momentous occasion. He directed his attention towards Lepismat, awash in elation.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了金属与黄金互相碰撞而发出的轰鸣。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into a cacophonous clash between metal and gold.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 咦，等等——这什么鬼？
E: Huh, hang on, what in the stars is this?

C: 「按原本的设计，『觐见之骰』是个类似供奉神龛的容器，承载着各条命途上行者的过往、经历，和因此流溢的能量！」黑塔皱了皱鼻子，「原本应该是这样的。」
E: "Based on the original design, the Audience Dice is a vessel similar to a shrine that carries the past and experiences of various Pathstriders, and the energy that flows due to it." Herta's nose twitches as she adds, "Originally, anyway."

C: 阮•梅突然出现了！
E: A wild Ruan Mei has appeared!

C: 「有机生物的食欲，本质为何物？」螺丝咕姆问道，「我仅与虚空鲸、蝴蝶相伴，未曾研究过星神的生命形态。祂的『吞噬』成谜。」
E: "The appetite of organic creatures... what is its nature?" Screwllum inquires, "I have only been in the company of void song whales and butterflies, and have never researched the lifeform of Aeons. THEIR devouring is a mystery."

C: 开端
E: Beginning

C: 我不想再继续了……
E: I don't want to keep going...

C: 「#27『帝皇』鲁珀特被#4『寂静领主』杀死了。」阮•梅依旧用她平静的声音总结着，她的言语化作数据储存进模拟宇宙的系统中，「祂的计算里没有#27的名字，也没有#4；祂只说了结果：在那一秒，帝皇的生命与它的帝国同时结束。」
E: "#27, Rubert the Emperor, was killed by #4, the Lord of Silence," Ruan Mei summarizes in her ever-peaceful voice. Her words transform into data that is stored in the Simulated Universe system. "#27's name is not found in THEIR calculations, nor is the name of #4. THEY only state the outcome: At that moment, the emperor and its empire ceased to exist at the same time."

C: 「机器不会老去。」机械领主闭目，「吾名<color=#dbc291ff>鲁德亚•珀忒修斯</color>。」
E: "Machines don't age." The mechanical overlord closes its eyes and says, "My name is <color=#dbc291ff>Ludia Perthesius</color>."

C: 德•维恩的手下因此定论：即便是被改造成人类外表，与有机生命建立联系已久的机械，也会在「反有机方程」的运算下加入战争。
E: As such, De Wayne's subordinates concluded that even machinery that had been given the human appearance and had bonded with organic lives for a long time could join the war under the calculations of the Anti-Organic Equation.

C: 那么，战争余烬之后呢？
E: What happened after the war ended?

C: 「欢迎你，一位通过『<color=#dbc291ff>认知测试</color>』的无机生命。」无机帝国的招待员站在你面前，「<color=#dbc291ff>经过鉴定</color>：您是一位合格的无机生命。情感：暂无；思维：暂无；感觉与艺术：暂无；自由意志：暂无。」
E: "Welcome, an inorganic life that has passed the <color=#dbc291ff>cognitive evaluation</color>." A receptionist from the Inorganic Empire stands before you. "<color=#dbc291ff>According to the test</color>, you're a qualified inorganic life. Emotions: Nil. Thoughts: Nil. Senses & Artistic Appreciation: Nil. Free will: Nil."

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我不服从。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I don't obey.

C: 终止*反有机方程*。
E: Stop the *Anti-Organic Equation*.

C: 战甲破碎，你与它的鲜血混杂在一起，密集的伤口在身上绽开，又迅速痊愈。你早已忘记，自己有多久不曾如此喜悦，令你如此地渴望掐住猎物的喉咙，咬碎他的头颅，令你如此享受这片厮杀晕染的血雾。
E: The armor shatters. Your blood mixes with its blood. Clusters of wounds erupt all over your body before quickly healing. You have forgotten how long it had been since you were this happy. It's making you eagerly desire clutching onto your prey's throat, tearing off its head, and causing you to enjoy this red mist stained by slaughter so very much.

C: 表达感谢。
E: Express your gratitude.

C: 你吹着口哨，悄无声息地走到没耳朵博士的跟前，他还没能从恐惧中缓过神来。
E: Whistling, you quietly slip over to Doctor No-Ears who has yet to recover from his fright.

C: 奔向战场。
E: Sprint into battle.

C: 该说再见了。
E: Time to say goodbye.

C: 男子微微一笑，提着药材匆匆离去。数日后，收音机里传来星际和平播报，某边陲星球的无名小镇发生一起诡异的食物中毒，患者的大脑受到不可逆的损伤，脑髓液如同热泪一般自他们的眼眶汩汩而出，使他们最终失去思考能力。
E: The man flashed a tight-lipped smile and hurried out with his medicines in hand. A few days later, an Interastral Peace Broadcast played on the radio, reporting that a mysterious case of food poisoning had struck a small town on an unnamed frontier planet. The patients' brains were irreversibly damaged, as cerebral spinal fluid poured from their eyes like tears, causing them to finally lose the ability to think entirely.

C: 「不管你怎么想，」身材高大的来访者向你俯下身，「区区灼心症，还不足以成为完美进化路途上的绊脚石。不如说我们要感谢它，让你有资格拥抱这颗地上的月亮。」
E: "Despite what you may think..." The tall visitor leans toward your bedside, "a little cardiac burning is not sufficient to halt your progress on the path to evolutionary perfection. In fact, you should be thanking it for proving that you are worthy of this earth-bound moon."

C: 再见。
E: Bye.

C: 老人将自己埋在乱如鸟窠的文牍之中。「普通人寻仇不会想到要来求助学者，你是第一个，况且你该去找量子历史学派的那群弄潮儿，而不是找我这个前朝遗老。」
E: The old man buries himself in a chaotic pile of documents, like a bird in a nest. "A normal person would not think to come to a scholar in their search of revenge, and you are the first. What's more, I would recommend going to those trendsetters in the Quantum History School, not a relic of a past generation like myself."

C: 可是，这是伟大的实验。
E: But, this is a great experiment.

C: 也许问题出在「记忆」上。
E: Perhaps the problem lies in their memories?

C: 克丝黛拉发出一声冷笑。「我当然能代表，因为我就是学派内屈指可数的年轻学者之一。阿蒙徳，四十五岁，会龄十三年；克里斯托弗，三十九岁，会龄八年；我，三十三岁，会龄五年。前辈，您猜猜，年轻人的研究理想是什么？」克丝黛拉用手指向你。
E: Chrystella smirked. "Of course I can speak on their behalf. I am one of the few young scholars in our school. Amanda, <unbreak>45</unbreak> years old, member for <unbreak>15</unbreak> years; Christopher, <unbreak>39</unbreak> years old, member for 8 years; myself, <unbreak>33</unbreak> years old, member for 5 years. Senior, take a guess, what research ideal do you think we youngsters hold?" Chrystella gestures towards you.

C: 「所以是否可以这样理解，这本书上的所有内容，都是作者的猜测？」学生把课本像抹布一样扔在桌上。
E: "So, you could say that everything in this book is no more than the author's assumption?" The student threw their textbook down on the table like a dirty rag.

C: 这个产品最终没有量产，部门高层中止了开发，理由是「成本太高，利润太低」。
E: This product never went to production, as it was stopped by the department's higher-ups. They said: "The costs outweigh the benefits."

C: 「在天才的世界，这样的冲击尤为显著。俱乐部里有人提出了『知识奇点』的概念，形容这种能永久改变对知识定义的认知临界点。」
E: "In the world of geniuses, such impact has always been considered extraordinary. An individual in the Genius Society proposed the concept of the Knowledge Singularity, describing it as a cognitive tipping point that can permanently alter the definition of knowledge."

C: 咕咕算法。
E: Solid waves theory.

C: 警告，遭受到有机体拦截。反有机方程载入，启动歼灭模式…武器系统查询失败，再次申请启动歼灭模式…武器系统查询失败。
E: Warning, intercepted by an organic entity. Loading Anti-Organic Equation, initiating annihilation mode... Weapon systems query failure. Requesting to activate annihilation mode once more... Weapon systems query failure.

C: 先到粮食制造区看看。
E: Take a look at the food production area first.

C: 「不…就当我在说胡话吧。我很害怕，总感觉，自己一直在被某种力量推着往前…也可能是我自作多情。」在对模型进行了多次迭代后，帕提维娅成功实现了对涟漪发生源的反向追踪。
E: "No... Just ignore me. I'm just so scared. I feel that some force has been driving me forward... Although maybe I'm just overthinking it." After recalibrating the model several times, Patavia successfully manages to reverse-navigate the source of the waves.

C: 无法触及真理的无知者。
E: A fool who could never encounter the truth.

C: 难道说，黑塔遇到的那些意外？
E: You mean... those accidents that Herta encountered...?

C: 「真想扒下这家伙的面部认知滤网，把她的照片传到星际和平网络最显眼的版块。」人偶伸了个懒腰——这一定是她身为人类时的习惯。
E: "I really want to rip off that facial recognition filter and post her picture on the most obvious spot on the main page of the Interastral Peace Network." The doll stretches lazily, a habit probably from when she was human.

C: 没有寒冷。
E: There is no cold.

C: 你听到高楼坍塌的声音，自己正在坠落，但是不怕，你仍能给予它新的解释。
E: You hear the sound of a tall building collapsing and find yourself plummeting to the earth below, but you are not scared. You can just give it another interpretation.

C: 模拟宇宙名气这么大？
E: The Simulated Universe is that famous?

C: 「黑塔女士因事务繁杂，邀请我一并处理。」螺丝咕姆十分平易近人，「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，由我暂为您带来更多『祝福』。」
E: "Madam Herta, overwhelmed with work, invited me to assist her." Screwllum is very amiable and says, "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, as of now, allow me to bring you more 'Blessings' on her behalf."

C: 「好了。记住，在代码构造的模拟世界之外，你察觉到任何矛盾，别怀疑，都是本人的伟大手笔——记住，我并不是被*模拟*出来的！」
E: "It's done. If you notice any contradictions beyond the simulated world created by codes, don't doubt them, as they are all my brilliant touches. Remember, I'm not 'simulated'!"

C: 莲花唱起歌，你被唤起童年回忆，你仿佛回到上个时代……
E: As the lotus starts singing, your childhood memories come flooding back. You seem to have traveled back in time to the previous era...

C: 你一无所获。
E: You gain nothing.

C: 遇见「序列扑满」是为吉兆。你开始思考如何应对：玩耍的规则，得根据每只扑满的性格定制。
E: Running into a Sequence Trotter is an auspicious sign. You start to think of a way to deal with them. The rules of the game must be fixed according to the personality of each Trotter.

C: 骑士向你伸出一只手。
E: The knight extends a hand to you.

C: 你抓住了那只手…传来的余温感动了你。
E: You grab that hand... The lingering body warmth melts your heart.

C: 人偶…
E: The puppet...

C: 你获得了一个*完美*的「潮流扭蛋人」！
E: You've won a *perfect* trendy gachapon figure!

C: 总是测试项目令你疲倦。你决定在模拟宇宙里收留一只虫子做你的伙伴。
E: You are tired of continuously testing one project after another. So, you decide to adopt a worm as your companion in the Simulated Universe.

C: 这些「鏖兜虫」发出了吮吸的声音…你犹豫是否要进入猎杀它们，这或许会让你的身上沾上更多惹人注意的虫类气味……
E: These Combatobugs make a sucking sound... You hesitate to enter the lair and hunt for them, as you might find yourself coated in the insects' scent and incur more unwanted attention...

C: 幼虫在奇物的影响下迅速成长，鞘翅破开乳白的外皮，分裂成复数的个体向你袭来。
E: The larva rapidly grows under the influence of the Curio. Its wings break through the milky-white skin and split into several independent units which begin attacking you.

C: 活塞往复抬升，密集的杠杆牵引齿轮转动，发出沉闷的咆哮，遥遥无期地修复着破损的躯体。
E: The piston rises and falls, resulting in a vigorous lever effect that brings about the turning of the gears. The machine emits a deep growl as it mends its damaged body with little hope of completion.

C: 问题一，您的出生地是？
E: Question one, where were you born?

C: 你忽地感觉有什么拂过自己的面庞，一阵风，一滴雨，它叫你收起鱼线，结束这场水晶母亲的献祭。
E: You suddenly feel something graze your face — a gust, a raindrop — it tells you to reel your line in, to end this tribute to the Crystal Mother.

C: 好一块寿司！以豪情万丈的架势冲过了陨石障碍圈。当其他对手试图干扰它的飞行时，你隐约看到寿司里长出一只巨大的手臂，一拳将对方打得稀碎。
E: What a piece of sushi! Watch as it boldly speeds through the meteorite field. When other contestants try to obstruct its flying, you faintly see the sushi grow a massive arm and shatter its foes into splinters.

C: 「记得你留下的废品吗？我把它们做成了新的玩具。你也试试看如何，相信你能做到的。」老人把零件推到你的面前，露出期待的眼神。
E: "Do you remember the scraps you left behind? I made them into new toys. Why don't you have a go? I believe you can do it." The old man pushes the parts to you with an expectant look in his eyes.

C: 多股洋流在这里交汇，滋生出混乱的乐园。你骑着变异鼻行兽在巨型蛰虫的背上狂奔，头戴面具的拟态猎豹在直立行走后和白鹭牵手跳舞。
E: Multiple currents converge here, giving rise to a paradise of chaos. You ride a mutant Nosewalker, racing atop a Giant Sting. A masked mimicry cheetah walks upright and holds hands with an egret to engage in a dance.

C: 你一路过关斩将，看着对手的锋刃，你知道，这又将是一段值得品味的人生。
E: You continue to surmount all obstacles in your way. As you look upon your opponents' swords, you know that this is also another life worth sampling.

C: 你身处密林的深处，眼前是一座藤蔓攀援的古代神殿。
E: You are deep in a dense forest, an ancient temple entangled in vines looming before you.

C: 你逃也似的离开了疯狂的多洛斯城，身后仍不断地传来骰子转动的声音。
E: You leave the mad city of Dolos in a frenzied hurry, the relentless sounds of rolling dice echoing behind you.

C: 在他曾停留的地方，泛着绚烂色彩的宝物安谧地沉睡着。只不过，长年被黑潮侵蚀的财宝，似乎也早已染上灰黯之手的气息。
E: Where he once stood, treasures gleaming in vibrant hues now rest in serene slumber. Yet, they have long been eroded by the black tide, their luster dulled with the Hand of Shadow's taint.

C: 这数据哪儿有错了？都用几十年了，肯定是你算错了。
E: What's wrong with this data? It's already been in use for dozens of years. You must be the one who's wrong.

C: 塔兰顿最蔑视的泰坦。
E: Talanton's most scorned Titan.

C: 继续缓步前进。
E: Keep moving forward.

C: 茧中的人离开了。
E: The one in the cocoon departs.

C: 黄金的光辉黯淡。
E: The golden glow dims.

C: 雅努斯在黑暗中睁开眼睛，命运的丝线令它感到拥挤和窒息。它用指尖勾勒出门径，言语描摹出通路，为广阔的虚空腾留出喘息的余地。
E: Janus opens their eyes in the darkness, cramped and suffocated by the threads of fate. They outline pathways with their fingertips, and articulate passages with their words, carving out breaths in the vast void.

C: 你翻了翻货架，发现还真有不少宝贝，但是又看了眼标价，不禁捂紧了钱包，随即开始和商人讨价还价。
E: You sift through the shelves and, sure enough, spot some real treasures. But after sneaking a glance at the prices, you instinctively tighten your grip on your wallet — looks like it's time for some haggling.

C: 「第<unbreak>108</unbreak>号面试者请进。」叫号声打断了你的思绪，你擦了擦额头的冷汗，小心翼翼地推开了面试间沉重的木门。
E: "Applicant <unbreak>108</unbreak>, please enter." The voice shatters your train of thought. You wipe the sweat from your brow, steady your breath, and carefully push open the heavy wooden door to the interview room.

C: 据说是城里的子民玷污土地，此举惹怒了吉奥里亚，这位和蔼的泰坦罕见地爆发盛怒，它撕开自己的胸膛，吞噬了整座城与人。
