E: It's said the people of the city defiled the land, provoking the wrath of Georios. The gentle Titan, in a rare fury, tore open their own chest and swallowed the entire city, every soul within.

C: 因为在塔兰顿看来，这只是人间的游戏。可一旦人子的行为跨越界线，它的审判便如雷霆般降临。
E: For in Talanton's eyes, these were but mortal games. Yet should humanity cross the line, their judgment would strike like thunder.

C: 命运三姐妹需要的是一片稳定的大地，于是塔兰顿耐心地教导吉奥里亚，使它把自己的冲动深埋于厚重的地壳之下。
E: What the Three Fates sisters needed was a stable land, and so Talanton patiently instructed Georios to bury their impulses deep beneath the thickness of the crust.

C: 飞鸟暂撇开艾格勒精心镌刻的云彩，俯身衔走蕴含智慧露珠的枝条；走兽亦贪恋难得的闲适，扇动鼻翼畅快地吸取林间醒神的清气。
E: Birds briefly veer away from the clouds meticulously engraved by Aquila, swooping down to seize branches glistening with the dew of wisdom. Beasts, too, indulge in rare respite, flaring their nostrils to drink deeply of the forest's awakening breath.

C: 好笑话永远不过时。
E: A good joke never gets old.

C: 摸一摸就会变聪明？
E: Will one get smarter if they touch it?
Hmm...

C: 你望着空白的时间段，不知为何手忽然有点痒——
E: You look for a blank spot, and your hands suddenly begin to feel itchy...

C: 传来了奇怪的声音……
E: There's a strange voice...

C: 除开机械运作的声音与少许人员交谈的声音，你好像还听见了别的动静……
E: Besides the sounds of machinery and a few voices chatting, you seem to hear something else...

C: 你也别气馁，我能有这样的研究发现，是因为在密卷科打下了扎实的理论基础，和你的起点是不一样的……
E: Don't lose hope. I owe this scientific discovery to the theoretical foundation given to me at the Department of Insight. We come from different backgrounds...

C: 这股香味仿佛有种魔力，望着深褐色的液体，你的思绪似乎也坠入了深渊……
E: This aroma seems to have its own magic and as you gaze into the deep brown liquid, you feel your thoughts slipping into the abyss...

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了空间站的某处。
E: After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported somewhere at the space station by the Door to A New World.

C: 它们…毫无疑问正在低语着什么——可那副口器…不，是那副*该死的*口器…本不该发出这样的声音…！
E: They... are definitely whispering something — but their mouthpieces... no, those DARN mouthpieces... should not be able to make that kind of sound!

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 「殿下，您有考虑过如今酸雾为何越来越频繁吗？」她嘶哑，「我们必须全面禁止使用迪赛尔热机了…它排出的废烟会极大刺激它的肠道，导致更多肠液分泌……」
E: "Your Highness, have you ever considered why acid mists have become increasingly common recently?" She asks hoarsely. "We must completely ban the use of Diesel engines... the exhaust fumes these engines release are causing significant irritation of the creature's intestines, which leads to increased secretion of intestinal juices..."

C: 「全面禁止」！你倒吸一口冷气。这女人说得倒轻巧。这会导致多么可怕的财政赤字啊！区区酸雾算什么？只要我们的工厂开足马力，拼命生产防护装备……
E: "Complete ban!?" You gasp. Her proposal is easier said than done. The fallout from such a ban would nose-dive the nation's finances into the red! What's the big deal with acid mist? As long as the factories continue ahead at full power and churn out more protective equipment...

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 正好，窗外似乎也是一派沉闷——粘稠的阴云在低空中聚合、翻滚——气温不高，你想，入秋了。这天气正适合睡觉…怪不得你睡得这么香。
E: It seems like the weather outside is quite gloomy. Thick, dark clouds hang low in the sky as they gather and roil. The temperature is low, and you realize it's already autumn. This kind of weather is perfect for sleeping. No wonder you slept so well.

C: 为我找些对手来喀！
E: Find some opponents for me!

C: 我感觉到了…悬锋城的勇士正在与门对面那可怕的力量抗衡，一次又一次倒下，又一次又一次站起来……
E: I can feel it... The warriors of Castrum Kremnos are locked in combat with that terrifying force behind the gates. One after the other, they fall down, and they get back up again...

C: 用尽全身力气敲下去。
E: Strike as hard as you can.

C: 「干得好，小东西。」
E: "Well done, little one."

C: 我填好了一份服务评价。
E: I filled out a service rating card.

C: 只是哄哄小孩子罢了，根本没必要上纲上线——你对自己如是说。
E: Just amuse the kids. You tell yourself there's no need to turn a game into a battle of wills.

C: <size=36>你这不是作弊吗！！！</size>
E: <size=36>You cheated!!!</size>

C: 哦，哦哦！我懂，我懂！
E: Oh! Oh! I see. I see!

C: 年轻的战士啊，为何你要选择回头喀？难道说，你还有所留恋嘛……
E: Young warrior there: Why do you choose to turn back, crrk? Could it be you're still reluctant to leave...

C: 我桥呢？
E: Where's my bridge?

C: 女人向你投来怜悯的目光…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
E: The lady looks at you with pity... but her expression quickly returns to normal.

C: 什么呀！是你输了！
E: What? You lost!

C: 今天就先到这里——我们下次再一起玩吧！鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
E: Time to call it a day. Let's play again next time! The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!

C: <size=36>喂，荣誉队员！你在里面吗？！</size>
E: <size=36>Hey, honorary member! Are you in there?</size>

C: 轻轻地敲下去。
E: Gently tap downward.

C: 直觉地感觉壁画里，多目的盲者头上缺几根羽毛啾！到底是为什么呢——
E: Something about that mural feels off. The many-eyed blind figure seems to be missing a few feathers, tweet! Why could that be—

C: 你刚刚去了一趟｢死者的世界｣，经历了一场离别，对吧嘤？
E: You just visited the "World of the Dead" and experienced a parting, didn't you, eep?

C: 预言？什么预言？扎格列斯老祖想去哪儿就去哪儿，从来不被预言束缚，我也一样！
E: Prophecy? What prophecy? Old Zagreus goes wherever they please, never bound by prophecies. I'm the same!

C: 什么也不想看…
E: Don't wanna see anything...

C: 「岁阳之祸」的岁阳也是生命体，当初也是它们也占领了金人的身体…你这样的担心也有一定的道理。
E: The heliobi of the Heliobi Disaster were also life forms back then, and they were the ones that possessed the aurumatons' bodies... Your concerns did have some merit.

C: 我可没准备什么奖励啊…你要是早点说的话，也许能准备点什么。
E: I haven't prepared any reward to give you... I might have been able to get something together if you said something earlier.

C: 你本不想使用「猥琐」这种词汇描述来形容一只无辜的机巧鸟，但是，你的直觉告诉你，在这只鸟眼中流转着的毫无疑问就是某种欲望——
E: You don't want to use a word like "obscene" to describe this innocent cycrane, but your intuition tells you that the eyes of this cycrane are without a doubt swimming in a certain kind of craving.

C: 前段时间，天舶司将一批禁止进入海关的画册扣押在流云渡了。我实在不能接受如此美妙的精神食粮变成太空垃圾，幸好我在这里叫住了你。
E: A while ago at Cloudford, the Sky-Faring Commission seized some banned photo books from going through customs. I cannot bear the thought of such splendid nourishment for the soul becoming space trash. Thankfully, I managed to catch your attention.

C: 饶我一条小命！
E: Spare me!

C: 我们大哥比大人还聪明，它帮我指导作业，比我妈妈还强。
E: Our boss is smarter than grown-ups. Bossman here can help me with my homework even better than my mom.

C: 螺丝咕姆其实是我编的名字。
E: Screwllum is actually a name I made up.

C: 我是大资本家，手上只有<unbreak>10</unbreak>巡镝给他们，请问小美应该得到多少？
E: I'm a capitalist, but I only have ten strales for them. How many strales should Little Susie get?

C: 老大，你不是考虑了很久之后告诉我们「附加题可以不用做」吗？
E: Boss, didn't you tell us to just skip the bonus question after thinking about it for a long time?

C: 一般来说「四大恶人」可以有五个人，但是我不允许这个团体里有比我更聪明的人。所以对不起，你不能加入。
E: Under normal circumstances, we could permit a fifth member to join the Infamous Four. But I won't allow anyone smarter than me in the group. I'm sorry to inform you that you can't join us.

C: 别骂了别骂了！
E: Hey, go easy on me!

C: 看来，我们的参赛选手已经全部到齐了！小店第四百二十一届大胃王比赛，即将开始！
E: Looks like our contestants are all ready. The <unbreak>421</unbreak>st Competitive Eater Championship is about to begin!

C: 呃——你不会真要按老板那套来吧？！
E: Um... are you really going along with all that stuff the boss said?

C: 可你根本不在乎——因为你现在需要水！你一口气吃了实在太多包子，简直快要把自己噎死了！
E: But you don't care in the slightest — because you need water, stat! You've eaten so many buns in one go that you almost choke to death!

C: 嘎更艮鹅日惹？！（发生什么事了？！）
E: Bopth pamphened!? ("What happened!?")

C: 喔——那可真是太可惜了。你已经苦苦支撑到现在，却在胜利前夕宣告倒下……
E: Oh, now that's a real shame. You've been struggling so hard up until this point, but on the cusp of victory you declare your own downfall...

C: 它有很长一段时间不说话，直到其他的机巧鸟回到系统里，我们才算是终于确信。
E: Then it didn't speak for a long time, and it wasn't until the other cycranes came back to the system that we were able to verify everything.

C: 难道…这就是所谓的饱和式救援喀！
E: Could this be what they call oversaturated rescue?

C: 我的话已经是最简洁的了，真没法再缩减了喀。
E: I've already made it as simple as possible — can't possibly trim it down more, you know.

C: 虫的一生难免遇到分岔路，当面对熙熙攘攘的坦途和人迹罕至的小径，应当如何选择自己的虫生？我曾无数次考虑过这个问题。
E: A bug's life is full of crossroads. When faced with a bustling avenue and a secluded path, which should one take? I've pondered this question time and time again.

C: 刺耳的巨响，熄灭的灯光…冬之民的天空堡垒在暴风中迷失之前，也有这样的前兆。
E: A piercing roar, darkness swallowing the light... Before the Winterfolk's sky fortress was lost to the storm, the same ominous signs appeared.

C: 如果你一定想在这里销毁那枚炸弹——<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>，一个也不能少。懂吗？
E: If you insist on destroying the bomb here, you need <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. Nothing less than six. Do you understand?

C: 听起来你还不明白——这片水体是持明族的圣地，是他们重要的精神寄托。如果你要在这里放个大烟花，那可是世界上最不道德的事之一了。
E: Sounds like you're still not getting it. This body of water is the Vidyadhara's sacred site and their important spiritual symbol. If you were to set off a big firework here, it would be one of the most immoral things in the world.

C: 「欢愉」的阿哈肯定会同意你的观点，但那「巡猎」可未必了。
E: Aha the Elation might've agreed on your perspective, but The Hunt would not have.

C: 总感觉你在敷衍我。
E: I feel like you're just humoring me.

C: 噢，那应该是我认错人了。
E: Oh, then I probably got the wrong person.

C: 安装了传送装置的豪车，通往位于口袋梦境的包厢，给人以最为私密的观影体验。
E: A limousine with teleporters that are directly connected to pocket dimension Dreamscapes, providing one with the most private cinema experience.

C: 自由，奔放，这才是我追求的终极艺术！让家族的约束统统见反物质军团去吧！
E: Freedom! Being truly unrestrained! This is the ultimate form of art that I pursue! Let all constraints imposed by The Family be given unto the Antimatter Legion!

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 祝您一路顺风！
E: Safe travels!

C: 好孩子，还是节省点好。
E: Child, it's good to be thrifty.

C: 瞧瞧这热水！
E: Look at all this hot water!

C: 尼卡多利的试炼要来了~
E: The trial of Nikador has come!

C: 接下来呢？
E: What next?

C: 种质库的内容必须备份！
E: The Gene Bank must be backed up!

C: 我买还不行吗？
E: Can't I buy some for you?

C: 列车长有义务保证乘客们的人身安全，我让你回来，就是要保证你的安全——
E: Pom-Pom is obliged to ensure the personal safety of all our passengers, so that's why Pom-Pom has called you back — to ensure your safety...

C: （赶紧把纽扣交给帕姆吧！）
E: (Take the button back to Pom-Pom ASAP!)

C: {NICKNAME}乘客！你怎么这么不小心！把杯子都打碎了！真是的，帕姆又得去打扫……
E: {NICKNAME}, how can you be so careless! You smashed that mug! Really, now Pom-Pom has to get out my broom again...

C: 那就应该使用胡萝卜，而不是使用蓝莓！帕姆记起来了，下次也不会忘了。
E: Then let's add the carrots, and not the blueberries! Pom-Pom remembers now, and won't forget next time.

C: 这样不好吧，太死板了。
E: That's no good. It's too strict.

C: 唔…好像是有点，帕姆再想想帕。
E: Oh... You're right. Pom-Pom will keep thinking on it.

C: 看你风尘仆仆的样子，估计肚子也饿了，餐车上的食物也得补货了。
E: Judging by your travel-worn appearance, you must be hungry. The food truck also needs restocking.

C: 果然会有这样的担心…老实说列车上确实不太建议培育这种未知品类的植物，除非有专人收容研究。
E: So you're afraid of that... To be honest, it really isn't the best to be propagating this kind of unknown species on the Express — unless we have a professional to help contain and study it.

C: 首先是——餐车食物的口味！你喜欢什么口味的食物哇？
E: Firstly, let's focus on the food truck! What kind of food do you like?

C: 准备起来总是需要时间的，{NICKNAME}乘客不要太心急噢。
E: It takes time to prepare them. Please wait patiently, {NICKNAME}.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你终于回来了！帕姆痛得好难受哇！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're finally back! The pain is driving me crazy!

C: （建议帕姆热敷）
E: (Suggest Pom-Pom that they use a warm compress)

C: 啦啦～啦～等等，怎么突然切歌了！
E: La, la... La... Hey! Why was the song cut off?

C: 什么叫「绿色通道纯粹」配色啦！唔姆…不过好像确实只有绿色也会很单调，而且容易让人无法辨识紧急出口的位置。
E: That's not the name of the colorway! Well, using only green color might be monotonous and make it difficult for passengers to locate the emergency exit.

C: 很简单的规则，试一试就会很快上手的，放心吧！
E: The rules are very simple — I'm sure you'll quickly get the hang of it!

C: 也不用每天都打扫吧？
E: Is it necessary to clean the floor every day?

C: 不行吗？
E: Is there a problem?

C: 我只是看看你在干嘛。
E: I just want to see what you're doing.

C: 我想听点摇滚乐…
E: I want to listen to some rock music...

C: 那好吧…
E: Okay then...

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: 关于丹恒：姬子的咖啡
E: About Dan Heng: Himeko's coffee

C: 为确保物流安全，物流机巧鸟将即刻返回停鸟架。
E: For security reasons, the courier cycrane will immediately return to its roost.

C: …肯定又是解释不清的原理！
E: ...As for how they caused the anomaly, it's still a mystery.

C: 石头老板放置的气球挡住了哈努兄弟的去路，没有被变小的伙伴或许能破坏它。
E: The balloons placed by Boss Stone have hindered Hanu's way. Those who are not shrunken can probably destroy the balloons.

C: …比俱乐部里的表演要刺激一万倍！
E: ...It's a thousand times more exciting than anything else in the club!

C: 你准备好了吗？
E: Are you ready?

C: 停、停，你先别急！会发出这种声音的也未必只有钟表——它还有可能是颗危险的炸弹呢，对不对？歪脑筋很有可能会要你的命，下次还是别这样了。
E: Wait, wait, just hold on for a sec! It's not just watches that could be ticking. What about bombs and explosive devices? We'd better be sure of it lest it kills us all.

C: 那可是个炸弹啊！
E: But that's an actual bomb!

C: 我不知道。画得真好看啊，会是谁呢？好想认识一下哦。
E: I don't know. They're so beautiful. Who could it be? I'd love to know.

C: 好，祝你度过愉快的一天，我先走了……
E: Well, have a nice day then. I'm off...

C: 真没东西？我不信。
E: Nothing? Really? I'm skeptical.

C: 你把手放到了箱子上。这个老旧的机械锁一共有四个凹槽，每个凹槽对应一个数字。现在轮到你行动了——第一个数字是什么？
E: You put your hands on the box. The ancient combo lock has four slots, which corresponds to four numbers. Now it's your turn. So, what's the first number?
One.

C: 被你理直气壮的发言所震慑，男人一时竟无言以对。
E: Dumbstruck by your righteous statement, the man remains speechless for a moment.

C: 说罢，多少钱？
E: Enough, how much do you want?

C: 好啊，听起来有点意思。
E: Alright, sounds interesting.

C: 能使毛物脱兽皮，能教水虫岸上栖，与化去而不见兮，此奇怪物不可欺。
E: It can shed the skin of beasts, teach aquatic bugs to live on land, and disappear without being seen. This strange thing cannot be provoked.

C: 哈哈哈哈，我无爪牙之利，又怎么能咬你呢？
E: Hahaha. Even if I want to, I don't have teeth!

C: 真不愧是您，符合我对您一直以来的印象。
E: Truly, you are just as I have always imagined.

C: 您不但找回了丢失的货物，还找回了丢失的机巧鸟，超额完成任务！我真是没看错您！请收下这些酬劳吧！
E: Not only did you find the lost cargo, but also the missing cycrane, exceeding our expectations! I knew I could count on you. Please accept this payment as a token of our appreciation!

C: 这个您就不必担心了，您找到他们时我就立刻报告了神策府。咱们现在说话这会儿，那几个家伙应该已经被云骑抓捕归案啦～
E: Don't worry about that. I've already informed the Seat of Divine Foresight when you found them. By now, I believe they have been arrested by the Cloud Knights.

C: 机巧鸟返回安全区中…
E: Cycrane is returning to the safe zone...

C: 鹤运物流希望能委托你去到这些货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找这些丢失的货物。
E: Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where goods have gone missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

C: 这不就是玻璃珠吗？
E: Aren't these just marbles?

C: 总之，这里还有些好东西，就当做是我的谢礼吧。
E: Anyway, there's still some good stuff here. Take it as a gift for rescuing me.

C: 唉…让你白跑一趟，真对不起。这样吧，给你一个取货码。
E: Ugh... Sorry about wasting your time, I'm really sorry. How about this, I'll give you a collection code for the item?

C: 他的头发和眉毛因愤怒拧成一团，好一会儿之后才舒展开来。
E: His hair and brow knitted together in a rage, taking quite some time before they unfurl.

C: 我…我已经受够了！有病吃药很难吗？很难吗？！
E: I... I've had enough! Is it really so hard to take medicine when you're sick? Is it???

C: 唉…世风日下，人心不古……
E: *sigh*... The world's not what it used to be. Kids these days...

C: …不…不——别过来！
E: ...No... No! Stay away!

C: 嗨，我倒是想——但多亏了我那「亲爱的」姐姐，自己在现实酒店当前台就算了，还非得买一赠一，把我也安排上。
E: Ha, I'd love to — but thanks to my "darling" sister, I've been signed up to work at the hotel in reality as a receptionist alongside her. It's not enough for her to be working there. She had to make it a two-for-one deal.

C: 这就要走了？行吧，有空再聊。和你闲聊还挺有意思的。
E: Going so soon? Fine, let's chat again next time you're free. You're fun to talk to.

C: 要知道，事件视界之外也是有引力的，而且越靠近中心、引力就越强。我那艘船的发动机不是尖货，没法保证取到信标后还能出来……
E: Y'know what, there is gravity outside the event horizon, and it gets stronger the closer you get to the center. My ship's engine wasn't the best, and there was no guarantee that we could even get out once we'd nabbed the beacon...

C: 博识学会还挺守约的…
E: The Intelligentsia Guild keeps their promises...

C: 那可是吸引了全世界目光的遗产，仿佛宇宙尽头的秘宝！而想要得到这宝物，只需要踏上{RUBY_B#「开拓」}他曾经走过{RUBY_E#}的道路。
E: That's an inheritance that attracted attention from all over the world, like a secret treasure at the end of the universe! And to get it, you need to step on the path {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}that he once took{RUBY_E#}.

C: （小声）大哥，这个人气势如此凶悍，说不定有点来头。我们…还是不要硬碰硬为好。
E: (Whispering) Dude, this one's no pushover, {M#he}{F#she} might be someone important. Let's... not clash head-on.

C: 厨师说：「我们还是决定把它吃掉。既然这玩意跟黄石牛长得差不多，肉质估计也差不到哪儿去」。
E: The chef said, "We still want to eat it. Since it looks similar to yellow boulder calves, the meat should taste the same."

C: 我不反对吃肉，但作为无名客，这些人明显缺乏对未知的敬畏和探索精神——他们应该加入泯灭帮才对……
E: I'm not against eating meat, but as the Nameless, these people obviously lack the awe for the unknown and the spirit of adventure — they should've joined the Annihilation Gang, instead...

C: 他们为什么对门这么执着？我反正理解不了。如果没人出来解释，我就只能理解为技术有限，能力不足了。
E: What's the reason behind the obsession? I'm puzzled. If no one cares to explain, I'll take it as a sign of incompetence.

C: 这苏、苏乐达啊…一口开怀、三口忘忧、十口入喉不知愁…哈哈…只要您喝得够多——
E: This is S—SoulGlad... One sip will cheer you up, three will make you forget about troubles, and ten will send you on cloud nine... Haha, as long as you down enough of it...

C: 关于莫里斯……
E: It's about Morris...

C: 我的青春毁于不切实际的梦想，但比这更可怕的是——还有无数和我一样的年轻人还在重复我的悲剧。就像自灭者喜欢的飞蛾，前仆后继地飞入名为梦想的火狱。
E: My youth was wasted on unrealistic dreams, but there is something worse — so many other young folks like me are going down the same path of failure. They're like moths that the Self-Annihilators love so much, diving headfirst into the purgatory called "dreams."

C: 我怎么没感觉到，每天不是罚工资就是扣绩效……
E: Are you sure? How come I'm getting either a pay cut or a KPI deduction every other day...?

C: 你真这么觉得？
E: You really think that?

C: 我看那个芙尔拉女士就是把人当作工具，只看重员工的商业价值，却不在乎员工的精神追求，真是令人痛心！
E: If you ask me, I'd say that Madam Forla is only treating her talents as tools. She only cares about how much she can earn from her employees, instead of listening to what her employees really want. That's saddening!

C: 对！都怪这些消费者不能接受更多元的艺术——要想帮助艺者实现梦想，就必须要先改变他们的审美！
E: Exactly! It's the fault of those consumers who aren't receptive to more diverse art! If I want to help my talents realize their dreams, I must convince the consumers to change their preferences first!

C: 今后我会好好听您的话，不会再想这些幼稚的事情了——也请您努力让拉洛丝成为一名「盛会巨星」，而不是那种孤芳自赏的小艺术家。
E: From today onward, I'll follow your arrangements and stop dwelling on those childish thoughts. So, please do your part and make me a superstar, not a small-time artist whose music is admired by no one.

C: 我理解您的追求，但每个人应该都对艺术都有不一样的评判标准。如果您只相信外界的评价，可能反而会错失「最好的演出」。
E: I understand your desire, but everyone has their own criteria for the "finest" shows. By relying solely on external judgments, you might overlook the truly finest shows.

C: 有什么能推荐的演出吗？
E: Are there any performances that you would recommend?

C: 我本以为她只是位醉酒的客人，但后来我才知道，她是鸢尾花家系最著名的明星经纪人——芙尔拉女士。我接受了她的邀请来到匹诺康尼，成了梦境中小有名气的歌星。
E: At first, I thought she was just some random drunken customer, but I later discovered that she was Forla, the most respected celebrity manager from the Iris Family. So I accepted her invitation to Penacony and became a songstress with a smidgen of fame in the Dreamscape.

C: 如何评价知更鸟？
E: What are your thoughts on Robin?

C: 这你都不认识？这可是来自声乐之星的拉洛丝小姐！
E: You don't know her? That's Larose, a renowned songstress from the planet of canticles!

C: 没想到我真的在大家面前唱出了「纯美之歌」，但是……
E: I never imagined I would perform the Song of Beauty in front of everyone, but...

C: 不，我…我射中了你！即便我不是故意的，但、但这是能一笑了之的事情吗？
E: No, I... I shot you! It wasn't intentional, b—but it isn't a mistake that can be easily brushed off!

C: 你原本可以享受大好人生，你的未来有那么多可能性，全都被我的失误给毁了！
E: You could have lived a wonderful life, with so many possibilities in your future. It was all ruined by me!

C: 但实际上呢？这些人的脑子比空垃圾袋还要浅薄，我一眼就把他们望到底！
E: The truth is, their mind is as empty as an unused trash bag! I can see right through them at a glance!

C: 工作内容非常简单——帮我收集一个人的信息。手段包括但不限于：记录她的工作与生活轨迹、并保存相关的影像，通过各种渠道获取她的信息……
E: It's pretty simple — I need you to gather a person's info for me. The means available to you include but are not limited to: Recording her work and her everyday life, saving relevant images and videos, and obtaining any information about her via any channel possible...

C: 眼前的皮皮西突然痛苦地抱头，整个人簌簌颤抖起来。
E: The Pepeshi before you suddenly clutches his head in agony, with his body trembling uncontrollably.

C: ..哈哈...没错、没错！人们或早或晚，总归要直面内心深处的自己...而现在我听到了，那甜蜜的寂静与安宁正召唤着我——
E: ...Haha... Yeah, indeed! Sooner or later, one will face their true self... I can hear it now. Sweet silence and peace are calling me...

C: <unbreak>30</unbreak>岁那年，我将自己的漫画《沉醉于你的耀眼光芒》改编为电影，并因此斩获惊人的票房，受到星际间无数年轻人的追捧。
E: At the age of 30, I adapted my manga, Mesmerized by Your Charm, into a movie, which turned out to be a phenomenal box office hit. The movie was all the rage among the youngsters in the universe.

C: 哈哈，当然没有，不然我还怎么站在这呢？
E: Haha, of course not, otherwise how could I still be standing here?

C: 格-蕾的脸上闪过一丝欢喜。智械本不会有表情，但在梦里，一切皆有可能。
E: A hint of joy flashes on Go-Ray's face. Intellitrons aren't supposed to have facial expressions, but everything is possible in a dream.

C: 比如…呼吁人们保护环境，把垃圾丢进垃圾桶里。
E: Like... raising the awareness of environmental preservation and encouraging people to dispose of their trash properly.

C: 我…又开始感到困扰了。自从蒙受恩赐、获得智慧之后，这种感觉就越发强烈。
E: I... have doubts again. This sensation has grown more and more intense since I underwent the transformation and gained wisdom.

C: 看来之前的那些垃圾需要时间才能彻底分解，我暂时无法接收垃圾了。
E: Looks like I need some time to fully break down the previous batch of trash. I can't take more for the time being.

C: 好啊，辛苦你了。
E: Sure, thank you very much.

C: 为了爬升家族的音阶，我已经倾尽了一切手段，甚至把我的兄弟姐妹都当成了晋升路上的垫脚石。
E: I have used every method at my disposal to climb up The Family's scales, even using my own siblings as footholds on my path to ascension.

C: 孩子，在企业家外，基金会内更多也是无数个像你一样心地善良的人。
E: Kid, in addition to scions of business there are also countless numbers of kind-hearted souls just like you who make up the foundation.

C: 你是刚才来见奥科萨娜的那家伙？怎么，那女人突然良心发现，打算给我们打个对折？
E: Are you the one who was coming to see Oksana before? What, don't tell me her conscience got the better of her, and she'd like to cut us a half-price deal now?

C: 呵，以她的为人，这种事恐怕比公司改信阿哈的可能性还低。
E: Ha! Knowing her, there's more chance of the IPC converting to Aha than there is of that ever happening.

C: 知道基金会建立的初衷是什么吗？是洗钱！然后把钱投到军火的代工生产线上，基金会还能掩人耳目，多么精明的算盘。
E: You wanna know the real reason why the foundation was established? Money laundering! They take that money and invest it into weapons manufacturers, then use the foundation to pull the wool over people's eyes. It's a shrewd hustle.

C: 我凭什么告诉你？
E: Why should I tell you?

C: 凭他的天赋，在匹诺康尼肯定能闯出一片天，但跑到星际和平公司那种人吃人的地方，给那些没有理想的老东西当奴隶——
E: Given how talented he is, he would have definitely been able to make a name for himself in Penacony. Yet, he chose to join a dog-eat-dog company like the IPC and serve as a workhorse for those unambitious squares...

C: 到时候你就跟他说：「校长的好意，查德心领了。可查德实在没有别的特长，适应不了竞争激烈的社会，只能凭自己的意愿碰碰运气。母校的教诲，我时刻铭记在心。」
E: When you see him again, you can tell him this, "I understand your good intentions. However, since I don't excel at anything else and can't adapt to an intensely competitive society, I can only try my luck as I see fit. As for the things that I learned at my alma mater, I will always bear them in my heart."

C: 那老鸟要开始念了。可能会有些慢，请同学务必保持耐心……
E: Then I'll start dictating. I may be a bit slow, so please be patient with me...

C: 家族已经用反模因手段清除了那些猴子的残留痕迹。至于更具体的来龙去脉，猎犬写了一份分锅用的报告……
E: The Family has already employed anti-memetic measures to remove the remaining trace of those monkeys. As for the specifics, it's all written in the report the Bloodhounds have prepared with regard to this incident...

C: 自那之后，主办方就将上场通道彼此分隔，以免选手提前接触。
E: Ever since that incident, participants from both sides have been kept separate to prevent any unwanted contact between them.

C: 作为旧日的武器试验场，有些废弃零件堆在这里也是很正常的。
E: It's not surprising to see discarded parts piled up in this abandoned weapon testing ground.

C: 是公司那帮家伙。自从上次的事结束后，这里的黑衣人越来越多，其中有些干脆住下来不走了。
E: It's those IPC guys. Ever since the Eternal Freeze let up, there have been more and more of those people in black around here. Some of them have simply settled in and not left!

C: 的确，我们不能只着眼当下，完全不考虑未来。
E: Indeed, we cannot be blinded by the present and not consider the future at all.

C: 这么说，你没参加过舞会？
E: Are you saying, you've never been to a party before?

C: 为什么你会想要这些废料？
E: Why would you want scrap like this?

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 所以，我打算把这批材料制成玩具机兵，换种形式为贝洛伯格添砖加瓦。现在封锁令解除了，我正好把它们给下层区的孩子送去。
E: So, I plan to use these materials to craft toy automatons and help Belobog in what little way I can. Now the lockdown has been lifted, I will be giving them to the children of the Underworld.

C: 是吗？快跟我说说~
E: You do? Tell me!

C: 啾啾，开盖有奖！是本小鸟啾！
E: Tweet tweet, open the lid for a prize! It's me, tweet!

C: 算了，我要回到大家身边取暖去了啾。
E: Forget it. I'm going back to everyone's side to keep warm, tweet.

C: 啾！在客官的帮助下，已经有很多孩子回来了啾！
E: Tweet! Many children have returned with your help, tweet!

C: 小镇宾馆？
E: Town Hotel?

C: 嗯哼，这下人家就能想起来了啾……
E: Uh-huh, now I can remember what happened, tweet...

C: <align="center">折纸鸟气喘吁吁地停回你身前。</align>
E: <align="center">The origami bird pauses in front of you, breathless.</align>

C: 嘿呀！
E: Hi-yah!

C: 唔…我确实安排了固定的站岗位置，但那些调皮的小家伙们总喜欢跑到别的地方去…
E: Ugh... I assigned fixed stations for sentry duty, but those playful little ones just love running off to other places...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，负责监督客房的小家伙总是严守换班时间，它大概躲在了<color=#dbc291ff>离「钟表」很近的地方</color>啾！
E: Hi-yah! Let me think: There's a little one watching over the guest room who's always very strict about shift change times. It's probably hiding somewhere <color=#dbc291ff>very near the clock</color>, tweet!

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个迷信的孩子总把四叶草作为吉祥物，总说只要有第四片叶子自己就不会被发现啾…说不定它就藏在<color=#dbc291ff>和四叶草有关的地方</color>呢？
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet tweet... That's right! There's a superstitious kid who uses four-leaf clovers as its lucky item. It's always saying that it won't be found as long as it has the fourth leaf, tweet... Maybe it's hiding <color=#dbc291ff>in a place to do with four-leaf clovers</color>?

C: 哼哼…没错，有个助手总觉得自己飞太累，最近总在念叨着用<color=#dbc291ff>「地下区域」的气球</color>不用翅膀也可以飞起来啾。
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a helper who always feels that flying is too tiring. Recently, it's always saying that it wants to use <color=#dbc291ff>the underground zone's balloons</color> to fly instead of using its own wings, tweet.

C: 你的人设撞了。
E: I've already met another character that said the same thing...

C: 啾啾！被你发现了！
E: Tweet tweet! I've been discovered!

C: 你也喜欢哈努兄弟吗？
E: Do you like Brother Hanu, too?

C: 哼，小气的人！那我去找别人帮忙了啾！
E: Humph, you're mean! Then I'll go and find someone else to help me, tweet!

C: 唔呣…那些孩子捉迷藏时都有固定的躲藏地点，但在下怎么也想不起来了啾…
E: Hmm... When these children play hide-and-seek, they always have specific hiding spots, but I can't seem to remember them, tweet...

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 呼哇，助手们聚集得这么快，这下很快就能开拍了啾~
E: Woah, all of my assistants gathered so quickly, now we can start filming, tweet~

C: 呼哇，助手们居然都来齐了，这下本公子的电影就可以开拍了啾~
E: Woah, all of my assistants actually came! Now I can finally start filming my movie, tweet~

C: 这里的声音很大，所以，就算躲在这儿唱歌，也不会有别的小鸟听到啾。
E: It's really noisy here, so even if you hide in here to sing, no other birdies can hear you, tweet.

C: 不过，就算没法参加比赛，也不要放松锻炼啾，否则会被石头老板欺负的啾。
E: But, even if you're not participating, you mustn't slack off on your training, or you'll be pushed around by Boss Stone, tweet.

C: 啾，朋友，你也被这天才的设计震慑住了吗？
E: Tweet, have you been dumbfounded by this genius' design?

C: 别怕，「漆黑的虎克大人」这就救你出来！
E: Don't worry, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great will rescue you!

C: 他忍住了笑声——你打心底里对他的矜持表示感激。
E: He restrains his laughter, for which you express sincere gratitude.

C: 两位客人想喝点什么啾？
E: What would you two like to drink, tweet?

C: 啾啾！原来如此，谢谢你！我要换个地方摆摊了啾~
E: Tweet tweet! Oh I see, thank you! Then I'll change a place to set up shop, tweet!

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 想玩蹦极啾？快站在喷气口上，我把你啾——地一下喷起来。
E: Wanna try bungee jumping, tweet? Stand on the air jet. I will fire you up with a pheewwww.

C: 这样一来，我的社会科学实践圆满完成！回去交作业了啾~
E: With that out of the way, my social science project is complete! Time to turn in the assignment, tweet!

C: 多么励志，多么伟大。我要学习这种精神才行。
E: So inspiring! So great! This is the spirit that I want to adopt!

C: 咕…呼噜？
E: Snort... *snooze*?

C: 糟了！一定是出事了，听着，我本想让我的同僚来保障你的安全，但他却不在这里，「上面」一定是出事了！
E: No... Something is terribly wrong! Look, I was going to ask my colleague to keep you safe, but he's not where he's supposed to be. Something must have gone wrong with the "higher-ups"!

C: 你当然也记得，这位「丹枢大人」早就在丹鼎司殒殁了，你对此非常确定。
E: You remember how Lady Dan Shu died in the Alchemy Commission, and you are absolutely certain of her death.

C: 路上小心。
E: Safe travels.

C: 我这心理素质，还需要陌生人帮我加油鼓劲…哎，我已经决定了，我要去抽，我要看清命运，我要决定我的未来，我现在就出发！
E: I even need a stranger to cheer me up... All right. I've made up my mind! I've got to draw the last lot and embrace my fate, no matter what it may have in store for me!

C: 墓碑旁的供品佐证了你的猜想，当这位叫「阿欣」的姑娘陷入永恒的沉睡中时，她的故友至亲也不曾忘记她——就是不知道他们在探望她的时候都准备了什么礼物。
E: Offerings beside the tombstone support your hypothesis. When this girl called A-Xin fell into an eternal sleep, her old friends and relatives never forgot about her — You just don't know what gift they prepared when they visited her.

C: 那你盯着我的墓碑干什么，我们又不认识，还踩在我的东西上，好生无礼呀。
E: Then why are you staring at my tombstone? We don't know each other but here you are stepping all over my offerings. It's so rude.

C: …时间也不早了，你打算再听一会吗？
E: ...It's getting late. Do you want to keep listening to the story?

C: 事不宜迟，就让我现在来演奏试试。
E: Then without any further ado, allow me to give it a play right now.

C: 今天这节课先告一段落啦！有什么问题，咱们下节课再说吧。
E: That's enough for today! If you've any problems, we can chat about it next time.

C: 记住了，开始吧。
E: Got it. Let's get started.

C: 很好，我收下了。
E: Great, I'll take it.

C: 你要是不喜欢的话…嗯，我…我也不知道你喜欢不喜欢，我就假装没看见吧。
E: If that's not what you want... well, I... I don't know whether you want it or not, so let's pretend I didn't see it.

C: 不过还是感谢您的配合。过马路时请多加小心，类似事故还是少出现为妙。
E: But thanks for the cooperation. Be careful when crossing the street to avoid similar accidents from occurring.

C: 竟然敢讹到我的头上？必须得给他点颜色看看了。
E: He dares put the blame on my head? I'll teach him a lesson!

C: 就快找到她了，爸爸。
E: We've nearly found her, father.

C: 在场的各位都看到了啊，结果很正常，机器没有任何问题，还有人不相信的，可以自己来玩一局。就摆在这，随时都可以。
E: Everyone here saw it, and the results are perfectly normal. For those who still doubt, you can come and play a round yourself. It's right here, anytime.

C: 请问你认识那位赌神吗？
E: Excuse me, do you know the Ace Gambler?

C: 不是吧，这么俗套的故事你也信？再说那个人是不是赌神，还不一定呢。
E: C'mon! How can you believe such a clichéd story? Besides, you don't know if he is actually the "Ace Gambler."

C: 不过这也说明…您很满意对吧？行嘞，您喜欢就好！
E: But that also means... you're satisfied with it, right? Well, as long as you like it!

C: 你好像还挺忙的。
E: You seem pretty occupied.

C: 我得向您承认，{F#女士}{M#先生}，我现在完全不知道如何是好。外人都说当局者迷，我想只有像您这样清醒的宾客能帮我这个忙了。
E: Truth be told, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I have no idea what to do. As the saying goes, "The spectators see the game better than the players." I believe only a level-headed guest like you can offer me some sound advice.

C: 如果还有一次机会，它还会继续做出相同的选择吗？还是说它会接受平庸、做一瓶普通人家餐桌上的红酒呢？你永远不可能知道答案了。
E: If it could live its life over again, would it have made the same choices? Would it accept its mediocrity and resign to being a bottle of red wine enjoyed by a modest family? That's an answer you'll never find out.

C: 我…我那是担心，打算豁出去跟你同生共死，结果你连句谢谢也不说…幸好咱们只是变成了哈努兄弟，除了颜值进步以外并无危险……
E: I... I was worried about you, so I risked my life and went through this thing with you. Yet, this is how you thanked me... It's a good thing that we're only turned into Hanu — we're better-looking now and aren't in any real danger.

C: 它望向你，态度似乎发生了微妙的转变，哼，善变的大鸟。
E: It turns to you, and its attitude seems to have changed a little... Humph, what a fickle bird...

C: 哈，你问谁我们三个谁最香醇？嘿，同胞们，居然有人想要用这么低劣的手段，破坏我们三瓶的完美情谊。
E: Hah, you're asking which of us is the finest of wines? Hey, brothers! You see what despicable methods they use to try and break up our perfect friendship!

C: 在另外两个酒瓶的冷漠里，小红愤怒地走进你的背包。它现在已经是最香醇的美酒，可仍有团火在它的心头燃烧。
E: As the other two bottles fall into indifferent silence, Red angrily storms into your Inventory. Now, knowing that it is the finest of wines, the fire in its heart has been reignited.

C: 这位卜者一定很乐于接受你的邀请——尤其是上班时间内——但希望那位太卜能放她一马。
E: I'm sure the diviner would be more than happy to accept your invitation... Especially if it is during work hours... Let's just hope the Master Diviner lets her get away for a moment.

C: …不愧是她。
E: ...We should expect no less of her...

C: 彦卿…
E: Yanqing...

C: 接下来是第二个孔位，也是最后一个孔位。满足这个条件的人倒是不少，你可以仔细想想。
E: Next, the second and final slot... There are a lot more people that meet the requirements for this one, so think carefully.

C: 听着像是某个星神…
E: Sounds like an Aeon...

C: 我编得应该够逼真了呀…再想办法改改。
E: My story should be credible enough... I should try to improve it.

C: 是你呀，一下子没认出来。
E: Oh, it's you! I didn't recognize you for a second.

C: 在梦的深处，九千只眼睛的桶王沉睡着，等待着全人类变成铁桶的那天。
E: In the depth of the dream, the nine-thousand-eyed King of Cans slumbers, waiting for the day when all of mankind is turned into iron cans.

C: 呵，梦泡电影看多了，真以为你一个人能打过我们？
E: You've been watchin' too many dream bubble movies! Ya really think ya can beat us alone?

C: 不会耽误你太多时间，挂个名给我们撑场面就行。
E: It won't take up much of ya time! All ya gotta do is say ya associate with us n' give us some street cred!

C: ——哇！气泡涨了好多，瓶盖都要给我气飞了！好啊，你骂得好啊！
E: ...Woah! That's got my bubbles going! My bottle cap is ready to burst! Alright, you know how to insult someone!

C: 依我看，别说是展柜里那些跟不上时代的老东西，就连只存在于都市传说中的秘密窖藏，恐怕也早已被我超越了。
E: The way I see it, it's not just those outdated old folks in the display cabinet, but I've already far surpassed the level of even the secret cellar stash of urban legends!

C: 知更鸟只兀自低头，怔怔地看着怀里的笔记本，什么也没有说。半晌，她终于开口。
E: Robin simply bows her head, staring dumbly at the journal in her hands, and says nothing. She finally speaks after a long silence.

C: 他…一定过得很孤独吧……
E: He... must be really lonely...

C: 邀请流梦礁那位女士。
E: Invite that lady from the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 原来是艾迪恩代币，而不是其他什么值钱的贵金属——真可惜，但至少这下你的牙不会遭殃了。
E: Turns out the coin is merely an Aideen Token and not some other valuable metal trinket. A pity, but at least there's no need for you to bite into the coin now.

C: 你向侍从确认了你的邀请名单，在耐心的等待后，瓦尔特、姬子与三月七赶到了你身边。
E: You pass the attendant the guest list and wait patiently. A short while later, Welt, Himeko, and March 7th show up.

C: 三月七迅速捂住了嘴，盖过了自己的惊呼，然后又捂住了眼睛。
E: March 7th covers her mouth as she cries out in surprise, then quickly covers her eyes.

C: 战斗画面挺热血的，年轻人的想象力果然丰富，匹诺康尼这个地方还真适合你。
E: What an intense combat scenario. Penacony truly is the perfect place for youngsters with a rich imagination like yours.

C: 要不，再看一会吧？
E: How about observing for a little while longer?

C: 观景车厢里有多少小圆桌？
E: How many small round tables are there in the Parlor Car?

C: 比起你们说话的内容，我更喜欢观察你们在面对意料之外的提问时，展现出的小动作和微表情。嫌疑人甲比你慌乱多了。
E: Rather than listening to your conversation, I'm more interested in observing your actions and expressions when facing unexpected questions. It's evident that Suspect A is more anxious than you.

C: 那么这一本是…《魔阴身考》？
E: So, this book is... A Study into the Mara-Struck?

C: 新来的狱卒挠了挠头离开了这里，这本《魔阴身考》切切实实成为了你的所有物。
E: The new prison guard scratched her head and left. A Study into the Mara-Struck is now your book.

C: 你好你好，很高兴认识你。
E: Hello hello, nice to meet you.

C: 逃犯知道自己无处可逃之后，看向了幽囚狱的高处，那是被古海之水淹没的特殊洞天构造。他一开始就知道自己即便能离开囚室，也无法从幽囚狱中逃走。
E: When the fugitive knows that he has nowhere to run, he looks up at the heights of The Shackling Prison — a unique delve formed from the waters of the ancient sea. From the beginning, he already knew that even if he could escape his cell, there would be no liberation from the walls of The Shackling Prison.

C: 这里具体是干什么的地方？
E: What is this place?

C: 看来应该是没有问题了！就是这个前人留下了密文和密钥。
E: Awesome, looks like we're good to go! This memo was written by the explorer who left behind the cipher and encryption key.

C: 你勉强回忆着刚才解读出的路线，穿过了集装箱组成的巨大迷宫。
E: Trying your best to recall the directions you just decoded, you make your way through the gigantic maze of freight containers.

C: 谢谢你的小知识，我要走了。
E: Thanks for the bit of trivia. I have to go.

C: 不成功便成仁，这炮，咱是非放不可的。
E: You have to make it work. We'll fire those cannons at any cost.

C: 怎么样，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}感受到了「礼炮精神」吗？
E: Well, {F#miss}{M#mister}, did you feel the "cannon spirit"?

C: 爷爷的行踪到这里就不见了，估计人还在附近。
E: Grandpa's trail ends here, so he must still be nearby.

C: 到！
E: Here!

C: 谁让你做选择题了？咳，注意影响，课堂上别老是东张西望。
E: Who said anything about multiple choice? Ahem, watch your behavior, and stop looking around during class.

C: 如此亲切的讲师，授课的内容也想必不会太过困难吧——你对接下来的课程充满期待。
E: Such a warm and kind teacher. You are sure the lesson won't be too hard either — you enthusiastically look forward to the class.

C: 小金。我想知道，你为什么要进入演艺圈？
E: Goldie, I'd like to know why you joined show business.

C: 看啊，那高贵的红毯正符合我的色彩，那璀璨的聚光灯正为了衬托我的光泽而亮起，那人群和呐喊声正在为我欢呼——我即是那最闪耀的星。
E: Look, that elegant red carpet matches my color perfectly. The glitzy lights bring out my hue and make it dazzle even shinier. The crowd's screams are their tribute to me — I am the brightest star around here.

C: 阿红选手以压倒性的优势击败了所有对手，是的，毫无悬念，这就是绝对的实力碾压！
E: Reddie has defeated all opponents with its overwhelming advantage in talent. Yes, indubitably, this is what we call "not even a fair fight"!

C: 触碰圣烛。
E: Touch the holy candle.

C: 在烛焰的明灭间，你努力感受着时间的变换，在某个瞬间，你领悟到了什么…可等你睁开眼，一切又消失了。
E: You strain yourself to feel time's passage within the flicker of the candlelight. For one moment, you feel like you gained an epiphany... But when you open your eyes, everything slips from you once more.

C: 可惜我们的老朋友…因为黑潮…哎……
E: Sadly, our old friend... he... the black tide... *sigh*

C: 怀疑你的专业程度…
E: I'm doubting your professionalism...

C: 稍安勿躁，「心理测试」马上开始！
E: Wait a moment. The psychological assessment will begin soon!

C: 哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
E: O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.

C: 吼吼，还是由本狮来公布正确答案吧！那就是——枕头！
E: Ho-ho, allow me to reveal the right answer then! It is... a pillow!

C: 贫穷。
E: Poverty.

C: 吼？这是本狮预料之外的回答，逻辑却和标准答案如出一辙。遐蝶小姐的智慧实在令本狮刮目相看。
E: Ho? Not an answer I expected, but the logic is identical to the standard answer. Miss Castorice's wisdom has opened this lion's eyes.

C: 求人不如求己！
E: Titans help those who help themselves!

C: 我既没劫持你的硬盘，也没在你的桌面上跳舞。这年头，像我这么老实的病毒可不多见了。
E: I neither hijacked your hard drive nor danced on your desktop. It's rare to find a virus as honest as me these days.

C: 还是算了吧，眼不见为净……
E: Forget it. What you don't know can't hurt you...

C: 呼呼…奇怪的人来了……
E: *crackle* A strange person.

C: 收到收到。呼呼，还不错嘛，这便是给有心之人的回赠。拿好！
E: I've received your offering. Very nice. *crackle* Take my gift for your hard work, kind soul!

C: 是不是你救了我？呼呼，感谢你，路旁的所有石头都将吟诵你的名字，崖壁上的每块巨岩都雕刻着你的样子。你就是最高的山，最长的坡。
E: Did you save me? *crackle* You have my gratitude. All the stones by the road shall chant your name, and every boulder on the cliffs shall feature your visage. You are the highest mountain and the longest slope.

C: 好湿，好湿！小火苗讨厌潮乎乎的东西，赶快拿走！
E: The moisture! The dim flame hates things that are damp! Take it away!

C: 讲讲你的故事？
E: Tell me your story.

C: 除非…除非你能给即将熄灭的篝火添加薪柴，能让火焰燃烧得更加猛烈，呼呼，才有可能从我手中拿走些许，否则…别想靠近！
E: Unless... Unless you can add firewood to the dying fire, and make it burn ferociously. *crackle* Then you can take your share. Otherwise, stay away!

C: 可像我这样又不好看，又不中用的东西，究竟什么地方会有价值呢？
E: But what value does something as useless as me possess?

C: 什么？伟大的哈努兄弟从不对邪恶心慈手软。你、你竟敢玷污他！
E: What? The great Hanu would never show mercy to evil. H—How dare you throw dirt on him!

C: 吾乃「奇兵」！
E: I'm the hero!

C: 无视计划，擅自加班，破坏秩序，当受天罚！
E: Ignoring the plan, working overtime without permission, disregarding Order! Judgment be upon you!

C: 如果这一切真的只是一场梦，那我希望在醒来之前，能找到属于我的答案。每个人，每个物体，都在这个宇宙中寻找着自己的位置。
E: If this is truly a dream, then I hope that before I awaken, I will be able to find an answer that truly belongs to me. After all, every human and every object is searching for their place in this universe.

C: …除非你哭得足够大声，否则很难解决问题。
E: ...Unless you cry loud enough, it probably won't solve anything.

C: 给他一球棒。
E: Give him a baseball bat.

C: （…恐怕是思念的力量吧？有些设定只能感受，不能细想。）
E: (...Maybe it was the power of our thoughts? Some things just feel right, you're not supposed to overthink them.)

C: 迷…这个风铃，是我最好的朋友送给我的。那时我们都还没有离开过家乡，约好风铃响起，就一起出发去外面的世界冒险迷！
E: Memi... this chime was a gift from my best friend. Back then, neither of us had ever left our home. We promised, when the chime rang, we'd head out into the world together, memi!

C: 迷…告诉你一个秘密，今天，我就要出发了！你…你觉得我能做到吗？
E: Memi... I'll let you in on a secret: Today's the day I set off! Do you... do you think I can really do it?

C: 风铃发出一丝喑哑的叹息。胜利在望，再敲一次试试吧。
E: The wind chime lets out a hoarse little sigh. Victory is close, try ringing it one more time.

C: …不过，为什么它的眼里会透露出一股坚毅？
E: ...But why does it have such determination in its eyes?

C: 真是不可思议…哀丽秘榭的草地，竟然比私人浴宫的床铺更加舒适。
E: Unbelievable... The grass here at the Aedes Elysiae is even more comfortable than the beds in the private bath chamber!

C: 叫它「好好奇美拉」。
E: Let's just call it Curious Chimera.

C: 不管用。也许这头大地兽是说方言的，你听不懂。
E: Nope, didn't work. Maybe this dromas speaks a different dialect that you don't understand?

C: 咦，这是「大地兽」？
E: Wait, is this a dromas?

C: 是啊，在祝祭庭院学习祷言的日子里，花草可是最重要的伙伴。
E: Yup. Back when I was learning the prayers at the Sacrament Courtyard, flowers were my best companions.

C: 黑塔女士，<color=#dbc291ff>你果真进入了翁法罗斯的世界吗？</color>
E: Madam Herta, <color=#dbc291ff>did you actually enter the world of Amphoreus?</color>

C: {NICKNAME}不也这么认为吗？所以才会随身带着这台留影石机，有它在，就相当于同伴一直陪伴在你身边。
E: Don't you think so too, {NICKNAME}? Maybe that's why you always carry this photostone around. With it, it's like your friends are always right there with you.

C: 稻草人？
E: The scarecrow?

C: 于是，昔涟讲起《如我所书》的故事……
E: Cyrene begins narrating the stories in "As I've Written"...

C: 而坐在屋顶的时候，反倒感觉远方的景色触手可及呢。
E: But when I'm sitting on the rooftop, I feel that such distant sights are within my grasp.

C: 我记得给你讲过天外故事。
E: I remember telling you stories from beyond the sky.

C: 是迷迷啊…
E: You're Mem...

C: 三、二、一……
E: Three, two, one...

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Climb inside the wooden horse's stomach)

C: 我也是悬锋城的人！
E: I am from Castrum Kremnos!

C: 耍的好啊！
E: Well played!

C: （描述悬锋报名官的外观）
E: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos registration officer)

C: …什么改装？
E: ...What modification?

C: …布利萨？我前不久才见过他们的城主，那座城邦早就在纷争的战火中被摧毁了。现在才去往布利萨，怕是为时已晚。
E: ...Bulsa? I recently met their ruler — that city-state has already fallen to the flames of Strife. Any journey to Bulsa now would be futile.

C: 凑近后，你发现它腹部的木板处刻着一行文字——「缺乏智慧者，不得入此门！」
E: Looking closer, you discover an inscription on its wooden stomach — "Entry denied to those without wisdom!"

C: 「入学仪式，其之四：激发灵感，涤净身心。若有邪祟异端，就此沉没也无妨。」
E: "The Fourth Rite of Initiation: Let inspiration wash over your spirit and mind. Should darkness or heresy arise, let them sink into oblivion."

C: 你呼唤活火，吉奥里亚的眷从，却并无回应。
E: You call upon the Living Flame, the attendants of Georios, but there is no response.

C: 我，我心里也慌啊！咕嘟——
E: I—I'm nervous too! Gulp—

C: 可生命多么…脆弱。脆弱又美丽，像一声叹息。你会在冥滩等我吗？过去了这么久，这么这么久…你还能认出我吗？
E: But life is so... fragile. Fragile and beautiful, like a sigh. Will you wait for me on the Nethershore? So much time has passed, so, so much time... Will you still recognize me?

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 好这个词语，已经无法形容我此时此刻的心境！
E: Good is an understatement for what I'm feeling right now!

C: 无论是来自裂缝深渊中的敌人，还是来自不轨人心的算计。
E: Whether they are enemies from the abyss or people with ill intentions...

C: 我叫卡波特，是界种科的科员。但还有另一重身份，更为重要——
E: My name is Capote. I'm a member of the Department of Ecology, but my other identity is even more important...

C: 外面来的家伙…我闻到了阴谋的味道。嘘，不要打扰我思考。
E: Outsiders... I smell a conspiracy. Shh, don't interrupt my train of thought.

C: 波少吩咐的工作，自然就是我应该做的工作啊。
E: Master Capote ordered me to do these things. Of course they are part of my job.

C: 还有一些事情想要问…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 哎，生命无常，生死难料。说不定这一次见面，就是我们最后一次呢？
E: Sigh. Life is unpredictable. Who knows if this will be the last time we meet?

C: 我叫洛奇，是地概科的科员。
E: My name is Rocky. I'm a researcher from the Department of Cosmic Geography.

C: 没什么需要继续问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone.

C: 不过是平日研究的时候有过几次交际，这小子就忘乎所以了！
E: They only had a few interactions during their research, and he's already gotten ahead of himself!

C: 要我说，那就是癞蛤蟆想吃天鹅肉！做梦去吧。
E: If you ask me, that can only be his wishful thinking! That can only happen in his dreams!

C: 如果说莱斯莉是百年一遇的天才，那洛奇这小子就是随处可见的科员。
E: Lesley is a once-in-a-century genius while Rocky is only an ordinary researcher.

C: 找到属于自己的风格了吗？
E: Have you found your own fashion style?

C: 不过大方向上已经决定好了。这次我不会再陷入「流行时尚」的怪圈了。这还得给你说一声谢谢呢，小年轻。
E: But I have a general direction now. I won't fall into the trap of modern fashion again and I have you to thank for that, young one.

C: 咦，又是你，有什么事吗？
E: Oh, it's you again. What's up?

C: 阮•梅…哎……
E: Ruan Mei... *sigh*

C: 沟通和协商是第一要务，尤其是这个跨物种，不同种群间的沟通很重要。鄙人，也是费了无数心血，才和我身边的这位「模特」建立了正式的外交关系。
E: Communication and negotiation are my top priorities, especially when it comes to bridging the gap between different species and populations. It took me a ton of effort to establish a proper diplomatic relationship with this "model" by my side.

C: 又是你啊，你是来寻求本大人的庇护的吗，还是有别的什么事？
E: It's you again. Are you here to seek for my protection, or is it something else?

C: 你好！欢迎启动心理咨询与闲聊功能，你好！有什么我可以为您做的吗？
E: Welcome to the counseling and chatting function! What can I do for you?

C: 不是我挑剔，两种货看起来都不怎么样。
E: I'm not being picky. It's just neither of their wares seems particularly good.

C: 嘘，小声些，不可对神明不敬。
E: Shh, quiet! You must not disrespect the gods.

C: 照你的说法，逻辑学课堂可就一文不值了，但别忘了，你是从那毕业的。
E: If that is true, logic classes would be completely worthless. Let us not forget that this was your major.

C: 让我来辩！
E: Let me join the debate!

C: 逻辑学同样如此。既然使用三段论来论证你的观点，难道你还要否认逻辑规律并不是知识吗？
E: The study of logic is much the same. As you have used syllogism to prove your point, surely you will not deny that the rules of logic are not true knowledge?

C: 并且…若是「阿卡索斯」不存在了，我…阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，该回哪去呢？
E: What's more... If "Icatus" were no longer to exist... Then where would I, Parmenides of Icatus, have to return to?

C: 您不必担心，我会尽快前往现场。
E: Don't worry. I'll be there as soon as I can.

C: 赫卡忒熟练地将传信石版解锁，翻找半晌，终于发现了一份隐藏文件。
E: Hekate unlocks the teleslate with an experienced flick and searches around for a while before finally pulling up a hidden document.

C: 我会帮你把这份证据带回去，让所有人都知道……
E: I'll help you take this evidence back so everyone can know the truth...

C: 拉达曼？他不是出了名的大好人吗，这什么情况？
E: Rhadaman? Isn't he a bit of a celebrity do-gooder? What's going on?

C: 我们将从那里乘坐大地兽离开，但离开前，有件重要之物要托付给你……
E: We'll depart from there by dromas — but before we go, there's something very important I'd like to leave with you...

C: 天真的孩子。我说的是<color=#dbc291ff>市集</color>那间房，最危险的地方就是最安全的。
E: Naïve child. I am talking about that room in the <color=#dbc291ff>market</color>. The most dangerous place is also the safest.

C: 掏出帽子。
E: Pull out the hat.

C: 人们会在这里向心中的神明祈祷，像救命稻草一般相信着「信仰之跃」真实存在。
E: People pray to their gods here, believing in the 'Leap of Faith' as if it were a lifeline, hoping that it truly exists.

C: 至于旁边那个赖着不走的家伙，交给我就好。
E: As for that person who refuses to leave, leave him to me.

C: 你说这人啊，就是奇怪。明明之前和那两个丫头也不时常联络，但自从…我反而天天有一肚子话想说……
E: It's funny how people work. I rarely kept in touch with my two girls before, but now they're... well, I have so many things I wish I could tell them...

C: 嗨，没事、没事…其实我都想通了。你看，她们虽然并非预言中的黄金裔，但依然活出了自己的人生不是吗？我完全不必替她们感到遗憾。
E: No, no, it's alright... I've already made peace with it. They might not have been the destined Chrysos Heirs, but they lived life their own way, you know? I'm proud of who they were.

C: 我实在不知该如何感谢你，年轻人…请务必注意安全，我等你顺利归来！
E: I... I can't thank you enough! Please be careful out there, and make sure you come back to us safely!

C: 为什么…仅仅是一击…黑衣执剑，那是个什么样的怪物…！
E: One strike... that's all it took... What kind of monster is that black-clad swordsman...!?

C: 行，那我再想想别的办法吧。
E: Okay, then I'll just have to think of another way.

C: 再说，事情可不能这么算了，您被大地兽给狠狠地撞了，当然要赔偿！
E: Besides, we can't just let this slide. That dromas hit you hard, so compensation is definitely in order!

C: 失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
E: The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.

C: 甚至还被多撞了一次。
E: And I even got hit twice.

C: 那里才是我们的家！
E: That's where our home is!

C: 你们俩，认识？
E: You two... know each other?

C: 换言之，人只能自己决定自己是谁。我认为我是伊俄，我也可以认为自己是埃德加。
E: In short, one determines their own identity. I see myself as Eio, but I can also choose to see myself as Edgar.

C: 她是异邦的黄金裔。
E: She's a Chrysos Heir from the outlands.

C: 你将希瑞雅的愿望如实讲给了守卫。他看上去有些动容。
E: You tell the guard about Serena's wish honestly. He seems somewhat moved.

C: 听不大懂呢…但是这个大眼睛指的应该是艾格勒吧？我这些日子读了许多泰坦的故事，勉强认得出来。
E: That's kind of hard to grasp... but that big eye must be Aquila, right? I've read a bunch of Titan stories lately, so I can sort of recognize it.

C: 倚老卖老，令人发笑。
E: Throwing your age around — pathetic.

C: 看呐，它高居云崖之巅，向奥赫玛的每一个人投去注视。我们的一切都因它的注视才得以存在。如此尊神，怎能不拜，怎能不为它献上牺牲？
E: Look, they sit atop Dawncloud, gazing upon every soul in Okhema. All that we are exists because of their watchful eye. A god so revered — how could we not worship and sacrifice to them?

C: 黑潮肆虐，不少人还被困在各处，在危险中呼唤着我的名字！作为蝉联三届「奥凯纳斯运动会」掷铁饼冠军的竞技豪雄，我怎么能视若无睹？
E: The black tide is raging, and many people are still trapped in various places, calling my name in distress! As a three-time consecutive "Okeanas Games" throwing champion and a true warrior of competition, how could I stand idly by?

C: 再坚持一会儿，希望就在眼前了！
E: Hold on a little longer, hope is right in front of us!

C: 哈哈，有点棘手，不过，咳——不是我的对手。
E: Haha, that was a bit tough, but uh... *coughs* they were no match for me.

C: 呃，你们不是牺牲了吗？
E: Oh, didn't you guys sacrifice yourselves?

C: 那我们就在这里乖乖等着，等你的好消息。
E: We will be waiting here for your good news.

C: 回想他的名字。
E: Recall his name.

C: 是啊，你想起了斐第斯留下的最后一句话——「可不能让圣城的孩子们失去笑容啊！」
E: Yes, indeed. You recall Phedes' last words — "We can't let the kids of the holy city lose their smiles!"

C: 维吉妮娅闭上眼，定神半晌，再度睁眼时气场已截然不同。
E: Verginia closes her eyes and remains focused for a while. When she opens her eyes again, her demeanor has completely changed.

C: 恭喜你们，我的伙伴……
E: Congratulations, my friends...

C: 你我如今所目睹的，便是一朵格外洁白而美丽的浪花…不是吗？
E: What we're witnessing right now is an exceptionally pure and beautiful whitecap... don't you think?

C: 下回，一起畅饮一杯吧，救世主阁下。
E: Next time, let's share a cup together, Great Deliverer.

C: 我把手机借给你吧。
E: You can use my phone.

C: 而且…帕姆看起来毛绒绒的，摸起来手感也很好……
E: Not to mention how fluffy and soft they are...

C: 啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！克拉拉有事想要找你……
E: Oh, it's you! I wanted to show you something...

C: 如果我为了听音乐专程来一次星穹列车，你们会介意么？
E: Would you mind if I made a trip to the Astral Express, just to listen to music?

C: 哎，{NICKNAME}，平时瓦尔特先生是个怎么样的人？
E: Hey {NICKNAME}, how would you describe Mr. Yang?

C: 能受邀来列车，我感到十分荣幸。
E: I'm honored to be invited aboard the Express.

C: 因为之前「军团」的入侵，小姐她最近热衷于定制防卫产品，似乎还成为了一些品牌的高级会员。
E: Ah, that's right. Since the Legion's invasion, Lady Asta's been procuring defense products customized to the station's needs. I think she's already got platinum membership cards with some of the suppliers...

C: 希望这些记录可以给列车长提供一些新的思路，以备不时之需。
E: Of course, it'd be great if you never had to use any of it, but I hope my analysis is of help to the conductor!

C: 我就不惊讶。
E: I'm not shocked.

C: 哦对，你看不见屏幕，和你解释一下，我刚才在转扭蛋，就是游戏里都会有的那种。
E: Oh yeah, you can't see the screen. Let me explain: I was just pulling for a gacha capsule — you know, the kind you can get in games.

C: 事先说清楚，这只是我的直觉，对你不一定管用，如果没有效果，我不负责。
E: Let's be clear about one thing first — this is just my intuition. It may not work for you, and I am not responsible for any sub-optimal results.

C: …等等，突然想到了一个问题，你们的列车长会长高吗？
E: Wait a minute... I just thought of something. Does your conductor ever grow taller?

C: 老师，你知道丹恒老师对什么话题比较感兴趣吗？
E: Do you know any topics he'd be interested in?

C: 阿尔乔姆见过的风景……
E: What Artem saw...

C: 那些东西世玲早就安排对应负责人进行回收了，你别瞎操心。这件事就当翻页了！以后不准再提了！
E: I already got the relevant parties to take back those Curios. Don't you worry about it. Just treat it as water under the bridge! Don't mention it ever again!

C: 嗯，你说得对。
E: Yeah, you're right.

C: 再仔细回想一下…
E: You really can't remember?

C: 玲可似乎睡着了。
E: Lynx seems to have fallen asleep.

C: 宇宙旅行当然很有吸引力，不过我最想做的事…果然还是帮助自己身边的人，守护家园。
E: Space travel is pretty tempting, but what I wanna do most... is help the people around me and protect my home.

C: 哎呀，真是恶毒的植物啊~账账，你可不许乱吃东西哦？
E: Ah! What a terrible plant! Numby, don't eat anything you're not supposed to, okay!?

C: <unbreak>317</unbreak>乘以<unbreak>226</unbreak>…
E: <unbreak>317</unbreak> multiplied by <unbreak>226</unbreak>...

C: 给账账喂「奇巧零食」。
E: Feed Numby Trick Snack.

C: 给账账喂「固态净水」。
E: Feed Numby Solid Water.

C: 下次回去问问她好了。
E: I'll ask her about it next time.

C: 你说的那个人是谁？
E: Who are you talking about?

C: 你看这沙发料子软和，若是在留声机里放一阙调子缓慢的小曲，再配上一壶鳞渊春，几块白云酥……
E: The fabric of the furniture is remarkably soft — I could lie here for days... All this needs is a slow, mellow tune on the phonograph, a pot of Whale-Tide Spring, and a few nimbus cakes...

C: 每当身处这里，总有种放下一切的快乐。
E: Whenever I step foot aboard the Express, I feel the joy of being relieved of all of my burdens.

C: …假期里，我内心挣扎过几次，最后都没好意思问出来。
E: ...I did think about that, but in the end, I never found the courage to ask them...

C: 这样的「装饰」，{NICKNAME}你觉得如何？
E: This ornament — {NICKNAME}, how does it strike you?

C: …如果春天常在，一切就不会因终将逝去，而令人感到这般旖旎。
E: Without its inevitable departure, the charm of spring would diminish.

C: 这是赞美。
E: That was a compliment.

C: 送点什么好呢……
E: What gifts should I prepare...

C: 我们仍然追随着阿基维利。
E: Nevertheless, we still follow the steps of Akivili.

C: 挺好的，很硬核。
E: Excellent. Very hardcore.

C: 自从踏上舞台后，我就格外珍惜这样能短暂停下来的时光。
E: Ever since I stepped into the spotlight, I have especially treasured peaceful moments like this.

C: 我只想找到宇宙中任何一个有乐子的角落，走哪儿看哪儿。如果乐子不够有趣，我会想办法，让它有趣得令人发指~
E: I just want to find a happy corner in the universe and drift wherever the wind blows. If it's not fun anymore, I'll find a way to make it fun!

C: 龇牙咧嘴，然后来点红色染料，表情越幽怨越好的那种！有趣，太有趣了！
E: Fangs bared, then add a little red dye... The more ghastly the expression, the better! Interesting, very interesting!

C: 已经开始觉得好玩了！
E: I'm already having fun!

C: 这一页，可以交给我来记录和绘制么？
E: May I have this page to record and draw?

C: 赠礼需要保留一些惊喜，就把它当作生活中的小仪式吧~
E: Gifts must have an element of surprise — just treat it as a part of life!

C: 直接复制列车智库吧！
E: Just copy the Express' data bank!

C: 厨房是个神秘的地方！
E: The kitchen is a very mysterious place!

C: 小女子再多来几次，定能亲眼瞧见星星诞生时的闪动。
E: I'll invite myself here a few more times and make sure to catch that spark at the moment of a star's birth.

C: 匹诺康尼真是热闹非凡呀，各道美食似乎都有独特的怪诞做法，倒也是它们的可爱之处。
E: Penacony is a truly bustling place. Every one of their dishes seems to have been made in a unique and bizarre way, but that's what makes them so delightful.

C: 真受不了吃饭吧唧嘴的混蛋。
E: I can't stand those who eat with their mouths open.

C: 要是有相机就好啦！
E: Wish I had a camera!

C: 我们刚刚认识，完全没有来往嘛。看来还是得从熟人中寻找朋友……
E: Well, we've had no prior dealings — we only just got to know each other. I guess I'll just have to seek friends among acquaintances.

C: 你俩是挺投缘的。
E: I think you two would hit it off.

C: 可能真是…
E: Perhaps...

C: 如果他喜爱美食，那我很愿意和他交流！不然的话还是免了，我还要思考下一期专栏怎么编…怎么写呢！
E: If he loves gourmet food then I'm willing to get in touch with him! Otherwise, no can do. I still have to work out how I'm going to spin... I mean, write my next column!

C: 「随着时间推移，鲑鱼的醇味被稀释，夕红果的肉脯无力阻挡被入侵的命运，当夕红鱼的食材和调味已经难分彼此，以食材命名的区分方式将失去意义…」
E: "Over time, salmon's rich taste becomes mild and makes its way into the defenseless Redsunset. When the seasoning and ingredient of Redsunset Salmon melt into each other, the distinction drawn between salmon and Redsunset becomes ever more blurred..."

C: …另外还有个小道消息，说是现在市政厅已经派先遣队去城外探险了——再加上现新任大守护者布洛妮娅是个温和改良派，所以……
E: ...Also, there has been a rumor that the Town Hall has dispatched a vanguard to explore areas outside the city. Bronya, the new Supreme Guardian, is a moderate reformist, so...

C: 哎，算了算了，这点烦恼我就自己消化好了。我打算接着练习了，你如果没有什么事的话，就到别的地方去转悠吧。
E: Never mind, I shouldn't bother you with this. Better keep it to myself. Now I'll continue with my rehearsal. If you don't have anything else to say, please give me some peace.

C: 你有什么烦恼？
E: Is there a problem?

C: 你也听出来了吧，我唱歌时的嗓音很低沉…导演对我很不满意，所以剧院就找了一位配音演员来「辅助」我。
E: As you can probably tell, my voice is rather low-pitched. The director is not very happy about that, so the theater hired a voice actress to "assist" me.

C: 唉…还是不行……
E: *sigh* Still sounds bad...

C: （茉莉似乎并没有注意到我……）
E: (Molly doesn't seem to notice me...)

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 现在好容易熬出头，我也该回家看看啦。正好，我也要把遇到你们的故事分享给老爹老妈——他们肯定会为我高兴的！
E: Now that I've made it professionally, it's time for me to visit home. I can't wait to tell my parents about meeting you all! I'm sure they will be happy to know that!

C: 这种道德绑架的话术我可见得多了。告诉你——本少爷不吃这一套！
E: Don't you try and morally blackmail me. I know that trick and I won't fall for it!

C: 我们的诉求也很简单：银鬃铁卫内部应当立即成立一支「深蓝骗局专案大队」，在贝洛伯格城内展开地毯式搜索，围剿这个蓝毛诈骗犯……
E: Our request is quite simple. The Silvermane Guards should immediately establish a Dark-Blue Scam Special Task Force that will launch a city-wide search in Belobog to round up this blue-haired con artist...

C: 那我可是有个妙招，能解您燃眉之急！
E: I have a great idea to help with your urgent needs!

C: 让你见笑了，嘿嘿，睡了一天，我也该起来吃早饭了。
E: Hehe, time to get up for breakfast. I've been in bed all day.

C: 我，堂堂「千面尤利安」——正在磨炼自己的伪装技巧呢！
E: I, Julian of a Thousand Faces, am honing my own disguise skills!

C: 就从「我是谁」开始吧。我叫…马克西姆…？
E: Let's start with who I am. My name is... Maxime... I think.

C: 因为…因为是那个姐姐给了我宝贵的奖章啊。
E: Because... Because she gave me that wonderful medal.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 当然是关心你啦！
E: Of course I mean you!

C: 有什么菜式推荐吗？
E: What dishes would you recommend?

C: 毕竟大部分都是磐岩镇本地的熟面孔嘛。大家收工之后经常过来打个尖儿、歇歇脚，倒也挺热闹的。
E: After all, most of our guests are from Boulder Town. People would gather here after work to chill and chat with each other. It's pretty lively.

C: 到后来，家族里出了几个败家子，把家产都败光咯。不过好在后边又有人努力重振家业，这才在这下层区开了家大饭店。
E: After that, several scoundrels in the family lost all of our wealth. Fortunately, later on, someone revived our family business and they opened a hotel in the Underworld.

C: 不过你要是有别的什么事，不妨说来听听。
E: But you can tell me if you have some other business.

C: 就那样呗，反正是不做鉴定古代遗物的行当了。
E: Same as always. Anyway, I'm not in the relic appraisal business anymore.

C: 嗯…是有尝试过啦，还不少呢。
E: Well... I did, actually quite a few.

C: 关于母亲…我只能尽力不去回想她临终前的样子。
E: As for Mom... All I can do is keep myself from remembering how she looked before she passed.

C: 但是大部分下层区人都付不起高昂的医疗费用。而且，据我所知…他们也不太信得过上层区的那些医生。
E: Most people down from the Underworld can't afford expensive medical bills. And as far as I know... They don't really trust those Overworld doctors.

C: 来聊聊天吧…
E: Let's have a chat...

C: 没错，是筑城<unbreak>233</unbreak>年……
E: That's right. It's Fortification Year <unbreak>233</unbreak>.

C: 啊，那件事已经被妥善处理了。
E: Oh, that has been taken care of properly.

C: 没有和公司签约，你遗憾吗？
E: Do you regret not signing the contract with the IPC?

C: 是说之前询问我意见的那件事吗？唔...当然不会啦~
E: You mean the thing you asked my opinion on before? Well... of course not~

C: 因为裂界的缘故，有许多人失去了家园……
E: The Fragmentum disaster caused many to lose their homes...

C: 伊妮丝表现得非常愉快。
E: Eunice looks really happy.

C: 生自地下也成长于地下，命令却让他回不了家
E: Child born and bred of the Underworld dark, orders that keep him and home far apart

C: 四千个昼，四千个夜
E: Four thousand days, four thousand nights

C: 四千个家，四千双眼
E: Four thousand homes, eight thousand eyes

C: 哎~天空降下星星的爱~
E: Hey! I feel the love of the universe burn~

C: 你和佩拉的关系？
E: What's your relationship with Pela?

C: 那台探测器本来就是古代遗物，还是把它留给过去吧。
E: That detector was an ancient relic to begin with, so let's just leave the past in the past.

C: 扑满发出兴奋的声音，时不时拱起鼻子做出回应。它很开心。
E: The Trotter lets out a squeal of excitement, scrunching up its nose in response. It's very happy.

C: 你用双手轻轻抱起小熊，它的重量比你想象得要轻一些。随着十指微微嵌入毛发与脂肪交叠的绵软地带，一阵暖意顺着你的掌心蔓延开来。
E: You gently pick up the little cub with both hands. It is lighter than you expected. A feeling of warmth spreads across your palms, as your fingers are immersed in the soft area where its fat and fur overlap.

C: 物价一直疯涨…
E: Prices have been going up like crazy...

C: 没见今天的《水晶日报》啊……
E: I haven't read today's issue of the Crystal Daily...

C: 他和我说，克里珀堡最近出台新法规，以后横穿铁轨可能要重罚了。
E: He told me that Qlipoth Fort implemented new rules that could lead to heavy fines for jaywalking across railway lines.

C: 这又是什么东西？
E: What is it?

C: 不是，我也不懂花啊……
E: No, I don't understand flowers either...

C: 你们带钱了吗？
E: Did you bring any cash?

C: 你这样回复他吧……
E: You should respond to him like this...

C: 不可能的吧。
E: There's no way.

C: 对对对，就是那玩意！那家伙不识货，要是我们能给搞过来……
E: Yup, that's the one! She doesn't know the value of what she's got. If we could get it...

C: 洞螈供需市场近期低位震荡，入场有风险，兼职需谨慎！
E: The Olm markets have been tanking recently. Investing now is risky, and hobbyists should be careful!

C: 我就说他这赛季不行……
E: I'm telling you, he's no good this season...

C: 到底什么时候才换班…
E: When on earth is the next shift starting...

C: 可能是线接错了？
E: Could it be a wrong wiring connection?

C: 呵呵，没想到你对老头子我的过去感兴趣啊。我只是个普通人罢了，不过既然你问到，那我就简单展开说说吧。
E: Hehe, you're interested in an old man's past? I'm just an ordinary person, but since you asked, I'll tell you a little bit about myself.

C: 于尔丹先生同我说，在{NICKNAME}的帮助下，这座博物馆终于可以对外完全开放，我便来一探究竟了。
E: Mr. Uldan told me that the museum was finally able to fully open to everyone, thanks to you, so I came to check it out.

C: 您这取名是不是差点儿文化？
E: You don't think your naming lacks a little sophistication?

C: 就比如说吧，把嫩豆腐切成蚕丝般的细线…这玩意儿说到底就是下苦功夫、笨功夫，勤学苦练而已。
E: For example, slicing tofu into thin threads as fine as silk... At the end of the day, it's just putting in the time and effort and learning through mistakes.

C: 没办法打败咱的动物，咱是坚决不吃的。
E: Such as animals who can't defeat me — I'll never eat those!

C: 承蒙您关照，咱家店最近生意不错。前几天还上了一个化外民的什么「银河百大黑暗菜肴榜」…哈哈。
E: Thanks to your sponsorship, my business has been going well. A few days ago, my store was even ranked on the "Top <unbreak>100</unbreak> Darkest Dishes in the Cosmos" made by Outworlders... Haha.

C: 话虽不能这么说…但我那家店大部分主顾，还都是化外民。偶尔有仙舟人来，也就是贩卖一些废品赚点小钱，没有人来买旧物或者修东西的。
E: Not quite... But most of the regulars here are Outworlders. Sometimes we'll get a Xianzhou shopper selling some junk to make a little pocket money, but never anyone buying second-hand goods or repairing things.

C: 换言之，伊须磨洲伟大的先民们修建「文明的图腾」所消耗的时间，远没有我的人生经历长。
E: In other words, all the time spent by the great ancestors of Insumousu to build this "totem of civilization" was far shorter than my entire life.

C: 行啊，反正客人是看准了我现在无所事事，那就随便聊聊吧。
E: Okay. Well, as you can see, I've nothing to do, so let's chat.

C: 「文化品味」又是什么？你不要发明新词语来敷衍我呀。
E: Culture? Taste? What's that? Don't just invent new words to trick me.

C: 「山横远翠疑歌黛，彦卿长得没我帅。你好坏，我被你打败，小可爱。」
E: "Emerald mounts hold a love fledgling, but I'm way more handsome than Yanqing. So annoying, yet you make my heart sing, you pretty thing."

C: 或许我是一朵机械蘑菇。
E: Maybe I'm a robot mushroom.

C: 其实我曾有一位主人。
E: Actually, I used to have a master.

C: 因为我只是一朵蘑菇。
E: Because I'm a mushroom.

C: 再见，蘑菇。
E: So long, mushroom.

C: 但现在我们可以实拍了，效果又好又能节约成本。
E: But now we can shoot the real thing — the effects are brilliant and we also save on our bottom line.

C: 那一刻我突然意识到，原来万物皆有自己的价值。
E: That was when I realized everything in this world has its worth.

C: 结果我还没来得及做什么坏事呢，那艘兽舰就被击落了…醒来的时候，我已经成了幽囚狱里的战犯，这一关就是几百年。
E: Before I could do anything bad, the beast ship was shot down. By the time I woke up, I was already a war criminal in The Shackling Prison. It's been hundreds of years since then.

C: 您看，我说这锻炼身体就能长寿也没有过度夸张的成分对吧？
E: See, I told you exercising can lead to extreme longevity without getting fast and loose with any facts, right?

C: 虽然这仙舟洞天里长年风调雨顺，不必担心自然环境变化影响生意；但要是能讨到个铁饭碗，谁又乐意成天做这种活计呢？
E: The climate in the Xianzhou delves is great all year round, so there's no need to worry about the environment impacting business. But if you could find a stable and reliable job, then who'd want to risk doing this kind of work forever?

C: 这你都不知道啊？果然是化外民。
E: Oh, you don't know even this? You really are an Outworlder!

C: 你连个忙都不肯帮，我看你才是情商低！
E: You're the one with the attitude! You won't even help me out with a favor!

C: 可是我没有魔阴身。
E: But I don't have any symptoms of being mara-struck.

C: 「体验官」都是长生种？
E: Are your Testing Officers all long-life species?

C: 小到市容市场管理，大到民事诉讼案件…你能想到的所有杂活，要是觉得该找官家办，那来找我们就对了。
E: It could be as small as the city's appearance, right up to a large civil lawsuit... If you can think of anything that the government should be doing, then come to us.

C: 哈哈，我能理解，{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}对我这陌生人有所提防——可我毕竟是将军贤弟，还能诓你不成？不信你就去长乐天打听打听，有哪个不知道我景芳的名号？
E: Haha, I get it. A young {F#lass}{M#lad} should be wary of a stranger like me — but I'm the dear brother of a famed general, so there's no way I could ever trick you. If you don't believe me, ask around the Exalting Sanctum about me. Everyone knows the name Jing Fang around these parts.

C: 暂时没别的问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 工造司的职责啊…这个倒是好解释。工造司就是负责设计、制造和改进仙舟上几乎一切物件的司部。
E: Our job scope? Hmm... Now that's far easier to explain! The Artisanship Commission is responsible for the design, manufacturing, and improvement of almost every single item there is aboard the Xianzhou.

C: 别问了…别问了…这是碰都不能碰的话题……
E: Don't ask... Just don't... These are unmentionable topics...

C: 十王司也确实尝试过开发一套档案管理玉兆来提高了办公效率，但…最后因为种种「客观因素」，这个计划没有推行下去。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission also tried to develop a file management abacus to improve work efficiency, but... due to various "objective factors," the plan couldn't be enacted.

C: 相比之下，罗浮处于浩瀚星海中，这可不是一个钟表般严密精巧的机械宇宙。
E: In comparison, the Luofu sails through galaxies of stars, not a machine-esque world as predictable as a complex clockwork of unerring precision.

C: 嗯…我见你不是一个会到处乱讲的大嘴巴，我才告诉你的……
E: Hmmm... You don't seem like the gossiping kind, so I'll tell you...

C: 请问您还有其他事情吗？
E: Is there anything else I can help with?

C: 最近有什么烦恼吗？
E: Any trouble going on recently?

C: 我听说还是有人在仙舟决斗的。
E: I've heard that people still duel on the Xianzhou.

C: 嗐嗐嗐，你以为我没去过吗？我去过好几遍了。
E: C'mon... Do you really think I haven't tried? I've been there many times already.

C: 看上去你和那位辛克莱不对付？
E: I'm guessing you and that Sinclair guy don't get along?

C: 老板，如果您需要一个可靠的、经验丰富的货运工人，请务必考虑我，我会竭尽全力干活的！
E: Hey boss, if you need a reliable and experienced freight handler, then please keep me in mind. I'll always give it my best!

C: 为什么不让自动机巧来干？
E: Why don't you use an ingenium to automatically handle freight for you?

C: 现在主要在忙些什么呢？
E: What are you keeping yourself busy with these days?

C: 我哪儿知道啊，我要懂这个，我何至于夜夜都睡不好觉……
E: How would I know? I'd like to know, too. I haven't had a good night's sleep in forever...

C: 大人的心意，我心领了。只要建木和它的传说还在，求药的叛党就会根除不绝，单凭你我是断然无法将他们处理干净的。
E: I appreciate your noblest of intentions, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. But as long as the Arbor and its legend exist, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus will never truly be eradicated. There's no way you and I alone could take them all out.

C: 将军在此处派驻了云骑，一定是为了观望敌人的余势。
E: The general must have stationed us Cloud Knights here to keep an eye on the enemy's remnant forces.

C: 但是我也希望他们能理解云骑军。如今妖人一日没有清剿干净，这丹鼎司洞天就一日难得平静。有时候也挺羡慕他们的，哎……
E: But I also hope they can understand where the Cloud Knights are coming from, too. As long as the devils were not completely quelled, the Alchemy Commission delve will never see peace. Sometimes I even envy these Vidyadhara, you know...?

C: 大人请慢走。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 确实如此，鳞渊境临近持明族的波月古海，那是他们浴月蜕生的地方，相当神圣…他们不希望有这么多持械士兵靠近，我也能理解。
E: There sure are. The Vidyadhara's Lunarescent Depths are near Scalegorge Waterscape. That's where they undergo their hatching rebirth, and it's a sacred place... They don't like having so many armed troops around, so I can see where they're coming from.

C: 肃清鳞渊境内的药王秘传残党。阁下要是有什么线索，随时可以提供给在下。阁下要是有什么疑问…那还是请您去问德威吧。
E: Eliminating the remnant Disciples of Sanctus Medicus here. If you have any leads, please let me know at any time. And if you have any further questions... Then please direct those to Dewei.

C: 我最近刚退役。听闻此次动乱中，有不少持明卵被打破…还有不少兄弟姐妹被药王秘传的妖人所害…可恶！
E: I've only just retired. I heard that during all the turmoil, many Vidyadhara eggs got cracked... Many of my brothers and sisters got harmed by those devils of Sanctus Medicus... Those hateful scoundrels!

C: 愁啊，愁。那首持明时调怎么唱的来着…「六百余年凡尘中，如梦尽是空」，哈哈哈哈，妙哉，妙哉。
E: How sad. How sad! How does that Vidyadhara elegy go again... "Pass like a dream out of sight and mind, six hundred years in this mortal bind"... Ha, simply wonderful.

C: 蜕生的人都留了什么东西？
E: What do people leave behind when they undergo hatching rebirth?

C: 但具体是怎么闹起来的，这些事我倒是不知道了……
E: Still, I have no idea about the details...

C: 我也不知道啊！啊，不对，我的确什么都不知道啊！
E: How should I know!? I really don't know anything!

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 现在是元会算法运行期间，闲杂人等请勿打扰。
E: The meta algorithm is running at the moment. Unauthorized personnel should not disturb the process.

C: 我既身为卜者，应当不骄不躁，不卑不亢…这些话，我时刻记在心中。
E: As a diviner, I should remain humble and well-composed. I always keep these words in my mind.

C: 还得是他们工造司项目多、收入高，随便搞个发明就能躺在专利费上舒舒服服地混上几十年，这不比太卜司好多了？
E: Those at the Artisanship Commission handle lots of projects and are paid well. With just one invention, they can live off the royalties for decades. Isn't it much better than the job at the Divination Commission?

C: 不记得我啦？
E: You don't remember me?

C: 每天放生一本日记，只要坚持下去，我身上纠缠的业缘定会散尽，假以时日…嘿嘿……
E: Release a diary book every day. Keep it up, and I'll be purified of my karma. And then... Heehee...

C: 金人巷商会会长吗…非要我说的话，也是「旧物」一件。
E: You mean the president of the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I assume? Well... he's an "old gadget" to me, if I can describe it that way.

C: 你今天已经卜过一卦了。「一日不二卦」，请明天再来吧。
E: I have already divined for you today. Please come back tomorrow.

C: 将军会用棋局模拟战事吗？
E: Do you use chess to simulate warfare?

C: 青镞竟同你说了这些。唉，是真是假，请君自行判断。
E: I can't believe Qingzu told you all this. But it's up to you to decide if they're true or not.

C: 你是想说「游刃有余」吧？
E: You mean to say "shooting fish in a barrel"?

C: 那人告诉我，世间命途变化转折最为剧烈之处，便是战场。人们的胜负生死在此颠倒变化，莫甚于此。
E: That person told me the battlefield is where the most drastic changes of fate take place. Nowhere else do the destinies of human beings rise and fall with such volatility.

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 顺利极了。自从咱们解决了那档子事，我那账号的关注度是蹭蹭往上涨啊～最近地衡司还联系我了，让我做「罗浮破除迷信形象大使」呢！
E: It's going great! We've been getting loads of followers since we solved that case~ The Realm-Keeping Commission actually got in touch with me recently and ask me to be their "Luofu myth-buster ambassador!"

C: 哦，当、当然，这是十王司判官的职责。
E: Oh, o—of course! Such is the duty of a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 雪衣大人真的很厉害，无论是怎样的任务都能妥善处理。
E: Madam Xueyi is truly amazing. No matter the mission, she can handle it properly.

C: 嗯，十王司将这偃息馆用作临时办公地点是有些时日了。我已经下意识把这里当成是上班地点了，要我说，这里的工作环境比之幽府还是宽敞多了……
E: Yes. The Ten-Lords Commission has been using this Pavilion of Cessation as a temporary office for some time. I've started thinking of it as my workplace. If you ask me, the work environment here is much more spacious than in the Netherworld...

C: 有没有人说过你性格很坏？
E: Has anyone told you that you've got a nasty personality?

C: 我印象里…六七百年前的时候？我那时候还在读书，家就住在这附近。
E: It's about... six or seven hundred years ago, I think? I was still studying then, and my house was around this area.

C: 客人呐，别怪我说话直，「广云袖」虽是高定，但贵有贵的道理。化外民来了仙舟，基本上都到咱们店里定制服饰，感兴趣的话我帮你订几件成衣？
E: Forgive me for being blunt: Cloudbreadth Sleeves may be haute couture, but our prices are justified. All Outworlders who come to Xianzhou order their clothes here. Could I interest you in ordering a few custom-made pieces?

C: 不知道亲亲在说的是什么呢…在仙舟以外的地方应该是买不到玉兆的，可不能随便说这就是抄袭吧……
E: I'm not sure what you mean, sweetie... You can only find a jade abacus for sale in Xianzhou. Don't just accuse us of plagiarism...

C: 玉兆到底是什么？
E: What actually is a jade abacus then?

C: 哈哈哈哈，像客人这样不爱显山露水的人，不是大富大贵，也即将是大富大贵。早点结交认识，以后小店也好做生意嘛。
E: Hahaha, for one who shies away from attention, even if you're not wealthy now, you soon will be. I merely have future businesses in mind by befriending you now.

C: 价值不过是人心中起伏的波澜，我能在这儿看看形形色色的人生，看人心潮起潮落，也就足够了。
E: Value is all but determined by fluctuations of the human impulse. How I can meet people from all walks of life and observe the ebb and flow of their hearts is already enough.

C: 景元将军！
E: General Jing Yuan!

C: 我无所谓。
E: I'm fine either way.

C: 我们持明族通常生活个数百年就会蜕鳞逆生。身体的损伤会在蜕生过程中重新修补，但记忆也会被完全抹去。
E: We Vidyadhara usually stay young by molting after living for centuries. Any damage done to the body will be repaired during the molting process, but our memories are completely wiped.

C: 万幸，我还没走呢，十王司的冥差还没来接我。
E: Thank goodness I'm still here. The Ten-Lords spiritfarers haven't come for me.

C: 那玩意儿的能量只够发报一次，本是我给自己留的后备方案——真要是搞出什么乱子，还得让云骑军来收场。这下可好，用上了。
E: That thing only had enough power for one transmission. I had intended to use it as my last resort — if anything untoward happened, at least the Cloud Knights can get here to clean it up. And now, I had a chance to use it.

C: 书里面提到了很多仙舟人平时会用的谚语、俗语，非常实用，你要是对仙舟文化感兴趣，可以把它当做一个切入口。
E: The book is really practical, mentioning tons of proverbs and sayings that the Xianzhou natives commonly use. It's a fantastic window into Xianzhou culture if that's something you're interested in.

C: 故事里说是蛋，应该就是蛋了。这蛋裂开，里面就跳出了个可漂亮的姐姐哩。
E: The story said it was an egg, so it must've been an egg. This egg cracked open, and out came a beautiful lady.

C: 对了，还有一项工作是必须由人类来负责，且几百年内不会改变的，那就是受理客户投诉。
E: Oh yeah — there's another job that can only be done manually, and that's never going to change: Handling customer service complaints.

C: 不过无论多么无聊的工作，只要有意义，那就比周末的懒觉还令人愉快，不是吗？
E: But no matter how boring the job might be, the fulfillment alone can still be more enjoyable than just lazily sleeping in on the weekends. Wouldn't you say so?

C: 哎，虽说我是有旅费报销的，但是报销以外的部分我就发愁了呀。难道说我这样有正式工作的人，还得找门儿副业营生吗……
E: *sigh* My travel expenses can be reimbursed. It's the expenses that can't be reimbursed that annoy me. Am I going to have to moonlight even when I have a proper job...?

C: 我在每个视频下面都发「孩子很喜欢，敏感肌也能用」，数量还不少。
E: Under each video, I wrote, "Children love this, great for sensitive skin too." I did that for LOTS of videos.

C: 不过我再强调一下，你如果有任何不懂的，可以直接问我，而不是自己到处乱碰。
E: But let me emphasize that if there's anything you want to know, just ask me instead of touching things.

C: 你知道停云吧，她就是天外行商团「鸣火」的首席代表。那个小妮子圆转如意，擅长与人沟通，天生是个做生意的料。
E: Tingyun is the Head Representative of the intergalactic merchant guild, Whistling Flames. She's witty and a great communicator. She was born to do business.

C: 银河在哭泣，仙舟却假装听不见，我只是代替那些承受后果之人发声而已。
E: The cosmos weeps, yet Xianzhou pretends not to hear. I'm just a voice for the voiceless victims.

C: 我记起来了，神策府后来直接处理了后续，天舶司这边已经同步备案过了。
E: I remember now. The Seat of Divine Foresight took over the case later, and the Sky-Faring Commission had kept a record of the case.

C: 托您的福，小店的生意还不错。
E: Thanks to you, business has been rather decent.

C: 特别观赛渠道到底是什么？
E: What exactly is the special viewing channel?

C: 我们刚才聊的这些，此时此地，你知我知，千万别说出去了哦。
E: Regarding what we've just discussed, it's a secret between the both of us. Don't go around telling others about it.

C: 但彦卿大人的出现，让我心中的火又燃了起来。相比我这样的普通人，他是剑术天才，我希望他能替我实现梦想。
E: However, the appearance of Master Yanqing reignited the spark within me. Compared to someone mediocre like me, he's a genius of the sword, and I hope that my dreams can be realized through him.

C: 但彦卿大人就像是我梦想的映射——看着他努力的身影，我也感觉自己收获了一份力量。即便我没有天赋，但是我会一直学剑，总有一天成为彦卿大人那样的剑侠！
E: But watching Master Yanqing is like watching my dreams come to fruition. When I look at how hard he works, I feel like I've gained some strength too. Even without talent, I'll continue to pursue swordsmanship in hopes of one day becoming a swordmaster like Master Yanqing!

C: 不如试试简短一些？
E: Why don't you try shortening it?

C: 请不要在这里游荡…
E: Please don't linger around here...

C: 威哥说，想在仙舟办好居留手续，就要走后门……
E: Wei said that if you want to complete residency procedures on Xianzhou, you may need to go through a back door...

C: 哈哈，上当了吧？狐人是有尾巴的！好啦，不要痴心妄想了，跟我走吧。
E: Haha, tricked ya! Foxians DO have tails! Alright, enough wishful dreaming — come this way.

C: 愿帝弓保佑你！
E: May the Reignbow bless you!

C: 会无限处于静滞状态。
E: You'll be placed in stasis indefinitely.

C: 计程槎飞行士就挺不错的。
E: Starskiff piloting sounds good to me.

C: 噢，形制还蛮古雅的。
E: Oh! The architecture has an air of classic elegance to it.

C: 您就算继续问我，我也没有什么可讲的故事了。在此，向您告别。
E: You can keep on asking, but I won't have any more stories to tell. That's all for now, farewell.

C: 什么民谣？
E: Which one?

C: 感谢您的好心，不过您不必担心。
E: Thanks for your concern, but don't worry about it.

C: 哦～你还有什么真本事，能不能再对着我的脑袋来这么一下，让我好好玩玩～
E: Oh, do you even have any real skill? Can you give my head another hit so I can have some fun?

C: 好嘛～记得常来找人家「切磋」啊～
E: Okay, don't forget to visit me for more sparring!

C: 最直接的方法自然是烤一烤，但别让它被点着了。仔细闻一闻「没有完全点燃」的状态，没有烟气干扰，更容易判断香的品质。
E: The most direct method to test it would just be to roast it, but not allow it to burn. Take a good smell when it is not properly lit, and you can get a clearer judgment of the scent's quality without the smoke interfering.

C: 联盟的态度…既然你见到了飞霄将军、怀炎将军，自然清楚联盟的态度。
E: About the Alliance's attitude... You have met with General Feixiao and General Huaiyan, so you are naturally aware of the Alliance's attitude...

C: 皆是天问，不可语人。
E: These are divine messages beyond the ken of mortals.

C: 我们才是仙舟的栋梁…
E: We are the true backbone of Xianzhou...

C: 但听说他们工作很累…
E: But I heard it's really hard work...

C: 行吧，那我什么时候才能体验这个幻戏呢？
E: Okay, so where can I experience this fantasy then?

C: 你给我讲讲，怎么可能有四分之三人受伤……
E: Tell me how it is possible that three quarters of a person are injured...

C: 我看太卜司是要变天了。
E: I think an upheaval is about to take place in the Divination Commission.

C: 都在太卜大人占测之内。
E: Everything has been foreseen by the master diviner.

C: 你知道金人巷的由来吗？
E: Do you know the history of Aurum Alley?

C: 但显然这样摆放更有趣。
E: But it makes things more interesting if you don't.

C: 没人会蠢到自投罗网。
E: No one would be dumb enough to walk into a trap.

C: 能讲讲我要做什么吗？
E: Can you tell me what I should do?

C: 不是，只是有点感触。
E: No, I'm just feeling a bit sentimental.

C: 我想成为最幸福的失业者。就让昏光庭院归于平凡，成为大家的下午茶沙龙吧！
E: I want to be the happiest unemployed person ever. Let the Twilight Courtyard return to normal and become everyone's afternoon tea salon!

C: 吾师卡吕普索啊，不妨修剪一番你那过度发散的思维，裁掉冗余之物，再仔细看看。
E: Master Calypso, why not prune those overly divergent thoughts of yours, cut away the redundancies, and take another careful look?

C: 任何微渺的炼金造术，都须持有足够严谨的学术态度。喏，姐姐，这是送给你的……
E: Even the smallest act of alchemy requires a rigorous academic approach. Here, sister, this is for you...

C: 在我看来，纷争正是为终结纷争而存在。纵是此世必要之痛，亦有愈合的一天。
E: In my view, strife exists to end strife itself. Though it may be a necessary pain in this life, there will come a day of healing.

C: 这一世，他也说过相同的话…但，那是在与我母亲并肩作战，一同在抗争来古士的战场上牺牲之时说的。
E: In this life, he said the same words... but that was when he fought alongside my mother, sacrificing himself on the battlefield in defiance against the Lygus.

C: 拿上吧，你以后再也不用起早贪黑，去集市上受那帮挑三拣四的客商们的气啦！
E: Take it! No more getting up at the crack of dawn to deal with those picky merchants at the market giving you grief!

C: 呵呵…不愧是我的孙女。奶奶替你和朋友们热些驼奶，你就着酥皮点心慢慢说。
E: Hehe... that's my granddaughter for you. Granny will heat up some camel milk, and you can tell me all about it while enjoying these flaky pastries.

C: 但是，*我们*仍然相信预言的力量。
E: However, we still believe in the power of prophecy.

C: 呜哇！小灰！突…突然间做什么啦？
E: Woah! Little Gray! Wh—What are you doing all of a sudden!?

C: 怎么会呢，妈第一眼就认出你了。还是那个愣头愣脑，只知道闷头往前的傻孩子！
E: Of course not, mom recognized you at first glance. Still the same scatterbrained kid who just barrels ahead without thinking!
