C: 呃…等他吃饱了蜂蜜烙饼，才有力气讲故事嘛！
E: Uh... let him finish his honey suncake first, and then he'll have the energy to tell his stories!

C: 不，他希望「凯撒」赢，他不接受战胜过自己的「凯撒」输给任何人。
E: No, he wants the Imperator to win. He won't accept she would lose to anyone else after besting him.

C: 黑潮退去后，我回到故乡，把法吉娜埋进海床的十二宝瓶都挖了出来。
E: After the black tide receded, I returned to my homeland and dug up all twelve bottles that Phagousa had buried in the seabed.

C: 只要微笑就可以了！
E: Just smile!

C: 药王慈怀，建木生发。
E: Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth.

C: 协助破案会有奖励么？有多少？
E: There's a reward for helping to solve the case? How much?

C: 那些人他们不懂幽默！我不就说了几个段子么？
E: Those people don't know humor! All I did was tell a few jokes!

C: 那你应该明白我是什么意思。
E: Then you should know what I meant.

C: 你做梦呢，你看这里哪个选手不是勤学苦练出来的。
E: Keep dreaming. All the contestants have worked hard and shed blood and sweat to get here.

C: 来试试演武好运抽抽乐嘛？全都是演武仪典周边官方正版！
E: Come join the lucky Wardance raffle! All prizes are official Wardance merchandise!

C: 「谛听形意拳」…
E: Diting Imitation Fist...

C: 那边的那个，注意手上动作！
E: That one, over there! Watch how you move your hands!

C: 那身钢铁腹肌好帅。
E: Those steel abs look so sick.

C: 这曾经是被称为「培养液注射器」的生产装置，能够给培养舱补充营养。
E: This is a production device once called the "culture medium injector." It can provide the incubators with nutrients.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 有早八的课吗？
E: Are there eight AM classes?

C: 单推你们有十年了！
E: I've been a fan for ten years!

C: 快递箱，备注一栏填写着：「拜托，千万别把货物名称写在上面」。
E: There is a remark written on the label of the courier package: "Please do not put the name of the goods on this."

C: 转身离开。
E: Turn around and leave.

C: 你上下打量着这包精美的蛋白米，随即得出结论——它包装完好，确实是没有过期。到底是谁做了这种浪费食物的事？
E: You examine the bag of protein rice and conclude — it is nicely packaged and has not expired. Who's thrown it away?

C: 身为方壶龙尊「冱渊君」的龙师，你以耿介自守，犯颜直谏，劝那位大人施雷霆震怒，降罚于掀起罗浮饮月之乱的同袍。
E: As a Preceptor of Glaciator Marum, high elder of the Fanghu, you are one of integrity, unafraid of pointing out wrongdoings directly. You advise the high elder to unleash her wrath, and impose punishment on your peers who instructed the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae on the Luofu.

C: 你听到持明卵中传来声声怒吼喧哗如潮，你凑耳静听。动雷般的巨响自一头孽物口中荡开，仿佛一千柄剑交击，传遍鳞渊境的洞天。你全身的骨头都为之打颤。
E: You hear furious roars coming from the Vidyadhara egg and move your ears closer to hear better. A thunderous sound explodes from the mouth of an abomination, and fills up the Scalegorge Waterscape delve as if a thousand swords had clashed together. Every one of your bones rattle from the deafening sound.

C: 聪明的金人巷游客应该是明白的，有的茶能让人醒神明目，有的茶能让人沉沉酣眠。
E: I'm sure wise Aurum Valley travelers are aware that some teas can make you alert and perky, while others can make you dozy and sleepy.

C: 无机生命保护协会（简称「无机会」）一直持之以恒地试图为机巧鸟争取其应有的权益——即便仙舟官方不厌其烦地复函解释，机巧鸟并没有严格定义的自我知觉。
E: The Non-organic Entity Emancipation Trust (NEET for short) has been tirelessly fighting for the cycranes' rights... Although Xianzhou officials have repeatedly sent letters explaining that cycranes do not possess true self-awareness.

C: 随着领头的工人高呼一声「开摆——」，码头的工人便开始码放货物。
E: When the team leader shouts "Lay'em out," the port workers get to arranging the goods.

C: 「后有药王贼作乱，凤云卸货于此处，乘槎迎击，吸引火力、争取时间、保护平民。不幸槎毁人亡，尸骨无存。」
E: "When Sanctus Medicus stirred up trouble, Fengyun unloaded his cargo here and used his starskiff to attract enemy firepower, buying time and protecting the civilians. Unfortunately, his vessel was destroyed, and his remains were never found."

C: 这时，你才看到箱子下面写着一行龙飞凤舞的毛笔字——「罗浮当代艺术双年展参展作品：『快递之龙』」。
E: At this moment, you notice a line of elegant calligraphy written underneath the boxes: "Biennial Exhibition of Contemporary Luofu Art: Delivery Dragon."

C: 让你别跟着我…
E: I'm telling you, stop following me...

C: 你本想去后台一探究竟，但在你推门时，眼角余光瞥见里面似乎有人在很高的地方沉默眺望这里。你吓了一跳，向后退去，那道高瘦的人影也随之消失。
E: You want to explore backstage, but the moment you push open the door, you notice someone silently watching you from a very high place out of the corner of your eyes. Surprised, you leap back, but that slender shadow has vanished.

C: 你听到几声闷响，想象的视野中，子弹正气势汹汹地嵌入昂贵的内墙；
E: You hear a number of muffled bangs. In your mind's eye, you imagine bullets voraciously embedding themselves into the interior walls;

C: 人不能两次踏入一台相同的电梯，也不能一次乘坐两台电梯。
E: You cannot step into the same elevator twice, just as you cannot take two elevators at once.

C: 「钟表披萨，钟表小子都爱吃的聚会美食。」
E: "Clockie Pizza. A party food that even Clockie loves."

C: 门后似乎是某个高档会所，玻璃的防窥探效果很好，在街上看不出太多端倪。
E: Behind the door seems to be some kind of upscale club. The glass is coated with a security layer that prevents prying eyes. You can't see much of it from the street.

C: 即便以梦境的尺度来看，这里的藏书数量也堪称夸张。
E: Even by Dreamscape measurements, the books stashed here border on hyperbole.

C: 一台价值不菲的钢琴，看来住在这间屋里的孩子受到了良好的音乐教育。
E: A very expensive piano. It seems that the child of this house received excellent music education.

C: 注：物品仅供演示，最终效果请以实际梦境为准。
E: Note: Items are for demonstration purposes. For the final results, please refer to the Dreamscape.

C: 你推了推，大门纹丝不动；又推了推——还是别浪费力气啦！
E: You push on it, but the door does not budge. You try again... Best not to waste your strength!

C: 梦泡，凝结的梦境精华。
E: Dream bubbles, made up of condensed Dreamscape essence.

C: 不知道从哪飘来的伞座，它的存在属实有些突兀，更恼人的是，你还搬不动它。
E: Not sure where the umbrella seat came from, its appearance is quite a surprise. What's more annoying is that you can't move it.

C: 有那么一瞬间，你惊觉这只猎犬的存在似乎变得不大*可靠*。下一秒，它便被扭曲的忆域吞没了。
E: For a moment, you are startled as the Hound's presence appears less *stable*. The next moment, it gets consumed by the distorted Memory Zone.

C: 有财力在匹诺康尼消费的贵宾往往都有一个共性：他们都很会撒谎。显然，你对这项技术并不擅长。
E: Those who're wealthy enough to spend in Penacony have something in common: They're all pretty good at lying. Obviously, it's a talent you don't have.

C: 智慧生命拥有的情绪细腻、珍贵，但多数人没有意识到它危险的一面。世间所有罪行都源自情绪酝酿而成的冲动。
E: The emotions that sentient beings possess are delicate and precious, but most of us do not realize their dangerous side. All crimes in the world are driven by impulses that stem from emotions.

C: 你知道吗？当透过那些画作看她时，我窥见了星空与海岸、梦与自由、永恒与无限。
E: You know what? When I looked at her through the paintings, I saw the stars and the shores, dreams and freedom, eternity and infinity.

C: 好吧，你明白了，谁没在路上碰到过几个推销员呢，大家都不容易。
E: Now you understand. Who hasn't run into a salesperson or two along the way, eh? Everyone's just trying to hustle.

C: 呜呜…从来没人爱过我，就算有谁搭话，也只是想骗我……
E: *sob*... No one's ever loved me, and those who talk to me all have ulterior motives...

C: 我是冲着家族来的。
E: I'm here for The Family.

C: 毫无进展…家族的手脚不可能这么干净，肯定会留下痕迹……
E: I'm getting nowhere... The Family's hands can't be this clean, and there must be a clue somewhere...

C: 啊啊…我的积蓄只够在酒店住半个月了，后面怎么办…难道要我去帮忙洗盘子拖地吗？
E: Aahhh... I only have enough savings to stay in this hotel for two more weeks. What do I do after that... Will I have to help with washing the dishes and mopping the floor?

C: 一台积满了灰尘的脏电脑。
E: A dirty computer coated with dust.

C: 就先聊到这吧。
E: Let's end it here for now.

C: 克劳迪娅专注地望着你。少女的明眸里似有群星闪烁，而你则是这片浩瀚银河的中心。
E: Claudia looks at you with piercing earnestness. Star clusters glitter in this girl's eyes, and you have become the center of this vast galaxy.

C: 您对都市传说感兴趣吗？您看，像这样一个梦之城，必定会有很多迷人的秘密——
E: Are you interested in urban legends? Just like in this city of dreams, there must be countless mesmerizing secrets...

C: 呜呜，呜呜呜。
E: Woo-woo, woo whoooo woo.

C: 不知为何，对方将整个背包都递给了你。
E: For some reason, the other person gives you their entire inventory.

C: 星际和平公司，您的订单已收到。商品将于三个匹诺康尼日内送达，请……
E: Welcome to IPC. your order has been received. Items will be delivered within three Penacony days. Please...

C: 摸摸它的肚子。
E: Rub its belly.

C: 汪！汪汪汪……
E: Woof! Woof ruff ruff...

C: 在你校准对方情绪的一瞬间，一名智械女性突然出现在了眼前。
E: The moment you calibrate the target's mood, an Intellitron girl appears out of nowhere.

C: 她拿走了属于我的一切——舞台，光芒，声音，前程……
E: She took away everything that belonged to me: The stage, the lights, my voice, my future...

C: 意思是会动之后就有了？
E: You mean to imply they will have that after they move?

C: 怎么样？这位客人，演出还满意吗？
E: How was it? Are you satisfied with the performance, Customer?

C: 我都想上去共舞一曲了。
E: It makes me wanna dance with it too.

C: 一般吧。
E: Average.

C: 每每陷入迷茫时，我总能在绘画中找到答案。你看上去…也像是个很有天分的人，虽然我不确定它是什么。
E: Every time I felt lost, I could find answers from painting. You seem... to be a very talented person, though I'm not sure what your talent is.

C: 哦不不不，这可不是广告。
E: Oh, no no! This is not an advertisement!

C: 再聊聊你的爱人吧。
E: Tell me more about this love of yours.

C: 哦…不……我太天真了。
E: Oh... No... I'm just being naïve.

C: 但…假的也行啊，让我再见一次她吧。
E: But... Even if it's fake, I still wish that I could meet her just one more time.

C: 怎么样，我讲脱口秀的水平是不是都足够去匹诺康尼大剧院表演了？
E: So, do you think I have what it takes to perform at the Penacony Theater?

C: 注意安全。如果遇到危险，猎犬随时为你效劳。
E: Watch yourself. If you run into danger, the Bloodhounds are at your service.

C: 而且我只是随便批评了两句，他就唉声叹气，哭哭啼啼……
E: And all I did was reprimand him lightly, and then he just sighed and started bawling...

C: 哈哈哈！没有猎犬，这个世界早完蛋了！
E: Hahaha! This world would've been a goner without the Bloodhounds!

C: 现在梦境里的公共交通是越来越发达了，速度也比以前要快，不过…乘坐那些狭窄球笼，终究还是少了些乐趣，您不这样觉得嘛？
E: The public transport in the Dreamscape is becoming more advanced, and much faster than before. But... it feels somewhat boring to sit in those Spheroids, don't you think?

C: 这个月到手的工资变少，都是那些人的错！
E: There's a cut in this month's paycheck, and it's all because of those people!

C: 等到人们发现，在那些未被人关注到的角落，存在着无数更新更好的作品时，我那伟大的「二次元帝国」的末日就到了……
E: When people realize that there are countless greater works hidden in the galaxy's unexplored corners, our great anime empire will meet its day of judgment...

C: …我只是在日常巡逻而已。您有什么事吗？
E: ...I am just on my daily patrol. Can I help you with something?

C: 每位想要前往「梦想之城」的逐梦客都需要在这里办理入住手续，并由此进入匹诺康尼宏伟瑰丽的梦境世界。
E: All Dreamchasers intending to enter the City of Dreams need to check in here before entering the magnificent dream world in Penacony.

C: …哼哼哼♪…哼、哼哼哼……
E: Hmhmhm♪... Hm... Hmhmhm...

C: 听着还不错！
E: Sounds good!

C: 看看你这里都有什么。
E: Let's see what you have here.

C: 没问题。入梦须知已记录在您的梦境护照上，您可以随时查阅。
E: Certainly. Please refer to your Dreamscape Pass for instructions.

C: 梦里有什么要注意的？
E: Is there anything I should pay attention to in the Dreamscape?

C: 当然，请随意挑选！
E: Certainly. Please feel free to browse!

C: 担心买不到合适的？机会来了！厄皮洛斯服装秀场有着全梦境最时髦的外衣，包您满意——购买任意产品还送苏乐达哟！
E: Do you find it hard to get clothes that suit your style? Here comes your chance! You can find the trendiest apparel at the Epirus Apparel Fashion Show! Make any purchase to redeem for free SoulGlad!

C: 哎，这不就到我出场的时候了嘛。
E: Now, let me enlighten you.

C: 还要等多久，才能遇到真正懂我的人呢？
E: When will I meet someone who truly understands me?

C: （继续保持沉默！）
E: (Continue remaining silent!)

C: 滴答！{NICKNAME}，我最好的朋友——我从来都没想过，自己居然还能等到这一天的到来！
E: Tick-tock! {NICKNAME}, my best friend! The day I've been eagerly anticipating has finally arrived!

C: 她的表情美丽而冷漠，仿佛能拒人于千里之外。你实在没法鼓起勇气对她自述「罪行」——假如你确实有的话。
E: Her expression is beautiful but aloof, as if she is keeping everyone at arm's length. You simply cannot muster your courage to tell her your sins — that is, if you actually had any.

C: 你怎么看待这里的皮套人？
E: What do you think of the costumed people here?

C: 希望有朝一日我也能参与到动画创作中去……
E: I hope that one day I can also play a part in animation production...

C: 倘若有一天，梦里的人们能不再有负面情绪，剧团或许也能始终保持纯粹——那会是真正的美梦。
E: If one day people in the Dreamscape could be rid of their negative emotions, the troupe could probably stay pure all the time — that would be a beautiful dream in the truest sense.

C: 美梦终有一天会迎来幻灭……
E: Dreams will one day face their end...

C: 它们应该进不来梦境吧…
E: I don't think those two can come into the Dreamscape...

C: 皮皮西头顶的绒球开始不停摆动，仿佛飞行器的螺旋桨——要是速度再快一点，说不定他真能飞起来。
E: The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head starts swinging vigorously like the propeller of an aircraft. He might be able to fly if it spins a little bit faster.

C: 还有，一个忠告：耳听为虚，眼见为实。祝你「开拓」好运！
E: One more word of advice: That which you hear is false, only seeing is believing. Good luck on your "trailblazing!"

C: 水池里的液体令你联想到匹诺康尼特产苏乐达——令人惊讶的是，它确实是苏乐达。但为什么？
E: The liquid in the pool makes you think of the Penacony specialty, SoulGlad. Shockingly, it actually is SoulGlad! But why?

C: 生活小窍门：水池里的水并不会主动攻击人类。放心洗手吧。
E: Life tip: Water in a pond will never actively attack humans. You can wash your hands with peace of mind.

C: 象征橡木家系的徽记，一圈圈年轮如靶心般指引众人前进的方向。
E: A crest that symbolizes the Oak Family. It shows growth rings of a great tree guiding everyone towards progress, like the bullseye on a target.

C: 您是个很善良的人，就像麦克斯先生那样，我从您的谈吐间看得出来。
E: You possess a benevolent soul, just as Maestro Max does. I can discern it from the way you speak.

C: 没关系，我们本就不该对人类奢望过多。
E: It's fine. I know we shouldn't expect too much from humans.

C: 哎…可惜啊，家族需要我，我还有任务在身。要不然，我真想辞了这个工作，和你们星穹列车一起旅行。
E: Ah... Unfortunately, The Family needs me. I still have a mission to do. If it weren't for that, I'd leave this job in a heartbeat and travel with you on the Astral Express.

C: 想当年，有个忆者和我大战了三百回合，愣是没撼动我的记忆半分，最后当场与我义结金兰…名字暂时没编好，你只用知道姐姐我很厉害就行了。
E: It makes me think of that one time when a Memokeeper fought me for three hundred rounds and shockingly couldn't even disturb a single bit of my memory. In the end, the Memokeeper and I became sworn sisters... I haven't made up a name yet, but all you need to know is that I am incredible.

C: 你不就在这儿吗？
E: Aren't you here now?

C: 多年来受的委屈，在骗局里持续的生活，这些东西止不住地在她的脑子里打转。
E: All of the wrongs she had endured over the years and the life she continued to lead in a scam, none of that could stop her mind from spinning.

C: 瞧瞧，这鬼地方竟来了位如此可爱的客人…有什么我能为你做的吗，亲爱的？
E: Oh look, such a lovely-looking customer in such a forsaken place... What can I do for you, darling?

C: …你！必须让你长长记性！
E: ...Why, you! I'll make sure you never forget!

C: 「石剑」！剑！剑！
E: "Stoneblade! Blade! Blade!"

C: 这采访正经吗？
E: Is it a serious interview?

C: 我就不明白了，大家都是成年人，为自己的行为负责就那么难吗？
E: What I don't get, though, is that we're all adults — is it really so hard to take responsibility for your actions?

C: …你盯着我看干嘛？等等…莫非你也是那群废物请来的群演？
E: ...What are you staring at? Hang on... Don't tell me you're one of the extras those losers hired?

C: 怎么，这就嫌吵了？
E: Why, am I being noisy?

C: 越想越气…还是工作吧！忙起来就没时间瞎想了。
E: Thinking about it just enrages me... I should get back to work! My mind can't race if it's busy.

C: 安装这个哨子模组是我这辈子做过的最正确的决定。
E: Installing this whistle module was the best decision I'd ever made.

C: 红哨小姐连续发出一阵短促、欢快的哨音，片场的空气中充斥着热爱的香气。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a series of short, cheery whistles. A sweet smell of enthusiasm fills the film set.

C: 苏乐达瓶放歪了？重新摆！场务有人在偷懒？狠狠骂！
E: Is there a bottle of SoulGlad placed at the wrong angle? Reposition it! Is one of the crew slacking off? Chew them out!

C: 不会吧！我都好久没开张过了，怎么通缉令还保留着。不应该啊？
E: No way! I've been out of business for ages. How are there still wanted posters around? That can't be right.

C: 我是从遥远的星球来的，最喜欢做的事就是驾驶飞船在宇宙里到处乱转。真的，你没体验过可能不知道，自由，浪漫，无拘无束，我爱死那种感觉了。
E: I come from a distant planet. There is nothing I love more than flying my spaceship around the universe as I please. Honestly, if you haven't experienced it, you won't understand that freedom, romantic sensation, and feeling of being truly unrestrained. I love that feeling so much.

C: 你去过美梦之外的地方吗？我不是说这座城寨…而是那种危机四伏的*噩梦*。
E: Have you ever been outside the dream before? I don't mean this fortress... I mean the nightmare fraught with danger.

C: 不、不好意思！我只是来这边采采风，打扰到您了……
E: Ah, S—Sorry! I'm just here collecting material. I didn't mean to disturb you...

C: 有人喜欢享乐，期盼它能冲淡现实的不快；有人厌恶繁华，渴望过无拘无束的生活…无论哪种人，在梦中都理应有容身之处。
E: Some people enjoy pleasure and hope, that it can dilute the misery of reality. Some despise opulence and long for a life without restraints... Whatever kind of person you are, there should be a place for you in the dream.

C: 知道流梦礁最大的优点是什么吗？清静。
E: Do you know what the greatest thing about the Dreamflux Reef is? The peace and quiet.

C: 梦里还能种田？
E: You can farm in a dream?

C: 正好田里没活，你想要聊什么？
E: I actually don't have any plants to tend to at the moment. What do you want to talk about?

C: 在我退休之后，我终于能够着手去利用梦境的功能，让现实中贫苦的孩子们接受音乐教育。
E: After I retired, I was finally able to make use of the Dreamscape's functions and provide musical education to impoverished children in the real world.

C: 梦境么…对我来说，它是现实的一种补充。
E: The Dreamscape... For me, it is a supplement to the real world.

C: 孩子们一直在稳定地进步，他们的潜力多么大啊……
E: The children have been making steady progress, and they all have such amazing potential...

C: 需要动手实践的学科。
E: Subjects that require hands-on experience.

C: 自我开始研究忆质动力学以来，我就一直在监测阿斯德纳忆域的忆质流动情况。
E: Since I started my research on memoria dynamics, I've been monitoring the flow of memoria in the Asdana Memory Zone.

C: 简单来说，组成它的忆质在不断流失——终有一天，它会消融在忆域的深海之中。
E: Simply put, the memoria that forms it is depleting. One day, it will dissolve in the depths of the Memory Zone's sea.

C: 无论如何，我不会忘记这里的人们，和这里曾发生的故事。毕竟，研究忆质的人，永远不会轻慢那些美好的记忆……
E: No matter what, I'll never forget the people and the stories here. After all, people who study memoria will never take those beautiful memories for granted.

C: 根据我的观测，流梦礁的忆质不再向着美梦的方向涌流。
E: Based on my observation, the Dreamflux Reef's memoria is no longer flowing toward sweeter dreams.

C: 我是钟表小子的超级粉丝！
E: I'm a super fan of Clockie!

C: 唉，我还能见到钟表小子博物馆建成的那一天吗？
E: Alas, will I ever see the day when the Clockie Museum is built?

C: 钟表小子相关的物件已经在我的房间里堆积成山了，也许它们终有一日会变作具有珍贵历史价值的文物…但我还能看到那一天吗？有谁能记得我做的努力吗？
E: Items related to Clockie have been piling up in my room, and maybe one day, they will become artifacts of significant value... but will I live to see that day? Will anyone remember my efforts?

C: 历史的愤慨之处在于，纵使它无法更改，也总会有人尝试去扭曲。
E: The infuriating part of history lies in its immutable nature, yet there are always relentless attempts to distort its course.

C: 欢迎光临…哎呀，这位客人也是新来的吧？城寨里最近突然多了许多生面孔，我都快记不过来了。
E: Welcome... Oooh, don't tell me we've got another new guest visiting today? All these new faces in town, I can't keep track of them all.

C: 听上去像虚假宣传。
E: Sounds like fake news to me.

C: 最近来了不少年轻人，也许我也应该开发一些新口味。
E: A lot of youngsters have been coming by the store these days. Maybe I should branch out into some new flavors?

C: 橡木蛋糕卷。
E: Oak Cake Rolls.

C: 所谓清醒村，其实就是{RUBY_B#流梦礁}这里{RUBY_E#}。一处收留那些不为美梦所容的可怜虫的「庇护所」罢了。
E: This so-called Rouseville is actually {RUBY_B#Dreamflux Reef}this place{RUBY_E#}. Nothing more than a safe haven for those poor souls who were abandoned by Dreamjoy.

C: 我曾是个漫游星间的雕塑家，帮助家族完成了一位「调弦师」的塑像，继而忝列贵客之流，受到了家族的邀约。
E: I was once a sculptor roaming the stars, and helped The Family complete a Chordmaster statue, subsequently becoming their honored guest and invited to The Family as a result.

C: 是吗？我以为自己只是用了一种便于有机生命理解的话术…看来我还是没有完全理解你们的礼仪，抱歉。
E: Really? I thought I was using vernacular apposite to organic beings... It appears I don't fully understand your customs. My apologies.

C: 随时随地，朋友。
E: Anytime, anywhere, friend.

C: 我曾遇见过一位「美丽」的作品。
E: I once encountered someone who was a work of absolute "beauty."

C: 我因此获得了「自由」，开始寻求某种自己发自内心渴望着的「美」。
E: After all, that incident had granted me "freedom." Since then, I have been searching for the "beauty" that I crave from the bottom of my heart.

C: 请用，特辣纯米蛋挞。
E: May I present Extra-Spicy Glutinous Rice Egg Tart. Please enjoy.

C: 「正因为你在痛苦，所以你现在才演奏得这么精彩。」
E: "Your suffering is the reason for your spectacular performance now."

C: 比起喜悦，她此刻的态度更接近得意。
E: She seems more proud of herself than happy.

C: 我还是为您重新介绍一下吧，虽说可以免费…可也不是没有任何条件哦？
E: Let me start over from the beginning. You can experience this for free if you fulfill some conditions.

C: 只要在深潜的过程中，你能够实实在在地用双手去接触它们，让那些看不见的小家伙随着你的上浮，来到我的面前。
E: All you have to do is find these invisible little creatures during the course of your dive, get in touch with them, and bring them back with you to show me.

C: 没关系，有想法的话，可以随时来找我。
E: Alright. Come find me once you reach a decision.

C: 托马斯年纪虽然比我大一些，但能娶到我这种级别的明星，他自己当然也得有点硬实力。
E: Thomas is a little older than me, but to land someone of my fame, he definitely holds his own.

C: 现在有很多人自称什么很有名，还拿电视节目和废纸一样的成功学著作背书…我跟你说，压根不是这么回事——如果有人在你面前强调自己多出名，那你可要千万小心了！
E: These days, you'll find plenty of self-proclaimed celebrities, reciting mantras about how they're successful from TV shows and motivational books. But let me tell you, it's all fake! If someone tells you they're famous, tread carefully!

C: 真是没办法啊，你说这人被器重就是…公司没我不行啊！但既然公司这么看得起我，我也得投桃报李嘛。
E: There's no helping it. I guess being held in such high regard means the IPC can't function without me! I mean, if they think so highly of me, I can only live up to it.

C: 最开始，我只是想更好地为我的重要客户服务，所以得了解这地方的所有细节。
E: Right at the start, I only dug into the details of this place so that I can better serve my VIP clients.

C: 人家现在担心它们会闯祸…好心的客官，要是您在船上看到了乱跑的小鸟，就请让它们来*船头*找人家，可以么啾？
E: I am worried that they may run into trouble... Kind guest, if you happen to see any birds flying about on the ship, please tell them to find me at the ship's bow. Can you do that for me, tweet?

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 虽然住客们很挑剔，但能在这儿工作，每天见到各种大人物，我还是挺幸运的！嘿嘿！
E: The customers may be demanding, but I get to meet all kinds of bigwigs at work every day. Heh, I guess I'm lucky to be able to work here!

C: 船长，您找我有什么事吗？
E: Captain, is there something I can do for you?

C: 跟我讲解下你的管理理念吧？
E: Tell me about your management philosophy.

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: That's all I wanted to talk about.

C: 年少的我没想太多，全当这是疯狂科学家一时兴起而随手写下的科幻故事，毕竟这小子在天体物理方面相当有天赋。
E: As a young man, I didn't think much of it. I simply thought that this was just a science fiction story written by a mad scientist hit by a bolt of inspiration. After all, that brat had some real talent in astrophysics.

C: 因为…哈鲁小姐是不会喜欢我的。传闻哈鲁小姐讨厌关于财富学院的一切，也有人说她偏爱可爱型的男生，皮皮西人那样的。总之，我不是她的理想型。
E: It's because I don't stand a chance with Haru. Rumor has it she hates everything about Fortune Academy, and some say she likes cute guys. Anyway, I'm not her type.

C: 「活得一帆风顺的家伙」、「跋扈阔少」、「冷血无情的逐利者」……
E: The guy with the smooth-sailing life, the rich and bossy guy, the self-serving profiteer...

C: 在她眼里，我所拥有的财富和人脉，包括我的处事方式在内，恐怕都和苏乐达公司的股价一样与她毫无关联。
E: My wealth, social connections, and even my approach to things probably mean as much as SoulGlad's shares to her — irrelevant and nothing at all.

C: 能聊聊吗？
E: Can we talk?

C: 我只是个路过的普通学生。
E: I'm just a passing student.

C: 嗨，同学！是来递交入团申请的吗？我就知道咱俩肯定合得来——
E: Hi, fellow classmate! Are you here to hand in your club application? I just knew that we'd get on...

C: 太难了。我想不出来。
E: It's too difficult. I can't think of an answer.

C: 你真好。
E: You're really nice.

C: 尝试：我可以向学校提出申请，要求取消财富学院的独立地位，划归到筑梦学院管辖内。希望这份提案能够通过。
E: Attempt: I can submit a proposal to the school to revoke Fortune Academy's independence and bring it under the jurisdiction of Dreamweaver Academy. I hope this proposal will be approved.

C: 好了好了，去玩你的吧。随便到哪里转转，都比和我这种老家伙废话要强！
E: Alright, alright, you go and play elsewhere. Going anywhere else would be better than engaging in pointless banter with this old coot!

C: 我说你也是难得来我这儿一趟。我这里新进了点物美价廉的好东西，价格呢，就按成本价给你打折。
E: I was saying it's rare for you to pop by. I've just gotten some high-quality and affordable items. As for the price, I'll give you a discount based on the cost.

C: 主播吗？我没看过直播，也没空直播。剧组的拍摄时间太不稳定了，我没办法准点直播。
E: A streamer? I've never watched a livestream before, nor do I have the time to host one. The filming schedule for the crew is too unpredictable, so I can't stick to a regular streaming schedule.

C: 我没什么想说的了。
E: I have nothing to say.

C: 我在片场上太容易紧张，情绪不够饱满，表情也很僵硬，还总是忘词儿…我这种小配角都能重拍这么多遍，不知道芮克先生有没有对我失望……
E: I get anxious easily on set, my emotions falter somewhat, my expressions are stiff, and I forget my lines all the time... Even a small role like mine needs to be shot multiple times. I wonder if Mr. Reca is disappointed in me...

C: 您竟会在百忙之中抽空与我聊天，令我备受感动！
E: You taking time from your busy schedule to chat truly touches me!

C: 因为他出生时就缺乏完整的大脑，却奇迹般地活着。他对整个世界都无知无识，却能挑动命运的机杼。
E: He was born with an incomplete brain, yet miraculously survived. He was ignorant and unaware of the entire world, yet he could steer the wheels of fate.

C: 很遗憾。我从未踏足那里，所知同样甚少。
E: Unfortunately, I've never set foot there, hence my limited knowledge.

C: 除了知更鸟，你一个也不认识，但装作认识他们会显得你很有品味。
E: Apart from Robin, you don't know any of them, but acting like you do makes it seem like you have good taste.

C: 无奖问答，哪台是「钟表匠」曾经用过的？好吧，他本人可能也记不得了。
E: Here's a question for you, but no prize if you get it right. Which of these was used by the Watchmaker? Fine, he probably doesn't remember either.

C: 不容为外人打扰的珍贵窖藏，迎来了数百年来的第一位客人。
E: A treasured cellar that usually doesn't tolerate visitors. It has welcomed its first guest in centuries.

C: 昂贵的钢琴，定期有家族调音师前来调律，音色极美，但大部分宾客把它视为社交时的白噪音。
E: Family tuners fix up the expensive piano regularly. Its sound is exquisite, but most of the guests treat it as white noise while they schmooze.

C: 把你的借我尝尝？
E: Do you want to lend me yours to try?
Ah...

C: 「克索韦茨女爵」，售价<unbreak>1868</unbreak>万起。
E: The starting price for "Dame Kosovec" is <unbreak>18.68</unbreak> million.

C: 当然不会啊。
E: Of course not.

C: 我要喝卡利白！
E: I want to drink Kapo-Kali!

C: 他们去做偶像团体了。
E: The other members went off to form an idol group.

C: 说来话长啊…
E: It's a long story...

C: 只是，您说要在天空上开个大洞…这可能不太好办啊。
E: But you mentioned making a big hole in the sky... That might be difficult.

C: 怎么没人停车啊？
E: How come no one's parking?

C: 你在家族待了这么久…
E: You've been in The Family for so long...

C: 又是「再来一瓶」…
E: ..."One More Bottle"? Again?

C: 那当然！
E: Definitely!

C: 要不我们还是分开吧…
E: Maybe we should just break up...

C: 你还是闭嘴吧！
E: Just shut up!

C: 呵，一开始说待十年，十年之后又十年…我当「家人」都当三十年了！
E: You promised me I'd come back after ten years... but now thirty years have passed, and I'm still stuck in The Family!

C: …且不说那些车会不会撞到你，就算真撞着了，你也不会真受伤啊！
E: ...Those cars won't bump into you! And even if they do, you won't really get hurt!

C: 唉，真没想到，竟然有一天喝免费的饮料也会这么痛苦……
E: Ugh, never thought getting free drinks would be so painful...

C: 葛瑞迪影业有新片上映了，叫《噩梦之镜》，我们一起去看吧？
E: Grady Films has released a new movie called The Mirror of Nightmares. How about we go watch it together?

C: 还要把影城买下来！
E: They want to buy the whole theme park!

C: 大家仍留在现场，感受比赛的余韵。
E: Everyone still remains at the venue, enjoying the aftermath of the competition.

C: 你这也太假了。
E: That's far-fetched, even from you.

C: 是你自己报名的吗？
E: Did you register by yourself?

C: 你这人总是这样，做事总想找捷径…算了，我们不是一路人，你以后也别来找我。
E: You're always trying to find shortcuts in whatever you do... Forget it. Since we're not like-minded anyway, we should just stop associating with each other.

C: 我就是在这里摔了一跤……
E: I slipped and fell right here...

C: 我觉得不如一人退一步……
E: How about everyone take a step back...

C: …开了个典当行，我还想去看看。
E: ...A pawnshop just opened. I want to go take a look.

C: 百分之八十…唉，谁能想到呢，学院居然引进了星际和平公司最新的论文查重系统，这下没法蒙混过关了。
E: Eighty percent... *sigh* Who knew that the academy would introduce the latest plagiarism check system from the IPC. I can't smoke my way through this time.

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 银河中有句箴言：「扑满的屁股摸不得」，即便它又小又可爱。
E: There is a saying across the cosmos: "One must never touch a trotter's butt," no matter how cute or small it is.

C: （泰坦的呓语）
E: (Titan's murmurs)

C: 我都预购十年了还没货！
E: I placed an order for a dolium ten years ago! And it still hasn't arrived!

C: 和我说说……
E: Tell me more about it...

C: 不需要。
E: No.

C: 山之民怎么了？
E: What's wrong with Mountain Dwellers?

C: 嗷呜嗷呜嗷！
E: Awoo awoo awoo!

C: 什么？！星核？！
E: What!? A Stellaron!?

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 你别看他们说我愤世嫉俗，我可从来不说黄金裔们的坏话…呃，至少不会说阿格莱雅、遐蝶、还有缇宝那几位的坏话！
E: You might see people calling me cynical, but I've never badmouthed the Chrysos Heirs... Well, at least not Aglaea, Castorice, or Tribbie!

C: 停停停、下次一定。
E: Wait, wait. Let's do it next time.

C: 我要说的就这些了，您可以入场逛逛。我会接着在这发呆，有需要就来找我吧。
E: This is all I have to say. You may go in and have a look around as you please. I will proceed to daydream here and snap back to reality if you need me.

C: 「水中舞动的人，痛饮秘酿的人，为法吉娜与它的追随者欢呼。在海洋上，在风暴中，我们与无常做伴，笑容如影随形。」
E: "They who sway in water, who savor secret brew, rejoice in Phagousa and their devotee. Over the oceans, within the tempests, we accept transience as constant company, yet among us happiness prevails wondrously."

C: 劳累的感触对我来说还真有些遥远了。我记得年幼时，半夜馋嘴偷吃神殿里的燕麦粥，被逮住后罚站到天明。那夜我肌酸骨痛，倒是真切地将「累」的感触刻进心中了。
E: The feeling of exhaustion is one that feels distant to me. I remember when I was young that I greedily snuck into the temple to eat the offerings of oatmeal. I was caught in the act and was punished. I stood in the temple until dawn. That night, my muscles burned and my bones ached. That was when the sensation of "exhaustion" was truly burned into my bones.

C: 呵，这可是个颇长的故事…我就只讲些片段吧。
E: Hah, that is a long story... Let me give you the abridged version.

C: 哼，与尼卡多利的决战都不足为惧，区区试炼有何可怕？但阻止我手握火种的并非泰坦的试炼…而是悬锋城的试炼。
E: Hmph. If a battle to the death with Nikador could not incite fear in my heart, what could scare me about a mere trial? The thing that stops me from grasping the Coreflame is not the trial of the Titan... but the trial of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 或许要让阁下失望了，翁法罗斯的大部分历史都是由吟游诗人们自遥远的过去带来，再由他人录为文字，如此口口相传，总有失真之处。
E: I fear you may be disappointed, {F#miss}{M#mister}. The majority of Amphoreus' history comes from bards recounting stories of ancient times. These stories are then recorded into words by third parties. Distortions of the truth are inevitable.

C: 哦，抱歉。刚才在祈祷，没注意到你。你也是新来的吗？你好，我叫布鲁图斯，刚到这儿没多久。
E: Oh, my apologies. I was praying and did not notice you. Are you new here, too? Hello, my name is Brutus. I arrived not long ago.

C: 你要是跟我一样…不信点什么的话，怕是连床都起不来。
E: If you were me... You'd need something to believe in, or you wouldn't even be able to get out of bed in the morning.

C: 你知道吗，我女儿那天还在闹脾气，说爸爸做的饭不好吃。我当时还训了她几句。要是能重来，我一定让她想吃什么就吃什么。
E: You know what? That day, my daughter was throwing a tantrum and saying that the food I cooked was horrible. I told her off. If I could go back, I would let her have whatever she wanted.

C: 没事，只是来打个招呼。
E: Nothing. I just wanted to say hi.

C: 我想起来了…那天，黑潮来袭，我们奉命守卫边境。
E: I remember... That day, the black tide attacked, and we were ordered to guard the border.

C: 下次还是找靠谱点的店铺吧，比如西塔罗斯小子家……
E: Why not try somewhere more reliable next time? What about that kid Theodoros' place...

C: 当然，您要是不在乎融化的肥皂是不是能像蜂蜜一样丝滑，那确实用矿物油都没问题。说到底也就是我们家乡的一种情怀啦！奥赫玛的人就不怎么在乎。
E: Of course, if you don't care whether your soap is as smooth as honey or not, then you can try using a mineral oil. After all, that's the vibe of our hometown! People in Okhema don't really care about too much.

C: 真有需要了我再找你。
E: I'll come find you if I really need you.

C: 人生或许真的是一个故事，但大部分人可能都不是故事的主角。
E: Life may really all be one big story, but most people aren't the protagonists of their own story.

C: 没关系，你要是感兴趣的话可以在这儿多逛逛，「小家伙」们也喜欢热闹。
E: That's fine. If you want, you can just hang around here for a while. The little fellas like a bit of action.

C: 这种事其实也不少见，像是什么谈恋爱就要送甜点、订婚就要送宝石戒指——这些我们耳熟能详的民俗最早也都来自商人的创意。
E: Such things are not rare. It's like having to give sweets and chocolates if you want to date someone, or having to give a ring if you want to get married... All of these familiar traditions were once nothing more than the creative ideas of merchants.

C: …希望这能让新兵的存活率提高几分吧。
E: ...I just hope that this will give our recruits a greater chance of survival...

C: 这星空…原来如此，她还没放弃…你也是这宴上的愚人呀……
E: This starry sky... I see, she still hasn't given up... You are also a fool in this banquet...

C: 想买些神兵利器。
E: I'd like to buy an amazing weapon.

C: 你已踏入「满溢之杯」法吉娜的地盘。在享乐之神的浴场，唯有豪饮与纵情被视为对它的尊敬，我们也乐在其中。
E: You have entered the domain of Phagousa, the Chalice of Plenty. While you bask in their divine bath, only indulgence and revelry are considered acts of respect to them, and thus we, too, shall revel in such.

C: 托{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}的福，我很少再梦到那些黯淡无光的往事，也不再听见母亲的声音了。
E: Thanks for asking, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}. I've rarely dreamed of those dark memories of the past, and I don't hear my mother's voice anymore.

C: 呵…有些任性的要求。记得不要说出去——欧洛尼斯的力量，本不该这么使用的。
E: Hah... A somewhat brazen request. Remember not to tell anyone else — Oronyx's power is not meant to be used like this.

C: 我，执勤…算了，说。
E: I am, on duty... Never mind, speak.

C: 数学，毫无疑问是公认的学科，可关于数学的任何公理都无法从存在的事物中找到。你永远见不到真正的圆形，却不影响我们谈论「圆」的知识。
E: Mathematics is undeniably a recognized school, yet there is no self-evident truth of mathematics that can be found within objects that exist. You will never see a true circle, yet that does not stop us from discussing knowledge regarding "circles."

C: （驳斥：你在混淆概念。）
E: (Rebuttal: You are confusing separate concepts.)

C: （驳斥：你在虚设实体。）
E: (Rebuttal: You are creating a fictional entity.)

C: 无法被感官认知的事物就必定不存在吗？盲人看不见你的样貌，耳聋的人听不见你的话语，难道就能因此推断出你并不存在？
E: If we cannot detect something through our senses, does that absolutely deny its existence? If a blind person cannot see your face and a deaf person cannot hear your words, can we then infer that you do not actually exist?

C: 世界永远不可知——唯有怀疑，以及我正在怀疑，才是确定无疑的事。
E: The world can never be fully known — the only things that are free of doubt are doubt itself, and the fact that I am doubting.

C: 好呀好呀。工作忙是好事，赚钱要紧，哈哈。
E: Busy with work, huh? That's great! Nothing beats being productive and making some cash!

C: 啊？博莱斯先生？您是在测试发明吗？刚看见这位勇士跑的飞快，我们还以为是在抓贼呢！
E: Huh? Mr. Bolaris? Are you testing your invention? We just saw this warrior running so fast, and we thought they were chasing a thief!

C: 你真的不是假面愚者吗？
E: Are you really not a Masked Fool?

C: 和他聊聊。
E: Talk to him.

C: 我的神啊，我手上没有那么多钱…不过，我会以自己的方式向你证明。
E: My god, I don't have that much money on me... but I will prove myself to you in my own way.

C: …离谱。我不想和你说话了。
E: ...Ridiculous. I don't want to talk to you anymore.

C: …希冀么。那是自然，若是不抱有看到明日晨光的愿望，又该如何度过这个漫长的夜晚呢？即使奥赫玛不受黑夜侵袭，也不该忘记心怀信念。
E: ...Aspirations, huh. That is only natural. If we do not cling to the hopes of tomorrow's dawn, how will we even endure this long night? Even if Okhema cannot be invaded by darkness, we should not forget to have faith in our hearts.

C: 这个嘛…如果还想了解一下其它六大学派，我倒是不介意给你简单介绍介绍——
E: About them... If you still want to know more about the other six schools, I wouldn't mind giving you a brief intro...

C: 就是树庭的一些研究成果，在瑟希斯的祝福下，我们将自己的心血储存在特殊的「种子」上，开放授权给特定的人群阅读。
E: Some research outcomes from the Grove. With Cerces' blessing, we have stored our efforts into special "seeds," and are granting permission to certain groups to read them.

C: 神驹能前往世界各处，为你取来想要的东西——但总得给我足够的时间啊。别急别急，待到门扉彻底闭合之时，自然会有结果。
E: Divine foals can travel the world and bring you whatever you need — but I need enough time. Don't be impatient and hold on until the gate has closed completely. You'll get your result.

C: 「门」的种类无穷尽，有的连通区域，有的跨越时空，有的分隔内外，也有的…只需要一把小小的钥匙便能为你带来惊喜。
E: There are endless types of "gates" out there, with some connecting areas, some linking spacetime, some separating inside from outside, and some... Just need one small key to deliver a big surprise.

C: 圣女大人还叮嘱，要她好好照顾自己。这么多年来，母亲一直想报答，可惜普通人没法轻易与圣女接触。母亲只好把这份感激之情向我们传承下去。
E: The Holy Maiden also urged her to take care of herself. Over the years, my mother has always wanted to repay the kindness, but meeting the Holy Maiden isn't something we can simply do. Instead, she instilled that deep gratitude in us.

C: 偷的？举报了。
E: Stolen? I'm reporting this.

C: 卫兵——
E: Guard —!

C: 啊啊…正如神谕所说，她果然是位善良的人…阁下，还请收下我的谢礼，请将它视作我对命运的进贡……
E: Ah... just as the prophecy foretold, she truly is a kind soul. Esteemed one, please accept this token of my gratitude — consider it my humble tribute to destiny.

C: 言尽于此。再会。
E: That is all I have to say. Farewell.

C: 此去恐无归期。我能否将后背交给你们，恳请你们…继续协助逐火的征程？
E: With this departure, I fear that I will never again return. Can I entrust you to watch my back... and to continue supporting the Flame-Chase Journey in my absence?

C: 与我十分甚至九分像的白厄。
E: My almost-doppelgänger, Phainon.

C: 关于后来的雅努萨波利斯……
E: About what happened to Janusopolis afterward...

C: 哈…我哪有那么高尚啊。比起我，如今独自在悬锋城的万敌，背负的职责才更沉重吧？
E: Ha... I'm not that noble. Compared to me, Mydei carries far heavier duties alone in Castrum Kremnos, don't you think?

C: 没什么了，下次再聊！
E: That's all for now. Let's chat next time!

C: 我明明听说那刻夏很注重实践。
E: I heard Anaxa emphasizes hands-on practice, though.

C: 其实最为主要原因是，钱兜已经见底，我们不得不留下挣些返乡路费。
E: Though honestly, the main reason was that we were broke. We had no choice but to stay and make enough money to afford our journey home.

C: 你记得遐蝶曾介绍过「亡语蝶」的来历——有人认为它是死者的最后一道执念，也有人认为它是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的信使。
E: You remember Castorice once spoke of the origins of the Eulogistic Butterflies. Some believe them to be the final obsession of the deceased, others believe them to be {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos'{RUBY_E#}s messengers.

C: 纵横海域的老船长最后在岸上死于疾病，她说「请帮我穿上衣服，扣上盔甲，让我能够像一名战士一样死去。」她最终被葬在海边。
E: The old captain who traversed many seas died from illness on dry land. She said, "Please help me put on my clothes and armor, and let me die like a proper soldier." She was buried by the sea in the end.

C: 也有人曾突然感到一阵头疼，随即她的*临终遗言*是「怎么回事？」
E: There was a person who felt a sudden headache, and her last words were, "What's happening?"

C: 这是雅努斯之城附近的铭文——
E: These are engravings found near the City of Janus —

C: 我的曾曾曾…曾？咳，四代前的曾祖父。他为奥德里西安王出谋划策，平定了边域的纷争，成为建国时的十五元老之一。
E: My great-great-great... great? Ahem, ancestor, four generations back, served the king of Odressian. He quelled border conflicts and became one of the fifteen founders of the city-state.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 我不理解。
E: I don't understand.

C: 作奸犯科，泰坦不恕！
E: Those who commit crimes and wrongdoing shall find no mercy from the Titans!

C: …我相信阿格莱雅大人。这份她和黄金裔英雄们用生命捍卫的事业，最后一定会把我们带去美丽的新世界吧。
E: ...I believe in Lady Aglaea. This cause, defended with the lives of her and the heroes of the Chrysos Heir, will surely lead us to a beautiful new world in the end.

C: 我的家人在黑潮中不幸身亡，我逃来奥赫玛投靠亲戚时，马尔库斯就在我们附近的街上晃悠。
E: My family died in the black tide, and when I fled to Okhema to stay with relatives, Marcus was always hanging around the street nearby.

C: …呼。拿去吧。别问我，也别多话。你就把石板上记载的往事，当作无人知晓的故事吧。
E: Hmm... Here. Ask nothing and speak nothing of it. Treat the history recorded on this slate as a story known to none.

C: 至少，这最后一次，我终于听到{RUBY_B#法吉娜}我的神明{RUBY_E#}对我说话了，它说——
E: At least, for this last time, I finally heard {RUBY_B#Phagousa}my deity{RUBY_E#} speak to me. They said —

C: 如果你愿意帮我，我会十分感激…带着阿格莱雅大人的份一起。
E: If you're willing to help, I'd be very grateful... and so would Lady Aglaea.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 嗯…有位织者好为人师。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>描绘壁画的长廊上</color>，等待为过路人解惑呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is eager to teach others. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the corridor with murals</color>, waiting to enlighten passersby.

C: 曾有信使连续奔跑三天三夜，最终累毙，只为将胜利的消息传回圣城。
E: Once, a messenger ran for three days and three nights without rest, only to collapse and die, all to deliver news of victory to the holy city.

C: 啦咪啦嗦~哆徕嘻~
E: La-mi-la-so~ Do-re-ti~

C: 好吃！还有吗？
E: This is delicious! You got more?

C: 我一个人能行，放心吧。
E: I'll be fine on my own. Really.

C: 舞会马上就要开始，我也得准备亮相了，记得来支持我迷~
E: The dance is starting soon. I need to get ready to shine! Don't forget to come cheer for me, memi~

C: 喂，你这家伙，收获月还没到，为什么要把我拔出来嘤？
E: Hey! What's the big idea? The Month of Reaping isn't here yet!

C: 不哦，也可以是{NICKNAME}的。能允许人家坐一坐吗？
E: Not really. It could be yours too. But you wouldn't mind if I used it, would you?

C: 唔，一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性一些，四处看看找点灵感吧？
E: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and look for some inspiration?

C: 迷？你问为什么要请大家吃饭，因为我开心，这才是过生日该有的样子迷。
E: Mem? Why am I paying for everyone's meal? Because it makes me happy, and that's how birthdays should be celebrated!

C: 不、不过，我不打算修改啦！毕竟这可是天外的「救世主」亲笔呢。
E: N—not that I plan to change it! After all, this is the writing personally penned by the Deliverer from beyond the sky.

C: 暂时不聊啦。
E: Done chatting for now.

C: 如凯撒大人所言——倘若旧律完美无缺，又怎会被轻易践踏？那些迂腐陈旧的教条，可不比目标的咽喉难以裁断。
E: As the Great Imperator said, if the old laws were so perfect, why did they crumble beneath her feet? Those ancient doctrines are as easy to cut apart as a target's throat.

C: 你自个儿喝去吧。
E: You can drink it yourself.

C: 动啊，水流！
E: C'mon, move, water current!

C: 没错，那就是「哈基蜜」！在外面的世界，它似乎也被叫做「蜂蜜」。
E: That's right, that's "Hachimead." In the outside world, I think they call it "honey."

C: 水？哦，当然是水！正如神谕者泰勒斯所言：「水容纳一切又连接一切」。处在水中时，人们的思想便得以向外延展，感知更多……
E: Water? Oh, sure — water! It's just as the sage Thales first said: "Water constitutes the principle of all things and connects all." In the water, the mind stretches out further away and perception is greatly strengthened...

C: 不，瑟希斯菜式的重点一定是颜色搭配，或许参照{RUBY_B#花花草草}裂分圣迹{RUBY_E#}会更合理。
E: No, the focus of Cercesian cuisine must be the arrangement of colors. Perhaps something like {RUBY_B#plants}the Relics of Rift{RUBY_E#} is more reasonable.

C: 嘘，好好听着，这议题相当重要。
E: Shush. Just listen. That is a very important topic.

C: 孩子，你怎么又私自闯入这里？幸亏是我先发现了你，如果撞见你的是卫兵……
E: Child, what are you doing sneaking in here again? You're lucky it was me that found you and not one of the guards...

C: 能仔细说说吗？
E: Can you tell me more about it?

C: 可是人家最喜欢湛蓝爵士的作品啾，就要当湛蓝爵士啾！
E: But I love Dr. Blues' pieces the most, tweet. I wanna be Dr. Blues, tweet!

C: 你有什么事情…吗？
E: How... can I help you?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你好像并没有因为入侵感到恐慌？
E: You don't seem to panic about the invasion?

C: 来聊聊吧…奇拉拉。
E: Let's have a chat... Chirara.

C: 用户未评价，本虫默认好评。看来我就是最美的喀！
E: Unable to find user comment. Recording the best rating by default. Looks like I'm the most beautiful after all, crrk!

C: 衣匠像一只沉睡的若虫般漂浮在空中。
E: The Garmentmaker floats in the air like a slumbering nymph.

C: 那道贯穿天地的金光令人心醉，我仍然久久沉浸在其中。
E: The golden light piercing the sky and earth takes my breath away. I'm still lost in its afterglow.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 你行不行啊，难道还等着角色去代入你吗？
E: Can you or can you not handle this? Are you waiting to get into the characters?

C: 她巧手专精，本人亲测。
E: She's got magic hands. I can vouch for that.

C: 你还好意思说，棍球打得好好的，突然告诉我订婚的消息！赔我输掉的利衡币！
E: What audacity! We were having a great stickball game when you suddenly dropped your engagement news! You owe me the Balance Coins I lost!

C: 嚯，大家伙。很高兴你还认得我们。
E: Whoa, big guy. Glad you still remember us.

C: 你说的有道理，是我太过在意了。
E: You're right, I was thinking too much into it.

C: 我可不好意思麻烦你们这些客人。
E: I wouldn't want to trouble guests like you.

C: 问问它最近有什么新鲜事？
E: Ask if anything new's happened lately.

C: 呜嗡！（嗯！记得早点来！实在太忙的话也可以不来…忙，忙点好啊……）
E: Grumph! (Yep! Be sure to come back soon! Though if you're super busy, that's okay too... Being busy is... good, right...?)

C: 这次你也是老板。
E: You're also the boss this time.

C: 看到你和家人们亲热团聚的场景，还以为「救世主」只顾得上故乡的亲人，等到空闲时间才能和旧友打声招呼。
E: Seeing you having such an intimate reunion with your kinship, I thought the Deliverer would only have time for family from the homeland, and would only get around to greeting old friends when you had some spare time.

C: 呵…衷心感谢你的祝愿。我早已是，今后亦是。
E: Heh... Thank you for your blessings. I always have been, and I always will be.

C: 用奏乐的方式征服人心？
E: Conquering the hearts of the people through music?

C: 「没那么夸张，只准备了四封！另外两封正打算寄给救世小子和裁缝女，邀请他们穿上自己搭配的新衣服，去参加新一季时装展览……」
E: "It's not that dramatic, I only prepared four letters! The other two are meant for our little deliverer boy and the tailor girl, inviting them to wear their self-coordinated new outfits to the new season's fashion exhibition..."

C: 若不介意，我可以现场烹饪，邀请大家一同来享用美食。
E: If you don't mind, I can cook them right here and invite everyone to enjoy the meal together.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 你也有蜕生之法？
E: Are you also capable of hatching rebirth?

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 嗯…有位织者凝望着光束的方向。金丝带来消息，它正趴伏于<color=#dbc291ff>坚韧的树权上</color>，感叹英雄的意志呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who gazes in the direction of the light beam. The golden thread brings tidings: They're resting on the <color=#dbc291ff>tenacious weight-balanced tree branch</color>, admiring the hero's will.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 能帮我打开那些羽珀吗？
E: Could you help me open those feather-shaped ambers?

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: （不对，感觉应该跟三月七有关系…还是问问她吧。）
E: (No, this must have something to do with March 7th... I should ask her about it.)

C: 他呀，是个老好人。外表像个热心肠的大叔，骨子里还是个意气风发的少年郎——别告诉他是我说的。
E: Welt? He may appear to be a kind old man, but deep inside he's still a strapping youth with a hopeful heart. Don't tell him I said that though.

C: 瓦尔特的过去…
E: About Welt's past...

C: 这有些说来话长了…我的力量来自一位前辈，可以说我继承的是他的使命，和他的意志。
E: Long story short, my powers come from an older acquaintance. You can say I inherited his mission and will.

C: 噢，我喜欢这个话题！说真的，星神是什么呢？
E: Oh, I love this topic! Honestly, what are Aeons?

C: 哔嘟…寻物探针间距离过于接近，无法进行准确定位。请重新选择位置。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Distance between the finder probes is too close for precise location detection. Please reselect position.

C: 我坦白了，我没看过。
E: I confess I haven't read it.

C: 没什么事了。
E: Nothing else.

C: 滴答，哈哈，宾客，您就当我刚才啥也没说，祝您玩得开心~
E: Tick-tock, haha, please pretend I didn't say what I just said, dear guest. Have a pleasant time!

C: …结果这居然是一套完整自洽的作战模拟软件，开发者甚至还给它取了个正式的名字：「星芒战幕」。
E: ...It was a complete and logically-consistent battle simulator, and the developer even gave it an official name: Stellar Flare.

C: 喔，对了，「星芒战幕」的关卡可不止一个，而且每种关卡都适配了三种难度——您如果感兴趣的话，不妨再多挑战几次。
E: Oh yeah, that's right — there's more than one stage in Stellar Flare, and each stage has three difficulty levels. If you want, you can keep playing it.

C: 是对手太强了。
E: They're just too good.

C: 要是出意外了呢？
E: What if things don't go as planned?

C: （那…稿费就归我了？）
E: (Then... I get to keep his fee, I suppose?)

C: （看来又能挣一笔跑腿费了……）
E: (Looks like I can pick up another tip from this...)

C: 咳咳。这可不行，我这幅作品可是贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆指名要求的稿件……
E: Ahem, no way. This artwork here has been commissioned by the Belobog History and Culture Museum...

C: 我来帮忙收集展品了
E: I'm here to help with collecting exhibits.

C: 我们有几台从其他部门租借来的展品，现在都出了故障，我正为此困扰呢——如果修不好它，我们博物馆还要支付一笔赔偿金……
E: We have several exhibits on loan from other departments, and they've all been broken. My problem is, if they can't be fixed, the Museum will have to pay up compensation...

C: 不…其实，此事与布洛妮娅大人的母亲、前任大守护者可可利亚有关。
E: No... Actually, it has to do with Lady Bronya's mother, the late Supreme Guardian Cocolia.

C: 我明白了。那么，接下来是母亲大人执政后的故事——
E: Got it. So, next up, mother's story after she has taken power...

C: 那么，接下来是母亲大人生命中的最后一刻…但这部分克里珀堡已有定论，让我们跳过它吧。
E: So, next is the final moments of mother's life... but Qlipoth Fort already has a conclusion for this part, so let's skip it.

C: 我确定。
E: I'm sure about it.

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}…如果没有你，贝洛伯格历史永远都无法给这个女孩以正确的评价了。
E: Thanks, {NICKNAME}... If it weren't for you, this girl wouldn't have her rightful place in the history of Belobog.

C: 你已经见过这场景太多次了——回到机械屋对你而言就像回裂界一样轻松。
E: You've already seen it so many times. To you, returning to the workshop is as simple as going to the Fragmentum.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了大矿区的地髓矿脉。
E: A work of photography that captures the geomarrow veins in the Great Mine.

C: 一台缝纫机，款式简约。
E: A simple sewing machine.

C: 「面对天外之敌的进犯，阿丽萨高执炎枪，率领贝洛伯格众人凭城据守，直到春神与战争之神雅利洛降临至我们的行列中；」
E: "In the face of the invasion of the enemy from beyond the sky, Alisa held her flaming spear and led the people of Belobog to defend the city until the god of spring and war, Jarilo, descended upon our ranks."

C: 「在生命的最后，大守护者决意前往裂界自行了断，以向众人宣告贝洛伯格绝不会被个人意志扼住咽喉；」
E: "At the end of her life, the Supreme Guardian decided to go to the Fragmentum and meet her own end, in order to announce to the people that Belobog would never be choked by the throat by personal will."

C: …只、只要我们不登上星槎肯定没事的，素裳小姐。
E: ...A—As long as we don't board the starskiff, we should be fine, Miss Sushang.

C: …你们也太谨慎了吧，那好吧，我们一起去找找吧。
E: ...You all are overcautious. Fine, let's search together.

C: 有、有道理。
E: Y—You're right.

C: 答应了。你妈妈，好威严，和…和我妈一样…一样的让人说不出话来。
E: Yes. Your Mom is very stern. J—Just like my Mom... Her presence makes it difficult to speak up.

C: 之前旅途中拍的好多照片都报废了，太让咱心疼了……
E: Lots of photos I took during the trips got ruined thanks to this. Ouch, that really hurts...

C: 「1 / 3 / 5 / 7 / 90 / 2 / 4 / 6 / 8分！」定分枪突然宣布，不知道是不是你照片的分数。
E: "1 / 3 / 5 / 7 / 90 / 2 / 4 / 6 / 8 points!" the Rating Pistol suddenly proclaims. It was unsure if that was meant to be the score of your photos or otherwise.

C: 拍呗，随便你。
E: Snap away, whatever.

C: （似乎在列车里抬头的时候看到过…）
E: (Think I saw this when I looked up on the Express...)

C: {NICKNAME}游客，咱们到啦，这儿就是金人巷了！要论旅游项目的特色，当然就是「好吃的特别多」。
E: {NICKNAME}, we've reached our destination — Aurum Alley! Of course, the main feature of this tour is the endless selection of tasty delicacies.

C: 啊，太好了，你怎么知道我想吃什么？
E: Fantastic! Hey, how did you know my favorite food?

C: 你们好好说话，可别欺负人——
E: Watch your words, no need to be aggressive here...

C: 身为云骑，码头上发生冲突，我岂有坐视不管的道理？还有，我不叫喂，也不叫野丫头，我叫素裳！
E: As a Cloud Knight, I can't just sit back and do nothing when I see civil unrest. And for your information, my name isn't "little miss feisty" — it's Sushang!

C: 没事没事，我看他盛气凌人的样子就觉得不爽，总该是要做点什么，要我袖手旁观可做不到。
E: It's okay — seeing that arrogant sneer on his face made me sick to my stomach. I had to do something.

C: 明明和公司代表打赌的是我，你也没插手啊……
E: It was me who accepted the bet. You're not involved at all...

C: 没事，有机会我再告诉您详细情况吧。
E: Don't worry, I'll explain all the details to you later.

C: 与此同时，这个地区不同的商铺也犹豫不决——有些人将公司视为卧榻之侧的虎豹，心怀不轨；也有人将公司承诺的高额利润看作转机……
E: Meanwhile, vendors in Aurum Alley have expressed mixed feelings about the IPC — some see it as a crouching tiger with malicious intentions, while others see the IPC's promise of high profits as a chance to turn things around...

C: 看到明曦面对公司那家伙时，我感到了同样的不安。明明活过了数倍于对方的生命，却在面对他们时茫然不知所措。
E: When I saw Mingxi being confronted by the IPC, I felt the same uneasiness. She's been around several life-spans longer than that stooge, but somehow she was still at a loss for how to deal with him.

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 如果我道歉，就能让热爱金人巷的人们不必心寒意冷的话，我会道歉一百次一千次！
E: An apology alone won't be enough to fix the damage. If it were — I'd make you do it a thousand times over!

C: 我懂了，会长一开始就不存在！
E: Wait, I get it... the president doesn't even exist!

C: 我知道你在店里，你开门啊。
E: Yeah, we know you're in there. Open the door!

C: …驭空大人，现在总是由过去造就，不是吗？
E: ...Madam Yukong, the present is always made from the past, is it not?

C: 而公司的做法我见过，他们讲究效率，在全银河中推行标准统一的商业模式。
E: I've seen the IPC's approach — they prioritize efficiency and a standard uniform business model across the galaxy.

C: 能告诉我们理由吗？
E: Can you tell us why?

C: …你们？改变商会？
E: Reforms?

C: 以商会现在的实力，还是公司赢面较大。
E: Given the state of the guild, my money is on the IPC winning...

C: 你所描述的过去并不客观。
E: You've been looking at the past through rose-tinted glasses.

C: 这就算了吧……
E: That won't be necessary...

C: 多亏了各位的努力，金人巷码头每天都在全力运转，和上次一样，我安排了码头工人将原本闲置的码头清理了出来，升级了「码放货物」的规模。
E: Thanks to your help, the dock is running at full capacity. Just like last time, I told the workers to clear out areas that weren't utilized and use them to store extra cargo.

C: 我同意。
E: Happy to help.

C: 吃什么还得由燕翠师傅决定。
E: Yep! Of course, Chef Yancui will have the final say on what to include in these deals.

C: 你可真敢说。
E: Bold statement to make.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 「金人巷」刻在了每个人的心中，这不比默默无闻在两三百年之后消失更好？
E: Wouldn't it be better for the Alley to take on a new life and stay known forever? If it remains a market, I can assure you it will die quietly over the course of the next two centuries.

C: 我想肯定是因为「热爱金人巷的情感」，所以不同的人才会因「热爱」汇聚于此，才会出现不合理的「幸运与巧合」，对吧？
E: I guess the love and care for the Alley brought everyone together, and that's why despite all the difficulties, things turned out for the best.

C: 客人们马上就要到了，店里就拜托你了。
E: The diners will be here soon, so I'll leave the store with you.

C: 实在不行的话，阿姨只能把这些东西交给小天了，让她看看能不能试着入药。
E: Guess I've no choice but to hand these to Little Tian and see if she can use them for medicine.

C: 你又要叫我白白跑腿了？
E: Running errands for nothing, again?

C: 中碗月华饭。
E: A medium bowl of moonlight rice.

C: 辛苦你了{F#小囡}{M#小伙子}。我听后厨说你心细得嘞，一个单都没搞错，阿姨太佩服你了。这点辛苦费你一定要收下。
E: That was some hard work, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. The kitchen staff told me you didn't get a single dish wrong. Now that's impressive. Here, for your trouble.

C: …啊，这个和青雀小姐这件事无关。你知道的，公司几乎向金人巷所有的商户都发送了邀请函，希望商户们能与公司建立合作。
E: ...Uh, that's all completely unrelated to Miss Qingque, though. As you know, IPC has sent invites to all guild merchants in Aurum Alley wishing to strike deals with all of them.

C: 那你就打消请假的念头吧。
E: Then you can give up on the thought of taking leave.

C: 我们付出了很多其他的努力！
E: We did much more than simply utilize the dock!

C: …不给。
听说街道上出了不少事情，我没有手脚…只好拜托你去看看了。
E: I heard big changes are happening, but it's difficult for me to know... Would you mind taking a look?

C: 这里可没有墙根可以钻…
E: There's nowhere to dig under...

C: 哎，世玲在想，要不要做一些更前沿的课题实验，开拓一些未知领域呢？
E: Hey, I was thinking, should I do some more "avant-garde" projects and venture into the lesser-known areas of study?

C: 科学界清扫得如何？
E: How's the scientific community tidying up?

C: …光作为…栗子，它携带粒子……
E: ...Light as a... particum, carries particle...

C: 是战争题材吗？
E: Is it about war?

C: 球笼已经运行到了尽头。哈努兄弟，美梦小镇最著名的人物之一，正抖动自己的大鼻子对你们表示欢迎。
E: The Spheroid reaches the end of its track. Hanu, one of the most famous figures in Dreamville, is twitching his big nose to welcome you.

C: 滴答…宇宙审美是很多元的，很多宾客都喜欢我们哦。
E: Tick-tock... There are myriad aesthetic tastes across the cosmos. Many of our guests love us.

C: 您说的对，我们需要证据。
E: You're right. We still need hard proof.

C: 走吧{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们再试一次。
E: Let's go. We'll have to try again.

C: <size=36>我要打烂你的脸！！！</size>
E: <size=36>I'll punch your face in!!!</size>

C: …最生气的一集！
E: ...This is by far the most infuriating thing!

C: 只是听它们说话而已。
E: I only lend my ear to them.

C: （是不是因为没人陪它玩，才会变得这么讨厌…去它的内心世界里看看吧。）
E: (Maybe he's become so unbearable because no one is spending time with him... I should go into his internal world and see what's going on.)

C: 和我想要的不太一样，但作为自由调制的教学而言，也算是足够了。
E: It's not exactly what I wanted, but it's good enough for a Free Mixing tutorial.

C: 我是最贴心的调饮师。
E: I'm the most caring drinksmith here.

C: 呀！莫非您是吃醋了？
E: Yikes! Are you being jealous or something?

C: …调饮师{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你是怎么到这的？
E: ...{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Drinksmith? How did you get here?

C: 拜托别在我面前秀了。
E: Alright, enough with the public display of affection.

C: 汪。闻到了奇怪的味道……
E: Woof! I'm smelling something weird...

C: …是在找我吗？
E: ...Are you looking for me?

C: 汪…可…舒翁……
E: Woof... but... Siobhan...?

C: 汪！你说话的方式好像我哇！
E: Woof! You're starting to talk like me now!

C: 就是没有你的名字！
E: Your name isn't there!

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}乘客嘛，怎么，对这个包裹感到好奇吗？肯定很好奇帕～
E: Oh, hey there, {NICKNAME}! What's the matter? Are you interested in this package? I bet you are~

C: ——现在，请闭上眼睛。
E: Now, please close your eyes.

C: 我们已经有好几个弟兄折在这个迷宫了。
E: We've already lost a few of our brethren to this maze.

C: 太羞耻了，小点声！
E: It's so embarrassing. Lower your voice!

C: 传说中，热砂会场的建造者在不为人知的地方藏了宝物，等待着像您这样优秀的选手去发现。
E: Legends speak of how Scorchsand Hall's builders concealed a treasure within its walls, awaiting discovery by an exceptional contestant like yourself.

C: 麻烦您把它赶走吧！
E: Please, could I trouble you to chase it away?

C: 您可以帮忙把它拼出来吗？
E: Can you help me piece it together?

C: 没有线索的条件下做到这一点，您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You found it without any clues! Surely you're a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 您应该知道，「美梦小镇」就是钟表小子和他的伙伴们生活的小镇，这部系列影片就是关于美梦小镇的故事。
E: The series revolves around the story of Dreamville, where Clockie and his friends live — I bet you already know this.

C: 这个嘛…我在克劳克影业干了大半辈子，但其实也只见过董事长一面——
E: Well... Although I've worked at Clock Studios for most of my life, I've only met the chairman once...

C: 呵呵，无论如何，《美梦小镇》传奇都为我们的观众带来了欢笑与感动，也让克劳克影业脱离了苦海。
E: Anyway, Dreamville has brought a joyful and heartwarming experience for our viewers and helped Clock Studios out of a tight spot.

C: 打扰了。
E: Sorry.

C: 嘘，你不用告诉我，让我自己猜吧——到时候肯定有各种各样的解读，没人知道哪个是对的，这样才更有趣！
E: Shh, don't tell me. Let me make a guess... I believe there are going to be all sorts of interpretations for the movie in due time, and no one will know which is the truth. That'll make things more interesting!

C: 但在克劳克影业，我们的动画分镜都是「钟表匠」先生手工绘制，他也要求我们的动画师亲手创作每一帧的内容。
E: But here at Clock Studios, our storyboards are all hand-drawn by Mr. Watchmaker. He insists that our animators create the content for each frame themselves by hand.

C: 这没有苏乐达的日子真是一天都过不下去了！
E: The days without SoulGlad are unbearable!

C: 「勇敢的广告牌被永远留在了黑暗之中，但美梦小镇会记住它的名字。」
E: "The brave billboard is left in the darkness, but the Dreamville will forever remember its name."

C: 虽然有些可惜…不过剧情也能勉强连上。「魔法生效，钟表小子最终回到了家乡。」
E: It's quite a pity... but at least the story's continuity is somewhat intact. "The magic takes effect, and Clockie finally returns to his hometown."

C: 记住，需要把<color=#dbc291ff>所有演员放在同一张画面里</color>哦。
E: Remember, <color=#dbc291ff>all the actors must be in the shot</color>.

C: 去拍下一个镜头吧。
E: Go shoot the next scene.

C: 嘿，你瞧瞧这诡计多端的鳄鱼。
E: Hey, would you just look at this cunning crocodile?

C: 最开始的时候，他像是钟表小子的长辈，总是为他讲述各种道理，让幼稚的钟表小子逐渐长大……
E: At the very start, he was like a mentor to Clockie — always explaining all kinds of logic to him so that this juvenile little Clockie boy could gradually grow up...

C: 呵呵，好呀，我很愿意跟年轻的动画人聊天。
E: Ha, sure. I love chewing the fat with young animators.

C: 关于现实中的仓鼠球骑士。
E: About the real Hamster Ball Knight.

C: 新剧本的超常水准…
E: The remarkable quality of the new script...

C: 回答正确！同伴看着你在沙子里打滚，想起此行种种坎坷。她忍不住笑出声，内心的希望重新燃起，所以这位姑娘——
E: Right answer! Your companion sees you rolling about in the sand, and thinks about the arduous obstacles along this journey. She can't help but let loose a laugh, rekindling hope in her heart — and so this girl...

C: 还算轻松…希望这样的考验不会持续太久。
E: Pretty simple... I just hope these tests don't take too long.

C: 两位逐梦客，恭喜你们站稳脚跟，成为匹诺康尼冉冉升起的新星。但此时，又一位竞争对手低价倾销，将你们拖入破产的边缘。
E: Congratulations to our two Dreamchasers for establishing yourselves as budding stars in Penacony. However, now you face a competitor selling at low prices, pushing you to the brink of bankruptcy.

C: 漫长的战斗后，你终于胜利了，但当年和你一同来到匹诺康尼的伙伴，却因看不到希望而早早离去。
E: After an extended battle, you finally emerged victorious, but the companion who journeyed to Penacony with you chose to leave — having lost all hope.

C: 哼！哼。
E: Hmph! Hmph.

C: 钟表小子？我也能看见…这一位是舞台布景吗？
E: Clockie? I can also see him... Is this character part of the show?

C: 锵锵——成功了！
E: Ta-dah, success!

C: 还好那位导演的技艺高超，仅凭几段记忆就创造出了她的影像，如同本人一般栩栩如生！
E: Thankfully, the director's skills were great, and he managed to simulate her likeness just from a few memory segments. It looks just like her!

C: 比你想象的久，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: I've known you for longer than you can imagine, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 最终个体意义不复存在，不死的赐福让敌我彼此也融合为一。
E: Ultimately, the concept of "individuals" is lost. The blessing of immortality joined friends and foes into one.

C: 当然，黑塔表达了截然相反的看法。但那道神与人的方程式，就像是获得了生命一般在我的灵感回路中无限地蔓延、如花瓣展开。
E: Naturally, Herta expressed an opposing view. However, that potential equation of gods and mortals, as if imbued with life, expanded infinitely like petals within my circuits of inspiration.

C: （怎么又是这家伙呀？）
E: (Why is it that guy again?)

C: 你别为了劝学，什么瞎话都往外编啊…真是的。
E: Oh, come on... you're just talking nonsense to keep me motivated.

C: 三分、四分？
E: Maybe around thirty... or forty percent?

C: 不会吧，彦卿师父对我可好了。
E: No way. Master Yanqing has been great to me.

C: 哦哦哦哦哦！
E: Ohhhhhhh!

C: 没错，从那天起，我被抽调出分部的核心业务。
E: Exactly. On that fateful day, I was reassigned, dismissed from my department's core operations.

C: 稍等，我还有些事情。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 最近我开始学习仙舟剑法了，有了一些学业压力，以及…社会压力。
E: I've started picking up Xianzhou swordplay, so there's been some academic stress, and... social stress.

C: 这两名受害者相信绥园凌厉肃杀的阴气能磨砺他们的招式，于是趁着开赛前在这儿练功，想要吸取天地之气为己用——都什么年代了怎么还有人信这？
E: These victims believed that Fyxestroll Garden's vengeful gloom would temper their skills, and decided to train here before their matches started, in some attempt to harness the worldly energies absorbed here... People still believe this mumbo-jumbo in this day and age?

C: 破案了，九叔是凶手！
E: Mystery solved! Uncle Jiu is the murderer!

C: 我告诉你，刚才有一位勇士偷偷找到我，鼓励我勇敢战胜你，为金人巷的乡亲们狠狠出一口恶气。
E: Guess what? A brave soul approached me in secret earlier, encouraging me to defeat you and seek revenge for all the people in Aurum Alley!

C: 等到比武的时候你们就明白了。
E: You'll understand once the duel begins.

C: 聊聊他的付出与待遇。
E: Discuss his contributions and what he gets in return.

C: 兴趣是可以培养的，学会如何品味生活的乐趣很重要啊。
E: It's important to learn to enjoy the simple pleasures in life. You might discover a new interest if you just give it a try.

C: 原来只是心理暗示吗…我还真以为椒丘先生真有什么不可告人的秘密呢。
E: So it was just a placebo effect... I really thought Mr. Jiaoqiu had some deep dark secret.

C: 前段时间有以太战线玩家发帖说，抓到了罕见的双属性以太灵——同时拥有机械以太灵和异形以太灵的特征。
E: Some time ago, an Aetherium Wars player posted that they had captured a rare double-type Aether Spirit — it has the stats of a Mechanical Aether Spirit and an Aberrant Aether Spirit.

C: 哦，原来你是这样的。
E: Oh, so that's what you believe.

C: 你别问我，我也不知道。
E: Don't ask me. I don't know either.

C: …你们二位是来太卜司内找太卜大人的吗？
E: ...Are you here at the Divination Commission to see the Master Diviner?

C: {NICKNAME}我们走吧，可以问问其他卜者……
E: {NICKNAME}, let's go. We can ask another diviner.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 你使出一套熟悉得不能再熟悉的连招。
E: You unleash a combo that, at this point, you could do in your sleep.

C: 现在，与我一起并肩战斗吧，朋友！让我们一同净化那些顽劣的「夹层生物」！
E: Now, my friend, let us battle side-by-side! Let us purify these terrible "Betweenwhere creatures"!

C: 「友谊魔法」生效后，我的桶身上会浮现你在你朋友心中真实的模样……
E: Your Magic of Friendship has been activated. My can will show the true image that your friend holds of you in their heart.

C: （进入战斗）
E: (Enter Battle)

C: 接下来的对手是几个云骑…啊，就是这里的银鬃…不对，我跟你解释这个干什么，你肯定比我懂…只有我什么都不懂。
E: The next opponents are several Cloud Knights... Ah, they're like the Silvermane here... No, why am I explaining this to you? You should know better than me... I'm the only one who doesn't know anything.

C: 有可能哦！有个博识学会的学者千辛万苦想觐见「智识」，但在亲眼见到博识尊的一瞬间，他疯了。有机生物的大脑是很脆弱的。
E: It's possible! There was a scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild who wished for an audience with the Erudition no matter the cost, but he went mad the instant he laid eyes on Nous. The minds of organic lifeforms are very fragile.

C: 卢卡先生，公司是个庞大的群体。给人们贴上标签很简单，但说到底，我们接触的每一个人都是有血有肉的生命。我也是公司产业中的一员，您难道也讨厌我吗？
E: Mr. Luka, the IPC is a megacorp. It's easy to pin labels on people, but at the end of it, everyone we meet is living flesh and bones with feelings. I'm also an IPC staff member. Do you hate me too?

C: 如今你们走出家园，想让整个银河看到你们，这当然很好。不过，在这片不怀好意的银河里，你们是否做好了应对更大危机的准备呢？无论有没有，我都祝你得偿所愿。
E: Now you've left your city in hopes of getting the cosmos to notice you, and that's certainly admirable. But, in this cosmos full of selfishness and malice, are you truly prepared to face even greater crises? Whether you are or not, I wish you the best of luck.

C: 那这个青雀我不要了，送你。
E: I don't want this Qingque then. You can have her.

C: 这不算医院，其实是科研机构。
E: This isn't really a hospital, but a research institute.

C: 这甚至是地位最低的司部。
E: And this is just the lowest-ranking department.

C: 贝洛伯格的域外访客。
E: A foreign visitor from Belobog.

C: …来吧，波提欧。我会打败你的。
E: ...Bring it on, Boothill. I'll make you eat your own words!

C: 那波提欧也太离谱了！要不是有这铁臂挡着，卢卡就要被他给…被他给……
E: That Boothill really went way overboard! If it weren't for Luka's Iron Arm, Luka would have been... would have been...

C: 可能是因为来罗浮以后见过了太多奇形怪状的东西，见识到尾巴大爷的本领，我竟然都不怎么觉得惊讶了。
E: Maybe it's because I've seen too many bizarre things after arriving on the Luofu. But after witnessing Mr. Tail's capability, I'm actually surprised that I'm not very surprised at all.

C: 我可以告诉他们，就算面对再可怕的对手，只要战斗，我们能赢的，我们一定会赢的！
E: I could tell them that no matter how scary the opponent was, as long as we kept on fighting, we would win out. We would definitely win!

C: 我上次没能战胜你。「基于数学概率」，这一次恐怕还是不行。
E: I didn't manage to beat you previously. "Mathematically speaking," I'm afraid I'll suffer the same fate this time.

C: 啊…你又在「考验我的觉悟」！差点把我唬住了！
E: Ah... you're testing my resolve again! I almost fell for your trap!

C: 嗯～还是你原装的铁臂看着顺眼。
E: Hmm, I gotta say, your original iron arm looks good.

C: 但身为罗浮守擂剑士，我也有我所要坚守的一切。
E: But as the Luofu ringmaster, there are things I must uphold.

C: 卢卡，你还好吗？
E: Luka, how do you feel?

C: 我想是时候收拾一下行李，和玲可他们一块儿回家了。
E: I think it's time to pack up my things and head home with Lynx and the others.

C: 他就这么离开了。时间匆匆过去…一晃眼，三百年的时光消逝了。
E: And just like that, he left. Time flew by... and then, in the blink of an eye, three hundred years had passed.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来得正好。现在演武仪典结束了，卢卡选手返回贝洛伯格，我也该走了。
E: Perfect timing, {NICKNAME}. Now that the Wardance has ended and Luka has returned to Belobog, it's time for me to go.

C: 同胞，请容许我纠正你的一个错误，步离人终究是人科人属的一支。自视为狼，是旧日的错误。自视为人，才有更多的选择。
E: My brethren, please allow me to correct a mistake of yours: The borisin are, after all, a branch of the human genus. It is a misconception of the past for us to see ourselves as wolves, for there are many more choices open to us once we begin to see ourselves as human.

C: 「驮那师父，我没有变回狼的样子……」
E: "Master Dhyana, I didn't turn back into a wolf..."

C: {NICKNAME}教练，我是仙舟精武新闻网特邀记者桂乃芬。首先要恭喜你啊！
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, Xianzhou Martial Elite Network special correspondent, Guinaifen here. First off, congrats on the win!

C: 请你立刻出去。
E: Please remove yourself from the premises.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Hahahahahaha!

C: 那当然，毕竟你可是天下无敌的尾巴大爷！
E: Of course! After all, you are the invincible Mr. Tail!

C: 波提欧选手不讲武德，一开场就使出了奥义。卢卡选手大意了，没有闪。
E: Boothill lacks martial ethics, using an esoteric move right out the gate. Luka got careless and didn't manage to dodge in time.

C: 虎克似乎站得有些太过靠前，以至于除了记者那一侧的视角，根本没人看到她。
E: Hook seems to be standing a little too far in front, which explains why no one can see her from that angle, apart from the journalists' seat.

C: 真的假的？卢卡有这么多的粉丝？
E: Really? Luka has this many fans?

C: 你脑补的也太多了…
E: You sure are agile with your mental gymnastics...

C: 谁会记这种事情。我问你，你记得自己前天早饭吃了什么吗？
E: Who even remembers this? Let me ask you, do you remember what you ate for breakfast two days ago?

C: {NICKNAME}教练你好，我是来自星际和平娱乐的实习记者卡美丽。你已经听过很多遍了——祝贺您和卢卡选手挺进守擂赛。
E: Hello, Coach {NICKNAME}, I am Carmella, and I am a journalist intern for Interastral Peace Entertainment. I'm sure you have heard this many times already, but congratulations to you and Luka on making the defending match!

C: 我听说下一场卢卡要打彦卿，据说是比虎克还要天才的剑士，{NICKNAME}怎么办？
E: I hear that Luka has to fight Yanqing in his next match. They say he's an even more talented swordmaster than Hook! What are you going to do, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我就不能超越她成为冠军？
E: Why can't I beat her and become champion?

C: 什么？我一顿瞎操作居然解开了？
E: What? I randomly messed around and it solved itself?

C: 唔…嗯。嗯。此次作战的致胜之道，已然清晰浮现于在下眼前。
E: Hm.... Hm. Hm. The path to victory in this battle grows clearer before my very eyes.

C: 好耶！我现在就去群里发消息，等等啊，很快就会有回复了。
E: Awesome! I'll post a message in the group now. Just give it a moment. Someone will reply real quick.

C: 嗯。谢谢。
E: Mm, thank you.

C: 但没想到你们又准备了一场这么精彩的音乐片，早知道就晚些完成剪辑了。
E: But I never thought you would prepare yet another superb music set. I would've delayed the post-production if I knew.

C: 「晖长石号」的新主人，匹诺康尼的股东，总不可能连个音乐派对都搞砸吧？
E: As the new owner of the Radiant Feldspar, and a shareholder of Penacony, I'm sure you won't mess up a mere music party, will you?

C: 音乐派对很重要吗？
E: Is the music party very important?

C: （收集到了折纸小鸟的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
E: (I collected the origami birds' rhythm record. Better send it to Rappa for a listen.)

C: 咕咕，晚会可是美梦小镇的一件大事，老鸟很期待这次的演出，你可要加油咕。
E: Hoot hoot. The banquet is a major event in the Dreamville. I look forward to your performance. Do your best, hoot.

C: 也不知道这个出云忍者题材的游戏，是怎么突然流行起来的，回过神来的时候，身边所有人都在谈论了。难是难了点，不过…真好玩啊！
E: I also don't know how this Izumo ninja-themed game got so popular all of a sudden. Before I knew it, everyone around me was talking about it. It's pretty hard, but... it's really fun!

C: 咦，你在运营乐队？好有意思！
E: Huh? You're running a band? Interesting!

C: 我遵守垃圾分类制度。
E: I will adhere to the trash-sorting regulations.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 随时都可以进行演奏哦，要来试试吗？
E: We can start a performance at any time. Wanna try?

C: 还有事吗？
E: You still got something to say?

C: ——但我看到了你们对达凡绮的重视。我可以破例允许她继续参加乐队演出。
E: ...However, I can see how important Dafanchy is to you. I can make an exception and allow her to continue performing with the band.

C: 但是，有一个前提条件。
E: However, there is one condition.

C: 至于「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的困境，在下自会想办法解决。
E: As for the issues with Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party, I shall find a solution.

C: 嗯，那是自然。主公带回的记录正好提供了不少灵感。在下这就开始闭关——
E: But of course. The records that Master has brought me have given me much inspiration. I shall begin my seclusion...

C: 虽然谐乐学院的那群人脑子都不好使，但临阵脱逃未免也太不讲乐队道德了吧？
E: I know the Charmony Academy students aren't the brightest, but abandoning us just before the contest is a violation of morals, surely?

C: 不管她守不守信用，我们的信用是要掉没了！
E: Whether she would or not, our reputation is about to be destroyed!

C: ——这都看得出来？！
E: ...You could tell all that!?

C: 哼哼。终于到在下大显身手的时候了——
E: Heh-heh. It's finally time for me to flaunt my expertise...

C: 欺负？学生犯了错误，违反学校规定，当然要由老师来纠正。这叫尽职！
E: Bullying? When a student commits a mistake and flouts school regulations, it is naturally a teacher's duty to correct it. That is performing one's duty!

C: 充分感受到了吗，何为「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的音乐魅力——
E: Can you fully feel the musical allure of Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party!!!

C: 「缭乱」的任何成员都不可或缺。在下这就出发，誓要将吉他•忍徒从邪魔手中救出，重返最终演台！
E: No one member of the Dazzling Ninja will be left behind. I will set off now — I swear to rescue Ninja Initiate Guitar from the clutches of evil, and return to partake in the final stage!

C: （乱破已经出发了，现在就去舞台附近看看吧。）
E: (Rappa has already left. Let's take a look around the stage.)

C: 别把气氛闹得这么沉重，演出虽然结束了，但我们的乐队可没有解散啊。
E: Don't be such a Debbie Downer. The show may be over, but our band hasn't disbanded.

C: 如今，藏在暗处的恶徒已经伏诛，音忍的修行完满结束，在下也该启程寻找新的去处。
E: And now, the evildoers lurking in darkness have been subjugated, and the sound ninja's training is complete. My journey must begin anew.

C: 咕咕，真是自信，就像钟表小子一样。
E: Hoot hoot, so confident, just like Clockie.

C: 「美梦多彩，理想自由」。
E: "Color your dreams, free your ideals."

C: （如实讲述刚才的经历）
E: (Recount the recent experience honestly)
...*sigh*

C: 我还是第一次见到这么有趣的动物，麻烦给它拍个照吧，我想带回去作为纪念。
E: It's my first time seeing such an interesting animal. Please take a picture of it — I wish to bring it back as a souvenir.

C: 哎，父母希望我把全部心思都放在学院的课业上，毕业后成为著名的音乐家。
E: *sigh* My parents hope that I would fully focus on my school work, and become a renowned musician after I graduate.

C: 这份炙热的友情，不远万里来为同伴加油应援的精神…太、太让人感动了！
E: This burning friendship, this spirit of traveling so far just to cheer a peer on... It's... It's simply too touching!

C: 大哥！和他正面对峙，我们不会退缩！
E: Big Bro! We won't back down from a showdown with him!

C: 行啊，坦然接受自己的失败也是种能力，等音乐派对结束，有你们好看！
E: Good, accepting your own failure is also a kind of strength. When the music party is over, you will learn what pain is!

C: 但…我把以前创作的曲子都做进了游戏里，就当是留个纪念吧。
E: But... I put all the songs I wrote into this game — a way to keep them as a memento.

C: 哦，材料凑齐了？那咱们这就合点东西出来，看看这生意是怎么做的。
E: Ooh, got all the materials ready? Let's get to synthesizing then. See how this business works.

C: 不知道笑点在哪？这就对了，因为它只是一个<color=#dbc291ff>笑话</color>，哈哈。
E: You don't know what's so funny about that? That's the point — because it's just <color=#dbc291ff>a joke</color>, haha.

C: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
E: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

C: 瞧我说什么，大受欢迎啊。
E: What'd I say? They're a surefire hit.

C: 是啊…有时候还会发现，明明一起相处了那么久，却并不够了解对方。我们讨论了好一阵，才发现没人知道列车长会喜欢什么礼物。
E: That's right... Sometimes you'll even discover that you know so little about others, even though you spend so much time together. We were locked in discourse for a long while before realizing that none of us knew what gift the Conductor likes.

C: 电磁炮台。
E: An electromagnetic turret.

C: {NICKNAME}，你迟到了。我们约好一起晨练，但你晚到了整整一个系统时。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're late. We agreed to train together in the morning, but you are a whole system hour late.

C: 货运车厢里，没准有好多被我们遗忘了的宝贝呢！
E: There's probably plenty of nice stuff we forgot about in the cargo carriage!

C: 可以这样说吧。不过，「现实原型」并不是你们也认识的那些人。
E: You could say that, but you wouldn't know their "real-life counterparts" anyway.

C: …缺乏安全感。
E: ...are insecure.

C: 杨叔人呢？
E: Where's Mr. Yang?

C: 是，主厨……
E: Yes, chef...

C: 三月七，没时间解释了，我们走！这次只能靠我们的力量了！
E: March 7th, there's no time to explain. We have to go! Everyone's counting on our strength this time!

C: 用手才是「拍」，像你这样用球棒，严格来说是「砸」。
E: "Slap" implies you're using your hand. Strictly speaking, as you're using your bat like that, that's called a "smash."

C: 快停下，三月乘客！蛞蝓确实被消灭了，但倒了这么多盐，这盆绿植也快变成腌菜了帕！
E: Stop, March! The slugs have all been eliminated, but with this much salt, this plant is fast becoming a pickle!

C: 怎么突然自爆了？
E: Why'd you suddenly confess?

C: 这样吧～我会采购一批符合规定的消防器材，并立刻派人安装。就当作空间站给合作伙伴的一些小礼物吧~
E: How about this? I will procure firefighting equipment that meets regulations, then dispatch personnel to install them. You can consider it a token of appreciation from the space station to our partners!

C: 睡觉
E: Sleep

C: 「三月七小姐在摄影上颇有潜力，既然有心参加影展，我会不遗余力指点。」
E: "Miss March 7th, you have great potential in photography, and since you're enthused about joining the exhibition, I will spare no effort in guiding you."

C: 上传完成！唔，那边是？
E: Upload complete! Huh, what's over there?

C: 摇一摇。
E: Jostle it.

C: 不过先别急着发火。我给你们准备了个小玩意儿，找找看吧~
E: But don't unleash your fury just yet. I've prepared something fun for you guys. You just have to find it!

C: 能自带特效…
E: It's got built-in special effects...

C: 我们的创作好评如潮！
E: Our photos are raking in the good reviews!

C: 不过，这物事的确邪乎…本大爷在它身上感到了能惑乱人心的邪祟气息，还是小心看管为好。
E: But this thing's definitely sinister... I felt an evil aura from it that can confuse people's minds. You guys had better be careful.

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，身为十王司判官，我绝不能放任邪祟祸害人间……
E: Sorry, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, as a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I can't allow this evil to roam the realm...

C: 有没有什么补偿？
E: Any compensation involved?

C: 救、救命……
E: H—Help me...

C: 栖在地上的机巧鸟振翅飞起，喊着友情梦想什么的，合力排成了你要求的阵列……
E: The cycranes roosted on the ground flap their wings, shouting words of friendship and dreams, and together create the formation you requested...

C: 就叫「蓝天守望者」吧！
E: "Guardian of the Azure Sky" it is then!

C: （来得有些迟了…颁奖典礼进行到哪一步了？）
E: (I'm late... What's going on with the award ceremony right now?)

C: 呼——颁奖典礼结束啦。刚才居然还有人找我签名，紧张得我差点把笔写劈叉了！
E: Phewwww, the ceremony is over! Someone even asked for my autograph just now. I was so nervous I almost broke the pen in half!

C: 你有什么线索吗？
E: Do you have any clues?

C: 您这套兵法中所记载的战术，恕我直言有些过于理想……
E: The tactics recorded in this strategy of yours are a little too idealistic, if I may say...

C: 小奇美拉睁着大大的眼睛望着你，似乎很期待和你进行一番亲切友好的交流。
E: The little chimera gazes at you with its wide eyes, as if eager to engage in a warm and friendly exchange with you.

C: 生命花园是奥赫玛重要的学术场所，当然不允许有人在这胡闹。快过去吧！
E: The Garden of Life is a key academic venue of Okhema. No nonsense is allowed here. Get over there quickly!

C: ——想跟随我和灰宝的小奇美拉，请站到这边来！
E: ...The chimeras that wish to follow me and Grayie, stand over here!

C: 呃…可能是近期要处理的工作太多，奇美拉都有些累，以前会更有精神的。
E: Err... Perhaps it's because there's been too much work recently. The chimeras must be overly fatigued. They used to be much more sprightly.

C: 可是，这几只小奇美拉都是队伍最初的成员，和大家相处很长时间了。要是进行惩罚的话，或许会对其余成员造成不好的影响。
E: But, these few chimeras have been in the squad since the start, and they've been with everyone the longest. If we punished them, that might have a negative influence on the other members.

C: 除非不得已，我也不想对团队进行换血。重新磨合很麻烦，对吧？
E: I don't wish to change up the squad either, only as a last resort. It's arduous to have to cohere with new members, is it not?

C: 我想，你们忙碌了挺长的时间，是该好好休息了。
E: I've been thinking of letting you guys take a much-needed break after being busy for so long.

C: 是呀。园丁们原本也是学者，他们照看小奇美拉，始终在想办法为城邦解决困难。或许，这里有什么我可以做的事。
E: Yes. The Gardeners are scholars at heart, but they look after the chimeras and are constantly thinking of ways to resolve the city's troubles. I thought maybe there was something I could do as well.

C: 既然如此，我也不再留情——来，让我试试，你是否真能撼动我的位置！
E: If that's the case, I won't hold back either. Come, let's see if you can really take my place!

C: 你所有的努力，都是在为奥赫玛的居民服务呀。
E: All your efforts are in service of Okhema's citizens.

C: 大家都靠近点，看镜头——
E: Get closer, everyone, eyes over here...

C: 众所周知，友爱之馆的经卷数量庞大，而历代学者的研究更是多如艾格勒的睫毛，杂乱无章。
E: It is well known that the Library of Philia holds a vast collection of scrolls, and the research of scholars across generations is as numerous as Aquila's eyelashes — a massive mess of disordered, disorganized papers.

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )o「哇呜~好可怕」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )o "Gaaah~ It's so scary!" )∋

C: 也别冲撞小海豹了，冲撞你吧。
E: Maybe I won't bump the seals, I'll bump you straight away.

C: 没问题，乘胜追击！
E: Absolutely, strike while the iron's hot!

C: 这一轮将要对战的两位，是{NICKNAME}选手和…普赫斯选手…啊！你、你怎么了？快来人，快叫昏光庭院的人来！
E: The contestants this round are {NICKNAME} and... Perhippas... Gah! You, what happened to you!? Someone inform the people in Twilight Courtyard!

C: (:３っ「豹歉，豹没看见」)∋
E: (:３っ "Sorry, seal no evil" )∋

C: 我们家泡泡会做自我情绪管理！
E: Bubbles can manage its own emotions!

C: 没、没错！
E: Yes... indeed!

C: {NICKNAME}，你确实有几分实力，泡泡也承认你是个优秀的合作伙伴。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're really something. I also acknowledge you as an excellent partner.

C: 它不是只普通的小海豹，它是在*超高温*浴池里泡过的小海豹，是在冥界走过一遭的小海豹。这里除了我，没人配指挥它！
E: This is no ordinary baby seal. It has endured scorching baths and traversed the nether realm. None here but I am worthy to command it!

C: 哎嘿，一不小心就赢了。
E: Aw, I didn't mean to win, just kinda blundered into it...

C: 缇宝最爱笑，总是给奥赫玛城的大家，拭去眼泪，带来温暖的希望。
E: Tribbie's the cheerful one, always there to dry tears and bring hope to everyone in Okhema.

C: 没问题，乘胜追击！
E: Absolutely, strike while the iron's hot!

C: 决赛怎么了？务实一点，我劝你们，把自己战术打法，小海豹冲撞这个理念先搞懂。泡泡跟着{NICKNAME}蛮好的，你把队伍换了干什么，赢都不要了。
E: So what if it's the finals? Let's be real. First, you all need to get the basics down — understand what Seal Slamming is all about. Bubbles was doing great with {NICKNAME}, so why switch up the team? You don't even care about winning, do you?

C: …可以了！输了就是输了。
E: ...Alright, fine! A loss is a loss.

C: 好啦！全部就位，都准备好了吗？
E: Alright! Everyone in position, are you all ready?

C: 毕竟{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的诞辰怎么能缺少了欢宴与庆贺呢？阿格莱雅希望更多的人参与其中，同享来自密底斯泰歇的欢乐。
E: {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} birthday won't be complete without festivities and celebrations after all. Lady Aglaea wants more people to be involved and share the joy of Mythemis.

C: 这有点突然，让我再考虑考虑。
E: I must consider this sudden proposal.

C: 它叫泡泡，是生命花园培育出来的小奇美拉，精力旺盛又爱闹腾，学者们都拿它没办法。
E: This is Bubbles, a little chimera raised in the Garden of Life. It's energetic and quite the trouble-maker. The scholars simply don't know what to do with it.

C: 啊，那是星穹列车即将发车的信号……
E: Ah, that's the signal for the Astral Express' imminent departure...

C: 是吗？哈哈，还是第一次听说。
E: Really? Haha, first time I've heard this.

C: 特地选在休赛期出现，也算是比较友善的抗议吧。
E: It chose the off-season to make its appearance, which is a relatively friendly form of protest, I suppose.

C: 嗷呜，泡泡的决定绝不是临时起意，{NICKNAME}不必挽留了，希望你能好好利用……
E: Awoo... I definitely didn't just decide this on a whim, {NICKNAME}. No need to beg me to stay — hopefully you'll make good use of this chance...

C: 嗯，除了「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」，最近*我们*又从浴场观众口中分别听到了「黑潮蚀清波」、「巨兽卧沉渊」……
E: Indeed. Apart from "the golden trophy shatters with no champion," we have heard two more at the baths: "black tide muddles clear waters" and "giant beast rests in the abyss"...

C: 虽然奖杯没有了，但还有冠军！
E: Even though the trophy's gone, the championship title is still up for grabs!

C: 这是{RUBY_B#阿格莱雅}「浪漫」的半神{RUBY_E#}予你的预言，你尽可以相信我。
