E: This is the prophecy bestowed upon you by {RUBY_B#Aglaea}demigod of Romance{RUBY_E#}. You can believe me.

C: 哈哈，请放心，诚如我们的某位开发者所言：「一切吝于给予玩家正反馈的游戏体验都是耍流氓！」
E: Haha, don't worry, as one of our developers likes to say: "A game that doesn't reward players properly is just cheating them!"

C: 不过现在，与其继续听我在这里夸夸其谈，不如还是亲自上手体验一下吧，我的朋友。
E: But right now, instead of hearing me talk about it, why not experience it for yourself, my friend?

C: 「于是勇敢的球棒侠决定追寻魔王的足迹，向其发起挑战。」
E: "Thus, the brave Baseballer decides to follow the Demon King's trail and challenge them."

C: 嗯…不过或许这么说能让你感到好受些：「讲理的叫不醒装睡的，球棒底下出真知——战斗爽才是重点。」
E: Hmm... But maybe this will make you feel better: "Reasonable arguments can't wake those who pretend to sleep, but true wisdom comes from the bat — fighting is what truly matters."

C: 我谨代表家族恳请您不要退出比赛。您想想，您是什么名望与身份…
E: On behalf of The Family, I beg you not to quit the race. Think about the prestige and status you have...

C: 好！祝您旗开得胜！
E: Great! Wishing you a good start!

C: …这辆赛车里还搭载了普罗米修斯同款远程操纵模块，带有联机功能——我设置成局域网了，只有你和我能联机。
E: ...This race car is also equipped with the same remote control module as Prometheus, featuring an online connection function. I've set it to a local network, so only you and I can connect.

C: 小桂子，你还是早点放弃吧。
E: Little Gui, you should give that up entirely instead.

C: 哎，裳裳啊，我怕你把自己给逛丢了。
E: Oh, Shangshang, I'm worried you'll end up getting lost out there.

C: 那么现在就立刻来体验一下这次的新内容吧！
E: Then let's jump right in and experience the new update!

C: 试试就试试！
E: Let's do it!

C: 咕，我反悔了！
E: Ugh, I changed my mind!

C: 账账使出一招漂亮的舍身冲撞，轻松制服了这位不速之客。
E: Numby performs a spectacular body slam, effortlessly neutralizing the unwelcome intruder.

C: 五天？！
E: Five days!?

C: （暂时离开）
E: (Leave For Now)

C: 答案：因为一日为狮，终身为父。您理解了吗？「狮」与「师」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Because he was caught "lion" in court! Get it? Because "lying" and "lion" sound similar! Clever, huh?

C: 不知道会遇见什么样的客人呢……
E: I wonder what kind of guests I'll meet...

C: （这份题为「人格」的配方里模糊可见「成长」、「反转」几个词……）
E: (In the recipe titled "Personality," the words "growth" and "reversal" appear faintly...)

C: 咦！
E: Huh!

C: 哼，有点意思。不过任何现象背后都有原因，眼下这个，未免有些太显而易见了。
E: Hmph. Interesting. But every phenomenon has a cause. This one feels a bit too obvious.

C: 对…可以……
E: End... here...

C: 你们为什么来这里？
E: Why are you here?

C: 学会新技能不露一手，如锦衣夜行。是时候让「闭嘴」瞧瞧你领悟的技术了。
E: To master a new skill and keep it hidden is like wearing fine robes in the dark. It's time for "Shush" to see what you've learned.

C: 你邀请真理医生品尝调饮……
E: You invite Dr. Ratio for a drink...

C: 让星核猎手在百忙中抽空来应约喝杯调饮，的确不大现实。
E: Can't expect a Stellaron Hunter to drop everything for drinks.

C: 你给自己充了些话费，但拨通电话后仍只听到熟悉的忙音。
E: You top up your own credit, but still hear the familiar busy tone after dialing.

C: 翡翠，你怎么来了？
E: Jade, what are you doing here?

C: 我以为要去庇尔波因特。
E: I thought we were going to Pier Point.

C: 虽然只是道开胃菜，但以第一次参与测试的结果来说，确实堪称优秀。
E: Although it was just a warm-up, your results were truly excellent for a first-time participant.

C: 那你可能要失望了，遗迹表层的宝贝已经没剩多少了。
E: Then you are gonna be disappointed. There's hardly any relics left anymore on the surface of the ruins.

C: 熟能生巧，一项工作干久了自然就有更多心得。
E: Practice makes perfect. You'll get the hang of it after putting in lots of hours.

C: 我们能找到什么古代遗物？
E: What ancient relics could we find there?

C: 这次差不多把遗迹翻了个底朝天，赚了这么多，估计其他寻宝者的后槽牙都要咬碎了！
E: This time we really looted every last scrap from that ruin, and we made a nice score. Those other relic hunters are gonna be steaming mad!

C: 卖什么卖，留着吧，以后洗完头还能用。
E: Sell it? No way. Let's keep it for the next time we wash our hair.

C: 您别急，此「升天」非彼「升天」，这乃是「飞升登天」的意思，不是什么嗝屁升天。
E: Listen, this isn't some half-baked "cure-all quackery." All it does is help you "ascend to the heavens," which is not that far-fetched, plotwise.

C: 「接着是『生灭灵芝』，它有无相生，将使冰与火的矛盾得以长久共存。」
E: "Next, came the Life-Death Polypore: Its quantum impermanence stabilizes the paradox inherent in the lotus."

C: 哎呀，这样一来，这折子戏就算是完成了……
E: Ah, if we put it like that, then this act will be complete...

C: 鳞渊境的怨气散去了一些…想来你已完成了试炼。无名客果然名不虚传……
E: The grievances hanging over Scalegorge Waterscape have cleared a little... I think you have indeed completed the trial. You really do live up to the moniker of the Nameless...

C: 道之为物，其变有三。既然通过了前两项试炼，那我就将最后、也是最重要的考验托付给你——先别急着说我不讲信用……
E: The truth always comes in threes. You may have passed the first two trials, but now comes the final and most important test — and please don't tell me that I'm not trusting...

C: 丹心如恒，好名字！
E: Dan Heng, the Everlasting — a great name!

C: 嗐…净顾着说评书了，差点忘了这事。这个事情在下早有准备，您就瞧好儿吧！
E: Hmm... I was so busy with all this storytelling that I almost forgot. I've made preparations for this, just you wait and see!

C: 注入催长剂，龙尊随即存想默念，运起云吟奇术。
E: After injecting the growth booster, the high elder sat in meditation as he performed his cloudhymn.

C: 竟然立刻长成了一艘星槎…看来催长实验失败了。我总不能握着一艘星槎和人打架。
E: It grew straight into a starskiff... Our growth-boosting experiment failed. No one can wield a starskiff in combat.

C: 唷，合着观众老爷今天不想当观众了。
E: Alas, looks like our audience has some other ideas today.

C: 不过他们到底是新人，经验不足，思维陷入误区倒也正常。你要是录制他们的相声，在下倒是有个法子能将他俩劝回来。
E: But they're new and inexperienced, so it's natural for them to have misunderstandings about the industry. If you want to record their crosstalk shows, I have a way to persuade them.

C: 现在，把那个假的砸掉，真的别碰啊！
E: Now, smash the fake one. And don't touch the genuine one!

C: 太感谢你了，刚才真是多亏有你啊。
E: Oh, I just can't thank you enough.

C: 答应我，不要做无趣的人，好吗？
E: Let's all agree to keep things peaceful and enjoyable.

C: 怎么不和我一起出发？
E: Hang on, did you just swap me out of the team?

C: 您说得不错——我们公司看中了雅利洛-Ⅵ的潜力，特地将这座旧武器试验场给翻新了。
E: Mm-hmm — the Corporation saw the potential in Jarilo-VI and decided to renovate this old weapon testing ground.

C: 我也热血沸腾了！
E: LET'S GOOOO!!!

C: 好事，好事！年轻人血气方刚，要的就是这种势头！
E: Haha, splendid! You young ones are all vim and vigor — that's just what I like to see!

C: 老夫我也摸不着头脑。我只不过是受人委托，至于话中禅机，想必是要二位自己领悟了。
E: I'm just as puzzled. But alas, I'm merely a messenger. The subtleties within the words, I imagine, are for you two to decipher.

C: 怎么会这样！竟然连输了三次……
E: WHAT!? How could we lose three times in a row to these twerps...

C: 无论如何，托帕总监说了，我必须督促「托帕后援团」成员把这只以太灵还给空间站「黑塔」才行。
E: In any case, Director Topaz asked me to make sure Topaz's Support Squad returns this Aether Spirit to Herta Space Station.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得呢？我们该怎么办才好？
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}? What should we do?

C: 看来我们想到一块去了。
E: Looks like we're on the same page.

C: 就交给你啦，{NICKNAME}——炸他们个出其不意吧！
E: It's all up to you now, {NICKNAME}! Catch 'em by surprise!

C: 所以，乔瓦尼先生，你可以告诉我们问题的答案吗？
E: Are you finally going to tell us?

C: 做得好！接下来请随我继续前进——
E: Task completion: Satisfactory. Maintain forward progression.

C: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，三月七小姐！你们来了！
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, Miss March! You made it!

C: 下一场比赛即将开始——
E: The next contest is about to begin.

C: 刚才那场对决可真是精彩！
E: Our bout just now was something else!

C: 哼…哼哼！哼！
E: Oink... Oink, oink!

C: 不过，正如托帕小姐所说，我确实是为了这只以太灵来的。
E: ...As Miss Topaz said, I'm here to talk about this Aether Spirit with you.

C: …怎么啦，不可以嘛。
E: ...Yeah. So what?

C: 那…艾丝妲小姐，这就是我们的决定。
E: Well... Miss Asta, we've made our decision.

C: 没完了是吧，怎么又拐到我这来了！不过，我承认你说的很有道理。
E: Why are you looking at me? Want a medal or something...? It does kinda sound like a good idea...

C: 确实像是岁阳所为…岁阳本就擅长操弄感官，文献中也常有它们幻化身影，装神弄鬼的记载。
E: It looks like the work of a heliobus... The heliobi are masters of manipulating the senses. There are stories of heliobi changing their shape and appearance to disguise themselves as someone else.

C: 你说得对。忍一时风平浪静…退一步越想越气…
E: Okay, okay... I just wish I could teach them a lesson!

C: 冤有头，债有主，
E: It wasn't your fight to begin with.

C: 事情还没完全办妥。按照寒鸦大人的吩咐，咱们一旦收服了岁阳，就要立刻赶回绥园，把它锁进「束形却邪阵」的镇妖塔里。
E: We're not done yet... Madam Hanya said that once we've subdued a heliobus, we should return to Fyxestroll Garden and lock them inside one of the Evil Binding Matrix's suppression towers.

C: 你们关系真好。
E: You two seem to have a lot of history.

C: 哼，若不是为了再战一场的事就别来烦我！
E: Tsk, don't bother me again until you're ready to fight!

C: 抓鬼是个晚上出洞的活计，睡过一整个白天岂不是很合理。
E: Catching ghosts is a night job — it only makes sense to sleep during the day.

C: 你们将阿灼束缚在了阵法中…我还听见了其他岁阳在低鸣、震颤…渴望离开此处。
E: So, you imprisoned Luxie in the matrix... and I heard the cries of other heliobi longing to break free.

C: 这样一来，以我在太卜司混的这些年资，能拿到一笔不小的赔偿呢…呼呼。
E: Then, with all the years I've spent in the Divination Commission, I'll be able to get a great severance package...

C: 谢谢寒鸦大人的赞美。
E: Thanks, Madam Hanya...

C: 不，其中存在第二种选择。各位，永远都会有选择的。
E: No, there's a second choice. There will always be another choice.

C: 都听你的，青雀。
E: It's all yours, Qingque.

C: 离开沙盘
E: Exit Sandpit

C: 宇宙嘛，就像牌桌上的琼玉牌一样。洗牌完毕时，胜负大势往往早已注定。
E: The universe is like jade tiles on a game table. When the tiles are shuffled, the outcome is already predetermined.

C: 就是现在！
E: Now!

C: 这…会是尾巴闹出来的事吗？
E: Is this... something Tail would do?

C: 什么新式机巧鸟！
E: Is that a new cycrane model!?

C: 按照十王司对岁阳习性的理解，它们多半会往人居稠密的地带寻找宿主。所到之处一定会有许多不能解释的「灵异事件」。
E: According to the Ten-Lords Commission's understanding of heliobi behavior, they tend to roam densely populated areas in search of hosts... and wherever they go, there are bound to be reports of "supernatural phenomena."

C: …你还需要更多的历练。
E: ...You still have a lot to learn.

C: 你不是还有捉鬼小队的那群朋友吗？
E: What about your ghost-hunting buddies?

C: 这尾巴也太吓人了吧！像个火把一样发亮，好恶心啊。
E: This tail is just so creepy! It glows like some sort of torch, gross!

C: 小鬼头！你太放肆了！
E: You wretch! How dare you be so impudent!

C: 这家伙在岁阳之中也是杂兵。
E: This heliobus is just a pawn in their ranks.

C: 嗯，谢谢你。我一会就赶过来……
E: Mmm, thanks. I'll be over real soon...

C: 青雀小姐，你都记得啊？
E: Miss Qingque, you remember everything?

C: 但岁阳不会无端给人类灌入不存在的念头。青雀小姐你真的没有这样的想法吗？
E: But a heliobus cannot implant an idea in a human that does not already exist. Have you really never thought about this before, Miss Qingque?

C: 抛弃无效沟通，直入主题，真不错。藿藿，好好学着点。
E: Abandoning useless communication and getting straight to the point, alright. Huohuo, you could learn a thing or two.

C: {NICKNAME}， 你变了。曾经那么无私快乐的你，居然变得如此斤斤计较。你让我感到…很陌生。
E: {NICKNAME}, you've changed. You used to be so joyful and selfless, now you're picky and fickle. I feel like I... don't know you anymore.

C: 呃…还、还有更糟的消息在后头呢！星际和平公司已经抢先宣布了新作品！
E: Uhm... There's actually worse news to come! The IPC have already gotten ahead of us to announce the new product!

C: （什么垃圾。）
E: (What trash.)

C: 你们在调查凶宅的时候，能不能帮我找到<color=#dbc291ff>「房产证」</color>。没有它，我可卖不了房……
E: While you are investigating the haunted house, could you help me find the <color=#dbc291ff>deed</color>? I won't be able to sell it without...

C: 总之，我们先去找到房产证，顺便调查岁阳真相——两件事情一次解决，最后发布「探访凶宅」的帖子，肯定能涨不少粉丝数！
E: Either way, we need to find the deed and investigate the truth behind this heliobus while we're at it. Two birds, one stone. Then, we'll put up a "haunted house investigation" post and rake in the followers!

C: 我们还找到了雷诺留下的信息，他们记录下自己遭遇的各类「灵异事件」，最后还是因为闹鬼被迫变卖房产，离开了这里。
E: We also found messages left behind by Renault. His family recorded multiple "supernatural incidents" they encountered. In the end, these "hauntings" forced them to sell the place and move out of here.

C: …你还有什么话想跟我说吗？
E: ...Anything else you'd like to say to me?

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 我是说，她妹妹不在人世这件事，看她最后那个样子，感觉是知道的。
E: I mean, knows that her sister's already passed away? Seeing her final expression, it felt like she knew.

C: 这「天上的恸哭声」…有可能是那时四散逃走的碎片，那…尾巴也许就在其中！
E: "Mournful Cries in the Sky"... It's possible these originate from all the fleeing fragments from back then. Then... Tail might be among them!

C: 我…我被关在黑暗里的时候，和同族有过交流。从它们的震动里，我看到过它们操纵过的人类的样子、经历。
E: When... when I was locked in a dark space, I interacted with my kind. From their actions, I've seen the way and experiences they had when manipulating humans.

C: 嗯，我也挺想让它去冒险的。毕竟都是「开拓」之路上的同伴嘛。
E: Yes, I want to let it go on an adventure, too. We're all companions trying to "Trailblaze" our own paths, right?

C: 我也蹭蹭！
E: Me too!

C: 我们俩这样一来一回有问有答，视频就没那么枯燥！
E: We'll go back and forth like this between you and me asking and answering questions, so the vlog doesn't seem so stale!

C: 你们有发现什么吗？
E: You guys find anything yet?

C: 你认真聆听着桂乃芬的分析，不远处一道视线停留在你身上，你顿时察觉到了不对。
E: You listen carefully to Guinaifen's analysis when you feel sight lines locking on to you from not too far away. Instantly, you realize something is wrong.

C: 好了，你没事就赶紧走吧，再不走我就叫人了。什么年纪，回去好好上课，别整烂活！
E: Alright, if there's nothing else, you can get outta here. And you'd better, otherwise I'll have to call someone. At your age, you should just be studying hard instead of messing around!

C: 此前有科员和它们接触过，闻到了「豆沙」香味的科员在回到休眠舱后变得郁郁寡欢，闻到了「芝士」香味的科员则极为亢奋。
E: Some researchers came into contact with them before. Those who smelled red bean felt depressed when they got back to their cryosleep pods. Meanwhile, those who could smell cheese grew extremely excited.

C: 藤萝饼将同伴带到你面前。
E: Wisteria Cake brings over a companion to you.

C: 真的发生过吗？
E: Did it really happen?

C: 游辞沉默不语。
E: Youci remains silent.

C: 等到星际和平公司介入调停，并将雅利洛-VI纳入自己的贸易体系时，有很多有识之士悔不当初。但此时又能怎么办呢？
E: Once IPC intervened with mediation and brought Jarilo-VI into its trading network, many of those in-the-know came to regret it. But what could be done now?

C: 真没意思！嘿嘿，听我出题——「你最害怕的对象是？」
E: That's no fun at all! Hee-hee, alright, I'll ask you a question... Who are you most afraid of?

C: 汪！这个太耍赖了，不能算数哇！
E: Woof! That's cheating! It doesn't count!

C: 至少，我们无须为任何事担忧害怕。
E: But at least we don't have to worry or fear anything.

C: （…那家伙能听到我说话吗？）
E: (...Can he hear me?)

C: ——有兴趣就跟上来吧！我们该回家了。
E: ...Follow up if you're interested! It's time to go home.

C: 我还需要参与戏剧，扮演其中的角色吗？
E: Do I still need to participate in plays and act out roles?

C: 「黄金的时刻」不行吗？
E: How about in the Golden Hour?

C: （能代表匹诺康尼观众的装饰物…我得仔细去挑选下。）
E: (A decoration that represents Penacony... I'll have to pick one carefully.)

C: 是手抖放错材料了吗？按我对您技术的了解，不应该会出这么明显的纰漏呀。
E: Did you accidentally use the wrong ingredients? I didn't expect you to make such an obvious mistake.

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: （表现出很讨厌我的样子，聊起天来又说个没完…它的心思还真复杂。）
E: (It acts like it hates me, but it doesn't stop chatting with me... It's really complicated.)

C: 我很满足，嘿嘿。感谢您的馈赠！
E: I'm feeling so satisfied, hehe. Thank you for the treat!

C: 对，它曾经是个失意的戏剧演员，在角色里陷得很深，除了念叨那些听不懂的台词外，就没有多少正常想法。
E: Yeah, they used to be a disillusioned actor, so deep in their role that they don't have any normal thoughts other than reciting lines that nobody can understand.

C: 继续。
E: Go on.

C: 就到这吧。你也累了，好好休息。这条路还很长，也会比你预想的更加艰难。
E: That's all for now. You must be tired too. Get some rest. The road ahead is long, and it'll be tougher than you expect.

C: 我…渴望真正的家人。
E: I... long for a real family.

C: 对。它们都是单纯的孩子，没什么复杂的心思。和它们呆在一块，让我感到放松，幸福。
E: Yeah. They're simple and innocent kids. Being with them brings me peace and happiness.

C: 所以我也见不得那些将它们视作工具，肆意使唤的人。可是，这种人在梦境里实在太多了，自私虚伪，靠着欺负弱者来维持可怜的自尊心。
E: That's why I can't stand those who treat them as tools and boss them around. Unfortunately, there are too many selfish and hypocritical people in the Dreamscape, bullying the weak to boost their own pathetic egos.

C: 别在意，荷官先生的话都是骗人的哇！不像我，永远都只会对你友好地摇尾巴哇！
E: Everything Mr. Dealer says is a lie, so don't mind him! He's not like me. I'll always wag my tail in a friendly way to you! That's the only thing I can do!

C: 嗯嗯
E: Got it

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪汪
E: Woof  Woof  WoofWoof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 更<rhythm>不<rhythm>要<rhythm>害怕
E: And <rhythm>no <rhythm>need <rhythm>to tremble

C: 现在是「一、二、三…广告牌！」的进阶试炼。
E: You're doing the "One, Two, Three... Billboards!" Advanced Trial right now.

C: 或许，你已经见识过我身后这神奇的迷宫——我敢打包票，没人能在里面找到出口。
E: You might have noticed the incredible maze behind me. No one will ever find their way out of it.

C: 看到钱眼睛比激光炮还直，看到危险跑得比扑满还快，还得是英雄您威武豪迈。
E: Their eyes lit up like lasers when they heard about money, and they ran faster than a Trotter when they heard about danger. Now I'm counting on you, hero.

C: 时间不等人，上面的雇主们开始催进度了。看到我身后那扇门了吗？准备好了就出发吧。
E: Clock's ticking, and the higher-ups want some progress. See that door behind me? Set off whenever you're ready.

C: 我是影视乐园的工作人员，负责在封闭期间领你们这些游客来体验项目。
E: I'm a staff member of Clock Studios Theme Park, and I'll be your guide through the program while the park is closed.

C: 你要和我一起吗？
E: Are you coming along?

C: 我已经准备好了哦，{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm ready, {NICKNAME}.

C: 那是什么？
E: What's that?

C: 早期开发版的测试结果挺好的，在安保科的评估中，他们甚至觉得该程序有交付给「公司」那边商业化的潜力。
E: Early prototype test results were encouraging. The Security Department even expected that this program had the potential to be submitted to the IPC for business applications.

C: 不，与托帕小姐无关，公司没必要做这种事。恐怕这位幕后黑手准备了很多个版本的报道，只是在等待合适的契机吧……
E: No, it's unrelated to Miss Topaz. The IPC has no reason to do this. The person behind this has likely prepared multiple versions of the report and was just waiting for the right opportunity...

C: 我这就去讨个说法。
E: I'm going to confront him about this.

C: 接下来怎么办？
E: What should we do next?

C: 托帕小姐提议，她可以帮你解决铄金带来的麻烦。
E: Miss Topaz offers her assistance to help you handle the trouble caused by Shuojin.

C: 女士们先生们、父老们乡亲们，不管咱们罗浮有没有昼夜的概念，总之先祝大家早上好中午好晚上好！我是你们最爱的主持人——叽米！
E: Ladies, gentlemen, elders, and community members! Whether the Luofu has a day-night cycle — good morning, good afternoon, and good evening! I'm your favorite host, Owlbert!

C: 好的，请品尝这杯「柴米油盐」。它有浓稠的柴油质感，同时具备稻米的清香和海盐的清爽，是列车上享誉数个琥珀纪的饮品。
E: Right away. Here's a Rustic Infusion for you. The fragrant aroma of rice, the refreshing taste of sea salt, and a rich consistency matching that of oil — this has been a classic drink on board the Express for several Amber Eras now.

C: 不久…或很久以前
E: Some... or maybe a long time ago

C: 慢点喝，小心呛到。
E: Take your time drinking it — be careful not to choke.

C: 嘿～竟敢讽刺本姑娘！
E: Hey~ Tease me again, I dare you!

C: 别开玩笑了帕！帕姆对生活品质要求很高的！
E: Stop joking around! Pom-Pom has high standards for quality of life!

C: 封印？
E: Seal?

C: 按理说这应该是雅努斯的权能，不过命运三泰坦亲如一家，能力互通倒也算合理。
E: This should actually be the authority of Janus, but seeing how close the Three Titans of Fate were, I guess it does make sense for them to share their powers.

C: 不是你{F#妈}{M#爸}，别碰瓷！
E: Hey, I'm not your {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!

C: 看来，当务之急是找个专业人士问清楚状况，顺便救你出来。
E: Clearly, you need to find an expert on this situation and get you free.

C: 就叫这个啦！
E: Yep, that's the name!

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 总之，先别想这些了…
E: Anyway, let's not think about all that for now...

C: 你最近似乎有心事？
E: Got something on your mind?

C: 大地兽泡久了会变泥巴兽。
E: A dromas that soaks too long will turn into a mud beast.

C: 走吧，我陪你一起。
E: Let's go, I'll come with you.

C: 它眼神不太好吧。
E: Its eyesight must be pretty bad.

C: 安安心心地坐在观众席，看那群小家伙的精彩表现就好。
E: Just sit back in the stands, and enjoy the little ones putting on a great show.

C: …所以你们就来找我了？
E: ...So that's why you came to me?

C: 此即零和——对弈结束后，什么都不会增多，什么也不会减少。
E: This is zero-sum — After the countering ends, nothing increases, nor decreases.

C: 而今，你已站在更重的那一端，我们需往另一端添上砝码。
E: Now that you stand on the heavier end, we need to add weights to the other side.

C: 好啦，我没骗你。宝物就在这儿，就是这片小湖，人家的小世界。
E: Alright, alright. I wasn't kidding, though. The treasure is right here. This little lake. My own little world.

C: 呵呵。我只是记性不太好，视力也有点差，但要做的事从来不会弄错。
E: Heh... Well, my memory's not the best, and my eyesight's a little fuzzy, but I never falter when it comes to doing the important stuff!

C: 伙伴越来越多了。
E: The team just keeps getting bigger.

C: 赚更多钱？
E: Make more money?

C: 取名字…这个难题曾多次让你焦头烂额。你重新搜刮起脑海中的知识储备，试图从其中挑选出最符合心意的答案。
E: Ah, naming... a task that has driven you to the brink many times before. Once again, you search through your mental archives, hoping to find the perfect name that captures your vision.

C: 好。这就开火。
E: Perfect. Let's start the fire.

C: 最后由{NICKNAME}统一通过，提议者来担任活动负责人。主题定期轮换，不会很辛苦的。
E: {NICKNAME} will have final say. Whoever suggests the chosen theme will take the lead for that event. We'll rotate themes regularly, so it won't be too much work.

C: 光说也没意思，先看看吧。但不准讨价还价！
E: Enough talk, see for yourself. But no haggling, got it?

C: 阿蝶，你尝尝就知道啦。
E: You'll know the moment you taste it, Cas.

C: 这就是我专门为阿蝶特制的蜂蜜派！
E: So I made this honey pie just for you, Cas!

C: 继续加油！朝着四星级餐馆的目标前进迷！
E: Keep it up and shoot for that 4-star rating next!

C: 村里的小酒馆，有时候会安排吟游诗人讲述沿海百邦的奇妙见闻。或许，我们也可以采用类似的方法。
E: The tavern in the village sometimes hosts bards who share tales from the Seaside States. Maybe we could try something like that too?

C: 就这么定——我和你，各自掌厨三天，看谁的成绩更好。
E: It's settled then. You and me, three days each in the kitchen. We'll see who's a better chef.

C: 你那边不也一样？
E: Like you're not doing the same thing?

C: 万敌的赢面更大。
E: Mydei's got the upper hand.

C: （向遐蝶使眼色）
E: (Gives Castorice a pointed look)

C: 以及，妖精的尾巴……
E: And the last ingredient... a Fairy's Tail...

C: 当然啦，谁能拒绝口袋里的钱越变越多呢。灰子，我这次干得还不错吧？
E: Of course! Who doesn't love saving money? Gray Mystery, didn't I do an amazing job this time?

C: 迷！我们正在把神奇果实，装进大盆里！
E: Mem! We're gathering these wondrous fruits and piling them into big tubs!

C: 敬最盛大的宴会。
E: To the greatest feast.

C: 希望两位主厨注意，竞赛不要再波及到无辜的旁人了……
E: I hope both chefs will be more mindful next time. Try not to drag innocent bystanders into your little competitions...

C: 还有…咳，刻意提及凯撒的身高乃是僭越，在此地我就不多追究了。
E: Oh, and... ahem. Openly commenting on the Imperator's height is a breach of etiquette. I'll let it slide this time.

C: （再给瓦尔特先生发一次消息吧。）
E: (I'd better send another message to Mr. Yang, then.)

E: Under development. Stay tuned!

C: 征战的铁蹄踏遍荒野，\n却终归要沾上<color=#9e5738>故乡的血</color>。
E: The torrent of conquest crosses the barrens,\nYet with <color=#9e5738>homeland's blood</color>, it is destined to be stained.

C: 男人沉默不语，\n只是瞪视天际，找寻迢遥的过去。
E: The man goes silent and still,\nHis gaze burning into the horizon, looking for a distant past.

C: 那流离的岁月，\n同一个问题，被千百人问起。\n而他从不否认——
E: In his days of wandering, this same question,\nWas asked by thousands upon thousands,\nAnd he never denied —

C: 「大祭司大人，请再一次…带领我们启翅远行。」
E: "High priest, please guide us once again as we spread our wings on this long journey."

C: 「若死亡不可避免……」\n少女说，\n「我希望它，更美一些。」
E: "For if death cannot be avoided..."\nSo says the girl,\n"I wish it could contain beauty more plentiful."

C:
但是啊——
彼时，她尚且不知。

死亡并非终结，
只是蝴蝶落在枯花的枝头，
<color=#9e5738>无足轻重</color>。
E:
But alas—
At that time, she knows not,

That death is not the end.
It is only a butterfly landing on a withered branch.
<color=#9e5738>Utterly meaningless. Profoundly trite</color>.

C: 谎言推倒了织坊，\n撕碎了老妇的美名，\n令女孩背负罪行。
E: The lies overthrow the shop,\nAnd tear apart the good woman's good name,\nLeaving the girl with guilt and grief.

C: 「桀桀！名为巴特鲁斯的神偷，」\n「会顺走你辛劳所得！」
E: "Hehe! I, Bartholos, master thief,\nShall take all you've labored to gain!"

C: <color=#9e5738>「祂」</color>将目光洒入记忆的棺椁，\n这是你与伙伴的初次相逢。
E: <color=#9e5738>THEY</color> cast THEIR gaze into the coffin of memory.\nThis is the moment you first meet your companion.

C: 朋友，\n你听说过粉霞天女吗？
E: My friend,\nHave you heard of the Rosy Celestial Maiden?

C: 关于棋局的落幕，\n学者们议论纷纭，\n却总是以一声叹息作结。
E: As for the end of that chess game,\nThe scholars debate endlessly,\nBut such discussions always end with a sigh.

C:
怪人的哑声微笑，
仿佛回荡耳边——
笑生来幽居的命运，
亦笑与她棋艺匹敌的是敌邦王女。
E:
The stranger's hoarse chuckle
Still echoed in her ear...
Laughing at the eternal fate of imprisonment,
And at how the one facing her was the princess of the enemy.

C:
人们知晓，
海洋的半神乃是一名贵爵。
她有着<color=#9e5738>绝伦的剑艺</color>，
还有着<color=#9e5738>传世的琴谣</color>。
E:
The people knew,
The demigod of the seas was still a noble captain.
She possessed <color=#9e5738>peerless swordsmanship</color>,
And <color=#9e5738>a song that is passed down through the ages</color>.

C: 只因女王深爱着她的子民，\n淹没了所有烦恼，\n只留欢宴与旋舞。
E: For the queen loved her people deeply,\nThus drowning out all sorrows\nAnd leaving only feasts and twirls.

C: 她浅笑着，将杯沿倾向金织的嘴角。\n「纵然身负缺憾，也请你记得……」\n「不要拒绝那浸满幻梦的一口。」
E: She smiled, then tilted the cup towards the Goldweaver's lips.\n"Even if one is burdened with imperfections, I beg you to remember..."\n"Not to refuse that sip filled with fantasy and dreams."

C: 时隔多年重返故里，\n海洋的公主持剑孤立，\n踱过同伴的血色氤氲。
E: She returned home after many years.\nThe princess of the ocean stood alone with her sword drawn,\nStepping over the blooming blood of her peers.

C: 海列屈拉犹疑着举起琴剑，\n那琴弦早已锈蚀崩裂。
E: Helektra raised her violin sword in doubt\nAs the strings had long ago rusted and snapped.

C: 「或许有一天，我会重登天空！」\n\n「又或许，那不该是你的归宿。」
E: "Maybe I will return to the sky one day!"\n\n"Or maybe that is not to be your fate."

C: 许久以后，\n满身伤痕的孩子立于焦土，\n将报废的农具掩埋，沉默无言。
E: Many days later, the wounded child stood upon the scorched earth,\nAnd silently he buried the ruined tool.

C: 他沉默不语，\n而后如往常那般，\n只是一笑。
E: He remained silent,\nThen, as he was wont to do,\nHe simply smiled.

C:
或许命运猜不到他的匡计，
但能践踏他的深谋——

最终，那些挑战皆为徒劳，
但他至今仍未放弃。
E:
Perhaps fate could not guess his goals,
But it could trample over his plans overnight —

At the end, all his challenges flicker out,
But he persists still, in endless plight.

C: 「我…可以吗？」\n「我们从重渊避难来，我想送妹妹一双鞋子。」
E: "Do I... fit the bill?"\n"My sister and I are refugees from the Abyss. I want to get a pair of shoes for her."

C: 又过了很长一段时间……
E: A long time passed...

C: 少女握紧手中的短刃。「我曾目睹人心因荒谬的信仰而坠入恶渊。终有一日，我会回到那座穹顶关塞，杀死艾格勒，令人类获得自由。」
E: The girl tightened her grip on the short blade. "I have witnessed hearts fall into the abyss of evil because of absurd beliefs. One day, I will return to the Fortress of Dome, kill Aquila, and set humanity free."

C: 「怎么了，小飞儿？」缇宝出声问询。赛飞儿看上去十分遗憾，「本来想着由我这个采购员去比掉对面的一员大将，所以偷偷把赛题换成了自己擅长的『鱼』，想不到这「煎鳍爵」真如传说中那样见不得鱼类受罪……」
E: "What's wrong, Little Ciphy?" Tribbie asked. Cipher looked regretful. "I was planning to take out one of their heavy hitters by switching the theme to something I'm good at...'fish.' But it turns out this 'Dux Grill-at-us' really can't bear to see fish suffer, just like the rumors say..."

E: A true performer needs more than just talent, but also an unyielding spirit. I hope that you keep going and discover new ways to shine in your future works. This will lay a solid foundation for your artistic career. May your future be resplendent, and I pray you'll find your place on the big screens.

C:
<align="center">抱歉，伙伴，我没大看懂你说的。</align>
<align="center">不过请教了村长后，我还是修理了一番，还说得过去吧？</align>
<align="center">但邮差听了，好像突然领悟了什么！</align>
<align="center">它嘟囔着「即时通讯」「移动支付」「万物互联」就走了。</align>
<align="center">真奇怪迷。</align>
E:
<align="center">Sorry, partner, I didn't really get everything you said.</align>
<align="center">But after asking the chief, I gave the repairs a try. It wasn't too bad, I guess?</align>
<align="center">The mailman seemed oddly inspired by it though!</align>
<align="center">It mumbled something about "instant messaging," "mobile payments," and "the internet connects everything," before leaving.</align>
<align="center">So strange, mem.</align>

C: 此剑——当斩，泰坦授首！

C:
原隶属「星际和平公司」技术开发部的小组长，但因爆破实验被开除，后加入隐夜鸫家系。
<s>疯狂的发明家，其代表性发明为破坏性梦境开拓装备「冯恩三世」，因过大的安全隐患而被废除使用。</s>
<color=#dbc291ff>骄傲的天才发明家，格拉克斯教授的狂热粉丝。他的尖端作品或许不够实用，但绝对足够花哨夺目。
于筑梦相关的研发实验中失踪，下落不明。</color>
E:
Originally a team leader in the Technical Development Department of the Interastral Peace Corporation, he was fired due to a demolitions experiment. Later, he joined the Nightingale Family.
<s>This mad inventor is known for his eccentric inventions, with his most notable being the destructive Dreamscape exploration equipment "Vaughn III," which was discontinued due to significant safety hazards.</s>
<color=#dbc291ff>A proud and brilliant inventor, a fervent fan of Professor Glaux. His cutting-edge creations may not be the most practical, but they are definitely flashy enough.
He went missing during dreamweaving-related research and development experiments, and his whereabouts remain unknown.</color>

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>物理属性</color>造成弱点击破时，会立即造成<color=#f29e38ff>物理属性击破伤害</color>，并施加<color=#f29e38ff>裂伤</color>状态。<color=#f29e38ff>裂伤</color>会在敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>回合开始时</color>，基于<color=#f29e38ff>目标生命上限的一定比例</color>，造成物理属性持续伤害。
E: Using <color=#f29e38ff>Physical</color> attacks to trigger Weakness Break will immediately deal <color=#f29e38ff>Physical Break DMG</color> and apply the <color=#f29e38ff>Bleed</color> effect. <color=#f29e38ff>Bleed</color> will cause enemies to take Physical DoT <color=#f29e38ff>at the start of the target's turn</color> based on <color=#f29e38ff>a proportion of the target's Max HP</color>.

C: 贝洛伯格筑城者制造的古代机器，服从于<color=#f29e38ff>存护</color>的意志。在特定战斗中，可以通过我方角色行动为其充能，激活技能。
E: An ancient machine made by the Architects of Belobog that obeys the will of <color=#f29e38ff>Preservation</color>. In certain combat scenarios, you and your allies can Charge the machine to activate its ability.

C: 击碎特殊的<color=#f29e38ff>可破坏物</color>、使用特定<color=#f29e38ff>消耗品</color>可以恢复<color=#f29e38ff>秘技点</color>。提升均衡等级可以提高<color=#f29e38ff>秘技点上限</color>，最多可以提高至5个。
E: Destroy <color=#f29e38ff>destructible objects</color> and use special <color=#f29e38ff>Consumables</color> to recover <color=#f29e38ff>Technique Points</color>. Increasing your Equilibrium Level will increase the number of <color=#f29e38ff>Technique Points</color> available to you, up to a maximum of 5.

C: 在飞行的过程中，可以遥控机巧鸟进行上升或者下降。
E: While in control of a cycrane, you have the option to either ascend or descend as desired.

C: 如果无法找到场景里的剩余标识，可以通过<color=#f29e38ff>相机</color>开启侦测功能，获得剩余标识的<color=#f29e38ff>位置信息</color>。
E: If you are unable to find the remaining markings in the area, use the <color=#f29e38ff>Camera's</color> detection system to obtain the remaining markings' <color=#f29e38ff>location information</color>.

C: 利用折纸小鸟修造的神奇火箭，哈努兄弟可以在不同的火箭两端快速移动，前往无法抵达的地方。
E: Using the fantastic rockets built by the Origami Bird, Hanu can quickly shift between the ends of different rockets to reach places otherwise inaccessible.

C: 屏幕右上方是石头老板的体力，通过开火反弹金币，击败可恶的石头老板吧！
E: Boss Stone's stamina is displayed in the upper right of the screen. Defeat him by firing at his gold coins to deflect them back!

C: 在该任务过程中，需要达成更多的目标条件以完成拍摄任务。
E: During this mission, more conditions need to be met to complete the photoshoot.

C: 探索翁法罗斯，与场景中的特殊物件交互，倾听居民们的故事…初次与世界的记忆相遇时，可以获取散落的<color=#f29e38ff>「记忆残晶」</color>。
E: Explore Amphoreus, interact with special objects in the map, and listen to the peoples' stories... When you encounter the world's memories for the first time, you can collect the scattered <color=#f29e38ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「时象仪」</color>是由欧洛尼斯祭司制作的时序祭器，有多种大小样式。<color=#f29e38ff>打碎</color>「时象仪」会让其<color=#f29e38ff>周围的时间静止。</color>
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Chrono Vessel</color> is a temporal ritual tool crafted by Oronyx's priests, with various sizes and styles. <color=#f29e38ff>Breaking</color> the Chrono Vessel will <color=#f29e38ff>pause time in the area around it.</color>

C: 每次<color=#f29e38ff>重塑凝晶</color>，光芒区域的<color=#f29e38ff>边界都会扩大</color>，借助这一性质来完成试炼吧。
E: Every time you <color=#f29e38ff>reforge a Crystal</color>, the <color=#f29e38ff>boundaries of the lit area will expand</color>. Use this property to complete the trial.

C: 如果哈努兄弟没有任何弹药可用后，可以回到哈努火箭炮的位置，通过重新解锁「哈努飞弹」补充一发弹药。
E: If Brother Hanu has no more ammo left, you can return to Hanu Launcher's position to unlock the Hanu Rocket again and replenish 1 ammo.

C: 在「睡蕉的时刻」中，乱破施放<color=#f29e38ff>秘技</color>会进入涂鸦状态，可持续冲刺并惊醒撞到的睡蕉小猴。尽可能让乱破在涂鸦中撞到更多睡蕉小猴，惊醒的睡蕉小猴越多，与普利蒙蕉授的决战中获得的增益也会越大。
E: In the Moment of Slumbernana, using Rappa's <color=#f29e38ff>Technique</color> will cause her to go into the Graffiti state that continues to Sprint and wakes the Slumbernana Monkey with whom she collided. Try to collide with more Slumbernana Monkeys. The more Slumbernana Monkeys she wakes up, the greater the buff in the final battle with Profnana Primon.

C: 角色的<color=#f29e38ff>能量充满</color>后可以施放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>。终结技可在<color=#f29e38ff>任意时刻施放</color>，发动一次额外的行动。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimates</color> can be used when a character's <color=#f29e38ff>Energy is fully charged</color>. Ultimates can be <color=#f29e38ff>unleashed at any time</color> as an extra action.

C: 训练过程中可能触发<color=#f29e38ff>灵光一闪</color>，使得本次训练的属性提升<color=#f29e38ff>效果翻倍</color>。
E: During training, <color=#f29e38ff>Epiphany Flare</color> may be triggered, <color=#f29e38ff>doubling</color> the stats gain for that session.

C: 参加「梦境训练」，可向<color=#f29e38ff>更高难度的</color>的擂主<color=#f29e38ff>发起挑战</color>。\n每次<color=#f29e38ff>擂台赛晋级</color>后，可解锁新的「梦境训练」。
E: Participate in Dreamscape Training to <color=#f29e38ff>issue challenges</color> against <color=#f29e38ff>higher difficulty</color> ringmasters.\nEvery time <color=#f29e38ff>you pass a Faceoff Match</color>, you can unlock new Dreamscape Training.

C: 模拟宇宙中每当击败敌人选择祝福时，最多可以消耗宇宙碎片<color=#f29e38ff>重置</color>出现的祝福<color=#f29e38ff>1</color>次。

C: 「最终试炼」为多层连续战斗，设置<color=#f29e38ff>6轮次</color>倒计时，首领敌人拥有特殊战斗机制。
E: The Final Trial is a continuous battle with a countdown timer of <color=#f29e38ff>6 Cycles</color>. Boss enemies in the trial will have their special battle mechanics.

C: 通关差分宇宙时的构筑内容可以保存下来，以相同的构筑内容进行快速挑战。
E: When you clear Divergent Universe, the build content can be saved, allowing for quick challenges with the same build content.

Well, Stephen did a great job. <color=#f29e38ff>Customizing your dice</color> will make your exploration easier and much more fun. In the future, you can get even more dice faces and freer gameplay.

C:
永不落幕的圣城，仿若与黄金之茧的半神昔在永在。
视物已成双眼的负累，她指尖的金丝，将无数尘埃间的低语和鲜血凝成的歌传至耳边。
梦是千百种可能的连缀，藉由命运丝线编织的未来更是如此。
织者落枕入梦…
——于梦中，她窥见了更为灼眼的金色。
E:
The holy city that sees no night seems as eternal as the demigod of the Chrysalis of Gold.
Sight is now a burden to her eyes, as the golden threads around her fingertips pass her countless songs of murmurs and blood, the speech of humanity buried in the dust.
Dreams are fabrics of thousands of possibilities, and so is the future woven from the threads of destiny.
The weaver lays down her head and dreams...
...And in that dream, she spies a gold even more bright.

C: 由「建木」化生，拱卫其根系的灵瑞之兽，履迹所之，和泽滋生，枝杪郁敷。\n自毁于太古时代的战争后，「建木」终于在星核的修补下再度生长。彼时仙人们所造的珍禽奇兽纷至沓来，宛如旧梦重临。
E: An auspicious spiritual beast wrought into being by the Ambrosial Arbor and protects its roots. Its arrival brings along exuberant vegetation and promises good fortune.\nOnce destroyed during ancient wars, the Ambrosial Arbor is mended by the Stellaron and finally revives. Rare creatures and legendary beasts made by celestials of the past all return to this world, like an old dream coming alive again.

C: 有万能的杨叔在，好耶！我是不是说太响了？
E: Mr Yang's here! Yeah! Did I just say that out loud?

C: 阿格莱雅女士不愧为大家的引路人，经过她的点拨，就连日常穿搭的品味，也上升了好几个等级呢！
E: My daily style improved so much after Lady Aglaea gave me some pointers. As expected from everyone's guide and mentor!

C: 飞起来的时候，我也想体验一下！
E: I wanna feel what it's like to fly, too!

C: 这家伙，怎么看上去不大好惹……
E: Oh great, another walk in the park.

C: 师父请喝茶！
E: Master, have some tea!

C: 这次咱可没拖后腿！
E: You couldn't have done it without me!

C: 有丹恒在我自然放心，不过…我也不多说了。
E: Having you here gives me peace of mind, Dan Heng. Still... I'll stop nagging.

C: 你想入坑？这系列只在我家乡放映过，不知道宇宙里能不能弄到…我可以用「拟态」能力复现几集给你看看，但精细度可不敢保证。
E: Oh, there's a lot to say there. They only aired that series on my home world — I don't know if there's anywhere else in the universe that'd have it... I can use my mimicry power to show you a few episodes, but I can't guarantee the resolution.

C: 别把自己逼得太狠…这和我在不在没关系，游戏一键通关就没意思了。
E: Don't push yourself too hard... Doesn't matter if I'm there or not — it's no fun beating the game too fast.

C: 小姐，战斗的事情交给我就好。
E: You should leave the fighting to me, Lady Asta.

C: 列车巡游银河，我不一定都能帮上忙，但只要是花钱能解决的事，尽管和我说吧。
E: I can't solve every problem the Express Crew might have in their voyage across the galaxy, but if money's ever the solution, come find me.

C: 目标就如星辰一般，并非都是遥不可及哟。
E: Goals are like the stars — we'll reach them eventually.

C: 燃烧吧，骑士之志！
E: Burn! The will of a knight!

C: 战利品就交由您来处置吧。
E: I leave you in charge of the war spoils.

C: 人总会成长，一个心智健康的正常人会不断否定过去的自己。你应该庆幸，你不必和过去那个不成熟的自己打交道…不，不如说这才是常态。就算赢了自己，伤痕也不会消失。
E: Growth is inevitable. A sound mind is always moving forward, always evolving, always rejecting its past self. You should be glad you don't have to deal with the immature person you used to be... though, really, that's just life... Even if you conquer your past, the scars it leaves don't disappear.

C: 打小我就明白，发脾气那套小把戏对娜塔没用，她是医生，所以…总有办法「治」你。
E: I learned when I was a kid that temper tantrums won't get you anywhere with Nat... Let's just say she knew how to give you a taste of your own medicine.

C: 要不是头儿，还有没有我这号人都不好说。
E: I probably owe my life to the chief.

C: 快走……
E: Run...

C: 史瓦罗先生休眠的时候，身体里也会传出声音，就像…就像在打呼噜一样~
E: When Mr. Svarog's sleeping, his body makes a noise. It sounds like... snoring~

C: 这个不错…！下次科考的时候试试看吧。
E: Nice! I'll try it out in my next expedition.

C: …啊，没什么。我只是在想，自己还得修炼多久才能打赢奥列格师傅。在他彻底变成没用的老头之前，我一定要完成这个目标。
E: ...Oh, uh, never mind — I was just wondering how much training I've got left before I can finally beat Master Oleg. I need to hurry up — if he gets too old it won't be impressive anymore!

C: 师傅说过：不要太惦记自己失去了什么；多想想自己得到了些什么。每次看到这只义手，我总能回忆起这句话。
E: My master said: Try not to think too much about what you lost — think more about what you gained. Every time I look at my arm, I remember those words.

C: 不能这么狼狈……
E: Gotta keep fighting...

C: 账账，狠狠地砸！
E: Smash them up, Numby!

C: 您上哪儿去？也捎小女子一程~
E: Where are you going? Please take me with you~

C: 客套话就不必讲了，我随时都可…诶？就打个招呼，不用我帮忙吗？
E: No need to be polite, I can help any— Huh? You're just here to say hello? You don't need my help?

C: 小桂子，你有啥新点子不？就这场，咱俩趁热打铁赶快整整？
E: Got any new ideas, Little Gui? I say we strike while the iron is hot!

C: 「急人所急，有求必应；日行一善，三省吾身」——将来，这句话定会出现在本姑娘的传记里，留名青史！
E: "Be eager to help those in need. Do one good deed a day and reflect on oneself three times a day." — Those words will definitely appear in my biography one day and be remembered!

C: 但换斗移星，谋事，在人！
E: Yet stratagems, constellations... are human creations!

C: 剑，如燕跃。
E: Blade, in flight.

C: 我听说将军大人对这些街头曲艺颇有兴趣？真希望有机会能去神策府里演一场，那我可就声名大噪了。
E: I heard that the general is interested in these street music performances. I wish I had the chance to perform at the Seat of Divine Foresight, then I could be famous.

C: 先暖个场！
E: Tough crowd!

C: 是丹恒先生啊，要不要教我些新的龙尊术法？
E: Dan Heng! Teach me some more high elder magic!

C: 要雨露均沾哦~
E: A little something for everyone!

C: 世上只有一种顽疾我爱莫能助，就是…长•不•高…哼！
E: There's only one ailment that I can't cure, and that. Is. Being. Short... Hmph!

C: 镜流不过是一介仙舟弃卒，流浪剑士。若不想惹来麻烦，装作我们未曾谋面亦可。
E: To the Xianzhou, I am but an abandoned pawn — a wandering swordmaster. If you wish to avoid trouble, pretend we never met.

C: 不值一哂。
E: Unworthy of my time.

C: 「建木」被斫断千年，却不死不灭。若丰饶民有异动，必定与其有关。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor was severed long ago, but it is not dead. If there is any activity from the Denizens of Abundance, it will be connected to the Arbor.

C: 吾在生时，丹枫的盛名无人不知。现如今他却沦为罪囚，被逐出仙舟，名字也换了一个…真是世事易变。
E: When I was alive, Dan Feng's reputation preceded him. To witness him now — an ousted criminal under a different name... How the world changes.

C: 将军襄助之情，十王定回以善报。
E: The Ten Lords will surely repay your assistance with kindness, General.

C: 快点收拾吧。
E: Quick, take it.

C: 藿藿：你、你好…我叫藿藿，是新上任的十王司判官，那个，还要说什么来着…\n尾巴：小丫头，我呢？本大爷可是岁阳一族赫赫有名的……\n藿藿：尾巴！他是尾巴！
E: Huohuo: H—Hello, I'm Huohuo, the newly appointed judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. Um... what else should I mention...\nTail: Ahem... Uh, Hello? Don't forget to introduce the most famous heliobus of all.\nHuohuo: Ah, yes — Tail! This is Tail!

C: 纵观整个联盟，炎老是最难以捉摸的天将。以往和老爷子打交道的场合不算少，但我至今拿不准他的心思。
E: In the entire Alliance, Huaiyan is the most inscrutable of the generals. I've worked with him on more than a few occasions, but I can never seem to figure him out.

C: 彦卿兄弟，安全第一。不然我没法和景元将军交代……
E: Safety first, Yanqing. If anything happens to you, I'll never be able to face General Jing Yuan...

C: 权当是推拿……
E: It's just a tuina massage...

C: 爪牙已经磨钝了？
E: Have your fangs and claws dulled?

C: 爷爷总是把我当成小孩子，可是话又说回来，他那个年纪，看谁不是小孩子呢？
E: Grandpa always treats me like a child. But come to think of it, at his age, who isn't a child to him?

C: 竟敢当着我这个师父的面把三月拐去打牌，这个青雀实在是胆子不小…不过我看她那身经百战的气势，要是三月能学到，也能用于剑招吧。
E: Qingque has the guts to grab March away right in front of me and go play Celestial Jade... but I can see she has experience. March might be able to learn a thing or two from her and apply it to her swordsmanship.

C: 彦卿，再比一场如何？三局两胜，不…一局定胜负！
E: Yanqing, how about a rematch? Best of three— No... one round!

C: 手有点生了……
E: Guess I'm a bit rusty...

C: 再见就免了吧，毕竟我时常会在街角和你擦肩而过。
E: Goodbyes are unnecessary. I often brush past you on the street anyway.

C: 我是「纯美骑士团」的银枝。我谨在此，以一朵玫瑰的沉重份量，向你致意。
E: My name is Argenti, I belong to the Knights of Beauty. May this rose convey my heartfelt salutations.

C: 我给飞船起名「希世难得」，打扫它十分耗费精力…或许我不该将外形雕刻得如此繁复。
E: "One and Only" is the name of my spaceship. I must admit, keeping her in good order can be a chore. Perhaps I shouldn't have etched such intricate patterns into the fuselage.

C: 听好了。
E: Pay attention.

C: 「财富」是世界的基石，宇宙的繁荣立足于流通和贸易。公司促成星球间的联系，令万事万物交汇相通。看！财富能诞下智识，创造欢愉；遏止毁灭，构筑同谐。
E: "Fortune" forms the foundation of our world. The flourishing of the cosmos relies on exchange and commerce — the IPC facilitates such connections between planets, weaving everything and everyone together. Wealth begets Erudition, produces Elation, averts Destruction, and builds Harmony.

C: 玩得开心吗？玩得开心就好！

C: 如果能先于世间察觉、收集一份记忆，那独自欣赏的时光，是我个人最钟爱的、独一无二的回忆。
E: If I can identify and encapsulate a fragment of memory before it's unveiled to the world, those solitary moments of delight are my most favored and unique memories.

C: 所有或一无所有，切勿背弃自己的信条。

C: 当那一缕「爱」的丝线编入翁法罗斯的命运，她的每一道注视早已在万载岁月里，穿过我们跳动的心，将彼此的生命连缀成形。
E: When that one thread of "love" was woven into Amphoreus's destiny, her every gaze was already infused into the countless years, molding our lives into shape through our beating hearts.

C: 我从不相信虚无缥缈的神谕，也不愿受所谓使命的束缚，直到现在亦是如此。不过，她能坚持千年的初心不变，也有可敬之处。
E: I've never believed in vague divine prophecies, nor do I wish to be fettered by so-called duty. That has never changed. However, I respect her for holding onto her beliefs for a thousand years.

C: 如何追上一只先于你出发的乌龟？这个悖论之于赛飞儿并不难解——她一定在起跑线上喜滋滋地把那乌龟捡走，转手扔进她庞大的收藏库里。
E: How do you catch up to a tortoise that set off before you did? For Cipher, this paradox isn't hard to solve — she would happily scoop up the tortoise right at the starting line and toss it into her massive collection.

C:
・在砂金完成了赌局后，身处风暴中心的列车组到达了匹诺康尼的死后世界「流梦礁」——原来，这里是家族以死亡为名，掩盖起来的流放之地。
・流萤在这里迎接了你，并向你展示了全部——包括她就是星核猎手「萨姆」的身份。
・在这里，你遇到了守墓人米凯，此前被杀死的知更鸟，米沙等人。对匹诺康尼有了更多了解。
・加拉赫将星期日杀死，带入了流梦礁与你们见面——据星期日所说，如今的「盛会之星」，正是阿斯德纳的星核之灾，也得知了加拉赫虚构史学家的真实身份。
・瓦尔特，星期日和知更鸟决定去找「梦主」歌斐木对峙。而姬子则向加拉赫询问无名客的事迹。
・在此期间，留守列车的丹恒遭遇了巡海游侠波提欧——他试图劫持列车，前往匹诺康尼寻找「虚无」令使黄泉。
・丹恒与波提欧一起来到了匹诺康尼，尝试与黑天鹅进行联络。
E:
・ After Aventurine completed his gamble, the Express Crew at the eye of the storm arrived at Penacony's afterlife, the "Dreamflux Reef." As it turns out, this was The Family's land of the exiles, concealed under the name of death.
・ Firefly welcomed you here and revealed everything, including her identity as the Stellaron Hunter "SAM."
・ Here, you met Gravekeeper Micah, Robin who was killed, Misha, and others. You learned more about Penacony.
・ Gallagher killed Sunday and brought him to Dreamflux Reef to meet with you. According to Sunday, the current "Planet of Festivities" was actually Asdana's Stellaron Disaster, and you also learned about Gallagher's true identity as a History Fictionologist.
・ Welt, Sunday, and Robin decided to confront the Dreammaster Gopher Wood. Meanwhile, Himeko questioned Gallagher about the Nameless.
・ During this time, Dan Heng, who stayed behind to guard the Express, encountered Galaxy Ranger Boothill, who attempted to hijack the Express to find the Emanator of Nihility, Acheron, in Penacony.
・ Dan Heng and Boothill arrived in Penacony together, attempting to contact Black Swan.

AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> refused the fate of dying in battle and chose to defect. Yet, leaving the empire doomed her to Entropy Loss Syndrome's rapid decay, like a larva separated from its hive.

If Weakness Break occurs, triggers both Ice and Fire Weakness Break effects. When ally target activates Ultimate with "<u>Brain in a Vat</u>," "Giant Turtle's Breath" action advances.

C:
悬锋的战士历来讲究荣耀，
偷袭、诡计，都是可耻的卑劣行径。
然而有这样一位士兵，他从不正面对敌。
要么事先布下天罗地网，要么干脆自阴沟里出击。
有人说他曾在多洛斯学艺，有人说他是扎格列斯的卧底。
可是他所带领的大队，总能传来胜利的消息。
忍无可忍的同僚提出决斗，
他则把决斗的内容换成比试射艺
——准星必须对准自己。
同僚被这大胆的提议吓到，请求他先做示范，
他泰然自若地扣下扳机，
弩矢擦着脸颊嵌入墙壁。
「不好意思，打偏了。」
E:
Warriors of Kremnos have always valued glory,
so sneaking and trickery are considered shameful, despicable acts.
Yet there was one soldier who never faced his enemies head-on.
He either set elaborate traps beforehand or struck from the gutters.
Some say he trained in Dolos, others claim he was Zagreus's spy.
But the battalion under his command always brought back news of victory.
A colleague, fed up with his ways, challenged him to a duel,
but he changed the terms to an archery contest,
with arrows aimed at oneself.
Terrified by this bold proposal, the challenger asked him to demonstrate first.
He calmly pulled the trigger.
The bolt grazed his cheek and embedded in the wall.
"Sorry, I missed."

C: 在黑天鹅的帮助下，你从星期日编织的幻觉中醒来，然而，要想终结眼前的长夜，一个人的力量远远不够。
E: With Black Swan's help, you woke up from the illusion woven by Sunday. However, one person's strength alone is far from enough to end the Evernight before you.

C: 前往银狼所说的房间
E: Go to the room Silver Wolf told you about

C: 寻找适合「偷渡」的入口
E: Find an entrance for "stowaways"

C: 当然，我特意加快了脚步呢。可惜，还是错过了一些事。
E: Of course. I deliberately picked up my pace for that. Though sadly, I still missed out on some things.

C: 制造一场骚乱，让「萨姆」站到台前。然后，我再以最快的速度回到这里，趁着骚动尚未平息，以「流萤」的身份入梦。
E: Create a commotion to force SAM in the spotlight. Then, I'll rush back here at top speed, and while the chaos is still fresh, dive into the dream as Firefly.

C: 你听不进我的话，仍在擅自调查？
E: You're still investigating on your own, ignoring what I said?

C: 不仅如此，在漫长的时光中，他已将自身与匹诺康尼的每一寸土地融汇。
E: Not only that, over the long passage of time, he has merged himself with every inch of Penacony's land.

C: 我来找找看吧，别抱太大希望。
E: I'll take a look, but don't get your hopes up.

C: 不错，接下来……
E: Good, now then...

C: 不对…它就在这里，要速战速决了。
E: Wait... it's right here. I need to end this quickly.

C: …「我的时候」？
E: ..."My time"?

C: …多谢，知更鸟小姐，你帮我们解开了许多困惑。但「梦主」倒向的命途…我们有不同的猜想。
E: ...Thank you, Miss Robin. You've helped us clear up many of our doubts. However, regarding the Dreammaster's Path... we have different conjectures.

C: 凭借最具吸引力的酬劳，我暗中组建了一支研究忆域的团队。而我索取的成果只有一个——若我意外迷失在匹诺康尼的忆质中，该如何逃得生天。
E: Backed by a most attractive package, I quietly assembled a team to research the Memory Zone. And I only asked for one thing in return: How to escape alive if I accidentally got lost in Penacony's memoria.

C: 那真是值得铭记，也值得倾尽所有的一生。可惜这里不太方便，否则，我也很想敬他一杯「聚散有时」，就像那位有始有终的加拉赫先生。
E: It was truly a life worth remembering, worth giving everything for. I would've loved to raise a glass of "Hello and Goodbye" to him, just like the one who saw things through to the end, Mr. Gallagher. What a shame I can't do it properly here.

C: 这老头，有时候还真固执——他更希望见证遗产的人，会是无名客。
E: That old man can be so stubborn sometimes... He'd rather have the Nameless be the ones to witness his legacy.

C: 这…有必要吗？
E: Is this... really necessary?

C: 抱歉，还未自我介绍——我名为银枝，来自「纯美骑士团」，为消弭世间丑恶之物穿梭于银河间。
E: Pardon my late introduction. I am Argenti of the Knights of Beauty, traversing the cosmos to eradicate all that is unsightly in this world.

C: 还能说什么呢？难道这位骑士先生，会听我们慢慢讲道理？
E: What else is there to say? Would this Sir Knight even listen to us try to reason with him?

C: 他的意思，是要我们去谐乐大典上一较高下吗？
E: Does that mean he wants to fight us during the Charmony Festival?

C: 未走之路，不可追回。即便身处梦中，此事亦然啊……
E: The road not taken can never be retraced. Even in dreams, this truth remains...

C: 因此，你的罪行，将以「恩赐」来责罚——
E: Therefore, your crime shall be punished with a "blessing"...

C: 太一之梦也绝非等闲，我和康士坦丝倾尽全力，也只能寻得眼前的寥寥诸位，再难有其他援手。
E: Ena's Dream is no ordinary matter. Even with Constance and me giving it our all, we could only reach the few of you here. It's impossible to find more help.

C: 她还好吗？
E: Is she okay?

C: 只要你别怕睡着，就一定能醒。
E: As long as you're not afraid to fall asleep, you'll definitely wake up.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我仍然不会放弃，也不会指责放弃的人——我要做的，只是把选择的权力，重新交给他们，也重新交给自己。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I won't give up, nor will I blame those who do. All I need to do is return their right to make that choice... and return that right to myself as well.</color>

C: 但铁尔南的子弹，仍在守护着美梦的今天。
E: But Tiernan's bullets still protect the sweet dream's present.

C: 约阿希姆•诺基安维塔宁
E: Joachim Nokianvirtanen

C: 不，她现在还有其他要紧事，所以才拜托我来见你——她很想向你道谢。
E: Don't be. She's got other pressing matters right now. That's why she asked me to meet you... She really wants to thank you.

C: 我找到你了，流萤。
E: I found you, Firefly.

C: 我不害怕死…但不要让我独自一人死去……
E: I'm not scared of death... but please, don't let me die alone...

C: 为什么……
E: Why...

C: 苏乐达的气泡里，是人生孤独而空寂的荒凉之味。看来你也无法理解我……
E: Inside SoulGlad's bubble, there's a taste of life's lonely and empty desolation. Seems you can't understand me either...

C: 恐怕一场酣畅淋漓的搏斗才能给你留下更深刻的教训！
E: Looks like only a good old-fashioned takedown will teach you a proper lesson!

C: 于是，乌拉尼娅就把听来的传奇，全都记录在了这卷启目集上。
E: So Urania recorded every legend Urania has heard on this scroll of enlightenment.

C: 一同「开拓」的同伴
E: Trailblazing Companions

E: Path preset removed

E: Challenge Strategy

E: Precious Treasure Opening
